legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系为基础的混合法律体系，宪法法庭行使违宪审查权
legalSystem.en: Civil law system with constitutional court exercising judicial review

taxationSystem.zh: 累进综合所得税（5%-40%）、营业税（5%）、营利事业所得税（20%）、证券交易税
taxationSystem.en: Progressive consolidated income tax (5%–40%), business tax (5%), corporate income tax (20%), securities transaction tax

role.zh: 内阁首长，负责行政院日常运作
role.en: Head of Cabinet, responsible for Executive Yuan daily operations

role.zh: 立法院议长，主持立法议事
role.en: President of Legislative Yuan, presides over legislative proceedings

religion.zh: 佛教、道教与民间信仰并存，基督教少数，宗教自由度高
religion.en: Buddhism, Taoism, and folk religions coexist, Christian minority, high religious freedom

philosophy.zh: 儒家传统与现代民主价值融合，重视教育与科技创新
philosophy.en: Confucian tradition blended with modern democratic values, emphasis on education and technological innovation

writingSystem.zh: 繁体中文书写系统
writingSystem.en: Traditional Chinese writing system

culturalAchievements.zh: 半导体制造奇迹、新浪潮电影、全民健保体系、婚姻平权亚洲首例
culturalAchievements.en: Semiconductor manufacturing miracle, New Wave cinema, universal healthcare system, first in Asia to legalize same-sex marriage

languageFamily.zh: 汉藏语系（官方为国语/华语），南岛语系原住民语言
languageFamily.en: Sino-Tibetan (Mandarin as official), Austronesian indigenous languages

education.zh: 高等教育入学率超过70%，台大/清华/交大为顶尖学府，半导体专业教育全球领先
education.en: Tertiary enrollment rate over 70%, NTU/NTHU/NCTU as top universities, world-leading semiconductor education

arts.zh: 金马奖华语电影最高殿堂、独立音乐蓬勃发展、珍珠奶茶文化全球传播
arts.en: Golden Horse Awards as pinnacle of Chinese-language cinema, vibrant indie music scene, global spread of bubble tea culture

gdpDescription.zh: 全球半导体制造中心，台积电贡献GDP约15%，出口导向型高科技经济体
gdpDescription.en: Global semiconductor manufacturing center, TSMC contributes ~15% of GDP, export-oriented high-tech economy

mainIndustries.zh: 半导体制造（台积电）
mainIndustries.en: Semiconductor manufacturing (TSMC)

mainIndustries.zh: 电子零组件
mainIndustries.en: Electronic components

mainIndustries.zh: IT硬件与面板
mainIndustries.en: IT hardware and displays

mainIndustries.zh: 机械设备
mainIndustries.en: Machinery and equipment

mainIndustries.zh: 石化工业
mainIndustries.en: Petrochemicals

mainIndustries.zh: 精密光学
mainIndustries.en: Precision optics

householdWealth.zh: 家庭储蓄率高，房价高企尤其在台北都会区
householdWealth.en: High household savings rate, elevated property prices especially in Taipei metropolitan area

economicSystem.zh: 出口导向型混合市场经济，政府在半导体产业战略中发挥指导作用
economicSystem.en: Export-oriented mixed market economy with government guiding role in semiconductor industrial strategy

debtLevel.zh: 中央政府债务约占GDP 30%，在先进经济体中较低
debtLevel.en: Central government debt ~30% of GDP, low among advanced economies

fiscalPolicy.zh: 审慎财政管理，强调产业投资与国防开支平衡，半导体产业享有战略性税收优惠
fiscalPolicy.en: Prudent fiscal management balancing industrial investment and defense spending, strategic tax incentives for semiconductor industry

description.zh: 地面防御主力，聚焦反登陆作战与城镇战能力
description.en: Ground defense core force, focused on anti-landing operations and urban warfare capabilities

description.zh: 台海与周边海域防御，反舰导弹为核心威慑
description.en: Defense of Taiwan Strait and surrounding waters, anti-ship missiles as core deterrent

description.zh: F-16V战机为主力，承担台海空域防御任务
description.en: F-16V fighters as mainstay, responsible for Taiwan Strait airspace defense

description.zh: 两栖作战与沿海防御精锐部队
description.en: Elite amphibious and coastal defense force

name.en: Information, Communications and Electronic Force Command

description.zh: 网络战与电子战部队，应对信息化战争
description.en: Cyber and electronic warfare force for information-age combat

threats.zh: 中国军事压力与台海武力威胁（首要生存威胁）
threats.en: China military pressure and cross-strait military threat (primary existential threat)

threats.zh: 灰色地带冲突（军机绕台、海上演习）
threats.en: Gray zone conflict (military aircraft incursions, naval exercises)

threats.zh: 网络攻击与信息战
threats.en: Cyberattacks and information warfare

specialCapabilities.zh: 不对称防御战略：反舰导弹（雄风系列）、水雷战、机动岸防、后备动员体系
specialCapabilities.en: Asymmetric defense strategy: anti-ship missiles (Hsiung Feng series), mine warfare, mobile shore defense, reserve mobilization system

demographics_description.zh: 少子化严重（生育率低至0.87），人口高度集中于西部都会带
demographics_description.en: Severe low birth rate (TFR as low as 0.87), population heavily concentrated in western metropolitan corridor

allies.zh: 美国（非官方安全承诺，台湾关系法）
allies.en: United States (informal security commitment, Taiwan Relations Act)

allies.zh: 日本（安全与经济紧密伙伴）
allies.en: Japan (close security and economic partner)

allies.zh: 欧盟（贸易与价值观伙伴）
allies.en: European Union (trade and values partner)

allies.zh: 澳大利亚与加拿大（印太民主伙伴）
allies.en: Australia and Canada (Indo-Pacific democratic partners)

enemies.zh: 中华人民共和国声索主权（首要威胁）
enemies.en: PRC claims sovereignty (primary threat)

foreignPolicy.zh: 维持现状、深化与民主盟友关系、以半导体实力构建'硅盾'战略安全
foreignPolicy.en: Maintain status quo, deepen ties with democratic allies, leverage semiconductor power for 'silicon shield' strategic security

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 蔡英文过境美国引发中国军演
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Tsai Ing-wen US transit triggering Chinese military exercises

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 与立陶宛互设代表处打破外交孤立
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Mutual representative offices with Lithuania breaking diplomatic isolation

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: TSMC赴美日欧设厂深化供应链同盟
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: TSMC building fabs in US, Japan, Europe deepening supply chain alliances

tradeAgreements.zh: 新南向政策（东南亚与南亚经贸）
tradeAgreements.en: New Southbound Policy (Southeast and South Asia trade)

era.zh: 全球半导体制造中心

keyInnovations.zh: 台积电3纳米制程（全球最先进量产工艺）
keyInnovations.en: TSMC 3nm process (world's most advanced mass production technology)

keyInnovations.zh: 先进封装CoWoS技术（AI芯片关键）
keyInnovations.en: Advanced chip packaging CoWoS technology (critical for AI chips)

keyInnovations.zh: EUV极紫外光刻量产应用
keyInnovations.en: EUV lithography mass production adoption

keyInnovations.zh: 2纳米制程研发（预计2025量产）
keyInnovations.en: 2nm process development (mass production expected 2025)

infrastructure.zh: 新竹科学园区为全球半导体之都，台南科学园区3纳米晶圆厂集群，高铁连接产业走廊
infrastructure.en: Hsinchu Science Park as the world's semiconductor capital, Tainan Science Park 3nm fab cluster, HSR connecting the industrial corridor

policy.zh: '硅盾'半导体战略聚焦AI芯片制造而非AI模型，台积电为全球AI硬件不可替代的基础设施
policy.en: 'Silicon shield' semiconductor strategy focused on AI chip manufacturing rather than AI models; TSMC as irreplaceable infrastructure for global AI hardware

regulatoryStance.zh: 技术出口管控配合美国芯片法案，对AI应用监管较为宽松
regulatoryStance.en: Technology export controls aligned with US CHIPS Act, relatively light regulation on AI applications

unit.zh: 美元（AI专项），台积电年资本支出360亿美元为实际AI基础设施投资
unit.en: USD (AI-specific), but TSMC's $36B annual capex is the real AI infrastructure investment

description.zh: 政府支持的繁体中文大语言模型，规模适中但意义重大
description.en: Government-backed Traditional Chinese LLM, modest scale but symbolically significant

products.zh: 全球最先进半导体代工厂，制造所有尖端AI芯片（NVIDIA H100、Apple、AMD），全球AI供应链中最关键企业
products.en: World's most advanced semiconductor foundry manufacturing ALL cutting-edge AI chips (NVIDIA H100, Apple, AMD); THE most critical company in the global AI supply chain

products.zh: AI赋能移动芯片组，全球第四大IC设计公司
products.en: AI-enabled mobile chipsets, world's 4th largest IC design company

products.zh: AI服务器制造（NVIDIA GPU服务器主要代工商）、电子组装
products.en: AI server manufacturing (primary OEM for NVIDIA GPU servers), electronics assembly

role.zh: 台积电创办人，发明晶圆代工模式使全球AI芯片成为可能
role.en: TSMC founder, invented the foundry model that enables all AI chips globally

role.zh: 台积电CEO，管理全球战略重要性最高的科技公司
role.en: TSMC CEO, managing the most strategically important tech company in the world

role.zh: NVIDIA CEO，其所有GPU均由台积电制造
role.en: NVIDIA CEO, whose GPUs are all manufactured by TSMC

researchFocus.zh: 先进制程节点（3nm/2nm）
researchFocus.en: Advanced process nodes (3nm/2nm)

researchFocus.zh: AI芯片先进封装（CoWoS）
researchFocus.en: AI chip advanced packaging (CoWoS)

researchFocus.zh: 边缘AI与AIoT
researchFocus.en: Edge AI and AIoT

researchFocus.zh: 半导体材料科学
researchFocus.en: Semiconductor materials science

computeInfrastructure.zh: 制造全球AI芯片但本土AI算力相对有限，国家高速网络与运算中心提供学术算力
computeInfrastructure.en: Manufactures the world's AI chips but domestic AI compute is relatively limited; National Center for High-performance Computing provides academic compute

talentPool.zh: 世界一流半导体工程师队伍，台大/清大研究实力强，硬件工程文化深厚，软件AI人才相对不足
talentPool.en: World-class semiconductor engineering workforce, strong NTU/NTHU research, deep hardware engineering culture, relatively weaker in software AI talent

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI芯片制造绝对垄断地位，TSMC生产全球约90%的先进制程芯片。
globalRanking.en: Absolute monopoly in AI chip manufacturing; TSMC produces ~90% of the world's advanced-node chips.

outlook.zh: 台湾的'硅盾'战略使其成为全球AI硬件不可替代的环节，但台海地缘政治风险为最大隐忧。
outlook.en: Taiwan's 'silicon shield' strategy makes it an irreplaceable link in global AI hardware, but cross-strait geopolitical risk is the greatest concern.

strengths.zh: 台积电垄断全球先进制程芯片制造
strengths.en: TSMC monopoly on advanced-node chip manufacturing

strengths.zh: 半导体工程人才世界一流
strengths.en: World-class semiconductor engineering talent

strengths.zh: 民主韧性与公民社会活力
strengths.en: Democratic resilience and vibrant civil society

strengths.zh: 全民健保等制度优势
strengths.en: Institutional advantages like universal healthcare

weaknesses.zh: 中国军事威胁为首要生存风险
weaknesses.en: China military threat as primary existential risk

weaknesses.zh: 国内市场规模小
weaknesses.en: Small domestic market

weaknesses.zh: 人才流失与少子化隐忧
weaknesses.en: Brain drain concerns and extremely low birth rate

weaknesses.zh: 晶圆厂用水用电压力
weaknesses.en: Water and power supply pressures for semiconductor fabs

outlook.zh: 在AI时代因半导体不可替代性而地位空前重要，但地缘政治脆弱性仍是最大挑战
outlook.en: Unprecedented importance in the AI era due to semiconductor irreplaceability, but geopolitical vulnerability remains the greatest challenge

name.en: Gulf States (UAE, Saudi Arabia, et al.)

description.zh: 2023年的海湾国家凭借石油财富与主权基金大举进军AI领域，阿联酋G42推出Falcon大模型，沙特推进Vision 2030 AI战略。
description.en: The Gulf States in 2023 are leveraging oil wealth and sovereign funds for major AI investments, with UAE's G42 launching the Falcon LLM and Saudi Arabia advancing its Vision 2030 AI strategy.

name.en: Gulf States (UAE, Saudi Arabia, et al.)

rulerTitle.zh: 沙特王储（最具影响力领导人）

dynasty.zh: 沙特-阿联酋双核领导时代

governmentForm.zh: 绝对君主制群体，各国在经济自由化程度上有差异，沙特与阿联酋为核心双引擎
governmentForm.en: Group of absolute monarchies with varying degrees of economic liberalization, Saudi Arabia and UAE as core dual engines

socialStructure.zh: 王室精英主导的分层社会，大量外籍劳工（占总人口过半），年轻化人口结构
socialStructure.en: Royal-elite dominated stratified society, massive expatriate labor force (over half the population), young demographic structure

rulingClass.zh: 沙特阿勒沙特王室、阿联酋阿勒纳哈扬与阿勒马克图姆家族、卡塔尔阿勒萨尼家族
rulingClass.en: Saudi House of Saud, UAE Al Nahyan and Al Maktoum families, Qatar Al Thani family

succession.zh: 王室内部选定继承人，沙特由国王指定王储，阿联酋各酋长国世袭
succession.en: Royal succession within ruling families; Saudi king designates Crown Prince; UAE emirates hereditary

structure.zh: 沙特：国王/王储主导行政+咨询委员会 | 阿联酋：联邦最高委员会+内阁 | 卡塔尔：埃米尔+咨询议会
structure.en: Saudi: King/Crown Prince-led executive + Consultative Assembly | UAE: Federal Supreme Council + Cabinet | Qatar: Emir + Advisory Council

name.zh: 沙特数据与人工智能局 (SDAIA)

function.zh: 国家AI战略规划与数据治理，推动Vision 2030 AI整合
function.en: National AI strategy and data governance, driving Vision 2030 AI integration

function.zh: 7000亿美元主权基金，全球AI与科技投资旗舰
function.en: $700B sovereign wealth fund, flagship for global AI and tech investment

function.zh: 全球最大主权基金之一（约9000亿美元），多元化投资组合
function.en: One of the world's largest sovereign funds (~$900B), diversified investment portfolio

function.zh: 军事战略与区域安全，对抗伊朗威胁与也门胡塞武装
function.en: Military strategy and regional security, countering Iran threat and Houthi insurgency in Yemen

name.zh: 阿联酋人工智能办公室

function.zh: 全球首个AI部长级机构，推动AI在政府服务中的全面应用
function.en: World's first minister-level AI office, promoting comprehensive AI adoption in government services

function.zh: 石油政策、OPEC+协调、能源转型战略
function.en: Oil policy, OPEC+ coordination, energy transition strategy

function.zh: 约4500亿美元主权基金，全球科技与AI投资
function.en: ~$450B sovereign wealth fund, global tech and AI investment

name.zh: 沙特通信与信息技术部
name.en: Saudi Ministry of Communications and IT

function.zh: 数字基础设施建设、智慧城市与数字化转型
function.en: Digital infrastructure, smart cities, and digital transformation

localAdmin.zh: 沙特13省、阿联酋7酋长国、卡塔尔8区、科威特6省、阿曼11省
localAdmin.en: Saudi 13 provinces, UAE 7 emirates, Qatar 8 municipalities, Kuwait 6 governorates, Oman 11 governorates

legalSystem.zh: 伊斯兰教法与成文法混合体系，沙特以沙里亚法为核心，阿联酋采用混合民商法
legalSystem.en: Hybrid system of Islamic Sharia and codified law; Saudi based on Sharia, UAE adopts mixed civil-commercial law

taxationSystem.zh: 无个人所得税，沙特与阿联酋征收5%增值税，企业税率15%（沙特2024起），石油特许权使用费
taxationSystem.en: No personal income tax, Saudi and UAE levy 5% VAT, 15% corporate tax (Saudi from 2024), oil royalties

role.zh: 沙特实际最高领导人，Vision 2030总设计师
role.en: De facto Saudi leader, chief architect of Vision 2030

role.zh: 阿联酋总统兼阿布扎比酋长，科技投资关键推手
role.en: UAE President and Ruler of Abu Dhabi, key driver of tech investment

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教为国教，沙特为逊尼派瓦哈比派中心，阿联酋推行宗教宽容政策
religion.en: Islam as state religion; Saudi as center of Sunni Wahhabism; UAE promotes religious tolerance policies

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰传统价值观与现代化经济愿景并行，Vision 2030推动社会开放
philosophy.en: Islamic traditional values coexist with modernization economic vision, Vision 2030 driving social opening

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文书写系统
writingSystem.en: Arabic writing system

culturalAchievements.zh: 世界级建筑（哈利法塔、未来博物馆）、2022世界杯、卢浮宫阿布扎比分馆、NEOM未来城
culturalAchievements.en: World-class architecture (Burj Khalifa, Museum of the Future), 2022 World Cup, Louvre Abu Dhabi, NEOM future city

languageFamily.zh: 闪族语系阿拉伯语，英语为商务通用语
languageFamily.en: Semitic Arabic, English as business lingua franca

education.zh: 大力投资高等教育：KAUST、MBZUAI（全球首个AI研究大学）、卡塔尔教育城
education.en: Major education investment: KAUST, MBZUAI (world's first AI research university), Qatar Education City

arts.zh: 从传统伊斯兰艺术到当代全球文化盛事（迪拜博览会、利雅得电竞节）
arts.en: From traditional Islamic art to contemporary global cultural events (Dubai Expo, Riyadh Gaming Festival)

gdpDescription.zh: 以石油天然气为基础的富裕经济体群，主权基金全球配置，积极推进经济多元化
gdpDescription.en: Oil-and-gas-based wealthy economies, sovereign funds globally deployed, actively pursuing economic diversification

mainIndustries.zh: 石油与天然气
mainIndustries.en: Oil and natural gas

mainIndustries.zh: 主权财富基金投资
mainIndustries.en: Sovereign wealth fund investments

mainIndustries.zh: 金融与银行业
mainIndustries.en: Finance and banking

mainIndustries.zh: 房地产与建筑
mainIndustries.en: Real estate and construction

mainIndustries.zh: 旅游与航空
mainIndustries.en: Tourism and aviation

mainIndustries.zh: 物流与港口
mainIndustries.en: Logistics and ports

currency.zh: 沙特里亚尔 (SAR) + 阿联酋迪拉姆 (AED)，均挂钩美元
currency.en: Saudi Riyal (SAR) + UAE Dirham (AED), both pegged to USD

householdWealth.zh: 国民享受高福利补贴，但外籍劳工收入差距极大
householdWealth.en: Citizens enjoy high welfare subsidies, but extreme income gap with expatriate workers

economicSystem.zh: 国家主导的石油经济正加速转型，Vision 2030与阿联酋经济愿景推动多元化
economicSystem.en: State-directed petro-economies undergoing accelerated transformation; Vision 2030 and UAE economic vision driving diversification

debtLevel.zh: 沙特债务约占GDP 26%，阿联酋约20%，整体较低
debtLevel.en: Saudi debt ~26% of GDP, UAE ~20%, relatively low overall

fiscalPolicy.zh: 石油收入为基础，推进非石油收入多元化，主权基金全球配置AI与科技资产
fiscalPolicy.en: Oil revenue as base, diversifying non-oil revenue sources, sovereign funds deploying globally in AI and tech assets

description.zh: 中东最大陆军之一，装备美制M1A2坦克
description.en: One of the largest armies in the Middle East, equipped with US M1A2 Abrams tanks

description.zh: F-15SA战机为主力，区域空中力量最强
description.en: F-15SA fighters as mainstay, strongest air power in the region

description.zh: 中东最精锐的小型军队之一，先进装备与作战经验
description.en: One of the most capable small militaries in the Middle East, advanced equipment and combat experience

description.zh: 红海与波斯湾双向海上防御
description.en: Dual-front maritime defense in Red Sea and Persian Gulf

description.zh: 王室直属精锐部队，兼负内部安全与圣城保卫
description.en: Elite royal guard force for internal security and protection of holy cities

threats.zh: 伊朗及其代理人网络（首要区域威胁）
threats.en: Iran and its proxy network (primary regional threat)

threats.zh: 也门胡塞武装导弹与无人机袭击
threats.en: Houthi missile and drone attacks from Yemen

threats.zh: 恐怖主义与极端主义
threats.en: Terrorism and extremism

threats.zh: 海上通道安全（霍尔木兹海峡）
threats.en: Maritime chokepoint security (Strait of Hormuz)

specialCapabilities.zh: 先进防空系统（爱国者/萨德）、高科技无人机采购、石油设施防护体系
specialCapabilities.en: Advanced air defense systems (Patriot/THAAD), high-tech drone procurement, oil facility protection systems

demographics_description.zh: 年轻化人口结构，外籍劳工占比极高（阿联酋超过85%），城市化率高
demographics_description.en: Young demographic structure, extremely high expatriate workforce ratio (over 85% in UAE), high urbanization

allies.zh: 美国（安全伙伴、军售关系）
allies.en: United States (security partner, arms sales relationship)

allies.zh: 中国（经济伙伴、一带一路合作）
allies.en: China (economic partner, Belt and Road cooperation)

allies.zh: 海合会成员国联盟
allies.en: GCC member state alliance

allies.zh: 以色列（亚伯拉罕协议后关系正常化）
allies.en: Israel (normalization post-Abraham Accords)

enemies.zh: 伊朗（区域对手）
enemies.en: Iran (regional rival)

enemies.zh: 也门胡塞武装
enemies.en: Houthi insurgency in Yemen

foreignPolicy.zh: 在美中之间战略对冲，以AI和科技作为经济多元化工具，寻求区域领导地位
foreignPolicy.en: Strategic hedging between US and China, leveraging AI and tech as economic diversification tools, seeking regional leadership

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 沙特与伊朗在中国斡旋下恢复外交关系（2023）
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Saudi-Iran diplomatic rapprochement brokered by China (2023)

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 阿联酋COP28气候大会主办国
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: UAE hosting COP28 climate conference

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 沙特加入金砖国家
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Saudi Arabia joining BRICS

era.zh: 石油财富驱动的科技跨越时代

keyInnovations.zh: 智慧城市项目（NEOM $5000亿/Masdar城）
keyInnovations.en: Smart city projects (NEOM $500B / Masdar City)

keyInnovations.zh: 可再生能源转型（沙特绿色倡议）
keyInnovations.en: Renewable energy transition (Saudi Green Initiative)

keyInnovations.zh: 金融科技与数字银行
keyInnovations.en: Fintech and digital banking

keyInnovations.zh: 太空计划（阿联酋火星探测器Hope）
keyInnovations.en: Space programs (UAE Mars probe Hope)

infrastructure.zh: 超现代化城市基础设施，大规模数据中心建设，5G全覆盖，高铁与新机场项目
infrastructure.en: Ultra-modern urban infrastructure, massive data center construction, full 5G coverage, high-speed rail and new airport projects

policy.zh: 沙特SDAIA国家数据与AI局推动Vision 2030 AI整合，阿联酋定位全球AI枢纽，主权基金大举布局AI投资
policy.en: Saudi SDAIA national data and AI authority driving Vision 2030 AI integration; UAE positioning as global AI hub; massive sovereign wealth fund AI investments

regulatoryStance.zh: 亲创新监管，以吸引全球AI企业与人才为优先
regulatoryStance.en: Pro-innovation regulation, prioritizing attraction of global AI companies and talent

unit.zh: 美元+（主权基金全球AI投资）
unit.en: USD+ (sovereign wealth fund global AI investments)

description.zh: 1800亿参数开源大模型，发布时为最大开源LLM之一
description.en: 180B-parameter open-source LLM, one of the largest open-source models at launch

description.zh: 阿拉伯语-英语双语大语言模型，针对阿拉伯语世界优化
description.en: Arabic-English bilingual LLM, optimized for the Arabic-speaking world

products.zh: Falcon大模型、AI基础设施、连接美中AI生态系统
products.en: Falcon LLMs, AI infrastructure, bridging US-China AI ecosystems
Falcon LLM series development, frontier AI research

products.zh: 集成AI系统的沙特超级城市（The Line线性城市）
products.en: Saudi megacity with integrated AI systems (The Line linear city)

products.zh: 沙特国家AI治理、数据平台与AI应用推广
products.en: Saudi national AI governance, data platforms, and AI application promotion

role.zh: G42 CEO，穿梭美中AI世界的关键人物
role.en: G42 CEO, key figure bridging US-China AI worlds

role.zh: COP28主席、ADNOC CEO、AI与能源转型倡导者
role.en: COP28 president, ADNOC CEO, AI and energy transition advocate

role.zh: 沙特通信与信息技术部长兼SDAIA主席，沙特AI战略总指挥
role.en: Saudi Minister of IT and SDAIA chair, chief architect of Saudi AI strategy

researchFocus.zh: 阿拉伯语自然语言处理
researchFocus.en: Arabic natural language processing

researchFocus.zh: 油气行业AI优化
researchFocus.en: Oil and gas AI optimization

researchFocus.zh: 智慧城市AI系统
researchFocus.en: Smart city AI systems

researchFocus.zh: 自主系统（超级工程项目）
researchFocus.en: Autonomous systems (megaproject integration)

computeInfrastructure.zh: 建设大规模GPU集群，与微软/AWS/Google建立云合作伙伴关系，G42获得大量NVIDIA GPU分配
computeInfrastructure.en: Building massive GPU clusters, Microsoft/AWS/Google cloud partnerships, G42 has significant NVIDIA GPU allocation

talentPool.zh: 本土AI人才有限，以高薪引进全球人才，MBZUAI为全球首个AI专业研究型大学
talentPool.en: Limited domestic AI talent, importing global talent with high salaries; MBZUAI as world's first AI-focused research university

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI投资第三极（仅次于美中），在大模型开源与AI基建方面异军突起。
globalRanking.en: The third pole of global AI investment (after US and China), emerging strongly in open-source large models and AI infrastructure.

outlook.zh: 凭借石油财富与主权基金大举布局AI产业，有望成为AI时代重要节点，但本土人才不足与地缘风险仍是制约。
outlook.en: Leveraging oil wealth and sovereign funds for major AI investments, positioned to become an important AI-era node, but limited domestic talent and geopolitical risks remain constraints.

strengths.zh: 庞大主权基金资本实力
strengths.en: Massive sovereign wealth fund capital

strengths.zh: 战略地理位置与能源安全
strengths.en: Strategic geographic location and energy security

strengths.zh: 大胆的AI投资愿景
strengths.en: Bold AI investment vision

strengths.zh: 无税或低税吸引全球人才
strengths.en: Tax-free or low-tax environment attracting global talent

weaknesses.zh: 本土AI人才严重不足
weaknesses.en: Severely limited domestic AI talent

weaknesses.zh: 石油依赖与荷兰病风险
weaknesses.en: Oil dependency and Dutch disease risk

weaknesses.zh: 人权议题影响国际合作
weaknesses.en: Human rights concerns impacting international cooperation

weaknesses.zh: 人口基数小，内需市场有限
weaknesses.en: Small population base with limited domestic demand

outlook.zh: 石油财富为AI布局提供充足资本，但可持续发展取决于人才培育与地缘风险管理
outlook.en: Oil wealth enables aggressive AI positioning, but sustainability depends on talent development and geopolitical risk management

dynasty.zh: 民主化后第三共和时期

governmentForm.zh: 半总统制共和国，总统与总理并立，国家大呼拉尔（议会）为最高立法机关。
governmentForm.en: Semi-presidential republic with a president and prime minister; the State Great Khural (parliament) serves as the supreme legislative body.

socialStructure.zh: 城乡二元结构突出，乌兰巴托集中全国近半人口，游牧民与城市中产阶级并存。
socialStructure.en: Pronounced urban-rural duality, with nearly half the national population concentrated in Ulaanbaatar; nomadic herders coexist with an urban middle class.

rulingClass.zh: 民选总统与总理、国家大呼拉尔议员、矿业利益集团与前国企管理层。
rulingClass.en: Elected president and prime minister, Great Khural members, mining interest groups, and former state enterprise management.

succession.zh: 总统由全民直选产生，任期六年，不可连任。
succession.en: The president is directly elected for a six-year term, non-renewable.

structure.zh: 半总统制，总统为国家元首，总理领导内阁，国家大呼拉尔（76席）为一院制议会。
structure.en: Semi-presidential system: the president is head of state, the prime minister leads the cabinet, and the State Great Khural (76 seats) is a unicameral parliament.

function.zh: 管理国家财政预算、税收政策与矿业收入分配。
function.en: Manages the national budget, tax policy, and mining revenue distribution.

name.en: Ministry of Mining and Heavy Industry

function.zh: 监管采矿许可、矿产开发与重工业政策。
function.en: Oversees mining licenses, mineral development, and heavy industry policy.

name.en: Ministry of Digital Development and Communications

function.zh: 推进数字基础设施建设、电子政务与ICT产业发展。
function.en: Advances digital infrastructure, e-government, and ICT industry development.

function.zh: 负责国家安全、军队管理与联合国维和任务协调。
function.en: Handles national security, military administration, and coordination of UN peacekeeping missions.

localAdmin.zh: 全国分21个省（aimag）和首都乌兰巴托市，各省设省长与地方议会，牧区基层为苏木（乡）。
localAdmin.en: Divided into 21 provinces (aimags) and the capital Ulaanbaatar, each with a governor and local council; rural grassroots units are soums (districts).

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以1992年民主宪法为根本法，司法独立程度有限。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system based on the 1992 democratic constitution, with limited judicial independence.

taxationSystem.zh: 以企业所得税（标准税率25%）、个人所得税（10%）和矿业特许权使用费为主要税源。
taxationSystem.en: Main tax sources include corporate income tax (standard 25%), personal income tax (10%), and mining royalties.

religion.zh: 藏传佛教为主（约53%），萨满教传统犹存，少数信仰伊斯兰教（哈萨克族）
religion.en: Tibetan Buddhism predominant (~53%), shamanic traditions persist, small Muslim minority (Kazakh ethnic group)

philosophy.zh: 游牧民族自由精神与成吉思汗崇拜交织，民主价值观与传统草原文化并存。
philosophy.en: Nomadic spirit of freedom intertwined with Genghis Khan reverence; democratic values coexist with traditional steppe culture.

writingSystem.zh: 蒙古西里尔字母为主，传统蒙古文字复兴运动推进中
writingSystem.en: Mongolian Cyrillic script primarily, with an ongoing revival movement for the traditional Mongolian script

culturalAchievements.zh: 呼麦（喉音唱法）被列为世界非物质文化遗产，那达慕大会、马头琴音乐传统享誉国际。
culturalAchievements.en: Khoomei (throat singing) inscribed as UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage; Naadam Festival and morin khuur (horse-head fiddle) music traditions are internationally renowned.

languageFamily.zh: 阿尔泰语系蒙古语族（蒙古语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Altaic, Mongolic branch (Mongolian as the official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 矿业驱动型经济，铜矿（奥尤陶勒盖）与煤矿出口占GDP大部分。经济易受大宗商品价格波动与对华出口依赖影响。
gdpDescription.en: Mining-driven economy with copper (Oyu Tolgoi) and coal exports comprising the bulk of GDP. The economy is vulnerable to commodity price swings and heavy dependence on exports to China.

mainIndustries.zh: 铜矿开采、煤炭出口、畜牧业（羊绒）、建筑业、零售服务
mainIndustries.en: Copper mining, coal exports, livestock (cashmere), construction, retail services

tradeGoods.zh: 铜精矿、焦煤、羊绒、黄金、铁矿石、石油
tradeGoods.en: Copper concentrate, coking coal, cashmere, gold, iron ore, crude oil

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数低，城乡差距巨大。乌兰巴托居民收入远高于牧区，矿业繁荣带动部分中产崛起。
householdWealth.en: Low median household wealth with a vast urban-rural gap. Ulaanbaatar residents earn far more than herders; mining booms have fueled a partial middle-class rise.

tradeRoutes.zh: 对华贸易占出口约90%，矿产品经铁路南下至中国；与俄罗斯有传统贸易通道。
tradeRoutes.en: China accounts for ~90% of exports, with minerals shipped south via railway; traditional trade routes with Russia also exist.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济体制，政府通过矿业法规与国有企业保留关键产业控制权，国际货币基金组织提供宏观稳定支持。
economicSystem.en: Market economy with the government retaining control of key sectors through mining regulations and state enterprises; the IMF provides macro-stability support.

source.zh: 矿业税收与特许权使用费

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备约42亿美元，蒙古银行持有一定黄金储备；财政状况因矿业周期波动。
treasuryDescription.en: Foreign reserves approximately $4.2 billion; the Bank of Mongolia holds gold reserves; fiscal position fluctuates with mining cycles.

displayNote.zh: 外债约占GDP的190%，债务负担较重。
displayNote.en: External debt approximately 190% of GDP, a heavy debt burden.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政稳定法限制赤字，通过人类发展基金（矿业收益）向公民分红，近年依赖IMF援助恢复财政纪律。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal Stability Law limits deficits; citizen dividends via the Human Development Fund (mining revenues); recent IMF assistance to restore fiscal discipline.

description.zh: 轻型机械化部队为主，配备苏联时期装甲车辆与少量现代化装备。
description.en: Primarily light mechanized units equipped with Soviet-era armored vehicles and limited modernized equipment.

description.zh: 小型空军，运输机与直升机为主，无现代战斗机。
description.en: Small air force focused on transport aircraft and helicopters, without modern fighter jets.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统乌赫那·呼日勒苏赫

technology.zh: 以苏联遗留装备为主，部分接受美国、日本与韩国军事援助进行现代化升级，积极参与联合国维和行动。
technology.en: Primarily Soviet-legacy equipment, with partial modernization via US, Japanese, and Korean military aid; active participation in UN peacekeeping operations.

threats.zh: 夹在中俄两大国之间，战略空间有限；无直接军事威胁但地缘依赖性强。
threats.en: Sandwiched between China and Russia with limited strategic space; no direct military threat but high geopolitical dependence.

recentBattles.zh: 无近期战斗，积极参与联合国维和行动（阿富汗、南苏丹等），被誉为人均维和贡献最高的国家之一。
recentBattles.en: No recent combat; actively participates in UN peacekeeping (Afghanistan, South Sudan, etc.), recognized as one of the highest per-capita peacekeeping contributors.

populationDescription.zh: 世界人口密度最低的国家之一（约2人/平方公里），人口年轻化，乌兰巴托集中约150万人口。
populationDescription.en: One of the world's least densely populated countries (~2 people/km²), with a young population; about 1.5 million concentrated in Ulaanbaatar.

ethnicGroups.zh: 喀尔喀蒙古族（约85%）、哈萨克族（约4%）、布里亚特族及其他少数民族
ethnicGroups.en: Khalkha Mongols (~85%), Kazakhs (~4%), Buriats, and other minorities

socialClasses.zh: 矿业精英与政商阶层、城市中产阶级、蒙古包（格尔区）贫民、游牧牧民。
socialClasses.en: Mining elites and political-business class, urban middle class, ger-district poor, nomadic herders.

allies.zh: 与中俄均保持友好关系，美国、日本、韩国、印度为'第三邻国'外交重要对象。
allies.en: Maintains friendly relations with both China and Russia; the US, Japan, South Korea, and India are key 'third neighbor' diplomatic partners.

enemies.zh: 无明确敌对国家，但受中俄战略挤压。
enemies.en: No explicit adversaries, but faces strategic pressure from China and Russia.

treaties.zh: 中蒙友好合作条约、俄蒙友好条约、美蒙战略伙伴关系、参与亚洲基础设施投资银行。
treaties.en: China-Mongolia Treaty of Friendship, Russia-Mongolia Treaty of Friendship, US-Mongolia Strategic Partnership, AIIB membership.

foreignPolicy.zh: '第三邻国'政策平衡中俄影响力，积极参与多边主义与联合国事务，推动矿业外交。
foreignPolicy.en: 'Third neighbor' policy to balance Chinese and Russian influence; active multilateralism and UN engagement; mining diplomacy.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年推进与美日韩深化合作，力拓奥尤陶勒盖铜金矿全面投产引发中蒙经济合作关注。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Deepened cooperation with the US, Japan, and South Korea in 2023; the full commissioning of Rio Tinto's Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine drew attention to China-Mongolia economic ties.

era.zh: 数字化转型初期

keyInnovations.zh: 移动支付普及率较高、电子政务推进、光纤网络覆盖主要城市、数字游牧文化吸引国际远程工作者。
keyInnovations.en: High mobile payment adoption, e-government advancement, fiber-optic coverage of major cities, and digital nomad culture attracting international remote workers.

infrastructure.zh: 乌兰巴托4G/部分5G覆盖，农牧区通信基础设施薄弱；铁路与公路网络有限。
infrastructure.en: 4G/partial 5G coverage in Ulaanbaatar, weak rural telecommunications infrastructure; limited railway and road networks.

policy.zh: 2022年发布《蒙古国人工智能国家计划》，旨在推动AI在公共服务与矿业中的应用，但尚处起步阶段。
policy.en: Released the 'National AI Program of Mongolia' in 2022, aiming to promote AI in public services and mining, but still in its infancy.

regulatoryStance.zh: 尚无专门AI法规，依赖现有数据保护与网络安全法律框架。
regulatoryStance.en: No dedicated AI regulations yet; relies on existing data protection and cybersecurity legal frameworks.

investmentScale.zh: AI领域投资极少，主要依赖国际开发机构（亚洲开发银行、世界银行）数字化项目资金。
investmentScale.en: Minimal AI investment, primarily relying on international development agencies (ADB, World Bank) for digitalization project funding.

keyProducts.zh: 移动通信、互联网服务、初步数字化方案
keyProducts.en: Mobile telecom, internet services, early-stage digitalization solutions

researchFocus.zh: 矿业数据分析、自然语言处理（蒙古语）的初步探索。
researchFocus.en: Preliminary exploration of mining data analytics and NLP for the Mongolian language.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 极为有限，无大规模数据中心或GPU集群，依赖云服务提供商。
computeInfrastructure.en: Extremely limited; no large-scale data centers or GPU clusters; reliant on cloud service providers.

talentPool.zh: AI人才稀缺，少数留学归国人员与大学研究者，蒙古国立大学设有计算机科学系。
talentPool.en: Scarce AI talent; a small number of returnees and university researchers; the National University of Mongolia has a computer science department.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI竞争力排名较低，属边缘参与者。
globalRanking.en: Low global AI competitiveness ranking; a peripheral participant.

outlook.zh: 矿业数字化与牧业智能化提供应用场景，但人才匮乏与资金不足制约AI发展前景。
outlook.en: Mining digitalization and smart herding offer application scenarios, but talent shortages and funding constraints limit AI development prospects.

strengths.zh: 丰富矿产资源、战略性地理位置、年轻人口结构、民主治理经验。
strengths.en: Rich mineral resources, strategic geographic location, young demographic structure, democratic governance experience.

weaknesses.zh: 经济过度依赖矿业、地缘政治受中俄制约、基础设施薄弱、人才外流严重。
weaknesses.en: Over-reliance on mining, geopolitically constrained by China and Russia, weak infrastructure, severe brain drain.

outlook.zh: 若能实现经济多元化并善用'第三邻国'外交，蒙古有潜力成为中亚连接枢纽。
outlook.en: If it can diversify its economy and leverage 'third neighbor' diplomacy, Mongolia has potential to become a Central Asian connectivity hub.

description.zh: 2023年的蒙古国是一个夹在中俄之间的年轻民主国家，依靠丰富矿产资源驱动经济发展。奥尤陶勒盖铜金矿全面投产提振经济，'第三邻国'外交策略努力在大国博弈中寻求平衡。AI领域几乎空白，但数字游牧文化为其带来独特的国际科技联系。
description.en: Mongolia in 2023 is a young democracy sandwiched between China and Russia, with an economy driven by rich mineral resources. The full commissioning of the Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine boosts the economy, while a 'third neighbor' diplomatic strategy seeks balance amid great-power competition. The AI sector is virtually nonexistent, but a digital nomad culture provides unique international tech connections.

ruler.zh: 东盟轮值主席国：印度尼西亚（佐科·维多多）

dynasty.zh: 东盟共同体时代

capital.zh: 雅加达（东盟秘书处所在地）

governmentForm.zh: 区域性政府间组织，十国成员以协商一致为决策原则，各成员国政体各异（民主制、君主立宪制、威权制、社会主义制）。
governmentForm.en: Regional intergovernmental organization of ten member states operating on consensus-based decision-making; member states have diverse political systems (democracies, constitutional monarchies, authoritarian, and socialist regimes).

socialStructure.zh: 多元种族与宗教社会，华人经济圈影响深远，城市化加速推动中产阶级壮大，数字经济催生新兴科技精英。
socialStructure.en: Multiethnic and multireligious societies; Chinese diaspora economic networks are deeply influential; accelerating urbanization expands the middle class; the digital economy spawns a new tech elite.

rulingClass.zh: 各成员国分别由选举产生的政府、王室、军方或一党执政机构治理；东盟层面由外交官与部长级会议协调。
rulingClass.en: Individual member states are governed by elected governments, royalty, military, or single-party institutions; at the ASEAN level, diplomats and ministerial meetings coordinate.

succession.zh: 东盟主席国按字母顺序年度轮换；各成员国各有独立继任机制。
succession.en: The ASEAN chairmanship rotates annually in alphabetical order; each member state has its own succession mechanism.

structure.zh: 东盟以年度峰会为最高决策机制，下设政治安全、经济、社会文化三大支柱共同体。东盟秘书处设于雅加达。
structure.en: ASEAN operates through annual summits as its highest decision-making mechanism, with three pillars: Political-Security, Economic, and Socio-Cultural Communities. The ASEAN Secretariat is in Jakarta.

function.zh: 协调成员国合作、管理东盟项目与对外关系。
function.en: Coordinates member-state cooperation, manages ASEAN programs and external relations.

name.zh: 东盟经济共同体理事会

function.zh: 推动区域经济一体化、贸易便利化与投资自由化。
function.en: Advances regional economic integration, trade facilitation, and investment liberalization.

name.zh: 东盟数字经济框架协议工作组
name.en: ASEAN Digital Economy Framework Agreement Working Group

function.zh: 协调区域数字贸易规则、跨境数据流与数字基础设施合作。
function.en: Coordinates regional digital trade rules, cross-border data flows, and digital infrastructure cooperation.

name.zh: 东盟网络安全合作中心

function.zh: 应对区域网络安全威胁，协调成员国网络防御能力建设。
function.en: Addresses regional cybersecurity threats and coordinates member states' cyber defense capacity building.

localAdmin.zh: 各成员国保留完整主权行政体系：新加坡设内阁部委制、泰国分府治理、越南分省制、菲律宾地方自治单位等。
localAdmin.en: Each member state maintains full sovereign administrative systems: Singapore uses cabinet ministries, Thailand is divided into provinces, Vietnam into provinces, the Philippines into local government units, etc.

legalSystem.zh: 各成员国法律体系各异，涵盖普通法（新加坡、马来西亚）、大陆法（越南、泰国）与伊斯兰法（文莱）。东盟层面依赖《东盟宪章》和框架协议。
legalSystem.en: Member states have diverse legal systems: common law (Singapore, Malaysia), civil law (Vietnam, Thailand), Islamic law (Brunei). At the ASEAN level, governance relies on the ASEAN Charter and framework agreements.

taxationSystem.zh: 各成员国税制独立。新加坡企业税率17%为区域最低；越南标准企业税20%；区域内推进关税减免与双重征税协议。
taxationSystem.en: Independent tax systems per member state. Singapore's 17% corporate tax rate is the regional lowest; Vietnam's standard rate is 20%; the region advances tariff reductions and double taxation agreements.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（马来西亚、印尼、文莱）、佛教（泰国、缅甸、老挝、柬埔寨）、天主教（菲律宾）、多元宗教并存
religion.en: Islam (Malaysia, Indonesia, Brunei), Buddhism (Thailand, Myanmar, Laos, Cambodia), Catholicism (Philippines), multifaith coexistence

philosophy.zh: 东盟方式（不干涉内政原则）、和谐共处哲学、华人儒家商业伦理与本土社群主义交融。
philosophy.en: The ASEAN Way (non-interference principle), philosophy of harmonious coexistence, Chinese Confucian business ethics blended with indigenous communitarianism.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（马来语、越南语、菲律宾语）、泰文、缅文、高棉文、老挝文等多种文字系统
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Malay, Vietnamese, Filipino), Thai script, Burmese, Khmer, Lao, and other writing systems

culturalAchievements.zh: 吴哥窟、婆罗浮屠等世界遗产，泰国料理与越南料理全球流行，K-pop与J-pop影响下的东南亚流行文化蓬勃发展。
culturalAchievements.en: World Heritage sites such as Angkor Wat and Borobudur; Thai and Vietnamese cuisine globally popular; Southeast Asian pop culture thriving under K-pop and J-pop influences.

languageFamily.zh: 南岛语系（马来语、菲律宾语）、侗台语系（泰语、老挝语）、南亚语系（高棉语、越南语）、汉藏语系（缅甸语）
languageFamily.en: Austronesian (Malay, Filipino), Kra-Dai (Thai, Lao), Austroasiatic (Khmer, Vietnamese), Sino-Tibetan (Burmese)

displayNote.zh: 东盟十国合计GDP约3.6万亿美元（2023年）
displayNote.en: Combined GDP of ten ASEAN nations approximately $3.6 trillion (2023)

gdpDescription.zh: 全球第五大经济体（若视为单一经济体），以制造业转移、数字经济和旅游业驱动增长。新加坡为区域金融中心，越南承接中国产业链转移，印尼为最大经济体。
gdpDescription.en: The world's fifth-largest economy if treated as a single unit, driven by manufacturing relocation, the digital economy, and tourism. Singapore is the regional financial hub, Vietnam receives China's supply-chain shifts, and Indonesia is the largest economy.

mainIndustries.zh: 电子产品制造、汽车组装、棕榈油、橡胶、旅游业、数字经济（电商、网约车）、半导体封测、纺织服装
mainIndustries.en: Electronics manufacturing, automobile assembly, palm oil, rubber, tourism, digital economy (e-commerce, ride-hailing), semiconductor packaging and testing, textiles and garments

tradeGoods.zh: 集成电路与电子元器件、棕榈油、天然气、橡胶、纺织品、汽车配件、热带农产品
tradeGoods.en: Integrated circuits and electronic components, palm oil, natural gas, rubber, textiles, auto parts, tropical agricultural products

name.zh: 各国货币（新加坡元、泰铢、越南盾、菲律宾比索、马来西亚林吉特、印尼盾等）
name.en: National currencies (SGD, THB, VND, PHP, MYR, IDR, etc.)

householdWealth.zh: 差异极大。新加坡人均财富全球前列，缅甸/老挝/柬埔寨仍属低收入国家。区域数字经济为年轻人创造新机会。
householdWealth.en: Extremely varied. Singapore per-capita wealth ranks among the global top; Myanmar/Laos/Cambodia remain low-income. The regional digital economy creates new opportunities for youth.

tradeRoutes.zh: 马六甲海峡为全球贸易最繁忙水道之一，对华/对美/对日韩贸易占主导，RCEP深化区域经济一体化。
tradeRoutes.en: The Strait of Malacca is one of the world's busiest trade waterways; trade with China, the US, Japan, and South Korea dominates; RCEP deepens regional economic integration.

economicSystem.zh: 各成员国经济体制多样：新加坡为开放型市场经济、越南为社会主义定向市场经济、缅甸经济改革滞后。RCEP与CPTPP推动区域一体化。
economicSystem.en: Diverse economic systems: Singapore is an open market economy, Vietnam a socialist-oriented market economy, Myanmar's reforms lag. RCEP and CPTPP drive regional integration.

unit.zh: 美元等值外汇储备（合计）

treasuryDescription.zh: 各成员国外汇储备合计超1.1万亿美元，新加坡金融管理局、泰国央行和印尼央行持有最多储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Combined foreign reserves exceed $1.1 trillion, with the Monetary Authority of Singapore, Bank of Thailand, and Bank Indonesia holding the largest shares.

displayNote.zh: 各成员国政府债务合计约占区域GDP的50%，差异较大（新加坡<130% vs 老挝>88%）。
displayNote.en: Combined government debt approximately 50% of regional GDP, with wide variation (Singapore <130% vs Laos >88%).

fiscalPolicy.zh: 新加坡坚持审慎财政，越南与印尼以基础设施投资拉动增长，菲律宾推进税制改革，缅甸军政府管控资金流动。
fiscalPolicy.en: Singapore maintains prudent fiscal policy, Vietnam and Indonesia drive growth through infrastructure investment, the Philippines advances tax reform, Myanmar's junta controls capital flows.

description.zh: 东南亚最大常备军之一，长期战争经验丰富，近年推进现代化。
description.en: One of Southeast Asia's largest standing armies with extensive combat experience, undergoing modernization.

description.zh: 群岛国家军队，海上防卫为重点，正推进最低必要力量建设。
description.en: Archipelagic nation's military, focused on maritime defense, pursuing Minimum Essential Force development.

description.zh: 在泰国政治中影响力巨大，近年经历政治改革后仍保持强势地位。
description.en: Highly influential in Thai politics; retains a strong position after recent political reforms.

description.zh: 装备精良的小型专业军队，技术水平居区域领先，实行全民兵役制。
description.en: A small but well-equipped professional military, technologically leading in the region, with universal conscription.

commanderInChief.zh: 各成员国独立军事指挥体系
commanderInChief.en: Independent military command structures for each member state

technology.zh: 军事技术水平参差不齐。新加坡拥有先进战机（F-35候选）与数字化军队；越南依赖俄制装备并转向以色列/印度来源；缅甸军方使用中俄武器。
technology.en: Military technology varies widely. Singapore has advanced fighters (F-35 candidate) and a digitized military; Vietnam relies on Russian equipment while shifting to Israeli/Indian sources; Myanmar's military uses Chinese and Russian weapons.

threats.zh: 南海主权争端（中国vs越南/菲律宾/马来西亚）、缅甸内战外溢、恐怖主义（菲律宾南部）、马六甲海峡海盗。
threats.en: South China Sea sovereignty disputes (China vs. Vietnam/Philippines/Malaysia), Myanmar civil war spillover, terrorism (southern Philippines), Strait of Malacca piracy.

recentBattles.zh: 缅甸内战持续（政府军vs民族武装/人民防卫军）、菲律宾反恐清剿行动、马来西亚/印尼联合反海盗巡逻。
recentBattles.en: Myanmar civil war continues (military vs. ethnic armed groups/PDF); Philippines counter-terrorism operations; Malaysia/Indonesia joint anti-piracy patrols.

populationDescription.zh: 东盟十国合计约6.8亿人口，占全球约8.5%，劳动力年轻化，数字原住民一代推动数字经济增长。
populationDescription.en: Ten ASEAN nations total approximately 680 million people (~8.5% of the world), with a youthful labor force; digital natives drive digital economy growth.

ethnicGroups.zh: 马来族、爪哇族、京族（越南）、泰族、菲律宾诸族群、华裔侨胞、印度裔等极为多元的族群构成
ethnicGroups.en: Extremely diverse: Malays, Javanese, Kinh (Vietnamese), Thais, Filipino groups, ethnic Chinese, Indians, and many more

socialClasses.zh: 城市科技新贵与传统华人商业家族并存、庞大的低薪制造业/服务业劳工、农村小农与渔民。
socialClasses.en: Urban tech nouveau riche coexist with traditional Chinese business families; a large low-wage manufacturing/service workforce; rural smallholder farmers and fishermen.

lifeExpectancy.zh: 72.5岁（区域平均，新加坡84岁vs缅甸67岁）

allies.zh: 东盟内部以'东盟方式'维系合作；新加坡/菲律宾/泰国为美国条约盟友；越南与中俄维持传统关系。
allies.en: Intra-ASEAN cooperation via the 'ASEAN Way'; Singapore/Philippines/Thailand are US treaty allies; Vietnam maintains traditional ties with China and Russia.

enemies.zh: 无集体性敌对国家；南海争端使多国与中国关系紧张；缅甸军政府遭国际制裁。
enemies.en: No collective adversary; South China Sea disputes strain relations between several members and China; Myanmar's junta faces international sanctions.

treaties.zh: 《东盟宪章》、RCEP、东盟自贸区（AFTA）、CPTPP（新加坡/越南/马来西亚/文莱）、美菲共同防御条约等。
treaties.en: ASEAN Charter, RCEP, ASEAN Free Trade Area (AFTA), CPTPP (Singapore/Vietnam/Malaysia/Brunei), US-Philippines Mutual Defense Treaty, etc.

foreignPolicy.zh: 坚持东盟中心性，在中美之间保持战略平衡，推动南海行为准则谈判，深化与印日韩澳的经济合作。
foreignPolicy.en: Upholds ASEAN Centrality, maintains strategic balance between China and the US, advances South China Sea Code of Conduct negotiations, and deepens economic cooperation with India, Japan, South Korea, and Australia.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年印尼成功主办东盟峰会、推进南海行为准则磋商、东帝汶原则加入东盟、RCEP全面生效。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Indonesia successfully hosted the 2023 ASEAN Summit; advanced South China Sea Code of Conduct consultations; Timor-Leste admitted in principle; RCEP fully entered into force.

era.zh: 数字经济高速增长期

keyInnovations.zh: 超级应用（Grab、GoTo、Shopee）、移动支付、电商平台、半导体封装与测试（马来西亚/越南）、智慧城市（新加坡）。
keyInnovations.en: Super-apps (Grab, GoTo, Shopee), mobile payments, e-commerce platforms, semiconductor packaging and testing (Malaysia/Vietnam), smart city (Singapore).

infrastructure.zh: 新加坡拥有世界级数字基础设施；越南/印尼光纤与4G/5G网络快速扩展；缅甸/老挝/柬埔寨数字基础设施相对滞后。
infrastructure.en: Singapore has world-class digital infrastructure; Vietnam/Indonesia rapidly expanding fiber and 4G/5G; Myanmar/Laos/Cambodia's digital infrastructure relatively lagging.

policy.zh: 新加坡发布《国家AI战略2.0》，越南发布AI发展战略，泰国推进Thailand 4.0战略中的AI计划；东盟层面发布《AI治理与伦理指南》。
policy.en: Singapore released National AI Strategy 2.0; Vietnam published an AI development strategy; Thailand advances AI plans in its Thailand 4.0 strategy; at the ASEAN level, the ASEAN Guide on AI Governance and Ethics was published.

regulatoryStance.zh: 新加坡引领以原则为基础的灵活监管框架（Model AI Governance Framework），多数成员国尚无专门AI法规。
regulatoryStance.en: Singapore leads with a principle-based flexible regulatory framework (Model AI Governance Framework); most member states lack dedicated AI legislation.

investmentScale.zh: 新加坡AI投资居区域之首（政府拨款超10亿新元），印尼/越南/泰国数字经济投资快速增长，区域AI投资总额约30-40亿美元。
investmentScale.en: Singapore leads regional AI investment (government allocation over S$1 billion); Indonesia/Vietnam/Thailand see rapid digital economy investment growth; total regional AI investment approximately $3-4 billion.

capabilities.zh: 针对东南亚语言优化的开源大语言模型，支持多种东南亚语言。
capabilities.en: Open-source LLM optimized for Southeast Asian languages, supporting multiple regional languages.

capabilities.zh: 泰语优化的大语言模型，由暹罗商业银行旗下创新机构开发。
capabilities.en: Thai-language optimized LLM developed by the innovation arm of Siam Commercial Bank.

keyProducts.zh: 网约车、外卖、数字支付、AI驱动的需求预测
keyProducts.en: Ride-hailing, food delivery, digital payments, AI-powered demand prediction

keyProducts.zh: Gojek网约车、Tokopedia电商、GoPay数字支付
keyProducts.en: Gojek ride-hailing, Tokopedia e-commerce, GoPay digital payments

keyProducts.zh: Shopee电商、Garena游戏、SeaMoney金融科技
keyProducts.en: Shopee e-commerce, Garena gaming, SeaMoney fintech

valuation.zh: 政府资助的国家级AI研究机构

keyProducts.zh: SEA-LION大模型、100E AI应用实验项目
keyProducts.en: SEA-LION LLM, 100 Experiments AI application projects

title.zh: 新加坡教育部长（前贸工部长）
title.en: Singapore Minister for Education (former Minister for Trade and Industry)

contribution.zh: 推动新加坡国家AI战略与智慧国家计划。
contribution.en: Advanced Singapore's National AI Strategy and Smart Nation initiative.

contribution.zh: 领导AI Singapore推动东南亚语言AI模型开发与本地AI人才培养。
contribution.en: Leads AI Singapore in driving Southeast Asian language AI model development and local AI talent cultivation.

researchFocus.zh: 东南亚语言NLP、智慧城市与交通优化（新加坡）、农业科技AI（泰国/越南）、金融科技风控AI。
researchFocus.en: Southeast Asian language NLP, smart city and transport optimization (Singapore), agritech AI (Thailand/Vietnam), fintech risk-management AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 新加坡拥有区域最密集的数据中心集群（亚太云计算枢纽）；马来西亚柔佛州建设新数据中心园区；其余国家计算设施有限。
computeInfrastructure.en: Singapore hosts the region's densest data center cluster (Asia-Pacific cloud hub); Malaysia's Johor state is developing new data center parks; other nations have limited compute facilities.

talentPool.zh: 新加坡汇聚国际AI人才，越南IT外包人才丰富，整体区域AI博士级研究者偏少。
talentPool.en: Singapore attracts international AI talent, Vietnam has abundant IT outsourcing talent, but the region overall lacks PhD-level AI researchers.

globalRanking.zh: 新加坡AI竞争力全球前15，区域整体处于全球AI版图的新兴地位。
globalRanking.en: Singapore ranks in the global top 15 for AI competitiveness; the region overall holds an emerging position on the global AI map.

outlook.zh: 庞大年轻人口与高速增长的数字经济为AI应用提供广阔市场，新加坡引领研发，但区域数字鸿沟与人才不足仍是挑战。
outlook.en: A large young population and rapidly growing digital economy provide a broad market for AI applications; Singapore leads R&D, but the regional digital divide and talent shortage remain challenges.

strengths.zh: 6.8亿人口红利、全球供应链转移受益者、数字经济高速增长、地缘位置关键（马六甲海峡）。
strengths.en: 680-million population dividend, beneficiary of global supply chain shifts, rapid digital economy growth, critical geostrategic location (Strait of Malacca).

weaknesses.zh: 区域内发展差距悬殊、南海争端持续、缅甸危机拖累区域形象、东盟一体化进程缓慢。
weaknesses.en: Vast intra-regional development gaps, ongoing South China Sea disputes, Myanmar crisis undermining regional image, slow ASEAN integration progress.

outlook.zh: 数字经济有望在2030年突破1万亿美元，若能弥合发展差距并维持地缘平衡，东盟将成为全球增长的关键引擎。
outlook.en: The digital economy is expected to surpass $1 trillion by 2030; if development gaps are bridged and geostrategic balance maintained, ASEAN will become a key engine of global growth.

description.zh: 2023年的东盟是一个拥有6.8亿人口的多元区域集团，作为全球供应链重组的最大受益者，数字经济蓬勃发展。新加坡以AI Singapore和智慧国家战略引领区域AI发展，Grab、GoTo、Sea集团构建东南亚数字生态，越南成为电子制造新热土。然而区域发展鸿沟巨大，缅甸内战与南海争端为地区安全蒙上阴影。
description.en: ASEAN in 2023 is a diverse 680-million-person regional bloc and the biggest beneficiary of global supply-chain restructuring, with a booming digital economy. Singapore leads regional AI development through AI Singapore and its Smart Nation strategy; Grab, GoTo, and Sea Group build the Southeast Asian digital ecosystem; Vietnam emerges as an electronics manufacturing hotspot. Yet a vast development divide persists, with the Myanmar civil war and South China Sea disputes casting shadows over regional security.

dynasty.zh: 第六共和国·国民力量党执政期
dynasty.en: Sixth Republic, People Power Party administration

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国，总统为国家元首兼政府首脑，行政权高度集中，一院制国会（300席）行使立法权。
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic where the president is both head of state and head of government with highly centralized executive power; a unicameral National Assembly (300 seats) exercises legislative authority.

socialStructure.zh: 财阀（三星、SK、现代、LG）主导经济结构，教育军备竞赛激烈，数字化生活方式全球领先，生育率全球最低。
socialStructure.en: Chaebol-dominated (Samsung, SK, Hyundai, LG) economic structure, intense educational arms race, globally leading digital lifestyle, world's lowest fertility rate.

rulingClass.zh: 总统与执政党核心层、财阀家族、高级行政官僚与检察系统。
rulingClass.en: President and ruling party core, chaebol families, senior administrative bureaucrats, and the prosecutorial system.

succession.zh: 总统由全民直选产生，任期五年，不可连任。
succession.en: The president is directly elected for a single five-year term, non-renewable.

structure.zh: 总统制，行政院（国务会议）为最高行政决策机构，国会为一院制立法机关，大法院与宪法裁判所行使司法权。
structure.en: Presidential system; the Cabinet (State Council) is the top executive body, the National Assembly is the unicameral legislature, and the Supreme Court and Constitutional Court exercise judicial power.

function.zh: 制定经济政策、财政预算、税制改革与对外经济合作。
function.en: Formulates economic policy, fiscal budgets, tax reform, and external economic cooperation.

function.zh: 主管科技创新政策、AI与半导体产业战略、5G/6G通信发展。
function.en: Oversees S&T innovation policy, AI and semiconductor industry strategy, and 5G/6G telecom development.

name.en: Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy

function.zh: 管理贸易政策、产业发展、能源安全与供应链战略。
function.en: Manages trade policy, industrial development, energy security, and supply chain strategy.

function.zh: 负责国防政策、对朝军事战略与韩美联合防务体制协调。
function.en: Handles defense policy, military strategy toward North Korea, and coordination of the ROK-US combined defense structure.

localAdmin.zh: 全国分17个一级行政区（1特别市、6广域市、8道、1特别自治市、1特别自治道），各设地方议会。
localAdmin.en: Divided into 17 first-level divisions (1 special city, 6 metropolitan cities, 8 provinces, 1 special autonomous city, 1 special autonomous province), each with local councils.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以1987年宪法为根本法，宪法裁判所拥有违宪审查权，检察体系权力强大。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system based on the 1987 constitution, with the Constitutional Court holding judicial review power and a powerful prosecutorial system.

taxationSystem.zh: 综合所得税（最高45%）、法人税（最高25%）、增值税（10%），辅以半导体等战略产业税收优惠。
taxationSystem.en: Comprehensive income tax (top rate 45%), corporate tax (top rate 25%), VAT (10%), supplemented by tax incentives for strategic industries like semiconductors.

religion.zh: 基督教新教（约20%）、佛教（约16%）、天主教（约11%）、无宗教（约46%）
religion.en: Protestant Christianity (~20%), Buddhism (~16%), Catholicism (~11%), irreligious (~46%)

philosophy.zh: 儒家传统深厚（尊师重教、长幼有序），与快速现代化、个人主义与科技拥抱并存。'Ppalli-ppalli'（快快）文化驱动效率导向社会。
philosophy.en: Deep Confucian traditions (reverence for teachers, hierarchical respect) coexist with rapid modernization, individualism, and tech embrace. 'Ppalli-ppalli' (hurry-hurry) culture drives an efficiency-oriented society.

writingSystem.zh: 韩文（훈민정음），公认世界上最科学的字母系统之一
writingSystem.en: Hangul (훈민정음), widely regarded as one of the world's most scientific alphabet systems

culturalAchievements.zh: 韩流（K-pop、K-drama）全球席卷，BTS与BLACKPINK为文化外交利器；韩国电影（寄生虫）获奥斯卡；电竞产业世界领先。
culturalAchievements.en: Hallyu (K-pop, K-drama) sweeps the globe; BTS and BLACKPINK serve as cultural diplomacy tools; Korean cinema (Parasite) won Oscars; esports industry is world-leading.

languageFamily.zh: 孤立语言（韩语，部分学者归入阿尔泰语系）
languageFamily.en: Language isolate (Korean; some scholars classify it within Altaic)

displayNote.zh: 2023年名义GDP约1.7万亿美元，全球第13大经济体
displayNote.en: 2023 nominal GDP approximately $1.7 trillion, the world's 13th largest economy

gdpDescription.zh: 半导体（存储芯片）、汽车、造船与文化产业驱动的出口导向型经济。SK海力士HBM芯片因AI热潮需求暴涨，三星争夺AI芯片市场。
gdpDescription.en: Export-oriented economy driven by semiconductors (memory chips), automobiles, shipbuilding, and cultural industries. SK Hynix HBM chips see explosive demand from the AI boom; Samsung competes for AI chip market share.

mainIndustries.zh: 半导体（DRAM/NAND/HBM）、汽车（现代/起亚）、造船、石化、电子消费品、K-pop与文化内容、电池制造
mainIndustries.en: Semiconductors (DRAM/NAND/HBM), automobiles (Hyundai/Kia), shipbuilding, petrochemicals, consumer electronics, K-pop and cultural content, battery manufacturing

tradeGoods.zh: 存储芯片（DRAM/HBM）、汽车、船舶、石化产品、显示面板、电池、K-pop内容
tradeGoods.en: Memory chips (DRAM/HBM), automobiles, ships, petrochemical products, display panels, batteries, K-pop content

householdWealth.zh: 家庭负债率全球最高之一（约105% GDP），房价高企尤其是首尔地区，年轻一代面临'N抛世代'压力。
householdWealth.en: Among the world's highest household debt ratios (~105% of GDP); high housing prices especially in Seoul; younger generation faces 'N-po generation' pressures.

tradeRoutes.zh: 对华贸易占出口约25%（半导体为主），对美/对日贸易重要，RCEP成员，积极参与印太经济框架。
tradeRoutes.en: China accounts for ~25% of exports (mainly semiconductors); US and Japan trade significant; RCEP member; actively participates in the Indo-Pacific Economic Framework.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济为主导，政府通过产业政策（K-半导体战略、K-电池战略）引导关键产业发展，财阀体制深刻影响经济运行。
economicSystem.en: Market economy led, with government guiding key industries through industrial policy (K-Semiconductor, K-Battery strategies); the chaebol system deeply shapes economic operations.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备约4200亿美元，位居全球前十；韩国银行持有约105吨黄金储备。
treasuryDescription.en: Foreign reserves approximately $420 billion, ranking in the global top ten; the Bank of Korea holds about 105 tonnes of gold reserves.

displayNote.zh: 国家债务约占GDP的55%，在发达国家中相对较低，但增速令人担忧。
displayNote.en: National debt approximately 55% of GDP, relatively low among developed nations, but the rate of increase is concerning.

fiscalPolicy.zh: K-半导体战略投资4500亿美元建设芯片集群、扩大R&D税收优惠，同时推进社会安全网扩张以应对老龄化。
fiscalPolicy.en: K-Semiconductor strategy investing $450 billion in chip cluster development, expanding R&D tax credits, while broadening the social safety net to address aging.

description.zh: 朝鲜半岛前线防御主力，沿三八线部署重兵，加速无人化与数字化转型。
description.en: The main defense force along the Korean Peninsula front, heavily deployed along the DMZ, accelerating unmanned and digital transformation.

description.zh: 拥有宙斯盾驱逐舰与潜艇舰队，建设蓝水海军能力。
description.en: Possesses Aegis destroyers and submarine fleet, building blue-water navy capabilities.

description.zh: 部署F-35A与KF-21五代机项目，维持对朝空中优势。
description.en: Deploying F-35A and the KF-21 fifth-gen fighter program, maintaining air superiority over North Korea.

technology.zh: 国产KF-21五代隐身战机、天弓系列防空导弹、玄武系列弹道导弹、自主研发军用无人系统、先进潜艇技术。
technology.en: Domestically developed KF-21 fifth-gen stealth fighter, Cheongung air defense missiles, Hyunmoo ballistic missiles, indigenous military unmanned systems, advanced submarine technology.

threats.zh: 朝鲜核导弹威胁为首要安全关切，朝鲜频繁试射导弹；中国军事影响力扩大、日韩历史争议。
threats.en: North Korea's nuclear and missile threats are the primary security concern with frequent missile tests; China's expanding military influence; ROK-Japan historical disputes.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接战斗，但2023年朝鲜多次试射弹道导弹引发高度紧张；韩美联合军演频次加密。
recentBattles.en: No direct combat, but multiple North Korean ballistic missile tests in 2023 caused high tension; ROK-US combined military exercises increased in frequency.

populationDescription.zh: 全球生育率最低的国家（总和生育率约0.72），人口老龄化加速，劳动力人口开始收缩。
populationDescription.en: The country with the world's lowest fertility rate (TFR ~0.72), accelerating population aging, and a shrinking working-age population.

ethnicGroups.zh: 韩民族占绝大多数（约96%），外籍居民与多文化家庭增加中
ethnicGroups.en: Korean ethnicity overwhelmingly predominant (~96%), with growing foreign residents and multicultural families

socialClasses.zh: 财阀家族与科技高管阶层、庞大的白领/教育中产、制造业蓝领工人、扩大的老年贫困人口。
socialClasses.en: Chaebol families and tech executive class, a large white-collar/educated middle class, manufacturing blue-collar workers, and a growing elderly poor population.

allies.zh: 美国（《韩美共同防御条约》核心盟友）、与日本改善关系、北约全球伙伴、参与印太合作。
allies.en: United States (ROK-US Mutual Defense Treaty, core ally), improved relations with Japan, NATO Global Partner, participates in Indo-Pacific cooperation.

enemies.zh: 朝鲜为首要安全威胁，技术上仍处于战争状态（1953年停战协定）。
enemies.en: North Korea as the primary security threat; technically still at war (1953 Armistice Agreement).

treaties.zh: 韩美共同防御条约、RCEP、韩EU自贸协定、《戴维营协议》（韩美日三边合作）。
treaties.en: ROK-US Mutual Defense Treaty, RCEP, Korea-EU FTA, Camp David Accord (ROK-US-Japan trilateral cooperation).

foreignPolicy.zh: 深化韩美同盟、改善韩日关系（'戴维营精神'）、对朝强硬立场、平衡对华经济依赖与安全竞争。
foreignPolicy.en: Deepening ROK-US alliance, improving ROK-Japan relations ('Camp David spirit'), hawkish stance on North Korea, balancing economic dependence on China with security competition.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年戴维营韩美日三边峰会达成历史性合作框架；尹锡悦访美加强半导体供应链合作；韩日关系显著回暖。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: The 2023 Camp David trilateral ROK-US-Japan summit reached a historic cooperation framework; Yoon visited the US to strengthen semiconductor supply chain cooperation; ROK-Japan relations significantly improved.

era.zh: 半导体与数字化强国时代

keyInnovations.zh: HBM高带宽存储芯片（SK海力士全球领先）、5G/6G通信、K-Pop数字内容产业链、自动驾驶、电池技术、KF-21五代战机。
keyInnovations.en: HBM high-bandwidth memory chips (SK Hynix global leader), 5G/6G communications, K-Pop digital content pipeline, autonomous driving, battery technology, KF-21 fifth-gen fighter.

infrastructure.zh: 全球最快平均网速之一、5G全面商用、KTX高铁网络、世界级半导体产业集群（华城-平泽-利川）。
infrastructure.en: One of the world's fastest average internet speeds, fully commercialized 5G, KTX high-speed rail network, world-class semiconductor cluster (Hwaseong-Pyeongtaek-Icheon).

policy.zh: 2023年发布《AI时代数字战略》，拨款4000亿韩元支持AI R&D；推进AI半导体国家战略；计划到2027年培养10万AI人才。
policy.en: Released 'Digital Strategy for the AI Era' in 2023; allocated 400 billion won for AI R&D; advancing the National AI Semiconductor Strategy; plans to train 100,000 AI talents by 2027.

regulatoryStance.zh: 推进《人工智能基本法》立法，采取促进创新优先、风险分级管理的监管路线。
regulatoryStance.en: Advancing the 'AI Basic Act'; adopting a regulatory approach prioritizing innovation promotion with risk-tiered management.

investmentScale.zh: 政府AI及半导体R&D年投入超50亿美元，三星与SK海力士每年在HBM/AI芯片上投资数百亿美元。
investmentScale.en: Government AI and semiconductor R&D exceeds $5 billion annually; Samsung and SK Hynix invest tens of billions each year in HBM/AI chips.

capabilities.zh: 韩语优化的大语言模型，深度整合Naver搜索与服务生态，支持韩/英/日多语言。
capabilities.en: Korean-optimized LLM deeply integrated with Naver's search and service ecosystem, supporting Korean/English/Japanese multilingual capabilities.

capabilities.zh: 韩语GPT模型系列，面向对话与内容生成任务。
capabilities.en: Korean GPT model series for dialogue and content generation tasks.

capabilities.zh: LG开发的多模态AI模型，专注于工业应用与科学研究。
capabilities.en: LG's multimodal AI model focused on industrial applications and scientific research.

keyProducts.zh: HBM存储芯片、高端DRAM/NAND、Exynos移动处理器、Samsung Gauss AI模型
keyProducts.en: HBM memory chips, high-end DRAM/NAND, Exynos mobile processors, Samsung Gauss AI model

keyProducts.zh: HBM3E高带宽存储（NVIDIA H100/H200核心供应商）、DDR5、企业级SSD
keyProducts.en: HBM3E high-bandwidth memory (core supplier for NVIDIA H100/H200), DDR5, enterprise SSDs

keyProducts.zh: HyperCLOVA X大模型、Naver搜索、LINE通讯、Papago翻译、Naver Cloud AI平台
keyProducts.en: HyperCLOVA X LLM, Naver Search, LINE messaging, Papago translation, Naver Cloud AI platform

headquarters.zh: 城南市（第二总部：沙特NEOM合作）
headquarters.en: Seongnam (Second HQ: collaboration with Saudi NEOM)

keyProducts.zh: KakaoTalk、Kakao Brain AI、Kakao Mobility、Kakao Pay
keyProducts.en: KakaoTalk, Kakao Brain AI, Kakao Mobility, Kakao Pay

contribution.zh: 领导三星在HBM芯片与AI半导体领域的大规模投资，推动GAA晶体管技术量产。
contribution.en: Led Samsung's massive investment in HBM chips and AI semiconductors, driving GAA transistor technology to mass production.

contribution.zh: 主导SK海力士HBM芯片战略，使SK海力士成为NVIDIA AI加速卡核心供应商。
contribution.en: Directed SK Hynix's HBM chip strategy, making SK Hynix a core supplier for NVIDIA's AI accelerator cards.

contribution.zh: 推动HyperCLOVA X大模型商业化，将Naver转型为AI驱动的搜索与服务平台。
contribution.en: Drove HyperCLOVA X commercialization, transforming Naver into an AI-driven search and services platform.

researchFocus.zh: HBM/AI半导体技术、韩语NLP、AI辅助半导体设计、工业AI（制造/质检）、AI内容生成（K-pop/影视）。
researchFocus.en: HBM/AI semiconductor technology, Korean NLP, AI-assisted semiconductor design, industrial AI (manufacturing/QC), AI content generation (K-pop/entertainment).

computeInfrastructure.zh: Naver Cloud和KT Cloud提供本土云计算服务，政府推进国家AI计算中心建设，三星与SK海力士提供全球领先的存储芯片产能。
computeInfrastructure.en: Naver Cloud and KT Cloud provide domestic cloud services; the government advances a national AI computing center; Samsung and SK Hynix offer world-leading memory chip production capacity.

talentPool.zh: KAIST、首尔大学、浦项工大等培养大量AI人才；人才外流至硅谷为挑战；政府推进AI人才引进与留学生回流计划。
talentPool.en: KAIST, Seoul National University, POSTECH produce significant AI talent; brain drain to Silicon Valley is a challenge; the government advances talent recruitment and diaspora return programs.

globalRanking.zh: AI半导体（HBM）领域全球第一，AI整体竞争力约全球第6-8位。
globalRanking.en: Global #1 in AI semiconductors (HBM); overall AI competitiveness ranked approximately 6th-8th globally.

outlook.zh: 凭借HBM芯片在AI硬件供应链中的关键地位不可替代，韩语AI模型生态加速构建，但算力与数据规模相比中美仍有差距。
outlook.en: The irreplaceable position of HBM chips in the AI hardware supply chain is a key advantage; the Korean-language AI model ecosystem is accelerating; but compute and data scale still lag behind the US and China.

strengths.zh: AI半导体（HBM）全球领先、高教育水平人力资源、数字化基础设施先进、韩流文化软实力强大。
strengths.en: Global leadership in AI semiconductors (HBM), highly educated human resources, advanced digital infrastructure, strong Hallyu cultural soft power.

weaknesses.zh: 全球最低生育率（人口危机）、朝鲜威胁、对中国出口依赖、政治极化、财阀垄断结构。
weaknesses.en: World's lowest fertility rate (population crisis), North Korean threat, export dependence on China, political polarization, chaebol monopoly structure.

outlook.zh: 作为AI时代硬件供应链的核心节点，韩国战略地位上升，但人口萎缩与地缘安全风险是长期结构性挑战。
outlook.en: As a core node in the AI-era hardware supply chain, South Korea's strategic importance rises, but population decline and geopolitical security risks are long-term structural challenges.

description.zh: 2023年的大韩民国是AI时代不可或缺的硬件强国。SK海力士的HBM高带宽存储芯片是NVIDIA AI加速器的核心组件，三星在先进制程与存储芯片领域双线竞争。Naver推出HyperCLOVA X构建韩语AI生态，韩流文化持续全球传播。然而全球最低的0.72生育率敲响人口警钟，朝鲜导弹威胁与中美之间的战略平衡构成持久挑战。
description.en: South Korea in 2023 is an indispensable hardware powerhouse of the AI era. SK Hynix's HBM high-bandwidth memory chips are core components of NVIDIA AI accelerators, while Samsung competes on both advanced process and memory chip fronts. Naver launched HyperCLOVA X to build a Korean-language AI ecosystem, and Hallyu culture continues its global spread. Yet the world's lowest fertility rate of 0.72 sounds demographic alarms, and North Korean missile threats plus the strategic balancing act between the US and China pose enduring challenges.

name.zh: 朝鲜民主主义人民共和国
朝鲜民主主义人民共和国

rulerTitle.zh: 朝鲜劳动党总书记、国务委员长
rulerTitle.en: General Secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea, Chairman of State Affairs

dynasty.zh: 金氏家族第三代世袭统治

governmentForm.zh: 一党制社会主义国家，实行世袭式个人独裁，以主体思想（Juche）和先军政治为指导思想。最高人民会议为名义上的立法机关。
governmentForm.en: One-party socialist state with hereditary personal dictatorship, guided by Juche ideology and Songun (military-first) politics. The Supreme People's Assembly is the nominal legislature.

socialStructure.zh: 出身成分（songbun）制度将公民分为核心阶层、动摇阶层和敌对阶层三大类，决定个人一生的机会与权利。
socialStructure.en: The songbun system classifies citizens into core, wavering, and hostile classes, determining an individual's lifelong opportunities and rights.

rulingClass.zh: 金氏家族为绝对权力核心，劳动党中央委员会、国务委员会与军方高层构成统治精英。
rulingClass.en: The Kim family holds absolute power; the Workers' Party Central Committee, State Affairs Commission, and senior military form the ruling elite.

succession.zh: 金氏家族世袭继承，金正恩于2011年继承金正日权力，2023年其女金主爱频繁公开亮相引发继任猜测。
succession.en: Hereditary succession within the Kim family; Kim Jong-un inherited power from Kim Jong-il in 2011; frequent public appearances by his daughter Kim Ju-ae in 2023 sparked succession speculation.

structure.zh: 朝鲜劳动党垄断一切权力。国务委员会为最高权力机构（金正恩任委员长），最高人民会议为橡皮图章立法机关，内阁管理日常行政。
structure.en: The Workers' Party of Korea monopolizes all power. The State Affairs Commission is the supreme authority (chaired by Kim Jong-un), the Supreme People's Assembly is a rubber-stamp legislature, and the Cabinet handles daily administration.

function.zh: 管理朝鲜人民军常规部队的行政、后勤与训练。
function.en: Administers the Korean People's Army's conventional forces, logistics, and training.

function.zh: 政治秘密警察机构，监控内部异见、管理政治犯收容所。
function.en: Political secret police; monitors internal dissent and administers political prison camps.

function.zh: 主管核武器与弹道导弹开发、军工生产。
function.en: Oversees nuclear weapons and ballistic missile development, military-industrial production.

function.zh: 制定中央计划经济指标与资源分配方案。
function.en: Formulates central-planned economic targets and resource allocation.

localAdmin.zh: 全国分9道、2直辖市、1特别市（南浦）和1特别行政区（开城），各级设党委会控制行政。
localAdmin.en: Divided into 9 provinces, 2 directly governed cities, 1 special city (Nampo), and 1 special administrative region (Kaesong); party committees control administration at all levels.

legalSystem.zh: 社会主义法制，以宪法为名义根本法，实际以劳动党指令与最高领导人旨意为准。政治犯收容所（管理所）体系游离于法律之外。
legalSystem.en: Socialist legal system with the constitution as nominal fundamental law, but Workers' Party directives and the Supreme Leader's will prevail in practice. Political prison camps (kwanliso) operate outside the legal framework.

taxationSystem.zh: 名义上1974年废除所有税收（'无税国家'），实际通过国有企业上缴利润、劳动力强制征用与外汇创收项目获取收入。
taxationSystem.en: Nominally abolished all taxes in 1974 (a 'tax-free nation'); in practice, revenue comes from state enterprise profit remittances, forced labor mobilization, and foreign currency earning projects.

religion.zh: 实质上的国家无神论，金氏家族崇拜具有准宗教性质。名义上允许佛教/天道教存在但受严格控制。
religion.en: De facto state atheism; Kim family worship has quasi-religious characteristics. Buddhism/Cheondoism nominally tolerated but strictly controlled.

philosophy.zh: 主体思想（Juche）：强调自主、自力更生与先军政治。白头山血统论为金氏世袭提供意识形态基础。
philosophy.en: Juche ideology: emphasizes self-reliance, autarky, and military-first politics. Mt. Paektu bloodline theory provides the ideological foundation for Kim family hereditary rule.

writingSystem.zh: 朝鲜文（Chosŏn'gŭl），废除汉字使用
writingSystem.en: Chosŏn'gŭl (Korean script), Chinese characters eliminated from use

culturalAchievements.zh: 大型团体操表演（阿里郎/光辉祖国）举世瞩目，宣传艺术体系高度发达，平壤地铁站建筑与主体思想塔为标志性建筑。
culturalAchievements.en: Spectacular mass gymnastics performances (Arirang/Glorious Fatherland), highly developed propaganda arts system, Pyongyang metro stations and the Juche Tower as iconic architecture.

languageFamily.zh: 孤立语言（朝鲜语，文化语标准）
languageFamily.en: Language isolate (Korean, Munhwaŏ standard)

displayNote.zh: 朝鲜GDP估计约180亿美元（数据高度不确定）
displayNote.en: North Korea GDP estimated at approximately $18 billion (data highly uncertain)

gdpDescription.zh: 中央计划经济与非正规市场（张麻堂）并存。国际制裁严重制约经济发展，军工生产占国民经济比重畸高。
gdpDescription.en: Central planned economy coexists with informal markets (jangmadang). International sanctions severely constrain economic development; military-industrial production accounts for a disproportionate share of the national economy.

mainIndustries.zh: 军工（导弹/核武）、采矿（煤炭/铁矿）、纺织、农业、网络犯罪与非法外汇创收
mainIndustries.en: Military-industrial (missiles/nuclear), mining (coal/iron ore), textiles, agriculture, cybercrime and illicit foreign currency generation

tradeGoods.zh: 煤炭（受制裁）、矿产品、纺织品、海鲜、军火出口（非法），网络盗窃加密货币
tradeGoods.en: Coal (sanctioned), minerals, textiles, seafood, arms exports (illicit), cryptocurrency theft via cybercrime

householdWealth.zh: 绝大多数民众处于赤贫状态，平壤精英阶层享有特权消费品。非正规市场（张麻堂）提供基本生活物资。
householdWealth.en: The vast majority of citizens live in extreme poverty; Pyongyang elites enjoy privileged access to consumer goods. Informal markets (jangmadang) provide basic necessities.

tradeRoutes.zh: 对华贸易占外贸约95%以上，经丹东-新义州铁路与海运；对俄小额边贸；国际制裁切断绝大多数正常贸易通道。
tradeRoutes.en: Trade with China accounts for over 95% of foreign trade via the Dandong-Sinuiju railway and sea routes; small-scale border trade with Russia; international sanctions cut off most normal trade channels.

economicSystem.zh: 中央计划经济体制，以国有经济为主导。非正规市场化（张麻堂）事实上成为民众生存依靠，外汇创收通过劳务输出与网络犯罪补充。
economicSystem.en: Central planned economy with state ownership predominant. Informal marketization (jangmadang) has become the de facto survival mechanism; foreign currency earned through labor exports and cybercrime.

source.zh: 军工与核项目相关收入
非法外汇创收（网络犯罪/劳务输出）

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备极度匮乏，据估计不足3亿美元。大量资金以加密货币形式通过网络盗窃获取。
treasuryDescription.en: Foreign reserves are extremely scarce, estimated at under $300 million. Significant funds are obtained in cryptocurrency through cyber theft.

displayNote.zh: 大量对外债务违约，被国际资本市场完全排斥。
displayNote.en: Extensive foreign debt defaults; completely excluded from international capital markets.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 军事优先财政分配，'先军经济'路线将军工置于一切之上；通过加密货币盗窃与劳务输出弥补外汇缺口。
fiscalPolicy.en: Military-first fiscal allocation; 'Songun economy' places military-industrial interests above all; bridges foreign currency gaps through cryptocurrency theft and labor exports.

description.zh: 全球最大常备陆军之一，大量火炮（含远程炮）对准首尔，装备整体老旧但数量庞大。
description.en: One of the world's largest standing armies; massive artillery (including long-range) aimed at Seoul; equipment largely outdated but numerically vast.

description.zh: 管理朝鲜弹道导弹库，包括'火星'系列洲际导弹与'北极星'潜射导弹。
description.en: Manages North Korea's ballistic missile arsenal, including Hwasong-series ICBMs and Pukguksong SLBMs.

description.zh: 装备大量老旧苏制战机（MiG-29/21），空战能力有限但构成数量威胁。
description.en: Equipped with numerous outdated Soviet fighters (MiG-29/21); limited air combat capability but poses a numerical threat.

technology.zh: 核武器（估计拥有50-60枚核弹头）、洲际弹道导弹（火星-17/18）、高超音速导弹原型、固体燃料技术突破、先进网络战能力（拉撒路集团）。常规装备大部分为1960-80年代水平。
technology.en: Nuclear weapons (estimated 50-60 warheads), ICBMs (Hwasong-17/18), hypersonic missile prototype, solid-fuel technology breakthrough, advanced cyber warfare capability (Lazarus Group). Conventional equipment mostly 1960s-80s era.

threats.zh: 与美韩处于对峙状态，朝韩技术上仍处于战争状态（无和平条约），面临国际制裁与孤立。
threats.en: In confrontation with the US and South Korea; technically still at war (no peace treaty); faces international sanctions and isolation.

recentBattles.zh: 2023年密集试射弹道导弹超20次，包括洲际导弹与侦察卫星发射。向俄罗斯提供炮弹以换取军事技术援助。
recentBattles.en: Over 20 ballistic missile tests in 2023, including ICBMs and reconnaissance satellite launches. Supplied artillery shells to Russia in exchange for military technology assistance.

populationDescription.zh: 约2600万人口，长期营养不良影响国民健康，平壤特权阶层与地方民众生活水平差距极大。
populationDescription.en: Approximately 26 million people; chronic malnutrition affects national health; vast disparity between the privileged Pyongyang class and provincial populations.

ethnicGroups.zh: 朝鲜民族（几乎100%单一民族）
ethnicGroups.en: Korean ethnicity (virtually 100% homogeneous)

socialClasses.zh: 以出身成分（songbun）划分：核心阶层（约28%，享有特权）、动摇阶层（约45%）、敌对阶层（约27%，受歧视与监控）。
socialClasses.en: Divided by songbun: core class (~28%, privileged), wavering class (~45%), hostile class (~27%, discriminated against and surveilled).

lifeExpectancy.en: 72.3 years (official data; likely lower in reality)

allies.zh: 中国（传统盟友，血盟关系）、俄罗斯（2023年关系急剧升温，军事合作加深）。
allies.en: China (traditional ally, 'blood alliance'), Russia (relations dramatically warmed in 2023, deepening military cooperation).

enemies.zh: 美国、韩国为主要敌对方，日本、联合国安理会制裁联盟。
enemies.en: United States and South Korea as primary adversaries; Japan; UN Security Council sanctions coalition.

treaties.zh: 《中朝友好合作互助条约》（1961）、《朝俄友好善邻合作条约》（2000）、朝鲜战争停战协定（1953）。
treaties.en: Sino-DPRK Treaty of Friendship (1961), DPRK-Russia Treaty of Friendship (2000), Korean Armistice Agreement (1953).

foreignPolicy.zh: 核武器是国家安全基石，以核导弹筹码要挟对话；2023年转向全面亲俄立场，向俄提供武器弹药以换取技术与经济支持。
foreignPolicy.en: Nuclear weapons as the cornerstone of national security, using nuclear/missile leverage to compel dialogue; shifted to a fully pro-Russia stance in 2023, supplying arms to Russia in exchange for technology and economic support.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年9月金正恩访问俄罗斯远东与普京会晤，达成军事技术合作协议；朝俄军火交易规模扩大。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Kim Jong-un visited Russia's Far East to meet Putin in September 2023, reaching military-technology cooperation agreements; DPRK-Russia arms trade expanded significantly.

era.zh: 军事技术突破与民用科技极度匮乏并存
era.en: Military technology breakthroughs coexist with extreme civilian tech deprivation

keyInnovations.zh: 洲际弹道导弹与核武器小型化、固体燃料火箭技术、侦察卫星（万里镜-1号）、网络攻击工具（加密货币盗窃）。民用领域科技极度落后。
keyInnovations.en: ICBM and nuclear warhead miniaturization, solid-fuel rocket technology, reconnaissance satellite (Malligyong-1), cyber attack tools (cryptocurrency theft). Civilian sector technology is extremely primitive.

infrastructure.zh: 电力供应严重不足（频繁停电），互联网仅限极少数精英使用（光明网为内部网），道路与铁路设施老旧。
infrastructure.en: Severe power shortages (frequent blackouts); internet restricted to a tiny elite (Kwangmyong intranet for domestic use); roads and railways are outdated.

policy.zh: 无公开AI政策或战略。金正恩强调'科学技术强国'建设，但资源几乎全部投入军事领域。
policy.en: No publicly known AI policy or strategy. Kim Jong-un emphasizes 'science and technology power' building, but resources are almost entirely directed to the military sector.

regulatoryStance.zh: 无AI相关法规，互联网完全封锁使AI应用场景极度受限。
regulatoryStance.en: No AI-related regulations; complete internet blockade makes AI application scenarios extremely limited.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资几乎为零。少量资源可能用于网络攻击中的机器学习工具开发。
investmentScale.en: AI investment is virtually zero. Small resources may be allocated to machine learning tool development for cyber attacks.

researchFocus.zh: 网络战中的自动化攻击工具、军事图像识别的初步探索（如卫星图像分析），但规模极小。
researchFocus.en: Automated attack tools for cyber warfare, preliminary exploration of military image recognition (e.g., satellite imagery analysis), but at an extremely small scale.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 几乎不存在。无数据中心或GPU集群。平壤金日成大学和金策工业大学可能有极少量研究用计算设备。
computeInfrastructure.en: Virtually nonexistent. No data centers or GPU clusters. Kim Il-sung University and Kim Chaek University of Technology may have minimal research computing equipment.

talentPool.zh: 对外封闭导致AI人才极度匮乏，少量在中国/俄罗斯培训的理工科人才可能接触AI基础知识。网络战人员约7000人具备一定编程能力。
talentPool.en: International isolation results in extreme AI talent scarcity; a few STEM graduates trained in China/Russia may have basic AI exposure. ~7,000 cyber warfare operatives possess some programming skills.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI竞争力几乎为零，但网络攻击能力排名较高。
globalRanking.en: Global AI competitiveness essentially zero, but cyber attack capability ranks relatively high.

outlook.zh: 除网络战工具外，朝鲜在AI领域几乎没有发展前景。国际制裁、互联网封锁与资源集中于军工使民用AI发展不可能。
outlook.en: Apart from cyber warfare tools, North Korea has virtually no AI development prospects. International sanctions, internet blockade, and resource concentration in the military-industrial complex make civilian AI development impossible.

strengths.zh: 核威慑力量、庞大的常备军、网络战能力、不对称军事战略。
strengths.en: Nuclear deterrence, massive standing army, cyber warfare capabilities, asymmetric military strategy.

weaknesses.zh: 经济极度落后、国际孤立、人权灾难、粮食不安全、科技基础薄弱。
weaknesses.en: Extreme economic backwardness, international isolation, human rights catastrophe, food insecurity, weak technological base.

outlook.zh: 在核武装化路线下短期安全得到保障，但长期面临经济崩溃与政权稳定性风险。与俄罗斯的军事合作为短期生命线。
outlook.en: Short-term security ensured by nuclearization, but faces long-term risks of economic collapse and regime stability. Military cooperation with Russia serves as a short-term lifeline.

description.zh: 2023年的朝鲜是一个核武装的封闭王朝国家。金正恩在年内密集试射导弹，包括洲际弹道导弹与侦察卫星，并与普京达成军事合作协议。拉撒路集团等黑客组织通过加密货币盗窃创造数十亿美元非法收入。AI领域几乎空白，但网络攻击能力不容小觑。绝大多数民众生活在贫困与信息封锁之中。
description.en: North Korea in 2023 is a nuclear-armed, hermit dynasty state. Kim Jong-un conducted intensive missile tests throughout the year, including ICBMs and a reconnaissance satellite, and reached military cooperation agreements with Putin. Hacker groups like Lazarus generate billions through cryptocurrency theft. The AI sector is virtually nonexistent, but cyber attack capabilities are formidable. The vast majority of the population lives in poverty and information blackout.

dynasty.zh: 改革时代（Reformasi）

capital.zh: 雅加达（计划迁都至努桑塔拉）

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国，总统为国家元首兼政府首脑。人民协商会议（MPR）、人民代表会议（DPR）与地方代表理事会（DPD）构成立法体系。
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic; the president is both head of state and government. The People's Consultative Assembly (MPR), People's Representative Council (DPR), and Regional Representative Council (DPD) form the legislative system.

socialStructure.zh: 全球最大穆斯林人口国家，华人经济影响力深远，新兴数字经济中产阶级快速壮大，城乡与岛际发展差距显著。
socialStructure.en: The world's largest Muslim-majority nation; Chinese-Indonesian economic influence is deep; a new digital economy middle class is rapidly growing; significant urban-rural and inter-island development gaps.

rulingClass.zh: 总统与执政联盟政党、军方（TNI）余威犹在、华人财团与本土商业精英、伊斯兰组织领袖。
rulingClass.en: President and ruling coalition parties, military (TNI) with residual influence, Chinese-Indonesian conglomerates and indigenous business elites, Islamic organization leaders.

succession.zh: 总统由全民直选产生，任期五年，可连任一次。2024年大选将产生佐科继任者。
succession.en: The president is directly elected for a five-year term, renewable once. The 2024 election will determine Jokowi's successor.

structure.zh: 总统制。中央政府设34个部委，人民代表会议（DPR，575席）为主要立法机关，宪法法院行使违宪审查权。
structure.en: Presidential system. The central government has 34 ministries; the People's Representative Council (DPR, 575 seats) is the main legislature; the Constitutional Court exercises judicial review.

function.zh: 管理电信监管、数字经济政策、网络内容管控与数据保护。
function.en: Manages telecommunications regulation, digital economy policy, online content moderation, and data protection.

function.zh: 管理国家预算、税收政策、国债发行与宏观经济稳定。
function.en: Manages the national budget, tax policy, sovereign debt issuance, and macroeconomic stability.

function.zh: 制定国防政策、管理军队预算与国防采购。
function.en: Formulates defense policy, manages military budgets, and defense procurement.

name.zh: 研究与技术部/国家研究创新署（BRIN）

function.zh: 整合全国科研资源，推进国家研究议程与创新生态建设。
function.en: Consolidates national research resources, advancing the national research agenda and innovation ecosystem.

localAdmin.zh: 全国分38个省（含5个特别地区），省下设县/市，村级为基层行政单元。2019年以来地方自治权扩大。
localAdmin.en: Divided into 38 provinces (including 5 special regions); provinces contain regencies/cities; villages are grassroots units. Local autonomy expanded since 2019.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系为主，伊斯兰法在亚齐省适用，习惯法（adat）在部分地区仍有效力。宪法法院自2003年起行使违宪审查。
legalSystem.en: Primarily civil law; Islamic law applies in Aceh province; customary law (adat) retains force in some areas. The Constitutional Court has exercised judicial review since 2003.

taxationSystem.zh: 个人所得税（最高35%）、公司税（22%）、增值税（11%）。税收征管效率偏低，非正规经济比重大。
taxationSystem.en: Personal income tax (top rate 35%), corporate tax (22%), VAT (11%). Tax collection efficiency is low, with a large informal economy.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（约87%，全球最大穆斯林人口）、基督教（约10%）、印度教（巴厘岛）、佛教
religion.en: Islam (~87%, world's largest Muslim population), Christianity (~10%), Hinduism (Bali), Buddhism

philosophy.zh: 建国五原则（Pancasila）：信仰上帝、人道主义、国家统一、民主与社会公正。伊斯兰温和派传统与多元共存。
philosophy.en: Pancasila (Five Principles): belief in God, humanitarianism, national unity, democracy, and social justice. Moderate Islamic tradition coexists with pluralism.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（印尼语/马来语基础），各地方语言使用多种传统文字
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Indonesian/Malay base); various traditional scripts for regional languages

culturalAchievements.zh: 婆罗浮屠与布兰班南寺庙群（世界遗产）、巴厘岛文化旅游、蜡染（batik）艺术、甘美兰音乐、全球美食（沙爹、巴东饭）。
culturalAchievements.en: Borobudur and Prambanan temple complexes (World Heritage), Bali cultural tourism, batik art, gamelan music, globally popular cuisine (satay, rendang).
