languageFamily.zh: 南岛语系（印尼语为国家通用语，700+地方语言）
languageFamily.en: Austronesian (Indonesian as the national language; 700+ regional languages)

displayNote.zh: 2023年名义GDP约1.32万亿美元，东南亚最大经济体
displayNote.en: 2023 nominal GDP approximately $1.32 trillion, Southeast Asia's largest economy

gdpDescription.zh: 东南亚最大经济体与G20成员，大宗商品（棕榈油、镍、煤炭）与国内消费驱动增长。数字经济快速崛起，GoTo与Tokopedia合并后成为区域超级平台。
gdpDescription.en: Southeast Asia's largest economy and G20 member, driven by commodities (palm oil, nickel, coal) and domestic consumption. The digital economy is rapidly rising; GoTo (post-merger with Tokopedia) has become a regional super-platform.

mainIndustries.zh: 棕榈油加工、镍矿开采与冶炼、煤炭、纺织服装、汽车组装、数字经济（电商/网约车/金融科技）、旅游业
mainIndustries.en: Palm oil processing, nickel mining and smelting, coal, textiles and garments, automobile assembly, digital economy (e-commerce/ride-hailing/fintech), tourism

tradeGoods.zh: 棕榈油、镍（全球最大生产国）、煤炭、天然气、纺织品、橡胶、电子产品组装
tradeGoods.en: Palm oil, nickel (world's largest producer), coal, natural gas, textiles, rubber, electronics assembly

householdWealth.zh: 中产阶级快速壮大（约8000万人），但贫富差距与地区差距显著。爪哇岛集中全国约60%经济活动。
householdWealth.en: The middle class is rapidly growing (~80 million), but wealth inequality and regional disparities are significant. Java concentrates ~60% of national economic activity.

tradeRoutes.zh: 对华贸易第一（镍/棕榈油出口），对日/对美/对印度贸易重要，马六甲海峡与巽他海峡为关键航运通道。
tradeRoutes.en: China is the top trade partner (nickel/palm oil exports); Japan, US, and India trade is significant; the Straits of Malacca and Sunda are critical shipping lanes.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济体制，政府通过国有企业（BUMN）控制关键行业（能源、矿业、银行），外资准入逐步放宽，镍出口禁令推动下游加工产业化。
economicSystem.en: Mixed economy; the government controls key sectors (energy, mining, banking) through state-owned enterprises (BUMN); foreign investment access gradually widening; nickel export ban promotes downstream industrialization.

source.zh: 非税收入（矿业/国企分红）

category.zh: 基础设施（含努桑塔拉新首都）

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备约1370亿美元，印尼央行持有约78吨黄金储备。财政纪律较好，债务水平可控。
treasuryDescription.en: Foreign reserves approximately $137 billion; Bank Indonesia holds about 78 tonnes of gold reserves. Good fiscal discipline with manageable debt levels.

displayNote.zh: 政府债务约占GDP的39%，在新兴市场中处于健康水平。
displayNote.en: Government debt approximately 39% of GDP, healthy by emerging-market standards.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政赤字上限3% GDP的法定约束，大力投资基础设施（新首都、高铁）与社会保障，镍下游加工政策推动工业化。
fiscalPolicy.en: Statutory fiscal deficit cap of 3% of GDP; heavy investment in infrastructure (new capital, high-speed rail) and social security; nickel downstream processing policy drives industrialization.

description.zh: 群岛国家最大军种，负责领土防御与内部安全，正推进最低必要力量建设。
description.en: The archipelago nation's largest branch, handling territorial defense and internal security, pursuing Minimum Essential Force development.

description.zh: 守护全球最大群岛水域，潜艇与巡逻舰队扩充中，纳土纳群岛巡逻加强。
description.en: Guards the world's largest archipelagic waters; expanding submarine and patrol fleets; intensified Natuna Islands patrols.

description.zh: 装备F-16与苏-27/30战机，计划采购法国阵风或美制F-15EX以替换老旧机队。
description.en: Equipped with F-16 and Su-27/30 fighters; planning to procure French Rafales or US F-15EX to replace aging fleet.

technology.zh: 军事技术以进口为主（美/俄/法/韩装备混合），国产中型坦克（Harimau）与护卫舰取得进展，KFX/IFX五代机项目（与韩国合作）推进中。
technology.en: Military technology primarily imported (mixed US/Russian/French/Korean equipment); domestic medium tank (Harimau) and frigate programs progressing; KFX/IFX fifth-gen fighter project (with South Korea) advancing.

threats.zh: 南海纳土纳群岛与中国专属经济区重叠争议、分裂主义（巴布亚）、恐怖主义残余（网络化极端组织）。
threats.en: South China Sea Natuna Islands EEZ overlap dispute with China, separatism (Papua), residual terrorism (networked extremist groups).

recentBattles.zh: 无大规模军事冲突，巴布亚地区低烈度治安行动持续，在纳土纳群岛海域加强对中国渔船的执法巡逻。
recentBattles.en: No large-scale military conflict; low-intensity security operations continue in Papua; enhanced enforcement patrols against Chinese fishing vessels in Natuna waters.

populationDescription.zh: 全球第四人口大国，人口年轻（中位年龄约30岁），数字原住民一代推动移动互联网与数字经济增长。
populationDescription.en: The world's fourth most populous nation, with a young population (median age ~30); digital natives drive mobile internet and digital economy growth.

ethnicGroups.zh: 爪哇族（约40%）、巽他族（约16%）、马都拉族（约3%）、华裔印尼人（约3%）及数百个其他族群
ethnicGroups.en: Javanese (~40%), Sundanese (~16%), Madurese (~3%), Chinese-Indonesians (~3%), and hundreds of other ethnic groups

socialClasses.zh: 华人与本土财团精英、城市数字经济新中产、庞大的非正规经济劳动者、农村小农与渔民。
socialClasses.en: Chinese-Indonesian and indigenous conglomerate elites, urban digital economy new middle class, vast informal economy workers, rural smallholders and fishermen.

allies.zh: 东盟核心成员（2023年轮值主席国），与中美均保持友好关系，日本/澳大利亚为重要伙伴。
allies.en: Core ASEAN member (2023 chair); maintains friendly relations with both China and the US; Japan and Australia are important partners.

enemies.zh: 无明确敌对国家，但与中国在纳土纳群岛海域存在摩擦。
enemies.en: No explicit adversaries, but friction with China exists in Natuna Islands waters.

treaties.zh: 《东盟宪章》、RCEP、全面战略伙伴关系（中/美/日/韩/澳），G20成员。
treaties.en: ASEAN Charter, RCEP, Comprehensive Strategic Partnerships (China/US/Japan/Korea/Australia), G20 member.

foreignPolicy.zh: '自由积极'（Bebas Aktif）外交政策，不结盟但积极参与多边机制，2023年成功主办东盟峰会，推动全球南方议程。
foreignPolicy.en: 'Free and active' (Bebas Aktif) foreign policy; non-aligned but actively participates in multilateral mechanisms; successfully hosted the 2023 ASEAN Summit; promoted the Global South agenda.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年成功主办东盟峰会（雅加达），推进南海行为准则磋商，获中美两国元首访问（G20后续），努桑塔拉新首都获国际关注。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Successfully hosted the 2023 ASEAN Summit in Jakarta; advanced South China Sea Code of Conduct consultations; received visits from US and Chinese leaders (G20 follow-up); the new Nusantara capital attracted international attention.

era.zh: 数字经济爆发增长期

keyInnovations.zh: 超级应用平台（GoTo/Gojek+Tokopedia）、移动支付（GoPay/OVO/Dana）、数字银行、镍加工技术升级、雅万高铁（中国合作）。
keyInnovations.en: Super-app platforms (GoTo/Gojek+Tokopedia), mobile payments (GoPay/OVO/Dana), digital banking, nickel processing technology upgrades, Jakarta-Bandung high-speed rail (China cooperation).

infrastructure.zh: 4G网络覆盖主要岛屿，5G在雅加达试点，Palapa Ring海底光缆连接全国群岛，但东部偏远岛屿数字基础设施仍薄弱。
infrastructure.en: 4G coverage across major islands, 5G piloted in Jakarta, Palapa Ring submarine cable connects the archipelago, but digital infrastructure remains weak in remote eastern islands.

policy.zh: 2020年发布《国家AI战略（Stranas KA）》，设定2025年目标：建设AI生态系统、培养人才、推动政务AI应用。但实施进展缓慢。
policy.en: Released the 'National AI Strategy (Stranas KA)' in 2020, targeting 2025: building an AI ecosystem, cultivating talent, promoting government AI applications. Implementation progress has been slow.

regulatoryStance.zh: 数据保护法（PDP Law）于2022年通过，为AI数据治理奠定基础；尚无专门AI法规。
regulatoryStance.en: Personal Data Protection Law (PDP Law) passed in 2022, laying groundwork for AI data governance; no dedicated AI legislation yet.

investmentScale.zh: AI专项投资规模较小（政府投入约数千万美元级别），但数字经济整体投资活跃，GoTo等平台在AI功能上持续投入。
investmentScale.en: Dedicated AI investment is small (government investment in the tens of millions of dollars), but overall digital economy investment is active; platforms like GoTo continue investing in AI features.

keyProducts.zh: Gojek网约车/外卖、Tokopedia电商、GoPay支付、AI驱动推荐系统
keyProducts.en: Gojek ride-hailing/delivery, Tokopedia e-commerce, GoPay payments, AI-driven recommendation systems

keyProducts.zh: 电商平台、Mitra数字微店、AI客服
keyProducts.en: E-commerce platform, Mitra digital kiosk, AI customer service

keyProducts.zh: 数字银行、AI风控、智能客服
keyProducts.en: Digital banking, AI risk management, intelligent customer service

title.zh: 印尼教育文化与研究技术部长（Gojek创始人）
title.en: Minister of Education, Culture, Research and Technology (Gojek founder)

contribution.zh: 作为Gojek创始人转任教育部长，推动教育数字化转型与科技创新人才培养。
contribution.en: Transitioned from founding Gojek to serving as education minister, promoting educational digital transformation and tech innovation talent cultivation.

contribution.zh: 领导GoTo（Gojek+Tokopedia合并体）发展为东南亚最大科技平台之一，推进AI驱动的超级应用生态。
contribution.en: Led GoTo (Gojek+Tokopedia merger) into becoming one of Southeast Asia's largest tech platforms, advancing AI-driven super-app ecosystems.

researchFocus.zh: 印尼语NLP、金融科技风控AI、农业AI（棕榈油产量优化）、物流AI（群岛配送优化）、伊斯兰金融AI。
researchFocus.en: Indonesian NLP, fintech risk-management AI, agricultural AI (palm oil yield optimization), logistics AI (archipelago delivery optimization), Islamic finance AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 雅加达数据中心市场增长迅速（AWS/Google/阿里云/腾讯均已进入），但本土AI计算能力有限。
computeInfrastructure.en: Jakarta's data center market is growing rapidly (AWS/Google/Alibaba Cloud/Tencent all present), but domestic AI computing capability is limited.

talentPool.zh: IT开发者数量庞大但AI专业人才不足，印尼大学（UI）、万隆理工（ITB）、Gadjah Mada大学为主要培养机构。大量人才流向新加坡。
talentPool.en: Large IT developer pool but insufficient AI specialists; Universitas Indonesia (UI), Bandung Institute of Technology (ITB), Gadjah Mada University are key training institutions. Many talents flow to Singapore.

globalRanking.zh: AI竞争力全球排名约40-50位，作为应用市场潜力巨大但原始研发能力不足。
globalRanking.en: AI competitiveness ranked approximately 40th-50th globally; enormous potential as an application market but insufficient original R&D capability.

outlook.zh: 2.77亿人口与高速增长的数字经济为AI应用提供全球最大新兴市场之一，但基础研发薄弱、人才外流与基础设施差距制约发展。
outlook.en: 277 million people and a fast-growing digital economy offer one of the world's largest emerging markets for AI applications, but weak basic R&D, brain drain, and infrastructure gaps constrain development.

strengths.zh: 2.77亿人口红利、全球最大镍生产国、数字经济高速增长、G20成员与地缘战略位置、年轻人口结构。
strengths.en: 277-million population dividend, world's largest nickel producer, rapidly growing digital economy, G20 membership and geostrategic position, young demographics.

weaknesses.zh: 基础设施不足（尤其东部岛屿）、官僚效率低下、非正规经济比重大、教育质量不均、腐败问题。
weaknesses.en: Insufficient infrastructure (especially eastern islands), bureaucratic inefficiency, large informal economy, uneven education quality, corruption.

outlook.zh: 若新首都建设顺利推进且镍下游加工实现工业化升级，印尼有望在2030年前跻身全球前五大经济体。数字经济是最大增长引擎。
outlook.en: If the new capital construction proceeds smoothly and nickel downstream processing achieves industrial upgrading, Indonesia could become a top-five global economy by 2030. The digital economy is the biggest growth engine.

description.zh: 2023年的印度尼西亚是东南亚最大经济体与世界第四人口大国。佐科·维多多总统领导下的改革时代推动基础设施建设（雅万高铁通车）、镍下游加工工业化与数字经济腾飞。GoTo（Gojek+Tokopedia）成为区域超级平台，数字支付渗透率快速提升。努桑塔拉新首都建设引发全球关注。AI领域处于起步阶段，但庞大的人口与数字经济增长提供巨大的应用市场潜力。
description.en: Indonesia in 2023 is Southeast Asia's largest economy and the world's fourth most populous nation. Under President Jokowi's Reformasi era, the country drives infrastructure development (Jakarta-Bandung high-speed rail launched), nickel downstream industrialization, and a digital economy takeoff. GoTo (Gojek+Tokopedia) has become a regional super-platform with rapidly rising digital payment penetration. The Nusantara new capital construction draws global attention. The AI sector is nascent, but a massive population and digital economy growth provide enormous application market potential.

name.zh: 巴基斯坦伊斯兰共和国
巴基斯坦伊斯兰共和国

dynasty.zh: 看守政府过渡期

governmentForm.zh: 联邦议会制共和国，总统为国家元首，总理掌实权，军方在政治中拥有巨大影响力。当前处于大选前看守政府阶段。
governmentForm.en: Federal parliamentary republic with the president as head of state and the prime minister holding executive power. The military wields enormous political influence. Currently under a caretaker government ahead of general elections.

socialStructure.zh: 封建地主阶层、军事—官僚精英与新兴商业中产并存，农村宗族势力仍然强大，城乡差距显著。
socialStructure.en: Feudal landowners, military-bureaucratic elites, and an emerging commercial middle class coexist. Rural clan networks remain powerful, with a stark urban-rural divide.

rulingClass.zh: 军方（尤其是陆军参谋长）、传统政治家族（谢里夫家族、布托家族）与官僚体系共同主导权力格局。
rulingClass.en: The military (especially the Army Chief of Staff), traditional political dynasties (Sharif, Bhutto families), and the bureaucratic establishment jointly dominate the power landscape.

succession.zh: 总理由国民议会多数党领袖出任，总统由议会间接选举，军方对政权更迭有实质干预能力。
succession.en: The PM is the leader of the majority party in the National Assembly; the president is elected indirectly by parliament. The military has substantive ability to influence regime change.

structure.zh: 联邦政府设总理府、各部委及参议院/国民议会两院，司法独立但受政治压力。军方通过三军情报局（ISI）等机构深度介入国家安全与外交决策。
structure.en: The federal government comprises the PM Office, ministries, and a bicameral parliament (Senate and National Assembly). The judiciary is nominally independent but faces political pressure. The military deeply influences security and foreign policy through agencies like the ISI.

function.zh: 统筹联邦行政事务与政策协调，监督各部委工作。
function.en: Coordinates federal executive affairs and policy, overseeing ministries.

function.zh: 管理三军事务与国防预算，实际由联合参谋总部主导作战指挥。
function.en: Manages armed forces affairs and defense budget; operational command is led by the Joint Chiefs of Staff Committee.

function.zh: 负责联邦财政收支、税务政策及IMF贷款谈判。
function.en: Manages federal revenue and expenditure, taxation policy, and IMF loan negotiations.

function.zh: 推动数字化转型与IT产业出口，管理电信监管框架。
function.en: Drives digital transformation and IT industry exports; manages the telecom regulatory framework.

localAdmin.zh: 四个省（旁遮普、信德、开伯尔-普什图、俾路支）各设首席部长与省议会，部落地区与吉尔吉特-巴尔蒂斯坦实行特殊行政。
localAdmin.en: Four provinces (Punjab, Sindh, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Balochistan) each have a chief minister and provincial assembly. Tribal areas and Gilgit-Baltistan have special administrative arrangements.

legalSystem.zh: 以英国普通法为基础，融合伊斯兰教法（沙里亚），联邦沙里亚法院对立法进行伊斯兰合规审查。
legalSystem.en: Based on English common law blended with Islamic Sharia. The Federal Shariat Court reviews legislation for Islamic compliance.

taxationSystem.zh: 以间接税（销售税、关税）为主，直接税征收率低，税基狭窄（税收仅占GDP约10%），严重依赖IMF贷款。
taxationSystem.en: Relies heavily on indirect taxes (sales tax, customs). Direct tax collection is low with a narrow tax base (tax-to-GDP ~10%), creating heavy dependence on IMF loans.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（逊尼派约85%，什叶派约15%），宗教在社会与政治中影响极大
religion.en: Islam (Sunni ~85%, Shia ~15%), religion holds enormous social and political influence

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰思想传统、苏菲派神秘主义与南亚多元文化交融，现代化与保守主义之间张力持续。
philosophy.en: Islamic intellectual traditions, Sufi mysticism blended with South Asian multiculturalism, with ongoing tension between modernization and conservatism.

writingSystem.zh: 纳斯塔利克体乌尔都文字（阿拉伯字母）、英语广泛使用
writingSystem.en: Nastaliq Urdu script (Arabic alphabet), English widely used

culturalAchievements.zh: 乌尔都诗歌文学传统深厚（法伊兹、伊克巴尔），卡瓦利音乐享誉世界，板球为国民运动，手工纺织与珠宝工艺闻名。
culturalAchievements.en: Rich Urdu literary tradition (Faiz, Iqbal), Qawwali music globally renowned, cricket as the national sport, famed textile handicrafts and jewelry.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系印度-伊朗语族（乌尔都语为国语，旁遮普语、普什图语、信德语等地区语言并行）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Indo-Iranian branch (Urdu as national language, with Punjabi, Pashto, Sindhi, and other regional languages)

gdpDescription.zh: 经济面临严重困难，通胀超30%，货币大幅贬值，外汇储备危急，严重依赖IMF紧急贷款（2023年7月获30亿美元备用安排）。
gdpDescription.en: Economy facing severe difficulties with inflation exceeding 30%, sharp currency depreciation, critical forex reserves, and heavy reliance on IMF emergency lending ($3 billion Stand-By Arrangement in July 2023).

mainIndustries.zh: 纺织服装、农业（棉花、小麦、水稻）、IT外包服务、水泥、化肥、汽车组装
mainIndustries.en: Textiles and garments, agriculture (cotton, wheat, rice), IT outsourcing services, cement, fertilizer, auto assembly

tradeGoods.zh: 纺织品、大米、皮革制品、运动用品、手术器械、IT服务出口
tradeGoods.en: Textiles, rice, leather goods, sports equipment, surgical instruments, IT services exports

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富极度不均，地主精英与军方关联商业集团控制大量财富，城市中产有限，农村大量贫困人口。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth is extremely unequal. Landowning elites and military-linked business conglomerates control vast wealth, while the urban middle class is limited and rural poverty widespread.

tradeRoutes.zh: 中巴经济走廊（CPEC）连接瓜达尔港至中国西部，传统贸易面向中东与欧盟纺织品市场。
tradeRoutes.en: The China-Pakistan Economic Corridor (CPEC) links Gwadar Port to western China; traditional trade oriented toward Middle East and EU textile markets.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济体制，国有企业占比较大（军方企业集团广泛涉足商业），私营部门以纺织和IT为主。
economicSystem.en: Mixed economy with significant state-owned enterprises (military conglomerates involved broadly in commerce); the private sector is centered on textiles and IT.

source.zh: 直接税（所得税与财产税）
非税收入（国企分红与特许权费）
source.en: Non-tax revenue (SOE dividends and concession fees)

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备一度跌至仅覆盖不足一个月进口的危急水平，IMF备用贷款安排暂时缓解压力。
treasuryDescription.en: Forex reserves fell to critical levels covering less than one month of imports; the IMF Stand-By Arrangement provided temporary relief.

debtLevel.zh: 公共债务约占GDP 75%，外债约占GDP 30%，债务偿还消耗财政收入超40%。
debtLevel.en: Public debt ~75% of GDP, external debt ~30% of GDP, debt servicing consumes over 40% of fiscal revenue.

fiscalPolicy.zh: IMF要求的紧缩政策主导：提高税率、削减补贴、收紧货币政策以遏制通胀。
fiscalPolicy.en: IMF-mandated austerity dominates: raising tax rates, cutting subsidies, and tightening monetary policy to curb inflation.

description.zh: 南亚最大陆军之一，拥有核武装能力，在国内政治中扮演核心角色。
description.en: One of South Asia's largest armies with nuclear capability; plays a central role in domestic politics.

description.zh: 负责阿拉伯海及瓜达尔港的海上安全。
description.en: Responsible for maritime security in the Arabian Sea and Gwadar Port.

description.zh: 装备F-16与JF-17枭龙战斗机，维持与印度的空中威慑能力。
description.en: Equipped with F-16 and JF-17 Thunder fighters, maintaining air deterrence against India.

commanderInChief.zh: 陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔上将（实际最高军事权力）
commanderInChief.en: Chief of Army Staff General Asim Munir (de facto top military authority)

technology.zh: 拥有核武器（估计165枚弹头）及弹道导弹系统，常规武器依赖中国与土耳其供应，无人机技术发展中。
technology.en: Possesses nuclear weapons (~165 warheads) and ballistic missile systems. Conventional arms depend on Chinese and Turkish supply; drone technology under development.

threats.zh: 印巴克什米尔争端持续、阿富汗边境不稳与TTP恐怖活动、俾路支分离势力。
threats.en: Ongoing India-Pakistan Kashmir dispute, Afghan border instability and TTP terrorist activity, Baloch separatist movements.

recentBattles.zh: 持续开展反恐军事行动，2023年TTP袭击频率上升，俾路支地区安全形势恶化。
recentBattles.en: Ongoing counterterrorism operations; TTP attack frequency increased in 2023; security situation in Balochistan deteriorated.

populationDescription.zh: 世界第五人口大国，人口增长率约2%，年龄结构年轻（中位数22岁），劳动力充裕但就业不足。
populationDescription.en: World's fifth most populous country, ~2% growth rate, young age structure (median 22 years), abundant labor force but underemployment.

ethnicGroups.zh: 旁遮普人（44%）、普什图人（15%）、信德人（14%）、萨拉伊基人（8%）、穆哈吉尔人（7%）、俾路支人（4%）等
ethnicGroups.en: Punjabi (44%), Pashtun (15%), Sindhi (14%), Saraiki (8%), Muhajir (7%), Baloch (4%), and others

socialClasses.zh: 封建地主与军事精英顶层、城市工商中产、城市非正规部门工人、广大农村贫困人口。
socialClasses.en: Feudal landlords and military elite at the top, urban commercial middle class, urban informal sector workers, and a large rural poor population.

allies.zh: 中国（全天候战略合作伙伴）、沙特阿拉伯、土耳其、阿联酋
allies.en: China (all-weather strategic partner), Saudi Arabia, Turkey, UAE

enemies.zh: 与印度因克什米尔与恐怖主义问题长期对立，与阿富汗塔利班政权关系复杂。
enemies.en: Long-standing confrontation with India over Kashmir and terrorism; complex relations with the Afghan Taliban government.

treaties.zh: 中巴经济走廊（CPEC）、上合组织成员、与美国保持有限安全合作。
treaties.en: CPEC, SCO member, limited security cooperation with the US.

foreignPolicy.zh: 深化中巴全天候伙伴关系，平衡美中关系，加强与海湾国家经济联系以获取援助与劳工汇款。
foreignPolicy.en: Deepening all-weather partnership with China, balancing US-China relations, strengthening economic ties with Gulf states for aid and remittances.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年7月获IMF 30亿美元备用贷款安排，中国继续推进CPEC第二阶段投资。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Secured $3 billion IMF Stand-By Arrangement in July 2023; China continues CPEC Phase II investments.

era.zh: 数字化转型初期

keyInnovations.zh: IT外包与软件服务快速增长（年出口超26亿美元），移动支付与数字银行普及（JazzCash、Easypaisa），4G覆盖扩大。
keyInnovations.en: Rapid IT outsourcing and software services growth (exports >$2.6B/year), mobile payment and digital banking adoption (JazzCash, Easypaisa), expanding 4G coverage.

infrastructure.zh: 电力短缺仍是主要瓶颈，CPEC带来的能源与交通基础设施改善中，光纤网络覆盖城市地区。
infrastructure.en: Power shortages remain a major bottleneck; CPEC is improving energy and transport infrastructure; fiber optic networks cover urban areas.

policy.zh: 2023年发布《国家AI政策草案》，成立总统AI委员会，但缺乏具体实施路线图与专项资金。
policy.en: Released a draft National AI Policy in 2023 and established a Presidential AI Committee, but lacks a concrete implementation roadmap and dedicated funding.

regulatoryStance.zh: 尚无AI专项法规，数据保护法律不健全，监管框架处于早期讨论阶段。
regulatoryStance.en: No AI-specific regulations yet; data protection laws are inadequate; regulatory framework at an early discussion stage.

investmentScale.zh: AI专项投资极少，主要依赖国际发展机构项目与少量私人科技投资。
investmentScale.en: Minimal dedicated AI investment, mainly relying on international development agency projects and limited private tech investment.

developer.en: Relies on international platforms (OpenAI API, Google, etc.)

capabilities.zh: 本地AI应用集中于Urdu NLP研究与农业遥感初步探索。
capabilities.en: Local AI applications focus on Urdu NLP research and preliminary agricultural remote sensing.

valuation.zh: 巴基斯坦最大IT企业，市值约5亿美元
valuation.en: Pakistan's largest IT company, market cap ~$500 million

keyProducts.zh: IT外包与数字化转型服务
keyProducts.en: IT outsourcing and digital transformation services

contribution.zh: 推动IT出口增长与数字巴基斯坦愿景。
contribution.en: Drove IT export growth and the Digital Pakistan vision.

researchFocus.zh: 乌尔都语自然语言处理、农业AI应用、基础机器学习教育。
researchFocus.en: Urdu NLP, agricultural AI applications, foundational machine learning education.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 算力基础设施极为有限，无大规模GPU集群，云计算主要依赖国际服务商。
computeInfrastructure.en: Extremely limited compute infrastructure with no large-scale GPU clusters; cloud computing depends primarily on international providers.

talentPool.zh: IT人才库增长迅速（年产约2.5万CS毕业生），但AI专业人才严重外流至海湾与欧美。
talentPool.en: IT talent pool growing rapidly (~25,000 CS graduates/year), but severe brain drain of AI specialists to the Gulf and Western countries.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名较低，在南亚地区落后于印度，AI生态尚未成型。
globalRanking.en: Low global AI ranking, trailing India in South Asia. The AI ecosystem has not yet taken shape.

outlook.zh: 庞大年轻人口与IT外包基础提供潜力，但经济危机、基础设施薄弱与人才外流严重制约AI发展。
outlook.en: Large young population and IT outsourcing base provide potential, but economic crisis, weak infrastructure, and brain drain severely constrain AI development.

strengths.zh: 核武装国家、庞大年轻人口、中巴战略伙伴关系、IT外包增长强劲。
strengths.en: Nuclear-armed state, large young population, China-Pakistan strategic partnership, strong IT outsourcing growth.

weaknesses.zh: 经济危机深重、政治不稳定、极端主义与恐怖威胁、基础设施薄弱、教育与卫生水平低。
weaknesses.en: Deep economic crisis, political instability, extremism and terrorism threats, weak infrastructure, low education and health standards.

outlook.zh: 短期前景严峻，需IMF改革换取稳定；中长期取决于政治改革、教育投入与工业化进程。
outlook.en: Short-term outlook is grim, requiring IMF-linked reforms for stability. Medium-to-long-term depends on political reform, education investment, and industrialization.

description.zh: 2023年的巴基斯坦正经历严重经济危机，通胀高企、外汇枯竭、依赖IMF纾困。看守政府过渡期政治不确定性高，军方继续主导国家安全方向。AI领域处于萌芽阶段。
description.en: Pakistan in 2023 faces a severe economic crisis with rampant inflation, depleted forex reserves, and IMF dependency. Political uncertainty is high during the caretaker transition, and the military continues to dominate national security. The AI sector is embryonic.

dynasty.zh: 人民联盟执政期

governmentForm.zh: 单一制议会民主共和国，总理掌握行政实权，总统为仪式性国家元首，但执政党日益威权化。
governmentForm.en: Unitary parliamentary democratic republic with the PM holding executive power and the president as a ceremonial head. The ruling party has grown increasingly authoritarian.

socialStructure.zh: 服装工厂工人阶层庞大，农村农业人口众多，新兴城市中产日益壮大，社会流动性逐步提高。
socialStructure.en: A large garment factory worker class, substantial rural agricultural population, a growing urban middle class, and gradually improving social mobility.

rulingClass.zh: 人民联盟政治精英、军方、服装业大亨与官僚集团构成权力核心。
rulingClass.en: Awami League political elites, military, garment industry tycoons, and the bureaucratic establishment form the power core.

succession.zh: 总理由国民议会多数党领袖出任，五年一届大选，但反对党指控选举不公。
succession.en: The PM is the majority party leader in parliament; elections every five years, though the opposition alleges electoral manipulation.

structure.zh: 一院制国民议会（Jatiya Sangsad，350席），总理府为行政中枢，设各部委执行政策。
structure.en: Unicameral Jatiya Sangsad (350 seats), with the PM Office as the executive hub and ministries implementing policy.

function.zh: 统筹政策制定与部际协调，监督发展项目。
function.en: Coordinates policy-making and inter-ministerial affairs, oversees development projects.

function.zh: 管理国家财政、预算编制及金融监管。
function.en: Manages national finances, budget formulation, and financial regulation.

function.zh: 负责进出口贸易政策与服装产业促进。
function.en: Responsible for trade policy and garment industry promotion.

function.zh: 推动数字孟加拉愿景，发展IT产业与电子政务。
function.en: Drives the Digital Bangladesh vision, IT industry development, and e-governance.

localAdmin.zh: 八个行政区（division）下设64县、495乡（upazila），联合专区制基层行政。
localAdmin.en: Eight administrative divisions with 64 districts and 495 upazilas forming the grassroots administrative structure.

legalSystem.zh: 以英国普通法为基础，家庭法方面穆斯林与印度教社区分别适用各自宗教法。
legalSystem.en: Based on English common law; family law applies separate religious law for Muslim and Hindu communities.

taxationSystem.zh: 增值税（VAT）与所得税为主，税收征管效率低（税收仅占GDP约8%），出口服装业享受税收优惠。
taxationSystem.en: VAT and income tax are primary; tax administration is inefficient (tax-to-GDP ~8%); export garment industry enjoys tax incentives.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（逊尼派约90%），印度教（约9%），世俗宪法但伊斯兰教为国教
religion.en: Islam (Sunni ~90%), Hinduism (~9%); secular constitution but Islam is the state religion

philosophy.zh: 孟加拉民族主义与世俗主义传统（源于1971年独立运动），苏菲派伊斯兰温和传统。
philosophy.en: Bengali nationalism and secularism tradition (rooted in the 1971 independence movement), moderate Sufi Islamic tradition.

writingSystem.zh: 孟加拉文字（东部纳格利字母变体）
writingSystem.en: Bengali script (eastern Nagari variant)

culturalAchievements.zh: 泰戈尔文学遗产、穆斯林纺织工艺（贾木达尼纱丽）、里克莎艺术、孟加拉新年庆典。
culturalAchievements.en: Tagore's literary legacy, Muslim textile craftsmanship (Jamdani sarees), rickshaw art, Bengali New Year celebrations.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系印度-雅利安语族（孟加拉语为国语与官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Indo-Aryan branch (Bengali as national and official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 亚洲增长最快经济体之一，GDP增速约6%，成衣出口全球第二，但面临外汇储备下降与通胀压力。
gdpDescription.en: One of Asia's fastest-growing economies at ~6% GDP growth, the world's second-largest garment exporter, but facing declining forex reserves and inflation.

mainIndustries.zh: 成衣制造（占出口85%）、纺织、制药、造船、水产养殖、皮革、IT服务
mainIndustries.en: Garment manufacturing (~85% of exports), textiles, pharmaceuticals, shipbuilding, aquaculture, leather, IT services

tradeGoods.zh: 成衣、纺织品、黄麻制品、冷冻虾、制药产品、皮革
tradeGoods.en: Garments, textiles, jute products, frozen shrimp, pharmaceutical products, leather

householdWealth.zh: 贫困率持续下降（2023年约18%），小额信贷覆盖广泛（格莱珉银行模式），但财富集中于少数商业家族。
householdWealth.en: Poverty rate continues to decline (~18% in 2023), with widespread microfinance coverage (Grameen Bank model), but wealth is concentrated among a few business families.

tradeRoutes.zh: 成衣出口至欧盟（最大市场）与北美，从中国进口原材料与机械，海上贸易经吉大港。
tradeRoutes.en: Garment exports to the EU (largest market) and North America, importing raw materials and machinery from China, maritime trade via Chittagong.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济为主导，政府干预较多，出口导向型工业化策略，小额信贷体系享誉全球。
economicSystem.en: Market economy with significant government intervention, export-oriented industrialization strategy, and a globally renowned microfinance system.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备从2021年峰值460亿美元降至约210亿美元，但仍可覆盖约四个月进口。
treasuryDescription.en: Forex reserves declined from a 2021 peak of $46 billion to ~$21 billion, but still cover about four months of imports.

debtLevel.zh: 公共债务约占GDP 39%，总体处于可管理水平，但外债增速较快。
debtLevel.en: Public debt ~39% of GDP, manageable overall, but external debt is growing rapidly.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 注重大型基础设施项目投资（帕德玛大桥、达卡地铁），同时努力扩大税基。
fiscalPolicy.en: Focused on large infrastructure investments (Padma Bridge, Dhaka Metro) while working to expand the tax base.

description.zh: 联合国维和行动主要贡献国之一，参与多项海外维和任务。
description.en: One of the top contributors to UN peacekeeping operations, participating in numerous overseas missions.

description.zh: 保卫孟加拉湾海域与专属经济区，近年扩建潜艇部队。
description.en: Protects Bay of Bengal waters and the exclusive economic zone; recently expanding submarine fleet.

description.zh: 装备规模较小，以防空与国土防御为主。
description.en: Small-scale force focused on air defense and homeland protection.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统（仪式性）/总理（实际控制）

technology.zh: 常规武器以中国与俄罗斯装备为主，两艘明级潜艇增强海上能力，无核武器。
technology.en: Conventional arms mainly from China and Russia, two Ming-class submarines enhancing naval capability, no nuclear weapons.

threats.zh: 罗兴亚难民危机、缅甸边境不稳、气候变化导致的安全威胁、国内伊斯兰极端势力。
threats.en: Rohingya refugee crisis, Myanmar border instability, climate change-induced security threats, domestic Islamic extremist elements.

recentBattles.zh: 无重大军事冲突，持续参与联合国维和任务（包括刚果、马里等地区）。
recentBattles.en: No major military conflicts; ongoing participation in UN peacekeeping missions (including Congo, Mali, and other regions).

populationDescription.zh: 世界人口密度最高的大国之一（约1300人/平方公里），人口增长放缓至约1.0%。
populationDescription.en: One of the most densely populated large countries (~1,300/sq km), population growth slowing to ~1.0%.

ethnicGroups.zh: 孟加拉族（98%）、少数民族（查克马、马尔马等约2%）
ethnicGroups.en: Bengali (98%), ethnic minorities (Chakma, Marma, etc. ~2%)

socialClasses.zh: 服装工厂女工构成庞大底层劳动力，城市中产阶层扩大，海外劳工汇款支撑大量家庭。
socialClasses.en: Female garment factory workers form a massive low-wage labor force, the urban middle class is expanding, and overseas worker remittances support many families.

allies.zh: 印度（主要战略伙伴）、中国（主要投资与军事装备来源）、日本（重要发展援助方）
allies.en: India (key strategic partner), China (major investment and military equipment source), Japan (important development aid provider)

enemies.zh: 与缅甸因罗兴亚难民危机关系紧张，无正式敌国。
enemies.en: Strained relations with Myanmar over the Rohingya refugee crisis; no formal enemies.

treaties.zh: 南盟（SAARC）成员、孟中印缅经济走廊（BCIM）参与方、与日本签订多项发展合作协定。
treaties.en: SAARC member, BCIM Economic Corridor participant, multiple development cooperation agreements with Japan.

foreignPolicy.zh: 在印中之间维持平衡外交，积极争取LDC毕业后的贸易优惠延续，推动气候正义议程。
foreignPolicy.en: Maintains balanced diplomacy between India and China, actively seeks continuation of trade preferences post-LDC graduation, and advocates for climate justice.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年继续推进中国资助的基础设施项目，同时深化与印度合作，美国因民主与人权问题施压。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Continued Chinese-funded infrastructure projects in 2023 while deepening India ties; US pressure over democracy and human rights concerns.

era.zh: 数字化基础建设阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 移动金融服务（bKash全球领先），数字政务推广，IT外包起步（软件出口超14亿美元）。
keyInnovations.en: Mobile financial services (bKash globally leading), digital governance expansion, IT outsourcing emerging (software exports >$1.4 billion).

infrastructure.zh: 帕德玛大桥通车（2022年），达卡地铁一号线运营，光纤到户覆盖扩大但农村网络仍薄弱。
infrastructure.en: Padma Bridge opened (2022), Dhaka Metro Line 1 operational, FTTH expanding but rural internet remains weak.

policy.zh: 纳入「数字孟加拉」2041愿景中的智慧孟加拉计划，但AI专项政策尚未出台。
policy.en: Included in the 'Smart Bangladesh' plan under the Digital Bangladesh 2041 Vision, but dedicated AI policy not yet released.

regulatoryStance.zh: 无AI专项法规，数字安全法因言论自由争议备受批评。
regulatoryStance.en: No AI-specific regulations; the Digital Security Act is criticized for freedom-of-speech concerns.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资极为有限，主要通过世界银行与亚洲开发银行数字化项目间接支持。
investmentScale.en: AI investment is extremely limited, mainly supported indirectly through World Bank and ADB digital projects.

developer.zh: 大学实验室（BUET、达卡大学）开展基础研究
developer.en: University labs (BUET, Dhaka University) conducting basic research

capabilities.zh: 孟加拉语NLP工具、农业与气候预测初步应用。
capabilities.en: Bengali NLP tools, preliminary agricultural and climate prediction applications.

keyProducts.zh: 移动支付与数字金融平台（涉及AI风控）
keyProducts.en: Mobile payment and digital finance platform (incorporating AI risk management)

title.zh: 诺贝尔和平奖得主、格莱珉银行创始人
title.en: Nobel Peace Prize laureate, Grameen Bank founder

affiliation.zh: 格莱珉电信与社会企业体系
affiliation.en: Grameen Telecom and social enterprise ecosystem

contribution.zh: 推动数字金融普惠理念，格莱珉体系为AI金融科技奠定基础。
contribution.en: Championed digital financial inclusion; the Grameen system laid foundations for AI fintech.

researchFocus.zh: 孟加拉语自然语言处理、气候变化预测模型、数字金融风控。
researchFocus.en: Bengali NLP, climate change prediction models, digital finance risk management.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 基本无大规模AI算力设施，依赖国际云服务，国家数据中心建设中。
computeInfrastructure.en: Virtually no large-scale AI compute facilities; reliant on international cloud services; national data center under construction.

talentPool.zh: BUET等高校培养的IT人才基础良好，但AI研究人才稀缺，海外流失严重。
talentPool.en: Good IT talent base from universities like BUET, but AI research talent is scarce with severe overseas drain.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名极低，处于起步阶段，数字金融是唯一亮点领域。
globalRanking.en: Very low global AI ranking, at a nascent stage; digital finance is the only bright spot.

outlook.zh: 数字金融基础与年轻人口提供长期潜力，但需大幅增加AI教育与研究投入。
outlook.en: Digital finance foundation and young population provide long-term potential, but significant increases in AI education and research investment are needed.

strengths.zh: 成衣出口全球第二、GDP高速增长、女性劳动参与率高、小额信贷与数字金融领先。
strengths.en: World's second-largest garment exporter, high GDP growth, high female labor participation, leading microfinance and digital finance.

weaknesses.zh: 政治威权化趋势、气候变化脆弱性极高（海平面上升威胁）、基础设施不足、治理腐败。
weaknesses.en: Authoritarian political trend, extremely high climate vulnerability (sea-level rise threat), inadequate infrastructure, governance corruption.

outlook.zh: 若能维持增长势头并改善治理，有望2026年从最不发达国家毕业；气候变化是最大长期挑战。
outlook.en: If growth momentum and governance improve, LDC graduation is expected by 2026; climate change is the greatest long-term challenge.

description.zh: 2023年的孟加拉国经济增长强劲，成衣出口与数字金融双轮驱动，但面临政治民主倒退、气候脆弱性与外汇压力。AI领域几乎空白，数字金融是唯一技术亮点。
description.en: Bangladesh in 2023 enjoys strong economic growth driven by garment exports and digital finance, but faces democratic backsliding, climate vulnerability, and forex pressures. The AI sector is nearly nonexistent, with digital finance as the sole tech bright spot.

name.zh: 南亚其他国家（斯里兰卡、尼泊尔、不丹、马尔代夫）
name.en: Other South Asian States (Sri Lanka, Nepal, Bhutan, Maldives)

ruler.zh: 拉尼尔·维克拉马辛哈（斯里兰卡总统）

rulerTitle.zh: 各国元首（斯里兰卡总统为代表）
rulerTitle.en: Heads of State (Sri Lanka President as representative)

dynasty.zh: 后危机过渡期（斯里兰卡）/ 联邦制探索期（尼泊尔）

capital.zh: 科伦坡（斯里兰卡）、加德满都（尼泊尔）、廷布（不丹）、马累（马尔代夫）

governmentForm.zh: 斯里兰卡为半总统制、尼泊尔为联邦议会制、不丹为君主立宪制、马尔代夫为总统制共和国，政体多样。
governmentForm.en: Diverse: Sri Lanka is semi-presidential, Nepal is a federal parliamentary republic, Bhutan is a constitutional monarchy, Maldives is a presidential republic.

socialStructure.zh: 各国社会结构差异大：斯里兰卡为中等收入社会（经济危机后中产受创），尼泊尔以农业社区和种姓制度残余为特征，不丹追求国民幸福总值，马尔代夫以旅游业为支柱。
socialStructure.en: Social structures vary greatly: Sri Lanka is a middle-income society (middle class hit by the economic crisis), Nepal features agricultural communities with caste remnants, Bhutan pursues Gross National Happiness, Maldives is tourism-dependent.

rulingClass.zh: 斯里兰卡政治家族与官僚、尼泊尔政党联盟与军方、不丹王室、马尔代夫商业与政治精英。
rulingClass.en: Sri Lankan political dynasties and bureaucrats, Nepalese party coalitions and military, Bhutanese monarchy, Maldivian business and political elites.

succession.zh: 斯里兰卡总统由议会选举产生（2022年特殊情况），尼泊尔总理由议会多数产生，不丹国王世袭制，马尔代夫总统直选。
succession.en: Sri Lanka president elected by parliament (2022 special circumstance), Nepal PM from parliamentary majority, Bhutan monarchy is hereditary, Maldives president by direct election.

structure.zh: 四国政府形态各异。斯里兰卡总统与议会二元体制，尼泊尔联邦-省-地方三级治理，不丹国王与议会共治，马尔代夫集中式总统制。
structure.en: Four distinct government forms. Sri Lanka has a president-parliament dual system, Nepal has three-tier federal-provincial-local governance, Bhutan has king-parliament co-governance, Maldives has centralized presidential rule.

function.zh: 管理经济危机后的财政重建与IMF改革计划执行。
function.en: Managing post-crisis fiscal reconstruction and IMF reform plan implementation.

function.zh: 协调七省联邦治理体制的落实与权力下放。
function.en: Coordinates implementation of seven-province federal governance and power devolution.

function.zh: 以国民幸福总值为导向评估与制定发展政策。
function.en: Evaluates and formulates development policy guided by Gross National Happiness.

function.zh: 管理支柱产业旅游业的发展、营销与环境可持续性。
function.en: Manages development, marketing, and environmental sustainability of the pillar tourism industry.

localAdmin.zh: 斯里兰卡九省制、尼泊尔七省联邦、不丹20宗（dzongkhag）、马尔代夫26环礁行政区。
localAdmin.en: Sri Lanka's nine provinces, Nepal's seven federal provinces, Bhutan's 20 dzongkhags, Maldives' 26 atoll administrative divisions.

legalSystem.zh: 斯里兰卡融合罗马-荷兰法与英国普通法，尼泊尔以成文法典为基础，不丹以佛教法与现代宪法并行，马尔代夫以伊斯兰教法为基础。
legalSystem.en: Sri Lanka blends Roman-Dutch and English common law, Nepal is statute-based, Bhutan combines Buddhist law with modern constitution, Maldives is based on Islamic Sharia.

taxationSystem.zh: 各国税制不同：斯里兰卡正在IMF要求下提高税率（VAT 15%→18%），尼泊尔以海关收入为主，不丹税负极低，马尔代夫依赖旅游税。
taxationSystem.en: Varied tax systems: Sri Lanka raising rates under IMF mandate (VAT 15%→18%), Nepal relies on customs revenue, Bhutan has very low taxes, Maldives depends on tourism taxes.

religion.zh: 佛教（斯里兰卡上座部佛教、不丹藏传佛教）、印度教（尼泊尔）、伊斯兰教（马尔代夫），多元信仰共存
religion.en: Buddhism (Sri Lanka Theravada, Bhutan Vajrayana), Hinduism (Nepal), Islam (Maldives), diverse faiths coexist

philosophy.zh: 上座部佛教非暴力传统、尼泊尔印度教多元主义、不丹国民幸福哲学、马尔代夫岛屿共同体文化。
philosophy.en: Theravada Buddhist nonviolence tradition, Nepalese Hindu pluralism, Bhutan's Gross National Happiness philosophy, Maldivian island community culture.

writingSystem.zh: 僧伽罗文字、泰米尔文字、天城体（尼泊尔）、藏文（不丹宗喀语）、塔纳文字（马尔代夫）
writingSystem.en: Sinhala script, Tamil script, Devanagari (Nepal), Tibetan Uchan (Bhutan Dzongkha), Thaana script (Maldives)

culturalAchievements.zh: 锡吉里耶狮子岩（斯里兰卡）、加德满都杜巴广场（尼泊尔）、虎穴寺（不丹）、水下内阁会议（马尔代夫气候倡导）。
culturalAchievements.en: Sigiriya Lion Rock (Sri Lanka), Kathmandu Durbar Square (Nepal), Tiger's Nest (Bhutan), underwater cabinet meeting (Maldives climate advocacy).

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系（僧伽罗语、尼泊尔语）、达罗毗荼语系（泰米尔语）、藏缅语系（宗喀语）、印度-雅利安语系（迪维希语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European (Sinhala, Nepali), Dravidian (Tamil), Tibeto-Burman (Dzongkha), Indo-Aryan (Dhivehi)

gdpDescription.zh: 斯里兰卡GDP约840亿美元（经济危机后复苏中），尼泊尔约365亿美元，不丹约28亿美元，马尔代夫约66亿美元。整体经济水平有限。
gdpDescription.en: Sri Lanka GDP ~$84B (recovering from crisis), Nepal ~$36.5B, Bhutan ~$2.8B, Maldives ~$6.6B. Overall economic scale is limited.

mainIndustries.zh: 旅游业（马尔代夫/斯里兰卡）、茶叶出口（斯里兰卡）、水电（尼泊尔/不丹）、劳工汇款（尼泊尔）、渔业
mainIndustries.en: Tourism (Maldives/Sri Lanka), tea exports (Sri Lanka), hydropower (Nepal/Bhutan), labor remittances (Nepal), fisheries

tradeGoods.zh: 锡兰红茶、服装、水电电力出口、旅游服务、宝石、香料
tradeGoods.en: Ceylon tea, garments, hydropower electricity exports, tourism services, gems, spices

name.zh: 斯里兰卡卢比/尼泊尔卢比/不丹努扎姆/马尔代夫拉菲亚
name.en: Sri Lankan Rupee / Nepalese Rupee / Bhutanese Ngultrum / Maldivian Rufiyaa

householdWealth.zh: 斯里兰卡中产因经济危机财富大幅缩水，尼泊尔依赖海外劳工汇款（占GDP 25%），不丹贫困率较低（约12%），马尔代夫旅游从业者收入相对较高。
householdWealth.en: Sri Lanka's middle class saw wealth sharply eroded by the crisis; Nepal depends on overseas remittances (~25% of GDP); Bhutan has low poverty (~12%); Maldives tourism workers earn relatively more.

tradeRoutes.zh: 斯里兰卡科伦坡港为印度洋航运枢纽，尼泊尔/不丹贸易依赖印度通道，马尔代夫以海空旅游通道为主。
tradeRoutes.en: Colombo Port is an Indian Ocean shipping hub; Nepal/Bhutan trade depends on Indian transit; Maldives relies on sea and air tourism corridors.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济体制为主，斯里兰卡正实施IMF结构改革，不丹实行国家主导的渐进式发展模式。
economicSystem.en: Mixed economies predominate; Sri Lanka is implementing IMF structural reforms; Bhutan follows a state-guided gradualist development model.

category.zh: 债务偿还（斯里兰卡主导）

unit.zh: 美元等值外汇储备（四国合计）

treasuryDescription.zh: 斯里兰卡2022年外汇耗尽后通过IMF重组恢复中（2023年约40亿美元），尼泊尔储备约100亿美元。
treasuryDescription.en: Sri Lanka recovering after depleting forex in 2022, rebuilding via IMF restructuring (~$4B in 2023); Nepal reserves ~$10B.

debtLevel.zh: 斯里兰卡外债约占GDP 60%（2022年主权违约后重组中），其他国家债务水平较低至中等。
debtLevel.en: Sri Lanka external debt ~60% of GDP (restructuring after 2022 sovereign default); other countries have low to moderate debt.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 斯里兰卡执行IMF紧缩方案（增税减支），尼泊尔温和扩张，不丹依靠水电收入审慎管理，马尔代夫加大旅游相关投资。
fiscalPolicy.en: Sri Lanka implements IMF austerity (tax hikes, spending cuts); Nepal is moderately expansionary; Bhutan prudently manages on hydropower revenue; Maldives increases tourism-related investment.

description.zh: 内战后维持庞大军队规模，陆军为主力，近年转向海上安全。
description.en: Maintains a large force post-civil war, army-dominated, shifting toward maritime security in recent years.

description.zh: 联合国维和行动重要贡献国，同时负责国内灾害救援。
description.en: Major UN peacekeeping contributor, also responsible for domestic disaster relief.

description.zh: 小型防御力量，国防依赖印度安全保障。
description.en: Small defensive force; national defense relies on Indian security guarantees.

description.zh: 以海岸巡逻与海上安全为主要职能。
description.en: Primarily focused on coast patrol and maritime security.

commanderInChief.zh: 各国总统/总理分别统帅（斯里兰卡总统为三军统帅）
commanderInChief.en: Respective presidents/PMs as commanders-in-chief (Sri Lanka president as supreme commander)

technology.zh: 常规轻武器与装甲车辆为主，无核武器，依赖印度、中国与西方的军事援助。
technology.en: Primarily conventional light arms and armored vehicles, no nuclear weapons, dependent on military aid from India, China, and the West.

threats.zh: 斯里兰卡后内战族群紧张、尼泊尔边境争端与政治不稳、马尔代夫面临印中地缘博弈。
threats.en: Post-civil-war ethnic tensions in Sri Lanka, Nepal border disputes and political instability, Maldives caught in India-China geopolitical competition.

recentBattles.zh: 无重大军事冲突，斯里兰卡2022年民众起义后社会趋稳。
recentBattles.en: No major military conflicts; Sri Lanka stabilizing after the 2022 popular uprising.

populationDescription.zh: 四国合计约5300万人口：斯里兰卡2200万、尼泊尔3000万、不丹78万、马尔代夫52万。
populationDescription.en: Combined ~53 million: Sri Lanka 22M, Nepal 30M, Bhutan 780K, Maldives 520K.

ethnicGroups.zh: 僧伽罗人与泰米尔人（斯里兰卡）、尼瓦尔人与各种姓群体（尼泊尔）、竺巴人与洛昌人（不丹）、迪维希人（马尔代夫）
ethnicGroups.en: Sinhalese and Tamils (Sri Lanka), Newar and various caste groups (Nepal), Ngalop and Lhotshampa (Bhutan), Dhivehi (Maldives)

socialClasses.zh: 斯里兰卡城市中产受经济危机冲击严重，尼泊尔种姓等级残余，不丹社会相对平等，马尔代夫旅游城乡二元结构。
socialClasses.en: Sri Lanka's urban middle class hit hard by the crisis; Nepal retains caste hierarchy remnants; Bhutan is relatively egalitarian; Maldives has a tourism-driven urban-rural duality.

allies.zh: 印度（南亚安全保障主导）、中国（基础设施投资）、日本（发展援助）
allies.en: India (South Asian security guarantor), China (infrastructure investment), Japan (development aid)

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但地缘上处于印中竞争前沿，各国在两大国间维持平衡。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, but geopolitically at the frontline of India-China competition; each country balances between the two powers.

treaties.zh: 南盟（SAARC）成员、各国与印度有双边安全与贸易协议，斯里兰卡参与「一带一路」。
treaties.en: SAARC members; bilateral security and trade agreements with India; Sri Lanka participates in the Belt and Road Initiative.

foreignPolicy.zh: 斯里兰卡努力在印中间保持平衡（汉班托塔港争议），尼泊尔/不丹外交亲印但加强与中国联系，马尔代夫亲印政策。
foreignPolicy.en: Sri Lanka balances between India and China (Hambantota Port controversy); Nepal/Bhutan diplomatically close to India but strengthening China ties; Maldives pursues pro-India policy.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年斯里兰卡与中国、印度分别进行债务重组谈判；马尔代夫亲印候选人穆伊兹当选总统。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Sri Lanka conducted debt restructuring talks with China and India in 2023; pro-India candidate Muizzu elected Maldives president.

era.zh: 数字化初期阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 斯里兰卡IT外包增长、尼泊尔移动支付普及（eSewa）、不丹国民幸福指数数字化评估系统、马尔代夫智慧旅游应用。
keyInnovations.en: Sri Lanka IT outsourcing growth, Nepal mobile payment adoption (eSewa), Bhutan's digital GNH assessment system, Maldives smart tourism applications.

infrastructure.zh: 斯里兰卡基础设施较好（中国援建），尼泊尔受地形限制严重，不丹正推进数字化转型，马尔代夫面临海平面上升基建挑战。
infrastructure.en: Sri Lanka has better infrastructure (Chinese-built); Nepal severely constrained by terrain; Bhutan is pursuing digital transformation; Maldives faces sea-level rise infrastructure challenges.

policy.zh: 各国均无正式AI国家战略，斯里兰卡将AI纳入数字经济规划讨论，尼泊尔关注基础数字素养。
policy.en: None of the countries has a formal national AI strategy; Sri Lanka includes AI in digital economy planning discussions; Nepal focuses on basic digital literacy.

regulatoryStance.zh: 无AI专项法规，数据保护与网络安全立法处于早期阶段。
regulatoryStance.en: No AI-specific regulations; data protection and cybersecurity legislation at early stages.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资几乎为零，依赖国际发展援助中的数字化项目。
investmentScale.en: AI investment is virtually zero, relying on digital components within international development aid.

developer.zh: 高校与国际合作初步研究
developer.en: Preliminary research through universities and international collaboration

capabilities.zh: 斯里兰卡莫拉图瓦大学等开展僧伽罗语/泰米尔语NLP基础研究。
capabilities.en: University of Moratuwa and others conduct foundational Sinhala/Tamil NLP research.

keyProducts.zh: 开源中间件与API管理平台
keyProducts.en: Open-source middleware and API management platform

contribution.zh: 打造斯里兰卡最大科技企业，推动南亚开源技术生态。
contribution.en: Built Sri Lanka's largest tech company, promoting the South Asian open-source tech ecosystem.

researchFocus.zh: 本地语言NLP、灾害预警AI系统、旅游推荐算法、水电优化。
researchFocus.en: Local language NLP, disaster early-warning AI systems, tourism recommendation algorithms, hydropower optimization.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 基本无AI专用算力设施，依赖国际云服务。
computeInfrastructure.en: Virtually no AI-dedicated compute facilities; reliant on international cloud services.

talentPool.zh: 斯里兰卡IT人才质量较好但规模有限（经济危机后大量外流），其他国家AI人才极为稀缺。
talentPool.en: Sri Lanka has decent IT talent quality but limited scale (mass emigration after crisis); AI talent is extremely scarce in other countries.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名极低，处于最初期探索阶段。
globalRanking.en: Very low global AI ranking, at the earliest exploration stage.

outlook.zh: 短期内AI发展极为有限，需优先解决经济危机与基础设施问题；长期可在旅游科技与灾害预警领域寻求利基。
outlook.en: AI development extremely limited in the short term, needing to prioritize economic recovery and infrastructure; long-term niche opportunities in tourism tech and disaster early warning.

strengths.zh: 斯里兰卡战略位置与人力素质、尼泊尔水电潜力、不丹可持续发展理念、马尔代夫旅游品牌全球知名。
strengths.en: Sri Lanka's strategic location and human capital, Nepal's hydropower potential, Bhutan's sustainable development philosophy, Maldives' globally recognized tourism brand.

weaknesses.zh: 斯里兰卡经济危机余波、尼泊尔基础设施极差、整体经济规模小、气候脆弱性高（马尔代夫面临存亡威胁）。
weaknesses.en: Sri Lanka's economic crisis aftermath, Nepal's extremely poor infrastructure, small overall economic scale, high climate vulnerability (Maldives faces existential threat).

outlook.zh: 斯里兰卡若IMF改革成功可逐步复苏，各国面临印中地缘竞争带来的机遇与风险。
outlook.en: Sri Lanka may gradually recover if IMF reforms succeed; all face opportunities and risks from India-China geopolitical competition.

description.zh: 2023年南亚小国群体处境各异：斯里兰卡从2022年经济崩溃中艰难恢复，尼泊尔政治碎片化但保持增长，不丹坚持独特的幸福发展模式，马尔代夫在气候威胁下依赖旅游。AI发展几乎为零。
description.en: South Asian smaller states in 2023 face varied situations: Sri Lanka painfully recovers from 2022 economic collapse, Nepal is politically fragmented but growing, Bhutan adheres to its unique happiness model, and Maldives relies on tourism under climate threat. AI development is virtually nonexistent.

name.zh: 土耳其共和国与高加索地区
土耳其共和国与高加索地区

ruler.zh: 雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安

dynasty.zh: 正义与发展党（AKP）执政期

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国（2017年修宪后权力高度集中于总统），高加索三国形态各异：阿塞拜疆威权制、格鲁吉亚议会制、亚美尼亚议会制。
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic (power highly concentrated in the presidency since the 2017 constitutional reform). The three Caucasus states differ: Azerbaijan authoritarian, Georgia parliamentary, Armenia parliamentary.

socialStructure.zh: 土耳其城市化水平较高的多元社会，安纳托利亚保守阶层与伊斯坦布尔都会自由派并存，库尔德少数民族问题长期存在。
socialStructure.en: Turkey is a highly urbanized pluralistic society with coexisting Anatolian conservatives and Istanbul metropolitan liberals; the long-standing Kurdish minority issue persists.

rulingClass.zh: 埃尔多安与AKP核心圈、军方（影响力减弱）、亲政府商业精英、伊斯兰保守派宗教领袖。
rulingClass.en: Erdoğan and the AKP inner circle, military (diminished influence), pro-government business elites, and Islamist conservative religious leaders.

succession.zh: 总统由直选产生，任期五年可连任一次（埃尔多安通过修宪重置任期限制），议会选举与总统选举同步。
succession.en: President elected by direct vote for five-year terms, renewable once (Erdoğan reset term limits via constitutional reform). Parliamentary and presidential elections are simultaneous.

structure.zh: 总统制下总统兼任政府首脑，取消总理职位，600席大国民议会行使立法权。总统直接任命部长与高级法官。
structure.en: Under the presidential system, the president serves as head of government (PM position abolished). The 600-seat Grand National Assembly holds legislative power. The president directly appoints ministers and senior judges.

function.zh: 统揽行政权力，直辖各部委与多个政策委员会。
function.en: Oversees all executive power, directly supervising ministries and multiple policy committees.

function.zh: 管理北约第二大常备军及国防工业现代化。
function.en: Manages NATO's second-largest standing army and defense industry modernization.

function.zh: 管理财政政策与货币稳定（里拉大幅贬值后），执行新的正统经济政策。
function.en: Manages fiscal policy and currency stability (after severe lira depreciation), implementing new orthodox economic policies.

function.zh: 推动工业化、科技创新与国防工业发展，管理科技园区与研发激励。
function.en: Promotes industrialization, tech innovation, and defense industry development; manages technology parks and R&D incentives.

localAdmin.zh: 土耳其81省由中央任命省长治理，30个大都市设市长直选。高加索各国分别设省/区行政体系。
localAdmin.en: Turkey's 81 provinces governed by centrally appointed governors; 30 metropolitan cities have directly elected mayors. Caucasus countries have separate provincial/district systems.

legalSystem.zh: 土耳其以大陆法系为基础（瑞士民法典影响），世俗法律体系，但近年伊斯兰保守政策影响增强。
legalSystem.en: Turkey uses a civil law system (influenced by the Swiss Civil Code), secular legal framework, but Islamist conservative policy influence has grown in recent years.

taxationSystem.zh: 增值税（18%）与所得税为主，公司税22%，科技园区企业享受税收优惠。
taxationSystem.en: VAT (18%) and income tax as primary sources, 22% corporate tax, with technology park enterprises enjoying tax incentives.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教逊尼派为主（99%穆斯林），世俗宪法传统与伊斯兰保守主义持续张力
religion.en: Sunni Islam predominant (99% Muslim), with ongoing tension between secular constitutional tradition and Islamic conservatism

philosophy.zh: 凯末尔世俗主义遗产与奥斯曼伊斯兰传统并存，突厥民族主义、泛突厥主义思潮活跃。
philosophy.en: Kemalist secularism legacy coexists with Ottoman Islamic tradition; Turkish nationalism and pan-Turkism ideologies remain active.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母土耳其语（1928年文字改革），高加索各国使用各自字母系统
writingSystem.en: Latin-script Turkish (1928 script reform); Caucasus countries use their respective writing systems

culturalAchievements.zh: 奥斯曼建筑遗产（圣索菲亚、蓝色清真寺）、土耳其电视剧全球风靡、高加索多元文化（格鲁吉亚葡萄酒、亚美尼亚教堂建筑）。
culturalAchievements.en: Ottoman architectural heritage (Hagia Sophia, Blue Mosque), Turkish TV dramas globally popular, Caucasus cultural diversity (Georgian wine, Armenian church architecture).

languageFamily.zh: 突厥语系（土耳其语、阿塞拜疆语）、南高加索语系（格鲁吉亚语）、印欧语系（亚美尼亚语）
languageFamily.en: Turkic (Turkish, Azerbaijani), South Caucasian (Georgian), Indo-European (Armenian)

gdpDescription.zh: 土耳其GDP约1.1万亿美元（G20成员），2023年通胀超60%，里拉持续贬值，新经济团队（西姆谢克）推行正统政策。高加索三国GDP合计约1000亿美元。
gdpDescription.en: Turkey's GDP ~$1.1 trillion (G20 member), 2023 inflation exceeding 60%, persistent lira depreciation, new economic team (Şimşek) pursuing orthodox policies. Combined Caucasus GDP ~$100 billion.

mainIndustries.zh: 汽车制造、纺织、电子、国防工业（无人机）、旅游、农业、建筑、钢铁、阿塞拜疆石油天然气
mainIndustries.en: Automotive, textiles, electronics, defense industry (drones), tourism, agriculture, construction, steel, Azerbaijan oil and gas

tradeGoods.zh: 汽车及零部件、纺织品、钢材、Bayraktar无人机出口、旅游服务、阿塞拜疆石油
tradeGoods.en: Vehicles and parts, textiles, steel, Bayraktar drone exports, tourism services, Azerbaijani oil

householdWealth.zh: 中产阶级因里拉贬值与高通胀购买力大幅下降，房地产成为主要保值工具，美元化趋势明显。
householdWealth.en: Middle-class purchasing power sharply eroded by lira depreciation and high inflation; real estate serves as a key store of value; dollarization trend pronounced.

tradeRoutes.zh: 欧盟（最大贸易伙伴）、俄罗斯天然气进口、中东贸易通道、博斯普鲁斯海峡国际航运咽喉要道。
tradeRoutes.en: EU (largest trading partner), Russian natural gas imports, Middle East trade corridor, Bosporus Strait as a critical international shipping chokepoint.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济为主，国家在国防工业与基建中干预较多，2023年回归正统经济政策（加息至40%+）。
economicSystem.en: Primarily market economy with significant state intervention in defense industry and infrastructure; 2023 return to orthodox economics (interest rates hiked to 40%+).

treasuryDescription.zh: 央行总储备约1000亿美元，但净储备一度为负，2023年下半年通过加息与资本流入逐步恢复。
treasuryDescription.en: Central bank gross reserves ~$100 billion, but net reserves were briefly negative; gradually recovering in H2 2023 through rate hikes and capital inflows.

debtLevel.zh: 土耳其公共债务约占GDP 30%，在新兴市场中较低，但企业外债较重。
debtLevel.en: Turkey's public debt ~30% of GDP, low among emerging markets, but corporate external debt is substantial.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 2023年2月大地震后财政扩张用于重建，同时新经济团队推行紧缩货币政策以控制通胀。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal expansion for reconstruction after the February 2023 earthquake, while the new economic team pursues tight monetary policy to control inflation.

description.zh: 北约第二大常备陆军，具备跨境作战能力（叙利亚、利比亚部署经验）。
description.en: NATO's second-largest standing army, with cross-border operational capability (deployed in Syria and Libya).

description.zh: 控制博斯普鲁斯海峡要冲，正建造两栖攻击舰与国产潜艇。
description.en: Controls the Bosporus chokepoint, building amphibious assault ships and indigenous submarines.

description.zh: 装备F-16机队，因S-400采购被排除F-35项目，推进国产KAAN战斗机研发。
description.en: Operates F-16 fleet, excluded from F-35 program due to S-400 purchase, advancing indigenous KAAN fighter development.

description.zh: Bayraktar TB2成为全球明星武器，已向乌克兰等20多国出口。
description.en: Bayraktar TB2 became a global sensation weapon, exported to over 20 countries including Ukraine.

technology.zh: 国防工业快速崛起——Bayraktar无人机全球畅销、国产KAAN五代机研发、Altay主战坦克、导弹系统国产化推进。
technology.en: Defense industry rapidly rising — Bayraktar drones global bestseller, indigenous KAAN fifth-gen fighter under development, Altay main battle tank, missile system indigenization progressing.

threats.zh: 库尔德武装（PKK/YPG）、叙利亚内战外溢、与希腊的爱琴海争端、高加索不稳定（阿亚冲突）。
threats.en: Kurdish militants (PKK/YPG), Syrian civil war spillover, Aegean disputes with Greece, Caucasus instability (Azerbaijan-Armenia conflict).

recentBattles.zh: 持续在叙利亚北部和伊拉克北部进行反PKK军事行动，支持阿塞拜疆2023年夺回纳卡地区。
recentBattles.en: Ongoing anti-PKK military operations in northern Syria and Iraq, supported Azerbaijan's 2023 retaking of Nagorno-Karabakh.

populationDescription.zh: 土耳其约8500万人口，含高加索三国约1500万。土耳其人口结构较年轻但老龄化加速。
populationDescription.en: Turkey ~85 million, with the three Caucasus countries adding ~15 million. Turkey's population is relatively young but aging is accelerating.

ethnicGroups.zh: 土耳其人（70-75%）、库尔德人（18-20%）、阿塞拜疆人、格鲁吉亚人、亚美尼亚人等
ethnicGroups.en: Turks (70-75%), Kurds (18-20%), Azerbaijanis, Georgians, Armenians, and others

socialClasses.zh: 伊斯坦布尔与安纳托利亚新兴中产、亲政府商业精英（AKP关联企业）、城市世俗精英、库尔德东南部欠发达社区。
socialClasses.en: Istanbul and Anatolian emerging middle class, pro-government business elites (AKP-linked enterprises), urban secular elites, underdeveloped Kurdish southeastern communities.

allies.zh: 北约成员但关系紧张、阿塞拜疆（最亲密盟友）、与俄罗斯保持务实关系、与中国经济合作增加
allies.en: NATO member but with strained relations, Azerbaijan (closest ally), pragmatic relations with Russia, increasing economic cooperation with China

enemies.zh: 与PKK/YPG长期敌对、与希腊/塞浦路斯海洋争端、与亚美尼亚历史恩怨。
enemies.en: Long-standing hostility with PKK/YPG, maritime disputes with Greece/Cyprus, historical grievances with Armenia.

treaties.zh: 北约成员、欧盟候选国（实际冻结）、与阿塞拜疆《舒沙宣言》军事同盟。
treaties.en: NATO member, EU candidate (effectively frozen), military alliance with Azerbaijan under the Shusha Declaration.

foreignPolicy.zh: 在美俄之间维持平衡外交，推动突厥世界整合，利用博斯普鲁斯海峡与黑海粮食协议杠杆作用。
foreignPolicy.en: Balancing between the US and Russia, promoting Turkic world integration, leveraging the Bosporus Strait and Black Sea Grain Initiative.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年5月埃尔多安赢得大选连任，批准瑞典加入北约（以争取F-16现代化交易），调停俄乌粮食协议。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Erdoğan won re-election in May 2023, ratified Sweden's NATO accession (seeking F-16 modernization deal), mediated Russia-Ukraine grain deal.

era.zh: 国防科技快速崛起期

keyInnovations.zh: Bayraktar无人机系列全球领先、KAAN五代战斗机原型、TOGG国产电动汽车量产、卫星通信系统。
keyInnovations.en: Bayraktar drone series globally leading, KAAN fifth-gen fighter prototype, TOGG domestic electric vehicle mass production, satellite communication systems.

infrastructure.zh: 大型基建项目密集（伊斯坦布尔新机场、海底隧道、高铁网络），但2023年2月大地震暴露建筑质量问题。
infrastructure.en: Intensive mega-infrastructure projects (Istanbul new airport, undersea tunnel, high-speed rail), but the February 2023 earthquake exposed construction quality issues.

policy.zh: 2021年发布《国家AI战略》（2021-2025），设定增强AI研发、人才培养与产业应用目标。
policy.en: Released the National AI Strategy (2021-2025) in 2021, setting goals for AI R&D, talent development, and industrial applications.

regulatoryStance.zh: 无AI专项法规，个人数据保护法（KVKK）为主要相关法律，关注欧盟AI法案动向。
regulatoryStance.en: No AI-specific legislation; the Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK) is the main relevant law; monitoring EU AI Act developments.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资约5亿美元级别，主要来自国防工业与科技园区，TUBITAK科研基金支持基础研究。
investmentScale.en: AI investment at ~$500 million level, mainly from defense industry and tech parks, with TUBITAK research grants supporting basic research.

capabilities.zh: 无人机自主飞行与目标识别AI系统，军用AI应用领先。
capabilities.en: Autonomous flight and target recognition AI systems for drones, leading military AI applications.

valuation.zh: 非上市，估值数十亿美元
valuation.en: Private, valued at several billion dollars

keyProducts.zh: Bayraktar TB2/TB3无人机、Kızılelma无人战斗机
keyProducts.en: Bayraktar TB2/TB3 drones, Kızılelma unmanned combat aircraft

keyProducts.zh: 电子战系统、雷达、通信设备，集成AI辅助决策系统
keyProducts.en: Electronic warfare, radar, communications equipment, AI-assisted decision systems

name.zh: 塞尔楚克·巴伊拉克塔尔

title.en: CTO and Chairman of Baykar Technologies

contribution.zh: 将Baykar打造为全球无人机领导者，推动AI在军事无人系统中的应用。
contribution.en: Built Baykar into a global drone leader, driving AI applications in military unmanned systems.

researchFocus.zh: 军用AI（自主无人系统、目标识别）、自然语言处理（土耳其语）、智慧城市、国防工业AI集成。
researchFocus.en: Military AI (autonomous unmanned systems, target recognition), NLP (Turkish), smart cities, defense industry AI integration.

computeInfrastructure.zh: TUBITAK ULAKBIM提供高性能计算，私营云计算增长，但远未达全球前沿水平。
computeInfrastructure.en: TUBITAK ULAKBIM provides HPC; private cloud computing growing, but far from global frontier levels.

talentPool.zh: METU、Bilkent等高校培养的工程人才基础良好，但顶尖AI人才流失至欧美。
talentPool.en: Good engineering talent base from METU, Bilkent, and other universities, but top AI talent drains to Europe and the US.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名约第20-25位，军用AI（无人机）领域全球领先，民用AI有待发展。
globalRanking.en: Global AI ranking ~20th-25th; globally leading in military AI (drones), civilian AI needs further development.

outlook.zh: 国防AI持续领先，民用AI需克服经济不确定性与人才外流挑战。
outlook.en: Defense AI continues to lead; civilian AI must overcome economic uncertainty and brain drain challenges.

strengths.zh: 北约军事大国、独特地缘战略位置（欧亚桥梁）、国防工业崛起（无人机全球领先）、年轻人口。
strengths.en: Major NATO military power, unique geostrategic position (Eurasian bridge), rising defense industry (global drone leader), young population.

weaknesses.zh: 高通胀与货币贬值、民主倒退担忧、库尔德问题、地震灾后重建负担、与西方盟友关系紧张。
weaknesses.en: High inflation and currency depreciation, democratic backsliding concerns, Kurdish issue, earthquake reconstruction burden, strained Western alliance relations.

outlook.zh: 若经济正统化政策奏效且地缘外交灵活性持续，土耳其将巩固区域大国地位；AI在国防领域将继续突破。
outlook.en: If orthodox economic policies succeed and geopolitical flexibility persists, Turkey will consolidate its regional power status; AI will continue to break through in defense.

description.zh: 2023年的土耳其在经济困境与地缘博弈中维持大国姿态：埃尔多安连任、北约关系微妙、国防工业（Bayraktar无人机）全球瞩目。高加索地区阿塞拜疆收回纳卡、格鲁吉亚亲欧、亚美尼亚转向西方。AI在军事无人系统领域表现突出。
description.en: Turkey in 2023 maintains great power ambitions amid economic difficulty and geopolitical maneuvering: Erdoğan re-elected, delicate NATO relations, defense industry (Bayraktar drones) in the global spotlight. In the Caucasus, Azerbaijan retook Nagorno-Karabakh, Georgia leans European, Armenia turns westward. AI excels in military unmanned systems.

ruler.zh: 阿里·哈梅内伊（最高领袖）/ 易卜拉欣·莱希（总统）

dynasty.zh: 伊斯兰共和国体制（1979年革命后）

governmentForm.zh: 神权共和制，最高领袖凌驾于三权之上，宪法监护委员会审查候选人与立法，总统掌行政权但受最高领袖制约。
governmentForm.en: Theocratic republic where the Supreme Leader stands above all three branches. The Guardian Council vets candidates and legislation. The president holds executive power but is constrained by the Supreme Leader.

socialStructure.zh: 革命卫队经济帝国、什叶派教士阶层与巴扎商人构成权力精英，城市中产与青年群体不满情绪高涨。
socialStructure.en: The IRGC economic empire, Shia clerical class, and bazaar merchants form the power elite; urban middle class and youth discontent is rising sharply.

rulingClass.zh: 最高领袖办公室、革命卫队（IRGC）高层、宪法监护委员会成员与高级教士构成核心权力圈。
rulingClass.en: The Supreme Leader's office, IRGC senior command, Guardian Council members, and senior clerics form the core power circle.

succession.zh: 最高领袖由专家会议选出（终身制），总统由直选产生但候选人须经宪法监护委员会审查。
succession.en: The Supreme Leader is selected by the Assembly of Experts (lifetime tenure); the president is directly elected but candidates must be vetted by the Guardian Council.

structure.zh: 双头体制：最高领袖控制军事、司法、媒体与外交大政方针；总统领导内阁处理日常行政。专家会议、宪法监护委员会、确定国家利益委员会构成宪政架构。
structure.en: Dual executive: Supreme Leader controls military, judiciary, media, and grand foreign policy; president leads the cabinet for routine governance. Assembly of Experts, Guardian Council, and Expediency Discernment Council form the constitutional framework.

function.zh: 国家最高决策中心，控制军队、司法任命与国家安全政策。
function.en: Supreme decision-making center, controlling the military, judicial appointments, and national security policy.

function.zh: 保卫伊斯兰革命体制，控制弹道导弹、核项目、海外代理人网络，并深度涉足经济领域。
function.en: Safeguards the Islamic revolutionary system, controls ballistic missiles, nuclear program, proxy networks, and is deeply involved in the economy.

function.zh: 管理石油天然气产业——国家经济命脉，协调OPEC政策与制裁规避出口。
function.en: Manages the oil and gas industry — the national economic lifeline, coordinating OPEC policy and sanctions-evading exports.

function.zh: 管理电信基础设施与互联网审查体系，推动国家信息网络（SHOMA）建设。
function.en: Manages telecom infrastructure and internet censorship, promoting the national information network (SHOMA).

localAdmin.zh: 31省由中央任命省长治理，市级设民选市政委员会。
localAdmin.en: 31 provinces governed by centrally appointed governors; cities have elected municipal councils.

legalSystem.zh: 以什叶派伊斯兰教法为基础的法律体系，宪法监护委员会确保所有立法符合伊斯兰教法与宪法。
legalSystem.en: Legal system based on Shia Islamic jurisprudence; the Guardian Council ensures all legislation conforms to Sharia and the constitution.

taxationSystem.zh: 石油收入为主要财政来源，增值税（9%）与企业税为辅，制裁下财政高度依赖能源出口。
taxationSystem.en: Oil revenue is the primary fiscal source, supplemented by VAT (9%) and corporate tax; under sanctions, the budget is heavily energy-export dependent.

religion.zh: 什叶派伊斯兰教（国教，约90-95%），逊尼派少数（5-10%），琐罗亚斯德教、犹太教等微量
religion.en: Shia Islam (state religion, ~90-95%), Sunni minority (5-10%), small Zoroastrian, Jewish, and other communities

philosophy.zh: 什叶派政治伊斯兰（法基赫监护制）、波斯文明遗产、苏菲派神秘主义传统、现代改革主义思潮受压制。
philosophy.en: Shia political Islam (Guardianship of the Jurist), Persian civilizational heritage, Sufi mysticism tradition, with modern reformist thought suppressed.

writingSystem.zh: 波斯-阿拉伯字母（波斯语，法尔西文）
writingSystem.en: Perso-Arabic script (Persian, Farsi)

culturalAchievements.zh: 波斯诗歌传统（哈菲兹、鲁米）、伊斯法罕建筑瑰宝、波斯细密画、电影（阿斯加尔·法尔哈迪奥斯卡获奖）、波斯地毯。
culturalAchievements.en: Persian poetry tradition (Hafez, Rumi), Isfahan architectural treasures, Persian miniature painting, cinema (Asghar Farhadi Oscar winner), Persian carpets.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系伊朗语族（波斯语为官方语言，阿塞拜疆语、库尔德语等少数民族语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Iranian branch (Persian as official, Azerbaijani, Kurdish, and other minority languages)

gdpDescription.zh: 制裁下经济承压但韧性较强，2023年石油出口回升（中国为主要买家），通胀约40%，里亚尔持续贬值。
gdpDescription.en: Economy under sanctions pressure but showing resilience; 2023 oil exports recovered (China as main buyer), ~40% inflation, rial continues to depreciate.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气（占出口80%+）、石化、汽车制造、钢铁、水泥、农业、IRGC控制的建筑与工程企业
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas (80%+ of exports), petrochemicals, automotive, steel, cement, agriculture, IRGC-controlled construction and engineering firms

tradeGoods.zh: 原油、石化产品、钢铁、开心果、藏红花、波斯地毯、汽车零部件
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil, petrochemical products, steel, pistachios, saffron, Persian carpets, auto parts

householdWealth.zh: 中产阶级购买力因制裁与通胀严重缩水，IRGC关联经济体控制大量国家财富，贫富差距扩大。
householdWealth.en: Middle-class purchasing power severely eroded by sanctions and inflation; IRGC-linked economic entities control vast national wealth; inequality widening.

tradeRoutes.zh: 对华石油出口（制裁规避渠道）、对土耳其与伊拉克贸易、波斯湾航运通道、国际金融系统隔离下的灰色经济。
tradeRoutes.en: Oil exports to China (sanctions evasion channels), trade with Turkey and Iraq, Persian Gulf shipping lanes, gray economy under international financial isolation.

economicSystem.zh: 国家主导型混合经济，革命卫队控制约30%经济活动，石油收入为财政支柱，制裁催生庞大灰色经济。
economicSystem.en: State-dominated mixed economy; IRGC controls ~30% of economic activity; oil revenue as fiscal pillar; sanctions have spawned a massive gray economy.

source.zh: 其他（国企与基金会收入）

unit.zh: 美元等值外汇储备（大部分被冻结）
unit.en: US dollar equivalent forex reserves (largely frozen)

treasuryDescription.zh: 名义外汇储备约200亿-300亿美元，但大部分被西方制裁冻结，可使用储备极为有限。
treasuryDescription.en: Nominal forex reserves ~$20-30 billion, but most frozen by Western sanctions; accessible reserves are extremely limited.

debtLevel.zh: 外债很低（约占GDP 3%），但国内财政因补贴负担沉重，隐性债务难以精确估算。
debtLevel.en: External debt is very low (~3% of GDP), but domestic finances are burdened by subsidies; implicit debt is hard to estimate precisely.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 大规模能源与食品补贴维持社会稳定，油价波动直接影响财政收支，正缓慢推进补贴改革。
fiscalPolicy.en: Massive energy and food subsidies maintain social stability; oil price fluctuations directly impact fiscal balance; subsidy reform progressing slowly.

description.zh: 精锐军事力量，控制弹道导弹、海外特种作战（圣城旅）与核设施保卫。
description.en: Elite military force controlling ballistic missiles, overseas special operations (Quds Force), and nuclear facility security.

description.zh: 常规武装力量，负责国土防御，装备相对老旧但通过逆向工程持续升级。
description.en: Conventional armed forces for territorial defense; equipment is relatively dated but continuously upgraded through reverse engineering.

description.zh: 准军事动员力量，用于国内安全控制与抗议镇压。
description.en: Paramilitary mobilization force used for domestic security and protest suppression.

technology.zh: 弹道导弹技术区域领先、无人机技术（向俄罗斯供应Shahed-136）、核浓缩能力（接近武器级）、网络战能力较强。
technology.en: Regionally leading ballistic missile technology, drone technology (supplied Shahed-136 to Russia), nuclear enrichment capability (near weapons grade), significant cyber warfare capacity.

threats.zh: 与以色列/美国的对抗、核问题国际压力、内部反政府运动、ISIS残余。
threats.en: Confrontation with Israel/US, international pressure over nuclear program, internal anti-government movements, ISIS remnants.

recentBattles.zh: 通过代理人参与中东冲突（支持真主党、胡塞武装、哈马斯），2023年10月后间接介入以巴冲突升级。
recentBattles.en: Engaged in Middle East conflicts through proxies (Hezbollah, Houthis, Hamas); indirectly involved in the Israel-Palestine escalation after October 2023.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约8700万，增长率降至约1%，城市化率高（约76%），受过高等教育的年轻人失业率极高。
populationDescription.en: Population ~87 million, growth rate down to ~1%, high urbanization (~76%), extremely high unemployment among educated youth.

ethnicGroups.zh: 波斯人（61%）、阿塞拜疆人（16%）、库尔德人（10%）、卢尔人（6%）、阿拉伯人（2%）等
ethnicGroups.en: Persian (61%), Azerbaijani (16%), Kurdish (10%), Lur (6%), Arab (2%), and others

socialClasses.zh: 革命卫队经济精英、教士阶层、巴扎商人、城市受教育中产（受压制）、农村与城市边缘贫困人口。
socialClasses.en: IRGC economic elite, clerical class, bazaar merchants, educated urban middle class (suppressed), and rural and urban-fringe poor.

allies.zh: 中国（石油主要买家）、俄罗斯（军事合作加深）、叙利亚阿萨德政权、真主党、胡塞武装
allies.en: China (primary oil buyer), Russia (deepening military cooperation), Assad regime in Syria, Hezbollah, Houthis

enemies.zh: 美国（全面制裁）、以色列（长期敌对）、沙特阿拉伯（地区竞争但2023年复交）。
enemies.en: US (comprehensive sanctions), Israel (long-standing hostility), Saudi Arabia (regional rivalry but restored ties in 2023).

treaties.zh: 上合组织正式成员（2023年）、中伊25年全面合作协议、与俄罗斯军事技术合作。
treaties.en: Full SCO member (2023), China-Iran 25-year comprehensive cooperation agreement, military-technical cooperation with Russia.

foreignPolicy.zh: 「抵抗轴心」战略——通过代理人网络在中东扩展影响力，深化与中俄东向外交，核谈判陷入僵局。
foreignPolicy.en: "Axis of Resistance" strategy — expanding influence in the Middle East through proxy networks, deepening eastward diplomacy with China and Russia, nuclear negotiations stalled.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年3月中国斡旋下与沙特复交，加入上合组织与金砖集团（2024年正式加入），10月后哈马斯袭击引发地区危机。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Restored Saudi ties in March 2023 via Chinese mediation, joined SCO and BRICS (formally joining 2024); Hamas attack in October triggered regional crisis.

era.zh: 制裁下的自主技术发展期

keyInnovations.zh: 弹道导弹与无人机技术（Shahed系列出口俄罗斯）、核浓缩技术（60%纯度）、网络战能力、卫星发射能力。
keyInnovations.en: Ballistic missile and drone technology (Shahed series exported to Russia), nuclear enrichment (60% purity), cyber warfare capability, satellite launch capability.

infrastructure.zh: 石油天然气基础设施老化（缺乏外国投资维护），国家互联网受严格审查与限速，铁路与公路网络尚可。
infrastructure.en: Aging oil and gas infrastructure (lacking foreign investment for maintenance), national internet under strict censorship and throttling, adequate rail and road networks.

policy.zh: 发布《国家AI战略文件》，由科技副总统府协调，但缺乏实质资金与制裁下的技术获取渠道。
policy.en: Released a National AI Strategy document, coordinated by the Vice Presidency for Science and Technology, but lacking substantial funding and technology access under sanctions.

regulatoryStance.zh: AI监管主要关注国内互联网控制与信息安全，尚无系统性AI治理框架。
regulatoryStance.en: AI regulation mainly focuses on domestic internet control and information security; no systematic AI governance framework yet.

investmentScale.zh: 受制裁影响AI投资规模极小，主要依靠政府科研预算与大学自有资金。
investmentScale.en: AI investment very small due to sanctions, mainly relying on government research budgets and university own funds.

developer.zh: 德黑兰大学、谢里夫理工大学
developer.en: University of Tehran, Sharif University of Technology

capabilities.zh: 波斯语文本处理、情感分析与基础对话系统。
capabilities.en: Persian text processing, sentiment analysis, and basic dialogue systems.

keyProducts.zh: 伊朗最大出行平台，应用AI进行路径优化与需求预测
keyProducts.en: Iran's largest ride-hailing platform, applying AI for route optimization and demand prediction

contribution.zh: 培养大量AI研究人才（许多移民海外），开展波斯语NLP与计算机视觉研究。
contribution.en: Trains a large number of AI research talents (many emigrate), conducting Persian NLP and computer vision research.

researchFocus.zh: 波斯语NLP、计算机视觉、军事AI应用（无人机目标识别）、医疗AI。
researchFocus.en: Persian NLP, computer vision, military AI applications (drone target recognition), medical AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 制裁下无法获取高端GPU（NVIDIA芯片被禁），算力严重受限，依靠国内组装与灰色市场渠道。
computeInfrastructure.en: Unable to obtain high-end GPUs under sanctions (NVIDIA chips banned); compute severely constrained, relying on domestic assembly and gray market channels.

talentPool.zh: 谢里夫理工、德黑兰大学等培养高质量STEM人才，但人才外流极为严重（全球最高脑力流失国之一）。
talentPool.en: Sharif University, University of Tehran, and others produce high-quality STEM talent, but brain drain is extreme (among the world's highest).

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名约第25-30位，学术论文产出不低但工业化应用受制裁严重制约。
globalRanking.en: Global AI ranking ~25th-30th; academic paper output is not low, but industrial application is severely constrained by sanctions.

outlook.zh: 制裁解除前AI发展空间极为有限，人才外流持续侵蚀研究基础；军事AI领域可能有隐性进展。
outlook.en: AI development space extremely limited until sanctions are lifted; brain drain continues to erode the research base; hidden progress possible in military AI.

strengths.zh: 区域军事实力强大（导弹与代理人网络）、石油天然气资源丰富、STEM教育基础扎实、战略地理位置。
strengths.en: Strong regional military power (missiles and proxy networks), abundant oil and gas resources, solid STEM education base, strategic geographic location.

weaknesses.zh: 全面制裁严重制约经济与技术、严重脑力外流、政教合一体制内部矛盾、高通胀与货币崩溃。
weaknesses.en: Comprehensive sanctions severely constrain economy and tech, extreme brain drain, internal contradictions in the theocratic system, high inflation and currency collapse.

outlook.zh: 短期在「抵抗经济」下勉力维持，中东代理人战争风险升高；长期前景取决于制裁走向与内部改革可能性。
outlook.en: Sustaining in the short term under a 'resistance economy,' with rising Middle East proxy war risks; long-term prospects depend on sanctions trajectory and reform possibilities.

description.zh: 2023年的伊朗在制裁围困与地缘博弈中维持「抵抗经济」运转。2022年头巾抗议运动遭镇压后社会表面平静，核浓缩持续推进至接近武器级，10月哈马斯袭击后「抵抗轴心」成为焦点。AI受制裁严重制约，但学术人才质量不容忽视。
description.en: Iran in 2023 maintains a 'resistance economy' under sanctions and geopolitical maneuvering. After the 2022 hijab protests were suppressed, society is outwardly calm; nuclear enrichment continues near weapons grade; the 'Axis of Resistance' became a focus after the October Hamas attack. AI is severely constrained by sanctions, but academic talent quality should not be underestimated.

dynasty.zh: 后美军撤离联合政府时期

governmentForm.zh: 联邦议会制共和国，总统为仪式性元首（库尔德人担任），总理（什叶派）掌行政权，库尔德斯坦地区享有高度自治。
governmentForm.en: Federal parliamentary republic with a ceremonial president (Kurdish), a Shia PM holding executive power, and Kurdistan Region enjoying broad autonomy.

socialStructure.zh: 教派—族群分裂主导社会结构：什叶派阿拉伯人（60%）主导政治，逊尼派阿拉伯人（20%）被边缘化，库尔德人（15%）享自治。
socialStructure.en: Sectarian-ethnic divisions dominate: Shia Arabs (~60%) dominate politics, Sunni Arabs (~20%) are marginalized, Kurds (~15%) enjoy autonomy.

rulingClass.zh: 什叶派政党联盟（受伊朗影响）、库尔德两大家族（巴尔扎尼与塔拉巴尼）、什叶派民兵领袖。
rulingClass.en: Shia party coalition (Iran-influenced), two Kurdish families (Barzani and Talabani), Shia militia leaders.

succession.zh: 总理由议会最大政团推举，需经教派与族群配额式协商形成联合政府。
succession.en: PM nominated by the largest parliamentary bloc, requiring sectarian and ethnic quota-based negotiations to form a coalition government.

structure.zh: 联邦议会（329席）、联邦政府与库尔德斯坦地区政府并行。权力分配按教派-族群配额制（muhassasa）运作。
structure.en: Federal parliament (329 seats), federal government, and Kurdistan Regional Government (KRG) in parallel. Power is distributed through a sectarian-ethnic quota system (muhassasa).

function.zh: 统筹联邦行政，协调安全部队与民兵武装的整合。
function.en: Coordinates federal administration and integration of security forces with militias.

function.zh: 管理全球第五大石油储量的开采与出口，占财政收入90%以上。
function.en: Manages extraction and export of the world's fifth-largest oil reserves, accounting for over 90% of fiscal revenue.

function.zh: 管理国内安全与警察力量，面临民兵武装整合挑战。
function.en: Manages domestic security and police forces, facing challenges in militia integration.

localAdmin.zh: 18省制（含库尔德斯坦三省），库尔德地区享有独立的议会、安全部队与财政体系。
localAdmin.en: 18 governorates (including three Kurdistan provinces). The Kurdish region has its own parliament, security forces, and fiscal system.

legalSystem.zh: 以伊斯兰教法为主要法源的民法体系，库尔德斯坦地区立法享有独立性。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system with Islamic law as a principal source; Kurdistan Region has legislative independence.

taxationSystem.zh: 几乎完全依赖石油出口收入（占预算92%+），非石油税收极为薄弱。
taxationSystem.en: Almost entirely dependent on oil export revenue (92%+ of budget); non-oil tax collection is extremely weak.

religion.zh: 什叶派伊斯兰教（60-65%）、逊尼派伊斯兰教（32-37%）、基督教与雅兹迪教等少数
religion.en: Shia Islam (60-65%), Sunni Islam (32-37%), Christianity, Yazidism, and other minorities

philosophy.zh: 两河文明遗产与阿拉伯伊斯兰传统交融，什叶派阿舒拉仪式文化深厚，部落忠诚仍然重要。
philosophy.en: Mesopotamian heritage blended with Arab Islamic tradition, deep Shia Ashura ritual culture, tribal loyalty remains significant.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字（阿拉伯语为官方语言）、库尔德文（索拉尼方言使用阿拉伯字母）
writingSystem.en: Arabic script (Arabic as official language), Kurdish script (Sorani dialect uses Arabic letters)

culturalAchievements.zh: 两河文明（巴比伦、亚述）遗产、阿拔斯王朝巴格达「智慧宫」遗产、伊斯兰书法、什叶派宗教建筑（卡尔巴拉、纳杰夫圣城）。
culturalAchievements.en: Mesopotamian (Babylon, Assyria) heritage, Abbasid Baghdad 'House of Wisdom' legacy, Islamic calligraphy, Shia holy cities (Karbala, Najaf).

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系闪语族（阿拉伯语为主）、印欧语系伊朗语族（库尔德语）
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic, Semitic branch (Arabic primary), Indo-European, Iranian branch (Kurdish)

gdpDescription.zh: 石油单一经济体，2023年受OPEC+减产影响GDP增速放缓。石油占出口和财政收入90%以上，经济多元化极度缓慢。
gdpDescription.en: Oil-dependent monoeconomy; 2023 GDP growth slowed due to OPEC+ production cuts. Oil accounts for 90%+ of exports and fiscal revenue; economic diversification is extremely slow.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气（绝对主导）、建筑、农业（伊拉克北部）、少量制造业
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas (absolutely dominant), construction, agriculture (northern Iraq), limited manufacturing

tradeGoods.zh: 原油（占出口99%）、少量椰枣与农产品
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil (~99% of exports), small amounts of dates and agricultural products

householdWealth.zh: 贫困率约25%，庞大的公务员体系（460万人）消耗财政，石油财富集中于政治精英与民兵关联企业。
householdWealth.en: Poverty rate ~25%; a massive civil service (4.6 million) drains the budget; oil wealth concentrated among political elites and militia-linked enterprises.

tradeRoutes.zh: 石油经南部巴士拉港与土耳其杰伊汉管道出口，从伊朗、土耳其与中国大量进口消费品。
tradeRoutes.en: Oil exported via the southern Basra port and Turkey's Ceyhan pipeline; heavy consumer goods imports from Iran, Turkey, and China.

economicSystem.zh: 国家主导型石油经济，私营部门极为薄弱，腐败严重，大规模公务员就业计划替代市场就业。
economicSystem.en: State-dominated oil economy with an extremely weak private sector, severe corruption, and massive civil service employment programs substituting for market-based jobs.

treasuryDescription.zh: 央行外汇储备约900亿美元（得益于高油价积累），但2023年预算赤字庞大（投资性支出增加）。
treasuryDescription.en: Central bank forex reserves ~$90 billion (built during high oil prices), but the 2023 budget deficit is large due to increased investment spending.

debtLevel.zh: 外债约占GDP 28%，内部债务另加约15%，石油价格下跌时债务风险急剧上升。
debtLevel.en: External debt ~28% of GDP, with ~15% additional domestic debt; debt risk rises sharply when oil prices fall.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 2023年通过史上最大预算（1980亿美元三年预算），扩大公务员就业与基建投资，但高度依赖油价维持。
fiscalPolicy.en: Passed a record budget in 2023 ($198 billion three-year budget), expanding civil service employment and infrastructure investment, but highly dependent on oil prices.

description.zh: 美国训练与装备的常规地面力量，反ISIS战斗后正重建中。
description.en: US-trained and equipped conventional ground forces, rebuilding after anti-ISIS combat.

description.zh: 以什叶派民兵为主的准军事力量，名义纳入国家安全体系，实际多受伊朗影响。
description.en: Predominantly Shia paramilitary force, nominally integrated into national security but largely Iran-influenced.

name.zh: 库尔德自治区武装（佩什梅格）

description.zh: 库尔德斯坦地区自治武装力量，反ISIS作战中发挥重要作用。
description.en: Kurdistan Region autonomous armed force, played a key role in anti-ISIS operations.

technology.zh: 美制M1A1坦克与F-16战机、俄制装备混用，PMF使用伊朗制武器，整体技术水平不高。
technology.en: US-made M1A1 tanks and F-16 jets mixed with Russian equipment; PMF uses Iranian weapons; overall technology level modest.

threats.zh: ISIS残余势力、PMF与国家军队权力竞争、伊朗影响力渗透、库尔德独立倾向。
threats.en: ISIS remnants, PMF-military power competition, Iranian influence penetration, Kurdish independence tendencies.

recentBattles.zh: 持续清剿ISIS残余（主要在安巴尔省与迪亚拉省），驻伊美军基地2023年后频遭亲伊朗民兵火箭弹袭击。
recentBattles.en: Ongoing ISIS remnant clearing (mainly in Anbar and Diyala), US bases in Iraq hit by frequent pro-Iran militia rocket attacks after October 2023.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约4300万，增长率约2.3%（高于区域平均），中位年龄仅20岁，青年失业率极高。
populationDescription.en: Population ~43 million, ~2.3% growth rate (above regional average), median age only 20, extremely high youth unemployment.

ethnicGroups.zh: 什叶派阿拉伯人（60-65%）、逊尼派阿拉伯人（15-20%）、库尔德人（15-20%）、土库曼人、亚述基督徒、雅兹迪人等
ethnicGroups.en: Shia Arabs (60-65%), Sunni Arabs (15-20%), Kurds (15-20%), Turkmen, Assyrian Christians, Yazidis, and others

socialClasses.zh: 石油政治精英与民兵领袖、庞大但低效的公务员阶层、城市失业青年、战后流离失所人口。
socialClasses.en: Oil-political elites and militia leaders, a massive but inefficient civil servant class, unemployed urban youth, post-war displaced populations.

allies.zh: 伊朗（什叶派同盟与深度政治影响）、美国（安全伙伴但矛盾日增）、土耳其（经济伙伴但有北部军事入侵争议）
allies.en: Iran (Shia alliance and deep political influence), US (security partner but growing tensions), Turkey (economic partner but disputed northern military incursions)

enemies.zh: ISIS残余势力，与以色列无外交关系，库尔德自治区独立倾向导致内部张力。
enemies.en: ISIS remnants, no diplomatic relations with Israel, internal tension from Kurdish autonomy and independence tendencies.
