treaties.zh: 美伊战略框架协议（驻军基础）、OPEC成员、与伊朗和土耳其有安全合作机制。
treaties.en: US-Iraq Strategic Framework Agreement (basing for US troops), OPEC member, security cooperation mechanisms with Iran and Turkey.

foreignPolicy.zh: 苏达尼政府寻求在美国与伊朗之间保持平衡，利用石油外交修复阿拉伯世界关系。
foreignPolicy.en: The al-Sudani government seeks to balance between the US and Iran, leveraging oil diplomacy to repair Arab world relations.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年推动「发展之路」铁路项目（连接巴士拉至土耳其与欧洲），10月后驻伊美军频遭亲伊朗武装袭击。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Promoted the 'Development Road' railway project (Basra to Turkey and Europe) in 2023; US forces in Iraq frequently attacked by pro-Iran groups after October.

era.zh: 战后重建与基础数字化阶段
era.en: Post-war reconstruction and basic digitalization stage

keyInnovations.zh: 移动支付初步推广、电子政务起步、石油行业引进国际先进开采技术。
keyInnovations.en: Initial mobile payment rollout, e-governance starting, oil industry adopting advanced international extraction technology.

infrastructure.zh: 战争破坏后重建缓慢，电力短缺严重（夏季断电频繁），互联网覆盖扩大但速度慢，道路与桥梁修复中。
infrastructure.en: Post-war reconstruction slow; severe power shortages (frequent summer outages); internet coverage expanding but slow; roads and bridges under repair.

policy.zh: 无国家AI战略，科技政策关注基础IT普及而非前沿技术。
policy.en: No national AI strategy; technology policy focuses on basic IT adoption rather than frontier technology.

regulatoryStance.zh: 无AI相关法规，网络治理以内容审查为主。
regulatoryStance.en: No AI-related regulations; internet governance focuses on content censorship.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资几乎为零，私营科技部门极为薄弱。
investmentScale.en: AI investment is virtually zero; the private tech sector is extremely weak.

capabilities.zh: 仅有少量大学进行基础机器学习教学与研究。
capabilities.en: Only a few universities conduct basic machine learning teaching and research.

valuation.zh: 伊拉克最大电信运营商

keyProducts.zh: 移动通信与初步数字化服务
keyProducts.en: Mobile communications and preliminary digital services

name.zh: 库尔德斯坦IT创业者群体

title.zh: 埃尔比勒科技创业生态

contribution.zh: 埃尔比勒有小规模但活跃的科技创业社区，是伊拉克最具技术活力的地区。
contribution.en: Erbil has a small but active tech startup community, the most technologically dynamic area in Iraq.

researchFocus.zh: 基础IT教育、石油行业数据分析初步探索。
researchFocus.en: Basic IT education, preliminary oil industry data analytics exploration.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 无AI专用算力，数据中心建设极为初步，依赖不稳定的国家电网。
computeInfrastructure.en: No AI-dedicated compute; data center construction extremely preliminary, dependent on an unstable national power grid.

talentPool.zh: STEM人才因战争与不稳定大量外流，大学教育质量下降，AI人才极度匮乏。
talentPool.en: STEM talent has massively emigrated due to war and instability; university education quality has declined; AI talent is critically scarce.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名极低，基本不在国际AI地图上。
globalRanking.en: Very low global AI ranking, essentially absent from the international AI map.

outlook.zh: 未来数年AI发展可能性极低，需先解决电力、安全与基础教育等根本性问题。
outlook.en: AI development prospects extremely low for the coming years; fundamental issues like electricity, security, and basic education must be addressed first.

strengths.zh: 全球第五大石油储量、年轻人口结构、2023年安全形势相对改善。
strengths.en: World's fifth-largest oil reserves, young population structure, relatively improved security situation in 2023.

weaknesses.zh: 极度依赖石油、教派政治分裂、腐败严重（全球透明度排名倒数）、伊朗影响力过大、基础设施破败。
weaknesses.en: Extreme oil dependence, sectarian political fragmentation, severe corruption (near bottom of global transparency rankings), excessive Iranian influence, dilapidated infrastructure.

outlook.zh: 若油价维持高位且安全持续改善，可推进基础设施重建；结构性改革（去石油化、反腐、教派和解）前景不明。
outlook.en: If oil prices stay high and security continues improving, infrastructure rebuilding can advance; prospects for structural reform (de-oilification, anti-corruption, sectarian reconciliation) are unclear.

description.zh: 2023年的伊拉克在石油财富与教派裂痕中维持脆弱稳定。苏达尼政府推进大规模基建预算，但PMF民兵力量与伊朗影响力构成治理挑战。10月后中东局势升级使驻伊美军基地频遭火箭弹袭击。AI发展在战后伊拉克几乎不存在。
description.en: Iraq in 2023 maintains fragile stability amid oil wealth and sectarian fissures. The al-Sudani government pursues a massive infrastructure budget, but PMF militia power and Iranian influence pose governance challenges. Post-October Middle East escalation saw frequent rocket attacks on US bases in Iraq. AI development is virtually nonexistent in post-war Iraq.

name.zh: 黎凡特地区（以色列、巴勒斯坦、约旦、黎巴嫩、叙利亚）
name.en: Levant States (Israel, Palestine, Jordan, Lebanon, Syria)

ruler.zh: 本雅明·内塔尼亚胡（以色列总理）为区域最强国领导人
ruler.en: Benjamin Netanyahu (Israeli PM) as the dominant regional power's leader

dynasty.zh: 以色列：利库德联合政府 / 其他国家：各自治理体制
dynasty.en: Israel: Likud coalition government / Others: respective governance systems

capital.zh: 耶路撒冷（以色列宣称）、拉马拉（巴勒斯坦行政中心）、安曼（约旦）、贝鲁特（黎巴嫩）、大马士革（叙利亚）
capital.en: Jerusalem (claimed by Israel), Ramallah (Palestinian administrative center), Amman (Jordan), Beirut (Lebanon), Damascus (Syria)

governmentForm.zh: 以色列为议会民主制、巴勒斯坦为有限自治政权、约旦为君主立宪制、黎巴嫩为教派配额议会制、叙利亚为威权总统制。
governmentForm.en: Israel is a parliamentary democracy, Palestine has limited self-governing authority, Jordan is a constitutional monarchy, Lebanon uses a sectarian-quota parliamentary system, Syria has an authoritarian presidential system.

socialStructure.zh: 以色列高科技创新社会与宗教-世俗分裂；巴勒斯坦被占领与封锁中的社会；约旦稳定但资源有限；黎巴嫩教派碎片化社会崩溃；叙利亚内战后废墟。
socialStructure.en: Israel: high-tech innovation society with religious-secular divide; Palestine: society under occupation and blockade; Jordan: stable but resource-limited; Lebanon: sectarian fragmentation and societal collapse; Syria: post-civil-war ruins.

rulingClass.zh: 以色列：政党联盟与军事安全建制、科技创业精英；约旦：哈希姆王室；黎巴嫩：教派军阀家族；叙利亚：阿萨德家族与阿拉维派军事精英。
rulingClass.en: Israel: party coalitions and military-security establishment, tech entrepreneurial elite; Jordan: Hashemite monarchy; Lebanon: sectarian warlord families; Syria: Assad family and Alawite military elite.

succession.zh: 以色列总理由议会多数联盟产生，约旦国王世袭，黎巴嫩总统由议会选举（2023年长期空缺），叙利亚总统名义选举但实为世袭。
succession.en: Israeli PM from parliamentary majority coalition; Jordanian king by hereditary succession; Lebanese president elected by parliament (long vacant in 2023); Syrian president nominally elected but effectively hereditary.

structure.zh: 五个政体并存：以色列120席议会（Knesset）制、巴勒斯坦权力机构（西岸有限治理）/哈马斯（加沙控制）二元分裂、约旦国王与议会共治、黎巴嫩教派配额制度（总统马龙派、总理逊尼派、议长什叶派）、叙利亚阿萨德独裁体制。
structure.en: Five polities coexist: Israel's 120-seat Knesset; Palestinian Authority (limited West Bank governance) / Hamas (Gaza control) split; Jordan's king-parliament co-governance; Lebanon's sectarian quota system (Maronite president, Sunni PM, Shia speaker); Syria's Assad dictatorship.

function.zh: 管理中东最强军队与先进军事技术研发，协调AI在国防领域的应用。
function.en: Manages the Middle East's strongest military and advanced military R&D, coordinating AI applications in defense.

function.zh: 通过资助、孵化器与政策支持推动「创业国度」科技创新生态。
function.en: Promotes the 'Startup Nation' tech innovation ecosystem through grants, incubators, and policy support.

function.zh: 维护约旦在以巴冲突中的调停角色与圣城耶路撒冷伊斯兰圣地托管权。
function.en: Maintains Jordan's mediation role in the Israel-Palestine conflict and custodianship of Islamic holy sites in Jerusalem.

localAdmin.zh: 以色列六大行政区；巴勒斯坦西岸A/B/C区分治与加沙封锁；约旦12省；黎巴嫩8省；叙利亚14省（大片领土政府不控制）。
localAdmin.en: Israel's six administrative districts; Palestinian West Bank Areas A/B/C division and Gaza blockade; Jordan's 12 governorates; Lebanon's 8 governorates; Syria's 14 governorates (government does not control large territories).

legalSystem.zh: 以色列以英美法系与犹太法律传统混合，约旦以伊斯兰法与民法混合，黎巴嫩多教派法律并行，叙利亚以法国民法与伊斯兰法混合。
legalSystem.en: Israel blends common law with Jewish legal traditions; Jordan mixes Islamic and civil law; Lebanon has parallel multi-sect laws; Syria blends French civil law with Islamic law.

taxationSystem.zh: 以色列税制成熟（增值税17%、公司税23%、高科技享优惠），约旦依赖国际援助与销售税，黎巴嫩财税体系近乎崩溃，叙利亚战时经济无正常税制。
taxationSystem.en: Israel has a mature tax system (17% VAT, 23% corporate, tech incentives); Jordan relies on aid and sales tax; Lebanon's fiscal system near collapse; Syria lacks a normal tax system in wartime.

religion.zh: 犹太教（以色列）、伊斯兰教逊尼派与什叶派（巴勒斯坦/约旦/黎巴嫩/叙利亚）、基督教（黎巴嫩马龙派、叙利亚东正教等）、德鲁兹教
religion.en: Judaism (Israel), Sunni and Shia Islam (Palestine/Jordan/Lebanon/Syria), Christianity (Lebanese Maronites, Syrian Orthodox, etc.), Druze faith

philosophy.zh: 犹太复国主义与创业文化（以色列）、巴勒斯坦民族主义与反占领运动、阿拉伯民族主义遗产、黎巴嫩多元共存传统（凤凰涅槃精神）。
philosophy.en: Zionism and startup culture (Israel), Palestinian nationalism and anti-occupation movement, Arab nationalist heritage, Lebanese pluralistic coexistence tradition ('phoenix' spirit).

writingSystem.zh: 希伯来字母（以色列）、阿拉伯字母（巴勒斯坦/约旦/黎巴嫩/叙利亚）
writingSystem.en: Hebrew script (Israel), Arabic script (Palestine/Jordan/Lebanon/Syria)

culturalAchievements.zh: 以色列高科技创业文化（「创业国度」）、死海古卷、阿拉伯音乐与文学传统、黎巴嫩美食全球流行、佩特拉（约旦）、帕尔米拉（叙利亚）世界遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Israeli high-tech startup culture ('Startup Nation'), Dead Sea Scrolls, Arab music and literary traditions, Lebanese cuisine globally popular, Petra (Jordan), Palmyra (Syria) World Heritage sites.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系闪语族（希伯来语、阿拉伯语为主），少量亚美尼亚语与库尔德语社区
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic, Semitic branch (Hebrew, Arabic as primary), with small Armenian and Kurdish-speaking communities

unit.zh: 美元/人（区域加权平均，以色列约52000美元）
unit.en: US dollars per capita (regional weighted avg; Israel ~$52,000)

gdpDescription.zh: 以色列GDP约5220亿美元（高科技经济体），约旦约475亿美元，黎巴嫩约180亿美元（经济崩溃后），叙利亚约不足100亿美元（内战破坏），巴勒斯坦约190亿美元。
gdpDescription.en: Israel GDP ~$522B (high-tech economy), Jordan ~$47.5B, Lebanon ~$18B (post-collapse), Syria <$10B (civil war devastation), Palestine ~$19B.

mainIndustries.zh: 以色列：高科技/AI/网络安全/半导体/钻石加工/制药；约旦：磷酸盐/旅游/服务业；黎巴嫩：金融（崩溃中）/侨汇；叙利亚：石油（受制裁）/农业
mainIndustries.en: Israel: high-tech/AI/cybersecurity/semiconductors/diamond processing/pharma; Jordan: phosphates/tourism/services; Lebanon: finance (collapsed)/diaspora remittances; Syria: oil (sanctioned)/agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 以色列高科技产品与军事技术出口、钻石、约旦磷酸盐与钾肥、黎巴嫩侨汇
tradeGoods.en: Israeli high-tech and military technology exports, diamonds; Jordanian phosphates and potash; Lebanese diaspora remittances

name.zh: 以色列新谢克尔/约旦第纳尔/黎巴嫩镑/叙利亚镑
name.en: Israeli New Shekel / Jordanian Dinar / Lebanese Pound / Syrian Pound

householdWealth.zh: 以色列人均收入接近西欧但住房成本极高，黎巴嫩中产阶级因银行危机财富蒸发80%+，叙利亚90%人口陷入贫困。
householdWealth.en: Israeli per-capita income near Western Europe but housing costs are extreme; Lebanese middle class lost 80%+ of wealth in the banking crisis; 90% of Syrians in poverty.

tradeRoutes.zh: 以色列：欧美与亚洲高科技贸易、与阿联酋/巴林正常化后的阿拉伯贸易通道；约旦：亚喀巴港红海通道；黎巴嫩：贝鲁特港（2020年爆炸后恢复中）。
tradeRoutes.en: Israel: EU, US, and Asian high-tech trade, Arab trade corridors opened by UAE/Bahrain normalization; Jordan: Aqaba port on the Red Sea; Lebanon: Beirut port (recovering from 2020 explosion).

economicSystem.zh: 以色列为先进市场经济（科技创业为核心），约旦为自由市场+援助依赖型，黎巴嫩银行体系崩溃后的危机经济，叙利亚战时统制经济。
economicSystem.en: Israel: advanced market economy (tech startups at core); Jordan: free market with aid dependency; Lebanon: crisis economy after banking collapse; Syria: wartime command economy.

source.zh: 以色列税收（所得税、增值税）

category.zh: 国防与安全（以色列为主）

unit.zh: 美元等值外汇储备（以色列为主）
unit.en: US dollar equivalent forex reserves (mainly Israel)

treasuryDescription.zh: 以色列外汇储备约2000亿美元（稳健），约旦约180亿美元，黎巴嫩央行储备几近耗尽。
treasuryDescription.en: Israeli forex reserves ~$200 billion (robust), Jordan ~$18 billion, Lebanon's central bank reserves nearly depleted.

debtLevel.zh: 以色列债务约占GDP 61%（可管理），黎巴嫩债务超GDP 180%（主权违约），约旦约90%。
debtLevel.en: Israel debt ~61% of GDP (manageable), Lebanon debt over 180% of GDP (sovereign default), Jordan ~90%.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 以色列2023年10月后战时财政急剧扩张，约旦依赖IMF支持的财政整顿，黎巴嫩无政府状态下财政近乎瘫痪。
fiscalPolicy.en: Israel shifted to wartime fiscal expansion after October 2023; Jordan relies on IMF-supported consolidation; Lebanon's finances nearly paralyzed under statelessness.

description.zh: 中东最强军事力量，拥有核武器（未公开承认）、铁穹防御系统、先进空军与AI集成武器系统。
description.en: The Middle East's strongest military with nuclear weapons (undeclared), Iron Dome, advanced air force, and AI-integrated weapon systems.

description.zh: 2023年10月后大规模动员36万后备役，为加沙地面行动提供兵力。
description.en: Massively mobilized 360,000 reserves after October 2023, providing forces for the Gaza ground operation.

description.zh: 美国训练的专业军队，约旦稳定的关键支柱。
description.en: US-trained professional army, a key pillar of Jordanian stability.

description.zh: 非国家武装力量：哈马斯军事翼（加沙，约3万）、真主党（黎巴嫩，约2万），受伊朗支持。
description.en: Non-state armed forces: Hamas military wing (Gaza, ~30,000), Hezbollah (Lebanon, ~20,000), Iran-backed.

commanderInChief.zh: 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡（以色列军事决策权）/ 约旦国王阿卜杜拉二世
commanderInChief.en: Israeli PM Netanyahu (Israeli military decision-making) / Jordanian King Abdullah II

technology.zh: 以色列军事技术全球领先：铁穹/大卫投石索/箭式反导系统、AI辅助情报分析（8200部队）、核武器能力、先进网络战。其他国家技术水平远落后。
technology.en: Israeli military technology globally leading: Iron Dome/David's Sling/Arrow missile defense, AI-assisted intelligence (Unit 8200), nuclear capability, advanced cyber warfare. Other countries far behind.

threats.zh: 2023年10月7日哈马斯大规模袭击以色列（造成约1200人死亡），以色列随即对加沙发动大规模军事行动，黎巴嫩真主党从北部开辟第二战线。
threats.en: October 7, 2023 Hamas mass attack on Israel (~1,200 killed); Israel launched a massive military operation in Gaza; Hezbollah opened a second front from northern Lebanon.

recentBattles.zh: 2023年10月7日哈马斯袭击→以色列「铁剑」行动（加沙地面入侵），以色列-黎巴嫩边境持续交火，叙利亚内战持续但烈度降低。
recentBattles.en: October 7 Hamas attack → Israel's 'Iron Swords' operation (Gaza ground invasion), Israel-Lebanon border continuous exchanges of fire, Syrian civil war continues at reduced intensity.

populationDescription.zh: 以色列约970万、巴勒斯坦约540万、约旦约1100万（含大量难民）、黎巴嫩约540万、叙利亚约2100万（含境内流离失所者，约600万难民在海外）。
populationDescription.en: Israel ~9.7M, Palestine ~5.4M, Jordan ~11M (including many refugees), Lebanon ~5.4M, Syria ~21M (with ~6M refugees abroad).

ethnicGroups.zh: 犹太人（以色列74%）、阿拉伯人（以色列21%、巴勒斯坦/约旦/叙利亚/黎巴嫩主体民族）、库尔德人、亚美尼亚人、切尔克斯人等
ethnicGroups.en: Jews (Israel 74%), Arabs (Israel 21%, majority in Palestine/Jordan/Syria/Lebanon), Kurds, Armenians, Circassians, and others

socialClasses.zh: 以色列科技精英与军事建制阶层、约旦小型稳定中产、黎巴嫩曾经的金融精英已大量移民、叙利亚大规模贫困与流离失所。
socialClasses.en: Israeli tech elite and military establishment, Jordan's small stable middle class, Lebanon's former financial elite largely emigrated, Syria's mass poverty and displacement.

allies.zh: 以色列-美国特殊关系、亚伯拉罕协议（阿联酋/巴林/摩洛哥正常化）；约旦-美国安全伙伴；黎巴嫩/叙利亚受伊朗/真主党影响
allies.en: Israel-US special relationship, Abraham Accords (UAE/Bahrain/Morocco normalization); Jordan-US security partnership; Lebanon/Syria under Iran/Hezbollah influence

enemies.zh: 以色列与哈马斯/真主党/伊朗处于战争/敌对状态，叙利亚阿萨德政权受西方制裁。
enemies.en: Israel at war/in hostility with Hamas/Hezbollah/Iran; Syrian Assad regime under Western sanctions.

treaties.zh: 亚伯拉罕协议（2020年）、以色列-约旦和平条约（1994年）、以色列-埃及和平条约（1979年）。2023年以沙正常化谈判因10月7日事件中断。
treaties.en: Abraham Accords (2020), Israel-Jordan peace treaty (1994), Israel-Egypt peace treaty (1979). Israel-Saudi normalization talks interrupted by the October 7 events.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以色列：推进阿拉伯世界正常化但因加沙战争受阻，美国提供380亿美元十年军援；约旦：在以巴间维持平衡；黎巴嫩：真主党国中之国困境。
foreignPolicy.en: Israel: advancing Arab normalization but stalled by the Gaza war, US provides $38B ten-year military aid; Jordan: balancing between Israel and Palestine; Lebanon: Hezbollah state-within-a-state dilemma.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年10月7日哈马斯袭击彻底改变区域局势，以沙正常化进程搁置，联合国安理会多次就加沙停火交锋。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: The October 7 Hamas attack fundamentally altered the regional situation; Israel-Saudi normalization shelved; UN Security Council repeatedly clashed over Gaza ceasefire.

era.zh: 以色列位于全球科技前沿，区域其他国家严重落后
era.en: Israel at the global tech frontier; rest of the region severely behind

keyInnovations.zh: 以色列：AI/网络安全/半导体设计/自动驾驶（Mobileye）/医疗科技/军事技术（铁穹、无人机AI）；其他国家技术水平有限。
keyInnovations.en: Israel: AI/cybersecurity/semiconductor design/autonomous driving (Mobileye)/medtech/military tech (Iron Dome, drone AI). Other countries have limited tech.

infrastructure.zh: 以色列基础设施先进（光纤全覆盖、研发密度全球最高），约旦基础设施尚可，黎巴嫩电力系统崩溃（每天停电20小时），叙利亚基础设施战争中大面积毁坏。
infrastructure.en: Israel has advanced infrastructure (full fiber coverage, highest R&D density globally); Jordan's infrastructure is adequate; Lebanon's power system collapsed (~20h daily outages); Syria's infrastructure massively destroyed.

policy.zh: 以色列政府设立国家AI项目，投资20亿谢克尔（约5.5亿美元）五年计划推动AI研发与产业化。军方8200部队大量使用AI情报分析。
policy.en: Israeli government established a National AI Program, investing NIS 2 billion (~$550M) in a five-year plan for AI R&D and industrialization. Military Unit 8200 extensively uses AI intelligence analysis.

regulatoryStance.zh: 以色列采取亲创新监管路线，无严格AI专项法规，鼓励「沙箱」式实验环境。其他国家无AI监管。
regulatoryStance.en: Israel takes a pro-innovation regulatory approach with no strict AI-specific legislation, encouraging sandbox experimentation. Other countries have no AI regulation.

investmentScale.zh: 以色列2023年AI投资约24亿美元，AI初创企业超1600家，占全球AI创业公司约10%。区域其他国家AI投资几乎为零。
investmentScale.en: Israel's 2023 AI investment ~$2.4 billion, with over 1,600 AI startups comprising ~10% of global AI startups. Other regional countries' AI investment is near zero.

capabilities.zh: 大语言模型，支持多语言文本生成与理解，提供API服务与企业应用。
capabilities.en: Large language model supporting multilingual text generation and comprehension, offering API services and enterprise applications.

capabilities.zh: 全球领先的自动驾驶视觉感知AI芯片与系统，装备超1.5亿辆汽车。
capabilities.en: Globally leading autonomous driving visual perception AI chip and system, equipping over 150 million vehicles.

keyProducts.zh: Jurassic-2大语言模型、Wordtune写作助手
keyProducts.en: Jurassic-2 LLM, Wordtune writing assistant

valuation.zh: 市值约220亿美元（2023年纳斯达克上市）

keyProducts.zh: EyeQ自动驾驶芯片、SuperVision高级驾驶辅助系统
keyProducts.en: EyeQ autonomous driving chip, SuperVision ADAS

keyProducts.zh: AI算力编排与GPU虚拟化平台
keyProducts.en: AI compute orchestration and GPU virtualization platform

keyProducts.zh: Gaudi AI训练加速器芯片
keyProducts.en: Gaudi AI training accelerator chip

title.zh: Mobileye创始人兼CEO、希伯来大学教授
title.en: Mobileye co-founder and CEO, Hebrew University professor

contribution.zh: 创立全球自动驾驶技术领导者Mobileye，并投资AI21 Labs推动大语言模型发展。
contribution.en: Founded global autonomous driving leader Mobileye and invested in AI21 Labs to advance LLM development.

title.zh: AI21 Labs联合创始人、斯坦福大学名誉教授
title.en: AI21 Labs co-founder, Stanford University Professor Emeritus

contribution.zh: 人工智能学术泰斗，创立AI21 Labs打造以色列本土大语言模型，推动「AI Index」年度报告。
contribution.en: AI academic luminary, founded AI21 Labs to build Israeli-origin LLMs, and drives the annual 'AI Index' report.

title.zh: 以色列军事情报精英部队

contribution.zh: 培养以色列最大AI与网络安全创业人才库，众多AI创业公司创始人出身于此。
contribution.en: Cultivates Israel's largest AI and cybersecurity entrepreneurial talent pool; numerous AI startup founders are alumni.

researchFocus.zh: 自动驾驶、大语言模型、网络安全AI、医疗AI、军事AI（目标识别与决策辅助）、AI芯片设计。
researchFocus.en: Autonomous driving, LLMs, cybersecurity AI, medical AI, military AI (target recognition and decision support), AI chip design.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 以色列拥有多个高性能计算中心（英特尔海法研发中心配备先进GPU集群），云计算普及率高。区域其他国家算力极弱。
computeInfrastructure.en: Israel has multiple HPC centers (Intel Haifa R&D center with advanced GPU clusters), high cloud adoption. Other regional countries have extremely limited compute.

talentPool.zh: 以色列AI人才密度全球领先——Technion、希伯来大学、魏茨曼研究所培养顶尖研究者，8200部队提供军转民人才通道。
talentPool.en: Israel's AI talent density is globally leading — Technion, Hebrew University, Weizmann Institute produce top researchers; Unit 8200 provides a military-to-civilian talent pipeline.

globalRanking.zh: 以色列AI综合实力全球前五（人均AI创业公司与投资全球第一），区域其他国家几乎不在AI版图上。
globalRanking.en: Israel's overall AI strength is top-5 globally (first per capita in AI startups and investment); other regional countries are essentially absent from the AI map.

outlook.zh: 以色列AI生态系统世界级但面临战争风险冲击——10月7日后部分科技人才外流、投资短期放缓，但长期创新韧性强。区域其他国家AI发展受冲突与贫困制约。
outlook.en: Israel's AI ecosystem is world-class but faces war risk impacts — some tech talent emigration and short-term investment slowdown after October 7, but long-term innovation resilience is strong. Other regional AI development is constrained by conflict and poverty.

strengths.zh: 以色列科技与军事超强（AI全球前五）、8200部队人才生态、约旦地缘稳定性。
strengths.en: Israel's tech and military supremacy (top-5 AI globally), Unit 8200 talent ecosystem, Jordan's geopolitical stability.

weaknesses.zh: 以巴冲突2023年全面升级、黎巴嫩国家崩溃、叙利亚内战废墟、区域安全极度不稳。
weaknesses.en: Full-scale Israel-Palestine conflict escalation in 2023, Lebanese state collapse, Syrian civil war ruins, extreme regional security instability.

outlook.zh: 短期充满冲突与人道危机，以色列AI实力不会因战争而根本削弱，但区域稳定性前景黯淡。
outlook.en: Short-term filled with conflict and humanitarian crisis; Israel's AI strength will not be fundamentally weakened by war, but regional stability prospects are bleak.

description.zh: 2023年的黎凡特地区处于剧烈动荡中：10月7日哈马斯袭击以色列引发加沙战争，中东局势急剧升级。以色列是全球AI强国（AI21 Labs、Mobileye等1600+初创企业），但战争带来巨大冲击。黎巴嫩持续崩溃，叙利亚内战余波未平，约旦勉力维持稳定。
description.en: The Levant in 2023 is in severe turmoil: the October 7 Hamas attack on Israel triggered the Gaza war and sharp Middle Eastern escalation. Israel is a global AI powerhouse (AI21 Labs, Mobileye, 1,600+ startups), but war brings enormous impact. Lebanon continues collapsing, Syria's civil war aftermath lingers, and Jordan struggles to maintain stability.

name.zh: 北欧与波罗的海国家联合体

ruler.zh: 各国民选领导人（北欧理事会协调）
ruler.en: Elected national leaders (coordinated via Nordic Council)

dynasty.zh: 多党议会民主制

capital.zh: 斯德哥尔摩/赫尔辛基/哥本哈根/奥斯陆/塔林/里加/维尔纽斯
capital.en: Stockholm / Helsinki / Copenhagen / Oslo / Tallinn / Riga / Vilnius

governmentForm.zh: 议会制民主共和国与立宪君主制并存（瑞典、挪威、丹麦为立宪君主制，芬兰、冰岛、爱沙尼亚、拉脱维亚、立陶宛为共和制），高度发达的福利国家体制。
governmentForm.en: A mix of parliamentary democratic republics and constitutional monarchies (Sweden, Norway, Denmark are constitutional monarchies; Finland, Iceland, Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania are republics), all with highly developed welfare state systems.

socialStructure.zh: 全球最平等的社会结构之一，强大中产阶级为主体，贫富差距极小，社会流动性高。科技精英阶层日益崛起。
socialStructure.en: Among the world's most egalitarian social structures, dominated by a strong middle class with minimal wealth inequality and high social mobility. A tech elite class is increasingly emerging.

rulingClass.zh: 民选政治家、社会民主党传统精英、科技企业家与公共部门高级官员构成治理核心。
rulingClass.en: Elected politicians, social democratic traditional elites, tech entrepreneurs, and senior public sector officials form the governance core.

succession.zh: 各国通过全民大选产生议会，由议会多数党或联盟组阁。君主制国家王位世袭，但无实权。
succession.en: National parliaments elected by universal suffrage, with governments formed by majority parties or coalitions. Monarchies have hereditary succession but no executive power.

structure.zh: 各国均为议会制，行政权归内阁与总理，立法权归议会。北欧理事会与波罗的海议会大会作为区域协调平台。欧盟成员国（除挪威、冰岛外）遵循欧盟法律框架。
structure.en: All nations operate parliamentary systems with executive power vested in cabinets and prime ministers, and legislative power in parliaments. The Nordic Council and Baltic Assembly serve as regional coordination platforms. EU members (except Norway, Iceland) follow the EU legal framework.

function.zh: 协调北欧五国在环境、教育、科技与文化领域的跨国合作。
function.en: Coordinates cross-border cooperation among the five Nordic countries in environment, education, technology, and culture.

function.zh: 推进数字化转型、电子政务、AI战略制定与网络安全。
function.en: Advancing digital transformation, e-governance, AI strategy formulation, and cybersecurity.

function.zh: 管理国防事务，芬兰和瑞典于2023年加速北约一体化进程。
function.en: Manage defense affairs, with Finland and Sweden accelerating NATO integration in 2023.

function.zh: 管理财政收支、税收政策与福利体系运行。
function.en: Manage fiscal revenue and expenditure, tax policy, and welfare system operations.

localAdmin.zh: 各国分为省/郡与市镇，地方自治权较大，数字化治理水平全球领先。爱沙尼亚的电子政务系统堪称全球标杆。
localAdmin.en: Countries are divided into provinces/counties and municipalities with substantial local autonomy and world-leading digital governance. Estonia's e-governance system is a global benchmark.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，各国宪法保障基本权利，同时受欧盟法律体系约束（EU成员国）。北欧国家法治指数全球最高。
legalSystem.en: Civil law systems with constitutional guarantees of fundamental rights, also bound by EU legal framework (for EU members). Nordic countries rank highest globally in rule of law indices.

taxationSystem.zh: 高税收高福利模式，个人所得税边际税率可达50-60%，增值税25%，但公共服务几乎全免费覆盖。
taxationSystem.en: High-tax, high-welfare model with marginal personal income tax rates reaching 50-60%, 25% VAT, but near-universal free public services.

religion.zh: 名义上以路德宗新教为主，实际上高度世俗化，宗教参与率欧洲最低
religion.en: Nominally Lutheran Protestant, but highly secularized with the lowest religious participation rates in Europe

philosophy.zh: 社会民主主义、平等主义与务实主义传统深厚，环保意识强烈，人权与科技伦理关注度高。
philosophy.en: Deep traditions of social democracy, egalitarianism, and pragmatism, with strong environmental awareness and high focus on human rights and tech ethics.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（瑞典语、挪威语、丹麦语、芬兰语、冰岛语、爱沙尼亚语、拉脱维亚语、立陶宛语）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, Finnish, Icelandic, Estonian, Latvian, Lithuanian)

culturalAchievements.zh: 诺贝尔奖发源地（瑞典/挪威），北欧设计享誉全球，Spotify引领全球音乐流媒体，电子游戏产业（Minecraft出自瑞典）发达，爱沙尼亚数字公民计划开创全球先河。
culturalAchievements.en: Birthplace of the Nobel Prize (Sweden/Norway), Nordic design renowned globally, Spotify leads global music streaming, thriving gaming industry (Minecraft from Sweden), Estonia's e-Residency program pioneering worldwide.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（北日耳曼语支）、乌拉尔语系（芬兰语/爱沙尼亚语）、印欧语系波罗的语族（拉脱维亚语/立陶宛语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Germanic (North Germanic branch), Uralic (Finnish/Estonian), Indo-European Baltic (Latvian/Lithuanian)

gdpDescription.zh: 北欧国家人均GDP名列全球前茅，挪威靠石油基金富甲一方，瑞典科技产业发达，丹麦航运与制药强劲，芬兰高科技与林业并重。波罗的海三国经济快速增长，爱沙尼亚数字经济表现突出。
gdpDescription.en: Nordic nations rank among the world's highest in GDP per capita. Norway benefits from its sovereign oil fund, Sweden has a thriving tech sector, Denmark excels in shipping and pharmaceuticals, Finland balances high-tech with forestry. The Baltic states show rapid economic growth, with Estonia's digital economy particularly impressive.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气（挪威）、科技与电信（瑞典）、航运与制药（丹麦）、林业与ICT（芬兰）、数字服务与金融科技（爱沙尼亚）、运输与物流（拉脱维亚/立陶宛）
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas (Norway), tech and telecom (Sweden), shipping and pharmaceuticals (Denmark), forestry and ICT (Finland), digital services and fintech (Estonia), transport and logistics (Latvia/Lithuania)

tradeGoods.zh: 石油天然气、电信设备、汽车（沃尔沃）、家具（宜家）、制药产品、海产品、林业产品、半导体设备、数字服务
tradeGoods.en: Oil and gas, telecom equipment, automobiles (Volvo), furniture (IKEA), pharmaceuticals, seafood, forestry products, semiconductor equipment, digital services

name.zh: 欧元/瑞典克朗/挪威克朗/丹麦克朗/冰岛克朗
name.en: Euro / Swedish Krona / Norwegian Krone / Danish Krone / Icelandic Króna

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数约27万美元（北欧）至6万美元（波罗的海），社会保障体系极为健全，住房保障率高。
householdWealth.en: Median household wealth approximately $270,000 (Nordic) to $60,000 (Baltic), with extremely robust social safety nets and high housing security.

tradeRoutes.zh: 波罗的海贸易圈、北海石油运输通道、跨大西洋贸易、欧盟内部单一市场贸易、北极航线潜力。
tradeRoutes.en: Baltic Sea trade circle, North Sea oil transport corridors, transatlantic trade, EU single market intra-trade, and Arctic shipping route potential.

economicSystem.zh: 北欧模式——市场经济与强大公共部门、高税收高福利、劳资协商制度的独特组合。波罗的海国家倾向更自由市场经济。
economicSystem.en: The Nordic model — a unique combination of market economy, strong public sector, high taxes and welfare, and corporatist labor-management negotiation systems. Baltic states lean toward freer market economies.

unit.zh: 美元（含挪威主权财富基金约1.4万亿美元）
unit.en: US dollars (including Norway's sovereign wealth fund ~$1.4 trillion)

treasuryDescription.zh: 挪威政府养老基金（全球最大主权财富基金，超1.4万亿美元）为区域财政稳定的压舱石。北欧国家财政纪律严格，债务水平较低。
treasuryDescription.en: Norway's Government Pension Fund Global (the world's largest sovereign wealth fund, exceeding $1.4 trillion) serves as an anchor for regional fiscal stability. Nordic countries maintain strict fiscal discipline with low debt levels.

debtLevel.zh: 北欧国家公共债务占GDP比率普遍低于50%（挪威仅40%），波罗的海国家更低（20-40%），远优于欧盟平均水平。
debtLevel.en: Nordic public debt-to-GDP ratios generally below 50% (Norway at just 40%), Baltic states even lower (20-40%), well below the EU average.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 审慎财政政策，注重长期可持续性。挪威严格限制石油收入使用比例，芬兰与瑞典在经济放缓时适度扩张财政。
fiscalPolicy.en: Prudent fiscal policies focused on long-term sustainability. Norway strictly limits the spending ratio of oil revenues; Finland and Sweden moderately expand fiscal spending during economic slowdowns.

description.zh: 以国土防御为核心，芬兰拥有欧洲最大预备役体系之一，瑞典恢复义务兵役制。
description.en: Focused on territorial defense, Finland has one of Europe's largest reserve systems, Sweden reinstated conscription.

description.zh: 波罗的海与北海巡防，挪威海军侧重北极水域防御。
description.en: Baltic Sea and North Sea patrol, Norwegian navy focuses on Arctic waters defense.

description.zh: 瑞典JAS-39鹰狮战机为自主研发亮点，芬兰采购F-35战机。
description.en: Sweden's JAS-39 Gripen is a standout indigenous fighter, Finland procured F-35 fighters.

commanderInChief.zh: 各国总统/国王名义统帅，实际由总理与国防部长指挥
commanderInChief.en: Nominally commanded by presidents/monarchs, effectively led by prime ministers and defense ministers

technology.zh: 先进常规军事技术，瑞典自主研发战斗机与潜艇，芬兰擅长冬季与森林作战，波罗的海国家以网络战与不对称防御见长。2023年芬兰正式加入北约，瑞典加入程序进行中。
technology.en: Advanced conventional military technology. Sweden independently develops fighters and submarines, Finland excels in winter and forest warfare, Baltic states specialize in cyber warfare and asymmetric defense. Finland formally joined NATO in 2023, Sweden's accession in progress.

threats.zh: 俄罗斯军事威胁为首要安全关切，尤其对波罗的海三国及芬兰。混合战争、网络攻击与信息战为持续威胁。
threats.en: Russian military threat is the primary security concern, especially for the Baltic states and Finland. Hybrid warfare, cyberattacks, and information warfare are persistent threats.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接军事冲突，但积极支援乌克兰（瑞典提供CV90步战车、丹麦提供豹2坦克、挪威提供NASAMS防空系统），大幅增加国防开支。
recentBattles.en: No direct military conflict, but actively supporting Ukraine (Sweden providing CV90 IFVs, Denmark providing Leopard 2 tanks, Norway providing NASAMS air defense), with significant defense spending increases.

populationDescription.zh: 总人口约3300万（瑞典1050万、挪威550万、丹麦590万、芬兰560万、冰岛38万、爱沙尼亚134万、拉脱维亚186万、立陶宛280万）。人口密度低，城市化率高。
populationDescription.en: Total population approximately 33 million (Sweden 10.5M, Norway 5.5M, Denmark 5.9M, Finland 5.6M, Iceland 380K, Estonia 1.34M, Latvia 1.86M, Lithuania 2.8M). Low population density, high urbanization rate.

ethnicGroups.zh: 北欧主体民族（瑞典人、挪威人、丹麦人、芬兰人、冰岛人）、波罗的海民族（爱沙尼亚人、拉脱维亚人、立陶宛人）、萨米人少数民族、近年移民群体增长显著
ethnicGroups.en: Nordic majority peoples (Swedes, Norwegians, Danes, Finns, Icelanders), Baltic peoples (Estonians, Latvians, Lithuanians), Sámi minority, with significant recent immigrant population growth

socialClasses.zh: 扁平化社会结构，庞大中产阶级，极少数超级富豪，社会流动性高，贫困率极低。
socialClasses.en: Flat social structure with a large middle class, very few ultra-wealthy, high social mobility, and extremely low poverty rates.

allies.zh: 欧盟成员国、北约成员国（2023年芬兰加入、瑞典申请中）、美国、英国。北欧五国之间关系极为紧密。
allies.en: EU member states, NATO members (Finland joined in 2023, Sweden applying), United States, United Kingdom. Extremely close relations among the five Nordic countries.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但视俄罗斯为主要安全威胁，俄乌战争后对俄关系急剧恶化。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, but Russia viewed as the primary security threat, with relations sharply deteriorating after the Russia-Ukraine war.

vassals.zh: 无附庸国。格陵兰与法罗群岛为丹麦王国自治领地。
vassals.en: No vassal states. Greenland and the Faroe Islands are autonomous territories of the Danish Realm.

treaties.zh: 北约条约、欧盟里斯本条约、申根协定、北欧护照联盟、赫尔辛基条约（北欧合作）。
treaties.en: NATO Treaty, EU Lisbon Treaty, Schengen Agreement, Nordic Passport Union, Treaty of Helsinki (Nordic cooperation).

foreignPolicy.zh: 以多边主义为核心，积极参与联合国、欧盟与北约事务，重视人权与发展援助，对俄强硬但寻求和平解决冲突。
foreignPolicy.en: Multilateralism-centered, active participation in UN, EU, and NATO affairs, emphasis on human rights and development aid, tough on Russia but seeking peaceful conflict resolution.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年芬兰正式加入北约（第31个成员国），瑞典北约申请获大多数成员国批准。北欧国家联合加大对乌克兰军事与经济援助。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Finland officially joined NATO in 2023 (31st member), Sweden's NATO application approved by most members. Nordic countries jointly increased military and economic aid to Ukraine.

era.zh: 数字信息时代前沿
era.en: Frontier of the digital information age

keyInnovations.zh: 5G基础设施（爱立信/诺基亚为全球主要供应商）、电子政务（爱沙尼亚e-Residency）、绿色能源技术、电池技术（瑞典Northvolt）、量子计算研究、Spotify流媒体平台。
keyInnovations.en: 5G infrastructure (Ericsson/Nokia as global major suppliers), e-governance (Estonia's e-Residency), green energy technology, battery technology (Sweden's Northvolt), quantum computing research, Spotify streaming platform.

infrastructure.zh: 全球最发达的数字基础设施，互联网普及率超97%，5G覆盖领先，铁路公路系统完善，北极光纤电缆项目推进中。
infrastructure.en: World's most advanced digital infrastructure with over 97% internet penetration, leading 5G coverage, comprehensive rail and road systems, Arctic fiber optic cable projects underway.

policy.zh: 积极拥抱AI技术，芬兰推出全民AI教育计划「Elements of AI」，瑞典侧重AI产业应用。
policy.en: Follows the EU AI Act framework while each country formulates its own AI strategy. Finland pioneered the universal AI education program 'Elements of AI', Sweden focuses on AI industrial applications.

regulatoryStance.zh: 以欧盟AI法案为基础的风险分级监管框架，注重伦理AI与人权保护，监管力度适中偏严。
regulatoryStance.en: Risk-tiered regulatory framework based on the EU AI Act, emphasizing ethical AI and human rights protection, moderately strict regulation.

investmentScale.zh: 区域AI投资约50亿美元/年，芬兰LUMI超级计算机（欧洲最快之一）为区域AI研究提供算力支撑。
investmentScale.en: Regional AI investment approximately $5 billion per year, with Finland's LUMI supercomputer (one of Europe's fastest) providing compute support for regional AI research.

capabilities.zh: 北欧语言大模型，支持瑞典语、挪威语、丹麦语等北欧语言处理。
capabilities.en: Nordic language large model supporting Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, and other Nordic language processing.

capabilities.zh: 开源多语言大模型，专注欧洲语言与工业AI应用。
capabilities.en: Open-source multilingual large model focused on European languages and industrial AI applications.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的买后付（BNPL）金融科技平台，AI客服助手。
keyProducts.en: AI-powered buy-now-pay-later (BNPL) fintech platform, AI customer service assistant.

keyProducts.zh: 企业级AI解决方案与欧洲语言大模型。
keyProducts.en: Enterprise AI solutions and European language large models.

valuation.zh: 国家级AI创新中心（非营利）

keyProducts.zh: GPT-SW3北欧语言模型、AI公共服务平台。
keyProducts.en: GPT-SW3 Nordic language model, AI public service platform.

contribution.zh: 芬兰裔开源运动奠基人，Linux操作系统支撑全球AI基础设施。
contribution.en: Finnish-born open-source movement founder, Linux OS underpins global AI infrastructure.

contribution.zh: 推动欧洲本土AI模型开发与企业级AI应用落地。
contribution.en: Driving European indigenous AI model development and enterprise AI deployment.

researchFocus.zh: 可信AI与伦理AI、自然语言处理（北欧小语种）、工业4.0与智能制造、绿色AI与能效优化、量子计算与AI融合。
researchFocus.en: Trustworthy and ethical AI, NLP for Nordic minority languages, Industry 4.0 and smart manufacturing, green AI and energy efficiency, quantum computing and AI convergence.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 芬兰LUMI超级计算机（欧洲第三快，550 PFLOPS）为旗舰设施，各国通过EuroHPC联合项目获取算力资源。
computeInfrastructure.en: Finland's LUMI supercomputer (Europe's third fastest, 550 PFLOPS) as the flagship facility, with countries accessing compute resources through the EuroHPC Joint Undertaking.

talentPool.zh: 数学与工程教育水平极高（PISA排名靠前），芬兰全民AI教育覆盖率领先全球，但总体人才规模受限于人口。
talentPool.en: Extremely high math and engineering education levels (top PISA rankings), Finland leads globally in universal AI education coverage, but overall talent pool limited by population size.

globalRanking.zh: AI准备度全球前列，但商业化规模不及美中。芬兰、瑞典、丹麦AI准备度指数排名全球前十。
globalRanking.en: Global leaders in AI readiness, but commercialization scale lags behind US and China. Finland, Sweden, Denmark rank in the global top ten for AI readiness index.

outlook.zh: 以伦理AI与绿色AI为差异化竞争力，有望在特定垂直领域（工业AI、安全AI、公共服务AI）形成全球领先优势。
outlook.en: Ethical AI and green AI as differentiated competitiveness, poised to achieve global leadership in specific verticals (industrial AI, safe AI, public service AI).

strengths.zh: 全球最高生活水平与社会平等度、数字化程度领先、创新生态活跃、教育体系卓越、巨额主权财富储备（挪威）、强大5G基础设施供应能力。
strengths.en: World's highest living standards and social equality, leading digitalization, active innovation ecosystem, excellent education system, massive sovereign wealth reserves (Norway), strong 5G infrastructure supply capabilities.

weaknesses.zh: 人口总量小制约市场规模、对俄罗斯安全威胁依赖北约保护、缺乏全球级AI大企业、老龄化加剧福利体系压力。
weaknesses.en: Small total population limits market scale, reliance on NATO for protection against Russian security threats, lack of global-scale AI giants, aging population increasing pressure on welfare systems.

outlook.zh: 凭借高人力资本、创新能力与优越治理水平，北欧-波罗的海区域将继续作为全球最宜居、最创新的区域之一，在伦理AI与数字治理领域引领全球标准制定。
outlook.en: Leveraging high human capital, innovation capacity, and superior governance, the Nordic-Baltic region will continue as one of the world's most livable and innovative, leading global standard-setting in ethical AI and digital governance.

description.zh: 2023年的北欧与波罗的海地区由瑞典、挪威、丹麦、芬兰、冰岛及爱沙尼亚、拉脱维亚、立陶宛组成。这一区域以全球最高的生活水平、社会平等度和数字化程度著称。芬兰于2023年正式加入北约，标志着俄乌战争后北欧安全格局的历史性转变。LUMI超级计算机为区域AI发展提供强大算力支撑，Klarna等企业引领AI在金融科技领域的应用。北欧模式的高福利社会与技术创新的结合，使该区域成为全球可持续发展与伦理AI的典范。
description.en: The Nordic and Baltic region in 2023 comprises Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Finland, Iceland, Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania. Renowned for the world's highest living standards, social equality, and digitalization, this region saw a historic shift in security architecture when Finland officially joined NATO in 2023 following Russia's invasion of Ukraine. The LUMI supercomputer provides powerful compute support for regional AI development, while Klarna and other companies lead AI applications in fintech. The combination of the Nordic welfare model with technological innovation makes this region a global exemplar of sustainable development and ethical AI.

dynasty.zh: 多党民主制

capital.zh: 马德里/里斯本/雅典/布加勒斯特/贝尔格莱德/萨格勒布
capital.en: Madrid / Lisbon / Athens / Bucharest / Belgrade / Zagreb

governmentForm.zh: 议会制民主共和国为主（西班牙为议会制立宪君主制），部分巴尔干国家为半总统制。欧盟成员国居多，塞尔维亚等尚在入盟进程中。
governmentForm.en: Primarily parliamentary democratic republics (Spain is a parliamentary constitutional monarchy), some Balkan states are semi-presidential. Most are EU members, with Serbia and others still in the accession process.

socialStructure.zh: 社会分层较明显，中产阶级受近年经济危机冲击有所萎缩。南欧青年失业率偏高，巴尔干地区城乡差距大。家庭纽带在社会结构中依然重要。
socialStructure.en: Noticeable social stratification with middle class weakened by recent economic crises. High youth unemployment in Southern Europe, significant urban-rural gaps in the Balkans. Family ties remain important in social structure.

rulingClass.zh: 政党精英、传统家族势力、欧盟机构官员与商业寡头（尤其在巴尔干）构成权力结构。
rulingClass.en: Party elites, traditional family power networks, EU institutional officials, and business oligarchs (especially in the Balkans) form the power structure.

succession.zh: 多数国家通过议会选举产生政府，西班牙王位世袭但无实权，巴尔干部分国家总统由直选产生。
succession.en: Most countries form governments through parliamentary elections, Spain's monarchy is hereditary but ceremonial, some Balkan presidents are directly elected.

structure.zh: 议会民主制为主流，行政权属内阁，立法权属议会。欧盟成员国受欧盟法规与政策框架约束，巴尔干非欧盟国家正在进行法律与制度改革以适应入盟标准。
structure.en: Parliamentary democracy is mainstream, with executive power in cabinets and legislative power in parliaments. EU members are bound by EU regulations, while non-EU Balkan states are undergoing legal and institutional reforms to meet accession standards.

name.zh: 各国经济与数字化部门

function.zh: 推动经济复苏、数字化转型与欧盟资金项目管理。
function.en: Driving economic recovery, digital transformation, and EU fund program management.

name.zh: 各国内政与公共秩序部

function.zh: 管理国内安全、边境管控（地中海移民危机应对）与公共秩序维护。
function.en: Managing domestic security, border control (Mediterranean migration crisis response), and public order maintenance.

name.zh: 各国劳动与社会事务部

function.zh: 应对青年失业、社会保障体系运营与劳动市场改革。
function.en: Addressing youth unemployment, social security system operations, and labor market reforms.

function.zh: 协调与欧盟的政策对接、入盟谈判（巴尔干国家）及欧盟资金申请。
function.en: Coordinating EU policy alignment, accession negotiations (Balkan states), and EU fund applications.

localAdmin.zh: 西班牙自治区体制赋予加泰罗尼亚/巴斯克等地区高度自治权，希腊和罗马尼亚中央集权程度较高，巴尔干地区地方治理能力参差不齐。
localAdmin.en: Spain's autonomous community system grants high autonomy to Catalonia/Basque Country, Greece and Romania are more centralized, Balkan local governance capacity varies widely.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，欧盟成员国遵循欧盟法规优先原则。巴尔干非欧盟国家正在推进司法独立改革。部分国家腐败问题依然突出。
legalSystem.en: Civil law systems with EU member states following EU regulation primacy. Non-EU Balkan states pursuing judicial independence reforms. Corruption remains a significant issue in some countries.

taxationSystem.zh: 增值税率普遍在20-24%，个人所得税累进制，西班牙与希腊税负偏重。巴尔干部分国家以低税率吸引投资（保加利亚10%平税）。
taxationSystem.en: VAT rates generally 20-24%, progressive personal income taxes, Spain and Greece have heavier tax burdens. Some Balkan countries attract investment with low rates (Bulgaria's 10% flat tax).

religion.zh: 天主教（西班牙/葡萄牙/克罗地亚）、东正教（希腊/罗马尼亚/塞尔维亚/保加利亚）、伊斯兰教少数群体（波黑/阿尔巴尼亚/科索沃）
religion.en: Catholic (Spain/Portugal/Croatia), Orthodox (Greece/Romania/Serbia/Bulgaria), Muslim minorities (Bosnia/Albania/Kosovo)

philosophy.zh: 地中海文化传统与东正教精神遗产交织，重视家庭、社区与历史记忆。民族主义情绪在巴尔干地区依然活跃。
philosophy.en: Mediterranean cultural traditions intertwined with Orthodox spiritual heritage, valuing family, community, and historical memory. Nationalist sentiments remain active in the Balkans.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（西/葡/罗马尼亚/克罗地亚）、希腊字母、西里尔字母（塞尔维亚/保加利亚/北马其顿）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Spanish/Portuguese/Romanian/Croatian), Greek alphabet, Cyrillic (Serbian/Bulgarian/North Macedonian)

culturalAchievements.zh: 地中海饮食（联合国非物质文化遗产）、弗拉门戈舞蹈、希腊古典遗产、罗马尼亚IT人才输出、塞尔维亚网球（德约科维奇）、西班牙足球联赛、葡萄牙法多音乐。
culturalAchievements.en: Mediterranean diet (UNESCO Intangible Heritage), Flamenco dance, Greek classical heritage, Romanian IT talent exports, Serbian tennis (Djokovic), Spanish La Liga, Portuguese Fado music.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西/葡/罗马尼亚语）、希腊语族、南斯拉夫语支（塞/克/波斯尼亚语）、阿尔巴尼亚语族
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Romance (Spanish/Portuguese/Romanian), Hellenic, South Slavic (Serbian/Croatian/Bosnian), Albanian

gdpDescription.zh: 经济体量差异大，西班牙GDP约1.4万亿美元居区域之首。南欧国家经历欧债危机后复苏缓慢，巴尔干国家经济基础较薄弱但增速较快。旅游业为多国经济支柱。
gdpDescription.en: Significant economic size variation, with Spain's GDP at ~$1.4 trillion leading the region. Southern European countries recovering slowly from the eurozone debt crisis, Balkan economies have weaker foundations but faster growth. Tourism is an economic pillar for many.

mainIndustries.zh: 旅游业、农业与食品加工、汽车制造（西班牙）、航运（希腊）、IT外包（罗马尼亚）、纺织业、能源、采矿（塞尔维亚/罗马尼亚）
mainIndustries.en: Tourism, agriculture and food processing, automotive manufacturing (Spain), shipping (Greece), IT outsourcing (Romania), textiles, energy, mining (Serbia/Romania)

tradeGoods.zh: 橄榄油、葡萄酒、汽车零部件、旅游服务、航运服务、IT服务、软木（葡萄牙）、时令水果蔬菜
tradeGoods.en: Olive oil, wine, automotive parts, tourism services, shipping services, IT services, cork (Portugal), seasonal fruits and vegetables

name.zh: 欧元/塞尔维亚第纳尔/罗马尼亚列伊等
name.en: Euro / Serbian Dinar / Romanian Leu etc.

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数差异极大：西班牙约16万美元，希腊约11万美元，罗马尼亚约3万美元，塞尔维亚约2万美元。
householdWealth.en: Enormous variation in median household wealth: Spain ~$160,000, Greece ~$110,000, Romania ~$30,000, Serbia ~$20,000.

tradeRoutes.zh: 地中海贸易圈、欧盟内部单一市场、中东欧供应链走廊、中国一带一路倡议节点（比雷埃夫斯港）。
tradeRoutes.en: Mediterranean trade circle, EU single market, Central-Eastern European supply chain corridors, Belt and Road Initiative nodes (Piraeus port).

economicSystem.zh: 混合市场经济，欧盟成员国遵循欧盟经济治理框架。南欧国家公共部门占比偏大，巴尔干国家处于市场经济转型进程中。
economicSystem.en: Mixed market economies with EU members following EU economic governance frameworks. Southern European countries have larger public sectors, Balkan states are in market economy transition.

unit.en: US dollar equivalent foreign exchange reserves

treasuryDescription.zh: 南欧国家普遍承受较高公共债务负担（希腊约170%GDP、西班牙约113%GDP），欧盟复苏基金为区域经济注入增量资金。巴尔干国家债务水平相对较低。
treasuryDescription.en: Southern European countries generally bear high public debt burdens (Greece ~170% GDP, Spain ~113% GDP), with EU Recovery Fund injecting incremental funding. Balkan countries have relatively lower debt levels.

debtLevel.zh: 区域平均公共债务占GDP约100%，希腊（170%）和西班牙（113%）为高债务国家，巴尔干国家多在50-70%之间。
debtLevel.en: Regional average public debt at ~100% of GDP, with Greece (170%) and Spain (113%) as high-debt countries, most Balkan states at 50-70%.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 受欧盟稳定与增长公约约束（赤字不超GDP3%目标），欧盟「下一代EU」复苏基金（7500亿欧元）正大规模投入数字化与绿色转型。
fiscalPolicy.en: Constrained by the EU Stability and Growth Pact (deficit under 3% GDP target), the EU's NextGenerationEU recovery fund (€750 billion) is being massively deployed for digital and green transformation.

description.zh: 以国土防御与北约框架内任务为主，希腊陆军因土耳其因素维持较大规模。
description.en: Focused on territorial defense and NATO framework missions, Greek army maintains larger size due to Turkey factor.

description.zh: 地中海海域巡防，希腊海军实力居区域之首，西班牙海军具备两栖作战能力。
description.en: Mediterranean patrol, Greek navy leads the region, Spanish navy has amphibious warfare capabilities.

description.zh: 以F-16、幻影2000等西方战机为主力，希腊正采购阵风战斗机升级空中力量。
description.en: Primarily equipped with F-16s, Mirage 2000s and other Western fighters, Greece procuring Rafale fighters for air force upgrade.

commanderInChief.zh: 各国总统/国王名义统帅

technology.zh: 中等偏上的常规军事技术水平，依赖北约体系与美欧军售。希腊与土耳其军备竞赛推动希腊持续军购。塞尔维亚同时从西方与俄罗斯采购武器。
technology.en: Upper-middle conventional military technology, relying on NATO systems and US-European arms sales. Greece-Turkey arms race drives continuous Greek procurement. Serbia procures from both Western and Russian sources.

threats.zh: 地中海非法移民涌入、土耳其与希腊领土争端、巴尔干民族主义残余冲突风险、俄罗斯对巴尔干的政治渗透。
threats.en: Mediterranean illegal immigration influx, Turkey-Greece territorial disputes, residual Balkan nationalist conflict risks, Russian political penetration in the Balkans.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接军事冲突。西班牙与希腊参与北约行动，塞尔维亚与科索沃北部局势2023年多次紧张升级。
recentBattles.en: No direct military conflict. Spain and Greece participate in NATO operations, Serbia-Kosovo tensions escalated multiple times in northern Kosovo in 2023.

populationDescription.zh: 总人口约1.5亿（西班牙4800万、罗马尼亚1900万、希腊1050万、葡萄牙1030万、塞尔维亚660万、保加利亚640万、克罗地亚380万等）。多国面临严重人口外流与老龄化问题。
populationDescription.en: Total population ~150 million (Spain 48M, Romania 19M, Greece 10.5M, Portugal 10.3M, Serbia 6.6M, Bulgaria 6.4M, Croatia 3.8M etc.). Many countries face severe population outflows and aging.

ethnicGroups.zh: 西班牙人、葡萄牙人、希腊人、罗马尼亚人、塞尔维亚人、保加利亚人、克罗地亚人、阿尔巴尼亚人、罗姆人少数民族等
ethnicGroups.en: Spaniards, Portuguese, Greeks, Romanians, Serbians, Bulgarians, Croatians, Albanians, Roma minorities, and others

socialClasses.zh: 中产阶级为主体但近年有萎缩趋势，公务员阶层庞大（南欧），新兴IT从业者阶层（罗马尼亚），农业与旅游业劳动者基数大。
socialClasses.en: Middle class-dominated but shrinking in recent years, large civil servant class (Southern Europe), emerging IT worker class (Romania), large agricultural and tourism labor base.

lifeExpectancy.zh: 80.5岁（区域平均，西班牙最高约83岁）
lifeExpectancy.en: 80.5 years (regional average, Spain highest at ~83 years)

allies.zh: 欧盟与北约成员国（多数国家）、美国。塞尔维亚与俄罗斯和中国保持友好关系，同时寻求加入欧盟。
allies.en: EU and NATO member states (most countries), United States. Serbia maintains friendly ties with Russia and China while seeking EU accession.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国。希腊与土耳其存在领土争端，塞尔维亚不承认科索沃独立，巴尔干各族群间历史创伤尚未完全愈合。
enemies.en: No formal enemies. Greece and Turkey have territorial disputes, Serbia does not recognize Kosovo's independence, historical traumas among Balkan ethnic groups remain partially unhealed.

treaties.zh: 北约条约、欧盟里斯本条约、申根协定（部分国家）、西巴尔干稳定与联系协定。
treaties.en: NATO Treaty, EU Lisbon Treaty, Schengen Agreement (some countries), Western Balkans Stabilization and Association Agreements.

foreignPolicy.zh: 欧盟框架内协调外交政策，南欧国家关注地中海安全与移民问题，巴尔干国家以入盟为核心外交目标。塞尔维亚在西方与俄罗斯之间保持平衡外交。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy coordinated within the EU framework, Southern European countries focus on Mediterranean security and migration, Balkan states prioritize EU accession. Serbia maintains balanced diplomacy between the West and Russia.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年克罗地亚加入申根区与欧元区，乌克兰与摩尔多瓦获欧盟候选国地位，塞尔维亚-科索沃对话在欧盟斡旋下持续但进展有限。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Croatia joined the Schengen zone and eurozone in 2023, Ukraine and Moldova received EU candidate status, Serbia-Kosovo dialogue continues under EU mediation with limited progress.

era.zh: 数字化转型进行中

keyInnovations.zh: 罗马尼亚IT外包产业（欧洲主要IT人才输出国之一）、西班牙可再生能源技术（全球太阳能与风能前列）、希腊航运技术、葡萄牙科技创业生态。
keyInnovations.en: Romanian IT outsourcing industry (major European IT talent exporter), Spanish renewable energy technology (global solar and wind leader), Greek shipping technology, Portuguese tech startup ecosystem.

infrastructure.zh: 南欧基础设施总体较好但分布不均，西班牙高铁网络发达。巴尔干基础设施相对落后，欧盟资金正大规模投入升级。5G部署进展中但慢于北欧。
infrastructure.en: Southern European infrastructure generally good but unevenly distributed, Spain has an advanced high-speed rail network. Balkan infrastructure relatively underdeveloped, with EU funds being massively invested in upgrades. 5G deployment ongoing but slower than Northern Europe.

policy.zh: 遵循欧盟AI法案框架，各国正制定本国AI战略。西班牙2020年发布国家AI战略（ENIA），葡萄牙推动AI创业生态，巴尔干国家AI政策处于起步阶段。
policy.en: Follows EU AI Act framework, with countries formulating national AI strategies. Spain released its National AI Strategy (ENIA) in 2020, Portugal promotes AI startup ecosystems, Balkan countries' AI policies are nascent.

regulatoryStance.zh: 以欧盟AI法案为基础的统一监管框架，但各国执行能力不一。南欧总体监管态度务实，巴尔干地区监管框架尚不完善。
regulatoryStance.en: Unified regulatory framework based on EU AI Act, but implementation capacity varies. Southern Europe generally pragmatic on regulation, Balkan regulatory frameworks still incomplete.

investmentScale.zh: 区域AI投资约30亿美元/年，远低于西北欧水平。主要依靠欧盟资金与跨国企业研发中心带动。
investmentScale.en: Regional AI investment approximately $3 billion per year, far below Northwestern European levels. Mainly driven by EU funds and multinational R&D centers.

capabilities.zh: 西班牙语大语言模型，基于大规模西班牙语语料训练。
capabilities.en: Spanish language LLM trained on massive Spanish language corpora.

capabilities.zh: 葡萄牙语自然语言处理模型，支持翻译与内容生成。
capabilities.en: Portuguese NLP model supporting translation and content generation.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的出行平台，在西班牙和拉丁美洲运营。
keyProducts.en: AI-driven mobility platform operating in Spain and Latin America.

keyProducts.zh: 全球领先的AI驱动机器人流程自动化（RPA）平台。
keyProducts.en: Global leading AI-driven robotic process automation (RPA) platform.

headquarters.zh: 原创立于布加勒斯特，罗马尼亚

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的语言翻译运营平台。
keyProducts.en: AI-powered language operations platform.

contribution.zh: 罗马尼亚裔企业家，将UiPath打造为全球RPA与AI自动化领域的龙头企业。
contribution.en: Romanian entrepreneur who built UiPath into a global leader in RPA and AI automation.

affiliation.zh: ELLIS（欧洲学习与智能系统卓越实验室）
affiliation.en: ELLIS (European Laboratory for Learning and Intelligent Systems)

contribution.zh: 西班牙AI研究领军人物，推动欧洲AI研究与伦理AI发展。
contribution.en: Leading Spanish AI researcher, advancing European AI research and ethical AI development.

researchFocus.zh: 自然语言处理（南欧语言）、旅游与服务业AI应用、农业智能化、医疗AI、机器人流程自动化。
researchFocus.en: NLP for Southern European languages, tourism and services AI applications, agricultural AI, medical AI, robotic process automation.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 巴塞罗那超算中心（MareNostrum 5，性能达314 PFLOPS）为区域旗舰设施，通过EuroHPC项目获取更多算力。巴尔干地区算力基础设施薄弱。
computeInfrastructure.en: Barcelona Supercomputing Center (MareNostrum 5 at 314 PFLOPS) as regional flagship, accessing additional compute through EuroHPC. Balkan compute infrastructure is weak.

talentPool.zh: 罗马尼亚IT人才充沛且性价比高，西班牙拥有良好大学体系但人才外流严重，巴尔干IT教育快速发展但整体规模小。
talentPool.en: Romania has abundant and cost-effective IT talent, Spain has a good university system but suffers brain drain, Balkan IT education growing fast but small in overall scale.

globalRanking.zh: AI发展水平位于全球中游，西班牙与葡萄牙在特定领域有亮点，罗马尼亚作为IT外包中心间接服务全球AI产业链。
globalRanking.en: AI development at the global middle tier, with Spain and Portugal having bright spots in specific areas, Romania as an IT outsourcing hub indirectly serving the global AI supply chain.

outlook.zh: 欧盟复苏基金与数字化转型投资有望推动区域AI能力提升，但与北欧、西欧的差距短期内难以缩小。旅游与农业AI应用具备差异化潜力。
outlook.en: EU Recovery Fund and digital transformation investments may boost regional AI capabilities, but the gap with Northern and Western Europe will be hard to close in the short term. Tourism and agricultural AI applications have differentiation potential.

strengths.zh: 丰富文化遗产与旅游资源、地中海气候优势、罗马尼亚IT人才池、西班牙可再生能源领先、欧盟成员身份保障资金与市场准入。
strengths.en: Rich cultural heritage and tourism resources, Mediterranean climate advantages, Romanian IT talent pool, Spanish renewable energy leadership, EU membership ensuring fund access and market entry.

weaknesses.zh: 高公共债务（南欧）、青年失业率居高不下、人口外流与老龄化、巴尔干制度性腐败、AI投资与研发不足、经济结构升级缓慢。
weaknesses.en: High public debt (Southern Europe), persistently high youth unemployment, population outflow and aging, institutional corruption in the Balkans, insufficient AI investment and R&D, slow economic restructuring.

outlook.zh: 欧盟一体化框架与复苏基金为区域发展提供重要支撑，但结构性挑战仍需时间消化。巴尔干地区的欧盟入盟进程将是未来十年的关键变量。
outlook.en: EU integration framework and recovery funds provide important support for regional development, but structural challenges require time. The Balkan EU accession process will be a key variable in the coming decade.

description.zh: 2023年的南欧与巴尔干地区涵盖西班牙、葡萄牙、希腊、罗马尼亚、保加利亚、塞尔维亚、克罗地亚等国。这一区域以丰富的文化遗产、地中海风光与多元民族构成为特色。经济上，南欧国家仍在消化欧债危机后遗症，巴尔干国家经济基础较薄弱但增长较快。AI发展处于中等水平，西班牙巴塞罗那超算中心和罗马尼亚IT产业为区域亮点。2023年克罗地亚加入申根区和欧元区标志着巴尔干欧洲一体化的新进展，但塞尔维亚-科索沃紧张局势及区域内部发展不均衡仍是主要挑战。
description.en: Southern Europe and the Balkans in 2023 encompass Spain, Portugal, Greece, Romania, Bulgaria, Serbia, Croatia, and others. The region is characterized by rich cultural heritage, Mediterranean landscapes, and ethnic diversity. Economically, Southern European countries are still dealing with the eurozone crisis aftermath, while Balkan economies have weaker foundations but faster growth. AI development is at a moderate level, with Spain's Barcelona Supercomputing Center and Romania's IT industry as regional highlights. Croatia's 2023 entry into the Schengen zone and eurozone marks new progress in Balkan European integration, though Serbia-Kosovo tensions and intra-regional development disparities remain key challenges.

name.zh: 东欧国家（乌克兰、白俄罗斯、摩尔多瓦）

ruler.zh: 泽连斯基（乌克兰）/ 卢卡申科（白俄罗斯）/ 桑杜（摩尔多瓦）

dynasty.zh: 乌克兰战时民主政府 / 白俄罗斯威权体制 / 摩尔多瓦亲欧民主政府
dynasty.en: Ukraine wartime democratic government / Belarus authoritarian regime / Moldova pro-EU democratic government

capital.zh: 基辅 / 明斯克 / 基希讷乌

governmentForm.zh: 乌克兰为半总统制共和国（战时体制），白俄罗斯为威权总统制（卢卡申科自1994年执政），摩尔多瓦为议会制共和国。三国体制差异巨大。
governmentForm.en: Ukraine is a semi-presidential republic (under wartime governance), Belarus is an authoritarian presidential system (Lukashenko in power since 1994), Moldova is a parliamentary republic. Vast systemic differences among the three.

socialStructure.zh: 后苏联社会转型尚未完成，贫富分化加剧。乌克兰战争导致大规模人口流离失所，白俄罗斯社会在威权压制下流失大量专业人才，摩尔多瓦劳动力严重外流。
socialStructure.en: Post-Soviet social transition incomplete with growing wealth polarization. Ukraine's war caused massive displacement, Belarus loses professional talent under authoritarian suppression, Moldova suffers severe labor outflow.

rulingClass.zh: 乌克兰：战时总统权力集中，IT企业家与志愿者网络崛起。白俄罗斯：卢卡申科个人独裁，安全机构控制社会。摩尔多瓦：亲欧改革派精英执政。
rulingClass.en: Ukraine: wartime presidential power concentration, rising IT entrepreneurs and volunteer networks. Belarus: Lukashenko personal dictatorship, security apparatus controls society. Moldova: pro-EU reform elite in power.

succession.zh: 乌克兰总统任期5年（战时推迟选举），白俄罗斯名义上选举但无实质竞争，摩尔多瓦总统由直选产生。
succession.en: Ukraine presidential term 5 years (elections postponed during war), Belarus has nominal elections without real competition, Moldova's president directly elected.

structure.zh: 乌克兰三权分立但战时总统权力扩大，最高拉达（议会）继续运作。白俄罗斯实质上由总统完全控制，议会为橡皮图章。摩尔多瓦议会制，总统与议会分权。
structure.en: Ukraine has separation of powers but expanded presidential authority during wartime, Verkhovna Rada (parliament) continues operating. Belarus effectively under complete presidential control with rubber-stamp parliament. Moldova has parliamentary system with power divided between president and parliament.

function.zh: 推动数字化抗战（Diia应用程序）、科技动员与AI工具在军事防御中的应用。
function.en: Driving digital resistance (Diia app), tech mobilization, and AI tool applications in military defense.

function.zh: 指挥反俄战争全面作战，协调西方军援接收与部署。
function.en: Commands full-scale defensive war against Russia, coordinates Western military aid reception and deployment.

function.zh: 卢卡申科权力核心机构，控制所有国家政策与安全事务。
function.en: Lukashenko's core power institution, controlling all state policy and security affairs.

name.zh: 摩尔多瓦欧洲一体化办公室

function.zh: 推动欧盟入盟进程、法律与制度改革对标欧盟标准。
function.en: Advancing EU accession process, aligning legal and institutional reforms with EU standards.

localAdmin.zh: 乌克兰分州管理但战时中央集权加强，多州处于战区。白俄罗斯州级政府完全服从中央。摩尔多瓦面临德涅斯特河沿岸分离地区（有俄军驻扎）治理困境。
localAdmin.en: Ukraine governed by oblasts but wartime centralization strengthened, many oblasts in war zones. Belarus oblast governments fully subordinate to center. Moldova faces governance challenges in the Transnistria breakaway region (with Russian troops stationed).

legalSystem.zh: 乌克兰大陆法系，战时实施戒严法，正推进司法改革以对接欧盟标准。白俄罗斯法律体系为威权工具。摩尔多瓦法律改革朝欧盟标准方向推进。
legalSystem.en: Ukraine civil law system with martial law in effect, pursuing judicial reforms to align with EU standards. Belarus legal system serves as authoritarian tool. Moldova legal reforms progressing toward EU standards.

taxationSystem.zh: 乌克兰战时税制简化，个人所得税18%，战争附加税。白俄罗斯税率相对低（13%所得税），摩尔多瓦12%平税制。
taxationSystem.en: Ukraine simplified wartime taxation, 18% personal income tax with war surcharge. Belarus relatively low rates (13% income tax), Moldova 12% flat tax.

religion.zh: 东正教为主（乌克兰正教会2019年独立、白俄罗斯隶属莫斯科牧首区），摩尔多瓦东正教与少数天主教
religion.en: Orthodox Christianity dominant (Ukrainian Orthodox Church gained independence in 2019, Belarusian church under Moscow Patriarchate), Moldovan Orthodox with Catholic minority

philosophy.zh: 乌克兰战时民族身份认同空前强化，公民爱国主义与志愿精神高涨。白俄罗斯社会在表面服从与地下抗议之间挣扎。摩尔多瓦在欧洲认同与后苏联遗产之间寻求定位。
philosophy.en: Ukrainian national identity unprecedentedly strengthened during war, with surging civic patriotism and volunteer spirit. Belarusian society struggles between outward compliance and underground protest. Moldova seeks identity between European belonging and post-Soviet legacy.

writingSystem.zh: 西里尔字母（乌克兰语/白俄罗斯语/摩尔多瓦语亦用拉丁字母转写）
writingSystem.en: Cyrillic alphabet (Ukrainian/Belarusian/Moldovan also uses Latin script transcription)

culturalAchievements.zh: 乌克兰战时文化创造力爆发（文学、纪录片、数字艺术）、Diia数字政务平台获全球关注、白俄罗斯流亡文化社群活跃、摩尔多瓦葡萄酒文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Ukrainian wartime cultural creativity explosion (literature, documentaries, digital art), Diia digital governance platform gaining global attention, active Belarusian exile cultural community, Moldovan wine culture.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系斯拉夫语族东斯拉夫语支（乌克兰语/白俄罗斯语）、罗曼语族（摩尔多瓦语/罗马尼亚语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Slavic, East Slavic branch (Ukrainian/Belarusian), Romance (Moldovan/Romanian)

gdpDescription.zh: 乌克兰GDP因战争从2021年的约2000亿美元骤降至约1500亿美元，经济遭受巨大打击。白俄罗斯GDP约730亿美元，受西方制裁影响增长乏力。摩尔多瓦GDP仅约160亿美元，是欧洲最贫困国家之一。
gdpDescription.en: Ukraine's GDP plummeted from ~$200 billion in 2021 to ~$150 billion due to war, economy severely impacted. Belarus GDP ~$73 billion, growth stagnating under Western sanctions. Moldova GDP only ~$16 billion, one of Europe's poorest countries.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（乌克兰黑土地带）、IT外包（乌克兰战前为欧洲主要IT中心）、军工（乌克兰无人机产业爆发）、石化（白俄罗斯）、钾肥（白俄罗斯）、农业与葡萄酒（摩尔多瓦）
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (Ukraine's black soil belt), IT outsourcing (Ukraine was a major European IT center pre-war), defense industry (Ukrainian drone industry boom), petrochemicals (Belarus), potash (Belarus), agriculture and wine (Moldova)

tradeGoods.zh: 粮食（小麦/玉米/葵花籽油）、IT服务、军用无人机、钾肥、精炼石油产品、葡萄酒、纺织品
tradeGoods.en: Grain (wheat/corn/sunflower oil), IT services, military drones, potash, refined petroleum products, wine, textiles

name.zh: 乌克兰格里夫纳/白俄罗斯卢布/摩尔多瓦列伊
name.en: Ukrainian Hryvnia / Belarusian Ruble / Moldovan Leu

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富极低，乌克兰中位数约1万美元（战争进一步削减），白俄罗斯约2万美元，摩尔多瓦约5千美元。
householdWealth.en: Extremely low household wealth, Ukraine median ~$10,000 (further reduced by war), Belarus ~$20,000, Moldova ~$5,000.

tradeRoutes.zh: 乌克兰粮食出口通道（黑海通道受战争影响改由陆路经欧盟出口），白俄罗斯依赖对俄贸易和中国市场，摩尔多瓦贸易转向欧盟。
tradeRoutes.en: Ukrainian grain export corridors (Black Sea route disrupted by war, shifting to overland via EU), Belarus dependent on Russia and China markets, Moldova trade pivoting toward EU.

economicSystem.zh: 乌克兰为战时经济体制，市场经济叠加大规模国际援助。白俄罗斯为国家主导经济，大量国有企业，受俄罗斯经济体系捆绑。摩尔多瓦为市场经济转型中，依赖侨汇与欧盟援助。
economicSystem.en: Ukraine in wartime economy mode, market economy supplemented by massive international aid. Belarus has a state-dominated economy with extensive SOEs, tied to Russia's economic system. Moldova in market economy transition, dependent on remittances and EU aid.

category.zh: 国防与安全（乌克兰为主）

unit.en: US dollar equivalent foreign exchange reserves

treasuryDescription.zh: 乌克兰外汇储备约400亿美元（含国际援助注入），白俄罗斯储备约80亿美元（受制裁影响），摩尔多瓦储备约50亿美元。乌克兰严重依赖西方财政支持维持政府运转。
treasuryDescription.en: Ukraine forex reserves ~$40 billion (including international aid injections), Belarus reserves ~$8 billion (affected by sanctions), Moldova reserves ~$5 billion. Ukraine heavily dependent on Western fiscal support to maintain government operations.

debtLevel.zh: 乌克兰公共债务因战争飙升至GDP约90%，白俄罗斯约40%GDP，摩尔多瓦约35%GDP。
debtLevel.en: Ukraine public debt surged to ~90% of GDP due to war, Belarus ~40% GDP, Moldova ~35% GDP.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 乌克兰实行战时财政紧缩与国际援助并行，白俄罗斯受制裁约束财政空间收窄，摩尔多瓦依赖欧盟与IMF资金支持推进改革。
fiscalPolicy.en: Ukraine implements wartime fiscal austerity alongside international aid, Belarus fiscal space narrowed by sanctions, Moldova relies on EU and IMF funding to advance reforms.

description.zh: 全面动员抵抗俄罗斯入侵，在西方武器援助下具备北约级别常规作战能力，无人机战术全球领先。
description.en: Fully mobilized to resist Russian invasion, NATO-level conventional warfare capability with Western arms aid, globally leading drone warfare tactics.

description.zh: 苏联遗留装备为主，实质上已成为俄罗斯军事体系附庸，2022年俄军曾借道白俄罗斯进攻基辅。
description.en: Primarily Soviet-era equipment, effectively a vassal of Russia's military system, Russian forces used Belarus as a staging ground to attack Kyiv in 2022.

description.zh: 小规模防御性军队，装备落后，面临德涅斯特河沿岸地区俄军驻扎的安全挑战。
description.en: Small defensive army with outdated equipment, facing security challenges from Russian troops stationed in Transnistria.

commanderInChief.zh: 泽连斯基总统（乌克兰）/ 卢卡申科总统（白俄罗斯）/ 桑杜总统（摩尔多瓦）
commanderInChief.en: President Zelensky (Ukraine) / President Lukashenko (Belarus) / President Sandu (Moldova)

technology.zh: 乌克兰军事技术在战争中快速演进，无人机技术（FPV无人机/海上无人艇）、AI辅助目标识别、星链通信系统成为战场优势。白俄罗斯军事技术依赖俄罗斯。摩尔多瓦装备老旧。
technology.en: Ukrainian military technology rapidly evolving in war, with drone tech (FPV drones/naval USVs), AI-assisted target recognition, and Starlink communications as battlefield advantages. Belarus depends on Russian military tech. Moldova has outdated equipment.

unit.en: US dollars per year (including Western military aid)

threats.zh: 俄罗斯全面入侵为最大威胁（乌克兰），俄罗斯对白俄罗斯的实质控制，德涅斯特河沿岸地区紧张局势（摩尔多瓦）。
threats.en: Full-scale Russian invasion as the greatest threat (Ukraine), Russian de facto control over Belarus, Transnistria tensions (Moldova).

recentBattles.zh: 乌克兰正在进行全面反侵略战争——2023年夏季反攻（扎波罗热方向）、巴赫穆特保卫战、克里米亚方向打击俄黑海舰队。白俄罗斯与摩尔多瓦无直接战斗。
recentBattles.en: Ukraine engaged in full-scale defensive war — 2023 summer counteroffensive (Zaporizhzhia direction), Battle of Bakhmut, strikes against Russia's Black Sea Fleet toward Crimea. Belarus and Moldova not in direct combat.

populationDescription.zh: 总人口约5500万（乌克兰约3700万——战前4400万，约800万难民流落海外；白俄罗斯约930万；摩尔多瓦约260万——不含德涅斯特河沿岸约47万）。乌克兰因战争面临严重人口危机。
populationDescription.en: Total population ~55 million (Ukraine ~37M — pre-war 44M with ~8M refugees abroad; Belarus ~9.3M; Moldova ~2.6M — excluding Transnistria's ~470K). Ukraine faces severe demographic crisis due to war.

ethnicGroups.zh: 乌克兰人（约78%，乌克兰）、白俄罗斯人（约84%，白俄罗斯）、摩尔多瓦人/罗马尼亚人（约75%，摩尔多瓦）、俄罗斯少数民族、加告兹人等
ethnicGroups.en: Ukrainians (~78%, Ukraine), Belarusians (~84%, Belarus), Moldovans/Romanians (~75%, Moldova), Russian minorities, Gagauz, and others

socialClasses.zh: 乌克兰战时社会阶层流动性大，IT从业者与军人社会地位上升。白俄罗斯国有企业工人与安全机构人员为社会骨干。摩尔多瓦以农业劳动者和海外务工侨民为主。
socialClasses.en: Ukraine wartime social mobility high, IT workers and military personnel gaining social status. Belarus SOE workers and security personnel form social backbone. Moldova dominated by agricultural workers and overseas migrant workers.

lifeExpectancy.zh: 72.5岁（区域平均，乌克兰因战争可能下降）
lifeExpectancy.en: 72.5 years (regional average, Ukraine's may decline due to war)

allies.zh: 乌克兰：美国、欧盟、英国、北约成员国为核心军事与经济支援方。摩尔多瓦：罗马尼亚（密切文化与政治纽带）、欧盟。白俄罗斯：俄罗斯（联盟国家条约）。
allies.en: Ukraine: US, EU, UK, NATO members as core military and economic supporters. Moldova: Romania (close cultural and political ties), EU. Belarus: Russia (Union State treaty).

enemies.zh: 乌克兰与俄罗斯处于全面战争状态，白俄罗斯是俄罗斯的军事盟友（被西方视为战争帮凶），摩尔多瓦无正式敌国但面临俄罗斯渗透威胁。
enemies.en: Ukraine at full-scale war with Russia, Belarus is Russia's military ally (viewed by the West as war accomplice), Moldova has no formal enemies but faces Russian infiltration threats.

vassals.zh: 白俄罗斯实质上为俄罗斯附庸国。乌克兰与摩尔多瓦无附庸。
vassals.en: Belarus is effectively a Russian vassal state. Ukraine and Moldova have no vassals.

treaties.zh: 乌克兰已获欧盟候选国地位、各类双边安全保障协议。白俄罗斯与俄罗斯签有联盟国家条约、集安条约。摩尔多瓦获欧盟候选国地位。
treaties.en: Ukraine received EU candidate status and various bilateral security guarantee agreements. Belarus has Union State treaty and CSTO with Russia. Moldova received EU candidate status.

foreignPolicy.zh: 乌克兰全力西向——争取加入北约与欧盟。白俄罗斯完全倒向俄罗斯，受西方全面制裁。摩尔多瓦坚定推进欧盟一体化路线。
foreignPolicy.en: Ukraine fully Western-oriented — seeking NATO and EU membership. Belarus entirely aligned with Russia, under comprehensive Western sanctions. Moldova firmly pursuing EU integration path.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 乌克兰与摩尔多瓦2023年6月获欧盟候选国地位，乌克兰和平方案全球斡旋，白俄罗斯瓦格纳集团驻扎事件引发东欧安全震荡。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Ukraine and Moldova received EU candidate status in June 2023, Ukrainian peace formula global outreach, Wagner Group stationing in Belarus caused Eastern European security shockwaves.

era.zh: 数字化与战时技术创新

keyInnovations.zh: 乌克兰Diia数字政务平台（全球领先的全场景电子政务）、FPV无人机大规模军事应用、海上无人艇（USV）、星链卫星互联网战场应用、AI辅助炮兵目标定位。
keyInnovations.en: Ukraine's Diia digital governance platform (globally leading all-scenario e-governance), mass FPV drone military applications, naval unmanned surface vehicles (USVs), Starlink satellite internet battlefield applications, AI-assisted artillery targeting.

infrastructure.zh: 乌克兰基础设施遭战争严重破坏（能源/交通/通信），但数字基础设施韧性惊人。白俄罗斯基础设施维护良好但技术更新缓慢。摩尔多瓦基础设施落后。
infrastructure.en: Ukrainian infrastructure severely damaged by war (energy/transport/communications), but digital infrastructure shows remarkable resilience. Belarus infrastructure well-maintained but slowly modernizing. Moldova infrastructure underdeveloped.

policy.zh: 乌克兰将AI视为国防与数字治理关键工具，战时快速采纳西方AI技术（Clearview AI用于身份识别、Palantir用于战场情报）。白俄罗斯无独立AI政策，跟随俄罗斯框架。摩尔多瓦AI政策处于萌芽阶段。
policy.en: Ukraine views AI as key for defense and digital governance, rapidly adopting Western AI tech during war (Clearview AI for identification, Palantir for battlefield intelligence). Belarus has no independent AI policy, follows Russian framework. Moldova AI policy in nascent stage.

regulatoryStance.zh: 乌克兰战时对AI采用务实开放态度，优先服务军事与安全需求。白俄罗斯受俄罗斯AI监管影响。摩尔多瓦参照欧盟AI法案方向。
regulatoryStance.en: Ukraine takes pragmatic and open approach to AI during wartime, prioritizing military and security needs. Belarus influenced by Russian AI regulation. Moldova referencing EU AI Act direction.

investmentScale.zh: 极其有限，乌克兰战前AI投资约2亿美元/年，战时大幅萎缩但军事AI应用获西方技术援助。白俄罗斯与摩尔多瓦AI投资极少。
investmentScale.en: Extremely limited, Ukraine's pre-war AI investment ~$200 million/year, significantly shrunk during war but military AI applications receive Western tech assistance. Belarus and Moldova AI investment minimal.

capabilities.zh: 利用计算机视觉与卫星影像实现战场目标自动识别与追踪。
capabilities.en: Automated battlefield target recognition and tracking using computer vision and satellite imagery.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的英语写作辅助工具，全球用户超3000万。
keyProducts.en: AI-powered English writing assistant with over 30 million global users.

headquarters.zh: 乌克兰裔联合创始人创立（总部已迁至旧金山）
headquarters.en: Founded by Ukrainian co-founders (HQ relocated to San Francisco)

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的智能安防系统，产品销往全球130多个国家。
keyProducts.en: AI-powered smart security systems, products sold to over 130 countries.

title.zh: 乌克兰数字转型部长兼副总理
title.en: Ukraine Minister of Digital Transformation and Deputy PM

contribution.zh: 推动乌克兰数字化抗战，Diia平台开发者，协调星链与AI工具的战场应用。
contribution.en: Driving Ukraine's digital resistance, Diia platform architect, coordinating Starlink and AI tool battlefield applications.

researchFocus.zh: 军事AI应用（无人机自主飞行、目标识别）、计算机视觉、网络安全AI、数字政务AI。
researchFocus.en: Military AI applications (autonomous drone flight, target recognition), computer vision, cybersecurity AI, digital governance AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 乌克兰计算基础设施受战争破坏但云服务保持运转（依赖AWS/Azure等国际云平台）。白俄罗斯依赖俄罗斯计算资源。摩尔多瓦算力极其有限。
computeInfrastructure.en: Ukraine's compute infrastructure damaged by war but cloud services remain operational (relying on AWS/Azure international cloud platforms). Belarus depends on Russian compute resources. Moldova has extremely limited compute.

talentPool.zh: 乌克兰战前拥有约30万IT人才（欧洲第一梯队），战争导致部分人才外流但核心IT产业保持远程运营。白俄罗斯IT人才2020年抗议后大量流亡。摩尔多瓦IT人才极少。
talentPool.en: Ukraine had ~300,000 IT professionals pre-war (European first tier), war caused some talent outflow but core IT industry maintains remote operations. Belarusian IT talent fled en masse after 2020 protests. Moldova has very few IT professionals.

globalRanking.zh: 乌克兰在军事AI应用领域因实战经验处于独特领先地位，但民用AI发展受战争严重制约。白俄罗斯与摩尔多瓦AI发展极为初级。
globalRanking.en: Ukraine holds a unique leading position in military AI applications due to combat experience, but civilian AI development severely constrained by war. Belarus and Moldova AI development is extremely nascent.

outlook.zh: 乌克兰战后重建将是全球最大规模的数字化国家重建实验，AI有望在重建过程中发挥核心作用。短期内，军事AI应用将继续快速发展。
outlook.en: Ukraine's post-war reconstruction will be the world's largest digital nation-rebuilding experiment, with AI poised to play a central role. In the short term, military AI applications will continue rapid development.

strengths.zh: 乌克兰全民抗战意志与国际支持、强大IT人才储备、战时技术创新能力（无人机/数字政务）、丰富农业资源（黑土地带）。
strengths.en: Ukraine's national resistance will and international support, strong IT talent reserves, wartime tech innovation (drones/digital governance), rich agricultural resources (black soil belt).

weaknesses.zh: 持续战争导致巨大人员伤亡与基础设施毁坏、白俄罗斯威权体制与俄罗斯附庸地位、摩尔多瓦经济脆弱与德涅斯特河沿岸分裂问题、区域整体人口危机。
weaknesses.en: Ongoing war causing massive casualties and infrastructure destruction, Belarus's authoritarian regime and Russian vassal status, Moldova's economic fragility and Transnistria separatism, regional demographic crisis.

outlook.zh: 区域命运与俄乌战争走向高度绑定。乌克兰若获胜将开启欧洲一体化新时代，白俄罗斯政权变革可能随之而来。摩尔多瓦的欧盟之路取决于区域安全环境改善。
outlook.en: Regional fate highly bound to the Russia-Ukraine war outcome. A Ukrainian victory would open a new era of European integration, potentially triggering Belarus regime change. Moldova's EU path depends on improved regional security environment.

description.zh: 2023年的东欧三国——乌克兰、白俄罗斯和摩尔多瓦——处于俄乌战争的风暴中心。乌克兰正进行自二战以来欧洲最大规模的军事冲突，全民动员抵抗俄罗斯入侵。数十万乌军在西方武器援助下展开反攻，FPV无人机与AI辅助目标识别等技术创新改变了现代战争面貌。白俄罗斯卢卡申科政权实质沦为俄罗斯附庸，国内镇压与国际制裁并行。摩尔多瓦在总统桑杜领导下坚定推进欧盟一体化路线，但德涅斯特河沿岸地区俄军驻扎构成持续安全威胁。这一区域是2023年全球地缘政治最紧张的热点之一。
description.en: The three Eastern European states — Ukraine, Belarus, and Moldova — in 2023 sit at the epicenter of the Russia-Ukraine war. Ukraine is fighting Europe's largest military conflict since WWII, with national mobilization resisting Russian invasion. Hundreds of thousands of Ukrainian troops counterattack with Western arms support, while tech innovations like FPV drones and AI-assisted targeting transform modern warfare. Belarus under Lukashenko has effectively become a Russian vassal state, with domestic repression and international sanctions in parallel. Moldova under President Sandu firmly pursues EU integration, but Russian troops in Transnistria pose a persistent security threat. This region is one of the most geopolitically tense hotspots globally in 2023.

dynasty.zh: 右翼联盟执政期（意大利兄弟党主导）

governmentForm.zh: 议会制共和国，总统为国家元首（礼仪性），总理掌握实权，参众两院制议会。含梵蒂冈城国与圣马力诺两个微型国家。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary republic with a ceremonial president as head of state, prime minister holding executive power, and a bicameral parliament. Includes the microstates of Vatican City and San Marino.

socialStructure.zh: 南北经济差距显著（北部工业发达、南部相对落后），老龄化严重，家族纽带在社会结构中根深蒂固，中小企业主阶层庞大。
socialStructure.en: Significant North-South economic divide (industrialized north vs. underdeveloped south), severe aging, deeply rooted family ties in social structure, and a large SME owner class.

rulingClass.zh: 政党精英、工业家族（北部）、天主教会（梵蒂冈影响力）、公务员体系与工会势力。
rulingClass.en: Party elites, industrial families (north), Catholic Church (Vatican influence), civil service bureaucracy, and trade union power.

succession.zh: 议会选举产生政府，总理由总统任命（通常为议会多数党领袖），总统由议会联合会议选举，任期7年。
succession.en: Government formed through parliamentary elections, PM appointed by president (usually majority party leader), president elected by joint parliamentary session for a 7-year term.

structure.zh: 两院制议会（参议院与众议院），总理领导内阁行使行政权。2022年议会改革缩减议员数量。宪法法院行使违宪审查权。20个大区拥有立法自治权。
structure.en: Bicameral parliament (Senate and Chamber of Deputies), PM leads cabinet exercising executive power. 2022 parliamentary reform reduced legislator numbers. Constitutional Court exercises judicial review. 20 regions have legislative autonomy.

function.zh: 管理国家财政、税收、公共债务与欧盟经济政策协调。
function.en: Manages state finances, taxation, public debt, and EU economic policy coordination.

name.en: Ministry of Enterprises and Made in Italy

function.zh: 推动工业发展、品牌意大利战略、中小企业支持与数字化转型。
function.en: Promoting industrial development, Made in Italy brand strategy, SME support, and digital transformation.

function.zh: 管理意大利武装力量，参与北约行动与地中海安全。
function.en: Managing Italian armed forces, participating in NATO operations and Mediterranean security.

name.zh: 数字创新与技术转型部

function.zh: 推动公共服务数字化、AI战略实施与数字基础设施建设。
function.en: Advancing public service digitalization, AI strategy implementation, and digital infrastructure development.

localAdmin.zh: 20个大区（5个特别自治区）、107个省、约7900个市镇构成多层级地方治理体系，南部地方治理能力相对较弱。
localAdmin.en: 20 regions (5 with special autonomy), 107 provinces, ~7,900 municipalities form a multi-tier local governance system, with relatively weaker local governance in the south.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，以1948年共和国宪法为基础，受欧盟法律体系约束。司法效率低下是长期问题，案件积压严重。
legalSystem.en: Civil law system based on the 1948 republican constitution, bound by EU legal framework. Judicial inefficiency is a longstanding issue with severe case backlogs.

taxationSystem.zh: 累进所得税（最高43%）、增值税22%、地方附加税。税负在欧盟中偏高，地下经济与逃税问题突出。
taxationSystem.en: Progressive income tax (up to 43%), 22% VAT, local surcharges. Tax burden above EU average, with significant underground economy and tax evasion.

religion.zh: 天主教为主（约80%名义信徒），梵蒂冈城国为天主教全球中心，世俗化趋势明显
religion.en: Predominantly Catholic (~80% nominal adherents), Vatican City is the global center of Catholicism, with a clear secularization trend

philosophy.zh: 人文主义传统深厚（文艺复兴发源地），审美与生活品质至上的文化价值观，天主教社会思想影响犹存。
philosophy.en: Deep humanist traditions (birthplace of the Renaissance), cultural values prioritizing aesthetics and quality of life, continued influence of Catholic social thought.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（意大利语）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Italian)

culturalAchievements.zh: 世界遗产数量全球第一（58处）、时尚产业（米兰时装周）、超级跑车（法拉利/兰博基尼/玛莎拉蒂）、美食文化（联合国非遗）、歌剧传统、电影大师传统（费里尼/维斯孔蒂）。
culturalAchievements.en: Most UNESCO World Heritage Sites globally (58), fashion industry (Milan Fashion Week), supercars (Ferrari/Lamborghini/Maserati), culinary culture (UNESCO heritage), opera tradition, cinematic master tradition (Fellini/Visconti).

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（意大利语为官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Romance (Italian as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 全球第八大经济体（欧盟第三），制造业实力雄厚（全球第二大制造业顺差国），但经济增长长期低迷，南北差距是结构性痼疾。2023年经济缓慢复苏但通胀压力持续。
gdpDescription.en: World's 8th largest economy (EU third), strong manufacturing (second largest global manufacturing surplus), but chronic low growth with North-South divide as a structural ailment. 2023 saw slow recovery but persistent inflation pressure.

mainIndustries.zh: 机械制造、汽车（菲亚特/法拉利）、时尚奢侈品（Gucci/Prada/Armani）、食品饮料、旅游、化工、航空航天、造船
mainIndustries.en: Mechanical manufacturing, automotive (Fiat/Ferrari), fashion and luxury goods (Gucci/Prada/Armani), food and beverage, tourism, chemicals, aerospace, shipbuilding

tradeGoods.zh: 机械设备、汽车、奢侈品、药品、精密仪器、食品（葡萄酒/橄榄油/意面）、旅游服务
tradeGoods.en: Machinery, automobiles, luxury goods, pharmaceuticals, precision instruments, food (wine/olive oil/pasta), tourism services

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数约18万美元，意大利家庭储蓄传统较强，房产是最主要财富形式，但年轻一代面临就业与购房压力。
householdWealth.en: Median household wealth ~$180,000, strong Italian savings tradition with property as the main wealth form, but younger generation faces employment and housing pressure.

tradeRoutes.zh: 欧盟单一市场为核心贸易圈、地中海贸易、跨大西洋贸易，中国为亚洲最大贸易伙伴（2023年退出一带一路倡议）。
tradeRoutes.en: EU single market as the core trade circle, Mediterranean trade, transatlantic trade, China as the largest Asian trade partner (Italy withdrew from Belt and Road Initiative in 2023).

economicSystem.zh: 混合市场经济，国有企业在能源和国防领域占重要地位，中小企业（约400万家）构成经济脊梁，劳动市场刚性较强。
economicSystem.en: Mixed market economy with SOEs playing important roles in energy and defense, SMEs (~4 million) forming the economic backbone, and relatively rigid labor markets.

unit.zh: 美元等值外汇与黄金储备
unit.en: US dollar equivalent forex and gold reserves

treasuryDescription.zh: 意大利央行持有约2452吨黄金储备（全球第三），但公共债务高达约2.9万亿美元（GDP的140%），是欧元区债务最高的国家之一。
treasuryDescription.en: Bank of Italy holds ~2,452 tonnes of gold reserves (world's third largest), but public debt reaches ~$2.9 trillion (140% of GDP), among the eurozone's highest.

debtLevel.zh: 公共债务约占GDP的140%，为欧元区第二高（仅次于希腊），债务可持续性是长期挑战。
debtLevel.en: Public debt at ~140% of GDP, second highest in the eurozone (after Greece), debt sustainability is a long-term challenge.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 受欧盟财政纪律约束，梅洛尼政府在扩张性民生支出与财政整顿之间艰难平衡。欧盟「下一代EU」基金为意大利分配1910亿欧元（最大受益国）。
fiscalPolicy.en: Constrained by EU fiscal discipline, the Meloni government balances between expansionary social spending and fiscal consolidation. EU NextGenerationEU allocated €191 billion to Italy (largest beneficiary).

description.zh: 北约成员军队，参与多项海外维和与反恐任务。
description.en: NATO member force, participating in multiple overseas peacekeeping and counter-terrorism missions.

description.zh: 地中海主要海军力量之一，拥有轻型航母「加富尔号」，承担地中海安全与移民拦截任务。
description.en: One of the major Mediterranean naval forces, with light carrier Cavour, responsible for Mediterranean security and migrant interception.

description.zh: 装备台风战斗机与F-35B，北约南翼空防重要力量。
description.en: Equipped with Typhoon fighters and F-35Bs, an important force for NATO's southern flank air defense.

description.zh: 兼具军事与执法功能的特殊武装力量，承担国内安全、反恐与海外宪兵任务。
description.en: Special armed force with both military and law enforcement functions, handling domestic security, counter-terrorism, and overseas gendarmerie missions.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统塞尔吉奥·马塔雷拉（名义），总理梅洛尼（实际）

technology.zh: 中上水平军事技术，F-35B隐身战机、自主研发的「达芬奇」军用无人机、先进造船能力（弗雷加特级护卫舰）。莱昂纳多（Leonardo）为全球十大军工企业。
technology.en: Upper-middle military technology with F-35B stealth fighters, domestically developed 'Da Vinci' military drones, advanced shipbuilding (FREMM frigates). Leonardo is a top-10 global defense company.

threats.zh: 地中海非法移民潮、北非与中东不稳定外溢、俄罗斯威胁（北约框架内）、网络安全威胁。
threats.en: Mediterranean illegal immigration waves, North Africa and Middle East instability spillover, Russian threat (within NATO framework), cybersecurity threats.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接军事冲突。参与北约增强前沿部署、地中海反移民走私巡逻、索马里反海盗行动。
recentBattles.en: No direct military conflict. Participating in NATO enhanced forward presence, Mediterranean anti-migrant-smuggling patrols, Somali anti-piracy operations.

populationDescription.zh: 总人口约5900万（含梵蒂冈城约800人、圣马力诺约3.4万人），是欧洲老龄化最严重的国家之一，出生率仅1.24，自然人口持续减少。
populationDescription.en: Total population ~59 million (including Vatican City ~800 and San Marino ~34,000), one of Europe's most aged nations with a birth rate of only 1.24 and continued natural population decline.

ethnicGroups.zh: 意大利人为绝对主体（约92%），北非与东欧移民群体增长（罗马尼亚裔约120万、摩洛哥裔约47万）
ethnicGroups.en: Italians as absolute majority (~92%), growing North African and Eastern European immigrant communities (Romanian ~1.2M, Moroccan ~470K)

socialClasses.zh: 北部工业资本家与专业中产、中小企业主阶层庞大、南部高失业率青年、公务员群体、农业劳动者。
