socialClasses.en: Northern industrial capitalists and professional middle class, large SME owner class, high-unemployment southern youth, civil servant groups, agricultural workers.

allies.zh: 欧盟与北约核心成员国、美国、法国（密切但有竞争）、德国。梅洛尼政府维持大西洋主义立场的同时加强与中东北非关系。
allies.en: Core EU and NATO member, United States, France (close but competitive), Germany. Meloni government maintains Atlanticist stance while strengthening Middle East and North Africa ties.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但在移民问题上与北非国家存在摩擦，对俄罗斯持制裁立场。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, but friction with North African countries on migration, maintains sanctions stance against Russia.

vassals.zh: 无附庸国。梵蒂冈城国与圣马力诺为独立微型国家，但在安全和经济上依赖意大利。
vassals.en: No vassal states. Vatican City and San Marino are independent microstates but dependent on Italy for security and economics.

treaties.zh: 北约条约、欧盟里斯本条约、申根协定、拉特兰条约（与梵蒂冈关系）。
treaties.en: NATO Treaty, EU Lisbon Treaty, Schengen Agreement, Lateran Treaty (relations with Vatican).

foreignPolicy.zh: 大西洋主义与欧洲主义并行，梅洛尼在保持亲美立场的同时积极推动地中海与非洲外交（马泰伊计划），在欧盟内部就移民政策据理力争。
foreignPolicy.en: Atlanticism and Europeanism in parallel, Meloni maintains pro-US stance while actively promoting Mediterranean and African diplomacy (Mattei Plan), firmly advocating for migration policy within the EU.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年意大利退出中国一带一路倡议备忘录，梅洛尼推出面向非洲的「马泰伊计划」以解决移民根源问题，主导兰佩杜萨岛移民危机应对。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Italy withdrew from China's Belt and Road Initiative MoU in 2023, Meloni launched the 'Mattei Plan' for Africa to address root causes of migration, led Lampedusa migration crisis response.

era.zh: 先进工业与数字化转型期
era.en: Advanced industrial and digital transformation era

keyInnovations.zh: 莱昂纳多集团航空航天与国防技术、法拉利/兰博基尼超级跑车工程、意法半导体（STMicroelectronics）全球主要芯片制造商、ENI能源技术创新。
keyInnovations.en: Leonardo Group aerospace and defense technology, Ferrari/Lamborghini supercar engineering, STMicroelectronics as a major global chipmaker, ENI energy technology innovation.

infrastructure.zh: 北部基础设施发达（高铁/高速公路），南部相对薄弱。5G部署进展中（TIM/Vodafone Italy主导），数字政务改革加速但起步晚于北欧。
infrastructure.en: Northern infrastructure advanced (high-speed rail/highways), southern relatively weak. 5G deployment ongoing (TIM/Vodafone Italy-led), digital governance reforms accelerating but lagging Northern Europe.

policy.zh: 2023年发布国家AI战略更新版，梅洛尼政府积极推动AI产业发展，主持2024年G7峰会将AI列为核心议题。教皇方济各多次就AI伦理发声（梵蒂冈AI伦理宣言）。
policy.en: Released updated national AI strategy in 2023, Meloni government actively promotes AI industry development, G7 2024 summit (Italy hosts) will feature AI as a core topic. Pope Francis has spoken on AI ethics multiple times (Vatican AI Ethics Declaration).

regulatoryStance.zh: 以欧盟AI法案为基础框架，意大利在创意产业AI版权问题上态度较为保守，曾短暂封禁ChatGPT（2023年3-4月）。
regulatoryStance.en: EU AI Act as the foundational framework, Italy relatively conservative on AI copyright in creative industries, briefly banned ChatGPT (March-April 2023).

investmentScale.zh: AI投资约20亿美元/年，低于德法但在加速增长。CDP Venture Capital与私人资本对AI创业投资增加。
investmentScale.en: AI investment ~$2 billion per year, below Germany and France but accelerating. CDP Venture Capital and private capital increasing AI startup investment.

developer.zh: 意大利国家研究委员会/罗马大学
developer.en: Italian National Research Council / Sapienza University of Rome

capabilities.zh: 基于Meta LLaMA微调的意大利语大语言模型，支持意大利语自然语言处理。
capabilities.en: Italian language LLM fine-tuned from Meta's LLaMA, supporting Italian NLP.

keyProducts.zh: 国防AI系统、无人机自主系统、网络安全AI解决方案。
keyProducts.en: Defense AI systems, autonomous drone systems, cybersecurity AI solutions.

keyProducts.zh: AI边缘计算芯片、微控制器、传感器，为全球AI设备提供核心硬件。
keyProducts.en: AI edge computing chips, microcontrollers, sensors, providing core hardware for global AI devices.

headquarters.zh: 日内瓦（意法合资，主要运营在意大利）
headquarters.en: Geneva (Franco-Italian joint venture, major operations in Italy)

keyProducts.zh: AI数据分析与商业智能平台。
keyProducts.en: AI data analytics and business intelligence platform.

contribution.zh: 在全球范围内积极倡导AI伦理，发布「罗马呼吁」倡议，呼吁以人为本的AI发展。
contribution.en: Actively advocating AI ethics globally, issuing the 'Rome Call' initiative, calling for human-centered AI development.

title.zh: 意大利国家网络安全局局长
title.en: Director of Italy's National Cybersecurity Agency

contribution.zh: 推动意大利网络安全与AI安全策略制定。
contribution.en: Advancing Italy's cybersecurity and AI safety strategy formulation.

researchFocus.zh: 文化遗产AI保护（数字修复/虚拟博物馆）、工业4.0与智能制造、时尚与设计AI、国防AI、农业精准AI。
researchFocus.en: Cultural heritage AI preservation (digital restoration/virtual museums), Industry 4.0 and smart manufacturing, fashion and design AI, defense AI, precision agriculture AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: CINECA超算中心（Leonardo超级计算机，欧洲第四快）为主要算力设施，ENI的HPC5超算支持能源AI研究。通过EuroHPC获取额外算力。
computeInfrastructure.en: CINECA computing center (Leonardo supercomputer, Europe's fourth fastest) as main compute facility, ENI's HPC5 supporting energy AI research. Additional compute via EuroHPC.

talentPool.zh: 理工科教育水平高但人才外流严重（「脑力流失」），AI研究人才集中在米兰、罗马、都灵等城市的顶尖大学。
talentPool.en: High STEM education levels but severe brain drain, AI research talent concentrated in top universities in Milan, Rome, Turin.

globalRanking.zh: AI发展水平居全球中上游，在国防AI、半导体和文化遗产AI领域有独特优势，但商业AI生态弱于英法德。
globalRanking.en: AI development at upper-middle global level, with unique advantages in defense AI, semiconductors, and cultural heritage AI, but commercial AI ecosystem weaker than UK, France, Germany.

outlook.zh: 2024年G7轮值主席国身份将推动意大利在全球AI治理中发挥更大角色。梵蒂冈的AI伦理倡导为意大利赋予独特软实力。制造业AI升级与文化产业AI应用是差异化方向。
outlook.en: G7 presidency in 2024 will push Italy into a bigger role in global AI governance. Vatican's AI ethics advocacy gives Italy unique soft power. Manufacturing AI upgrades and cultural industry AI applications are differentiation directions.

strengths.zh: 全球制造业强国（第七）、文化软实力无与伦比、G7成员与北约核心、莱昂纳多与意法半导体等科技巨头、梵蒂冈赋予的全球道德话语权。
strengths.en: Global manufacturing powerhouse (seventh), unmatched cultural soft power, G7 member and NATO core, tech giants like Leonardo and STMicroelectronics, global moral authority conferred by the Vatican.

weaknesses.zh: 公共债务高企（GDP的140%）、南北经济鸿沟、严重老龄化与低出生率、官僚体系效率低下、人才外流严重、政局不稳传统（频繁换政府）。
weaknesses.en: High public debt (140% GDP), North-South economic divide, severe aging and low birth rate, bureaucratic inefficiency, serious brain drain, tradition of political instability (frequent government changes).

outlook.zh: 梅洛尼政府稳定性超出预期，欧盟复苏基金为改革提供契机。若能有效利用1910亿欧元欧盟资金推动数字化与绿色转型，意大利有望在制造业AI与文化创意AI领域找到独特定位。
outlook.en: Meloni government stability exceeds expectations, EU recovery fund provides reform opportunities. If Italy effectively utilizes €191 billion in EU funds for digital and green transformation, it can find a unique position in manufacturing AI and cultural-creative AI.

description.zh: 2023年的意大利半岛以意大利共和国为主体，含梵蒂冈城国与圣马力诺两个微型国家。意大利是全球第八大经济体，GDP约2.1万亿美元，在机械制造、时尚奢侈品、超级跑车和美食文化领域享有全球声誉。总理梅洛尼领导的右翼联盟政府展现出超预期的稳定性和务实性。然而，高达GDP 140%的公共债务、严重的南北差距与欧洲最低的出生率构成结构性挑战。在AI领域，意大利处于中等水平，拥有Leonardo超级计算机和国防科技巨头莱昂纳多，教皇方济各的AI伦理倡导为意大利赋予独特全球话语权。2023年意大利退出一带一路倡议、筹备2024年G7峰会，标志着其在全球地缘政治中更加积极的角色。
description.en: The Italian Peninsula in 2023 centers on the Italian Republic, including the microstates of Vatican City and San Marino. Italy is the world's 8th largest economy with GDP ~$2.1 trillion, enjoying global renown in mechanical manufacturing, fashion and luxury goods, supercars, and culinary culture. PM Meloni's right-wing coalition government has demonstrated unexpected stability and pragmatism. However, public debt at 140% of GDP, severe North-South divide, and Europe's lowest birth rate pose structural challenges. In AI, Italy is at a moderate level with the Leonardo supercomputer and defense giant Leonardo SpA, while Pope Francis's AI ethics advocacy gives Italy unique global voice. Italy's 2023 withdrawal from the Belt and Road Initiative and preparations for the 2024 G7 summit signal a more active role in global geopolitics.

ruler.zh: 托卡耶夫（哈萨克斯坦）/ 米尔济约耶夫（乌兹别克斯坦）/ 扎帕罗夫（吉尔吉斯斯坦）/ 拉赫蒙（塔吉克斯坦）/ 别尔德穆哈梅多夫（土库曼斯坦）

dynasty.zh: 威权总统制（程度不一：土库曼斯坦最严，吉尔吉斯斯坦相对宽松）
dynasty.en: Authoritarian presidential systems (varying degrees: Turkmenistan most severe, Kyrgyzstan relatively relaxed)

capital.zh: 阿斯塔纳/塔什干/比什凯克/杜尚别/阿什哈巴德

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国，权力高度集中于总统。哈萨克斯坦2022年后推进有限政治改革，乌兹别克斯坦渐进开放，吉尔吉斯斯坦经历多次政权更迭但民主化有限，塔吉克斯坦与土库曼斯坦为高度威权体制。
governmentForm.en: Presidential republics with power highly concentrated in presidents. Kazakhstan pursuing limited political reforms post-2022, Uzbekistan gradually opening, Kyrgyzstan experienced multiple regime changes with limited democratization, Tajikistan and Turkmenistan highly authoritarian.

socialStructure.zh: 以部族/氏族网络为基础的社会结构，威权体制下的裙带关系网络，城乡二元分化，年轻人口占比高（中位年龄约28岁）。
socialStructure.en: Social structure based on tribal/clan networks, cronyism networks under authoritarian systems, urban-rural dual divide, high youth population share (median age ~28).

rulingClass.zh: 总统家族与亲信网络、安全机构高层、能源与矿业寡头、传统部族精英。
rulingClass.en: Presidential families and inner circles, security apparatus leadership, energy and mining oligarchs, traditional tribal elites.

succession.zh: 名义上总统选举，实际为控制性继承。哈萨克斯坦纳扎尔巴耶夫向托卡耶夫权力交接仍在消化中，土库曼斯坦由父传子（老别尔德穆哈梅多夫传位于儿子），塔吉克斯坦拉赫蒙执政近30年。
succession.en: Nominally presidential elections, effectively controlled succession. Kazakhstan's Nazarbayev-to-Tokayev transition still being digested, Turkmenistan father-to-son transfer (elder to younger Berdimuhamedow), Tajikistan's Rahmon in power for nearly 30 years.

structure.zh: 总统主导型政府，议会功能弱化，司法缺乏独立性。各国安全机构权力庞大。哈萨克斯坦与乌兹别克斯坦行政效率相对较高，其余国家治理能力较弱。
structure.en: President-dominated governments with weakened parliaments and lacking judicial independence. Security agencies hold extensive power. Kazakhstan and Uzbekistan have relatively higher administrative efficiency, others have weaker governance capacity.

function.zh: 国家权力核心，制定所有重大政策与人事任命。
function.en: Core of state power, setting all major policies and personnel appointments.

function.zh: 管理国内安全、情报、反恐与政治控制。
function.en: Managing domestic security, intelligence, counter-terrorism, and political control.

name.zh: 各国能源与矿产资源部

function.zh: 管理石油、天然气与矿产资源开采，是国家收入核心部门。
function.en: Managing oil, natural gas, and mineral resource extraction, core departments for national revenue.

function.zh: 推动电子政务与通信基础设施建设，但数字化水平较低。
function.en: Advancing e-governance and communications infrastructure, but at low digitalization levels.

localAdmin.zh: 各国分州/省管理，中央控制力强。哈萨克斯坦幅员广大（全球第九大国），地方治理依赖州长（总统任命）体系。吉尔吉斯斯坦地方自治相对发展。
localAdmin.en: Countries governed by oblasts/provinces with strong central control. Kazakhstan's vast territory (world's 9th largest) relies on governor systems (presidential appointments). Kyrgyzstan has relatively developed local autonomy.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系与苏联遗产混合，司法独立性不足，总统对司法有较大影响力。哈萨克斯坦推进国际仲裁中心（AIFC）建设以吸引外资。
legalSystem.en: Mix of civil law and Soviet legacy, insufficient judicial independence, presidents have significant influence over judiciary. Kazakhstan advancing the AIFC international arbitration center to attract investment.

taxationSystem.zh: 较低税率吸引投资：哈萨克斯坦企业税20%、个人所得税10%，乌兹别克斯坦近年大幅简化税制。能源出口收入为主要财政来源。
taxationSystem.en: Low tax rates to attract investment: Kazakhstan corporate tax 20%, personal income tax 10%, Uzbekistan significantly simplified tax system recently. Energy export revenue as main fiscal source.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教为主（各国穆斯林人口70-90%），世俗国家体制，宗教活动受政府管控
religion.en: Sunni Islam predominant (Muslim population 70-90% across countries), secular state systems, religious activities government-controlled

philosophy.zh: 突厥-波斯文化传统与苏联世俗遗产交织，部族忠诚与国家认同并存，后苏联民族建构进程中。伊斯兰复兴与世俗治理之间的张力是共同课题。
philosophy.en: Turkic-Persian cultural traditions intertwined with Soviet secular legacy, coexistence of tribal loyalty and national identity, ongoing post-Soviet nation-building. Tension between Islamic revival and secular governance is a shared challenge.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（哈萨克斯坦/乌兹别克斯坦正从西里尔转换）、西里尔字母（吉尔吉斯/塔吉克）、拉丁改良字母（土库曼）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan transitioning from Cyrillic), Cyrillic (Kyrgyz/Tajik), modified Latin (Turkmen)

culturalAchievements.zh: 丝绸之路文化遗产（撒马尔罕/布哈拉为联合国世界遗产）、传统游牧文化（哈萨克骑马文化/吉尔吉斯毡房）、突厥音乐传统、2017年阿斯塔纳世博会。
culturalAchievements.en: Silk Road cultural heritage (Samarkand/Bukhara as UNESCO World Heritage), traditional nomadic culture (Kazakh equestrian culture/Kyrgyz yurts), Turkic music traditions, 2017 Astana Expo.

languageFamily.zh: 突厥语族（哈萨克语/乌兹别克语/吉尔吉斯语/土库曼语）、印欧语系伊朗语族（塔吉克语），俄语仍为通用语言
languageFamily.en: Turkic (Kazakh/Uzbek/Kyrgyz/Turkmen), Indo-European Iranian (Tajik), Russian remains a lingua franca

gdpDescription.zh: 哈萨克斯坦GDP约2200亿美元（区域最大经济体），乌兹别克斯坦约800亿美元（人口最多），吉尔吉斯斯坦约120亿美元，塔吉克斯坦约100亿美元，土库曼斯坦约约600亿美元（数据不透明）。经济高度依赖能源与矿产资源出口。
gdpDescription.en: Kazakhstan GDP ~$220 billion (largest regional economy), Uzbekistan ~$80 billion (most populous), Kyrgyzstan ~$12 billion, Tajikistan ~$10 billion, Turkmenistan ~$60 billion (opaque data). Economies highly dependent on energy and mineral resource exports.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气（哈萨克/土库曼）、铀矿开采（哈萨克斯坦占全球40%）、棉花（乌兹别克）、黄金开采（乌兹别克/吉尔吉斯）、铝业（塔吉克）、水电（吉尔吉斯/塔吉克）
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas (Kazakhstan/Turkmenistan), uranium mining (Kazakhstan at 40% global supply), cotton (Uzbekistan), gold mining (Uzbekistan/Kyrgyzstan), aluminum (Tajikistan), hydropower (Kyrgyzstan/Tajikistan)

tradeGoods.zh: 原油、天然气、铀、棉花、黄金、铝、稀土矿物、农产品
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil, natural gas, uranium, cotton, gold, aluminum, rare earth minerals, agricultural products

name.zh: 哈萨克斯坦坚戈/乌兹别克斯坦索姆/吉尔吉斯斯坦索姆/塔吉克斯坦索莫尼/土库曼斯坦马纳特
name.en: Kazakh Tenge / Uzbek Som / Kyrgyz Som / Tajik Somoni / Turkmen Manat

unitName.zh: 坚戈/索姆/索莫尼/马纳特

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数差异大：哈萨克斯坦约1.5万美元，其余国家约3000-8000美元。城乡差距与地区差距极为显著。
householdWealth.en: Wide variation in median household wealth: Kazakhstan ~$15,000, other countries ~$3,000-8,000. Urban-rural and regional disparities extremely pronounced.

tradeRoutes.zh: 中国-中亚天然气管道、里海石油管道（BTC/CPC）、中欧班列过境、传统丝绸之路复兴（一带一路）、对俄贸易通道。
tradeRoutes.en: China-Central Asia gas pipeline, Caspian oil pipelines (BTC/CPC), China-Europe rail transit, revived Silk Road (Belt and Road), Russia trade corridors.

economicSystem.zh: 国家资本主义为主导，能源与矿产资源由国有企业或总统亲信控制，乌兹别克斯坦近年推进市场化改革，哈萨克斯坦的阿斯塔纳国际金融中心试图吸引外国投资。
economicSystem.en: State capitalism dominant, energy and mineral resources controlled by SOEs or presidential cronies, Uzbekistan pursuing market reforms recently, Kazakhstan's Astana International Financial Centre attempting to attract foreign investment.

unit.zh: 美元（含哈萨克斯坦国家基金约600亿美元）
unit.en: US dollars (including Kazakhstan National Fund ~$60 billion)

treasuryDescription.zh: 哈萨克斯坦国家基金（Samruk-Kazyna管理）约600亿美元是区域最大财政缓冲。土库曼斯坦声称有大量天然气外汇储备但数据不透明。其余国家储备有限。
treasuryDescription.en: Kazakhstan's National Fund (managed by Samruk-Kazyna) at ~$60 billion is the region's largest fiscal buffer. Turkmenistan claims large gas-derived forex reserves but data is opaque. Other countries have limited reserves.

debtLevel.zh: 哈萨克斯坦公共债务约25%GDP，乌兹别克斯坦约35%GDP，吉尔吉斯斯坦约55%GDP，塔吉克斯坦约40%GDP。整体债务水平适中但对外债依赖度高。
debtLevel.en: Kazakhstan public debt ~25% GDP, Uzbekistan ~35% GDP, Kyrgyzstan ~55% GDP, Tajikistan ~40% GDP. Overall moderate debt levels but high dependence on external debt.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 哈萨克斯坦通过国家基金稳定财政，乌兹别克斯坦加大社会支出与基建投入，吉尔吉斯斯坦与塔吉克斯坦依赖国际贷款与援助。
fiscalPolicy.en: Kazakhstan stabilizes finances through the National Fund, Uzbekistan increasing social and infrastructure spending, Kyrgyzstan and Tajikistan rely on international loans and aid.

description.zh: 以苏联遗留装备为主，哈萨克斯坦正推进军队现代化（采购土耳其无人机与西方装备）。
description.en: Primarily Soviet-era equipment, Kazakhstan pursuing military modernization (procuring Turkish drones and Western equipment).

description.zh: 以苏制战机为主（苏-27/米格-29），哈萨克斯坦少量引进现代装备。
description.en: Primarily Soviet-era fighters (Su-27/MiG-29), Kazakhstan with limited modern acquisitions.

name.zh: 各国安全部队与准军事力量

description.zh: 国内安全维稳力量庞大，各国国民卫队/内务部队在2022年哈萨克斯坦骚乱中发挥关键作用。
description.en: Large domestic security and stability forces, national guards/interior troops played key roles in the 2022 Kazakhstan unrest.

commanderInChief.zh: 各国总统兼任武装力量最高统帅
commanderInChief.en: National presidents serve as supreme commanders of armed forces

technology.zh: 军事技术整体落后，以苏联遗留装备为基础。哈萨克斯坦从土耳其采购Bayraktar TB2无人机，从以色列采购防空系统。土库曼斯坦大量采购意大利海军舰艇（里海防御）。
technology.en: Overall backward military technology based on Soviet-era legacy. Kazakhstan procures Bayraktar TB2 drones from Turkey and air defense from Israel. Turkmenistan purchases Italian naval vessels (Caspian defense).

threats.zh: 俄罗斯地缘影响力、阿富汗塔利班外溢风险、费尔干纳盆地族群紧张、水资源争端（上下游矛盾）、伊斯兰极端主义渗透。
threats.en: Russian geopolitical influence, Afghan Taliban spillover risk, Fergana Valley ethnic tensions, water resource disputes (upstream-downstream conflicts), Islamic extremism infiltration.

recentBattles.zh: 2022年哈萨克斯坦「一月事件」（国内骚乱，CSTO出兵协助镇压），2022年吉尔吉斯-塔吉克边境武装冲突（因水资源与领土争端）。
recentBattles.en: 2022 Kazakhstan 'January Events' (domestic unrest, CSTO troops assisted suppression), 2022 Kyrgyzstan-Tajikistan border armed conflict (over water resources and territorial disputes).

populationDescription.zh: 总人口约7900万（乌兹别克斯坦3600万——中亚最多、哈萨克斯坦1970万、塔吉克斯坦1010万、吉尔吉斯斯坦690万、土库曼斯坦630万）。人口增长率较高，中位年龄年轻。
populationDescription.en: Total population ~79 million (Uzbekistan 36M — most in Central Asia, Kazakhstan 19.7M, Tajikistan 10.1M, Kyrgyzstan 6.9M, Turkmenistan 6.3M). Relatively high population growth rate, young median age.

ethnicGroups.zh: 哈萨克人、乌兹别克人、吉尔吉斯人、塔吉克人、土库曼人为各国主体民族，俄罗斯族群体规模因移民减少（尤其在哈萨克斯坦）
ethnicGroups.en: Kazakhs, Uzbeks, Kyrgyz, Tajiks, Turkmen as titular nationalities, Russian ethnic groups declining due to emigration (especially in Kazakhstan)

socialClasses.zh: 权贵阶层与普通民众鸿沟巨大，城市新兴中产小规模发展（阿拉木图/塔什干），大量农村贫困人口与海外劳动力（尤其在俄罗斯务工）。
socialClasses.en: Enormous gap between elite and ordinary citizens, small-scale emerging urban middle class (Almaty/Tashkent), large rural poor and overseas labor force (especially working in Russia).

allies.zh: 俄罗斯（传统安全保障国/CSTO成员——但哈萨克斯坦寻求保持距离）、中国（经济与基建伙伴/上合组织成员）。各国在大国间保持多向平衡外交。
allies.en: Russia (traditional security guarantor/CSTO member — but Kazakhstan seeks distance), China (economic and infrastructure partner/SCO member). All countries maintain multi-vector balanced diplomacy among great powers.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国。吉尔吉斯-塔吉克存在边境争端，各国对阿富汗塔利班政权保持警惕，土库曼斯坦维持永久中立国地位。
enemies.en: No formal enemies. Kyrgyzstan-Tajikistan border disputes exist, all countries vigilant toward Afghan Taliban regime, Turkmenistan maintains permanent neutrality status.

treaties.zh: 集体安全条约组织（CSTO）、上海合作组织（SCO）、欧亚经济联盟（哈萨克/吉尔吉斯）、中亚区域合作机制。
treaties.en: CSTO, Shanghai Cooperation Organization (SCO), Eurasian Economic Union (Kazakhstan/Kyrgyzstan), Central Asian regional cooperation mechanisms.

foreignPolicy.zh: 多向平衡外交为共同特征——在俄罗斯、中国与西方之间维持等距关系。俄乌战争后，哈萨克斯坦与乌兹别克斯坦加速「去俄化」外交调整，加强与土耳其、欧盟的联系。
foreignPolicy.en: Multi-vector balanced diplomacy as a shared feature — maintaining equidistant relations among Russia, China, and the West. After the Russia-Ukraine war, Kazakhstan and Uzbekistan accelerated 'de-Russification' diplomatic adjustments, strengthening ties with Turkey and the EU.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年中国-中亚峰会首次在西安举行，哈萨克斯坦在联合国就乌克兰问题保持中立投票。「中间走廊」（跨里海国际运输通道）因俄乌战争获得战略重要性提升。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: First China-Central Asia summit held in Xi'an in 2023, Kazakhstan maintained neutral votes on Ukraine at the UN. The 'Middle Corridor' (Trans-Caspian International Transport Route) gained strategic importance due to the Russia-Ukraine war.

era.zh: 工业化与数字化初期

keyInnovations.zh: 哈萨克斯坦阿斯塔纳国际金融中心（AIFC）金融科技沙盒、乌兹别克斯坦IT Park科技孵化器、哈萨克斯坦铀提取技术（全球最先进）。
keyInnovations.en: Kazakhstan's AIFC fintech sandbox, Uzbekistan's IT Park technology incubator, Kazakhstan's uranium extraction technology (world's most advanced).

infrastructure.zh: 基础设施总体落后但在中国一带一路投资与本国政府推动下快速改善。哈萨克斯坦公路与铁路网络最为发达，乌兹别克斯坦高铁项目推进中。互联网普及率约60-85%不等。
infrastructure.en: Infrastructure generally underdeveloped but rapidly improving with China's Belt and Road investment and government efforts. Kazakhstan has the most developed road and rail network, Uzbekistan high-speed rail project underway. Internet penetration varies from ~60-85%.

policy.zh: 哈萨克斯坦2022年发布首份AI发展概念文件，乌兹别克斯坦将AI纳入数字经济战略。其余国家尚无专门AI政策。整体处于AI政策启蒙阶段。
policy.en: Kazakhstan released its first AI development concept paper in 2022, Uzbekistan incorporated AI into digital economy strategy. Other countries have no dedicated AI policies yet. Overall at the AI policy enlightenment stage.

regulatoryStance.zh: 几乎无AI专门监管框架，数据保护法规不完善。哈萨克斯坦AIFC提供较为先进的金融科技监管沙盒。
regulatoryStance.en: Virtually no AI-specific regulatory frameworks, incomplete data protection regulations. Kazakhstan's AIFC provides a relatively advanced fintech regulatory sandbox.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资极其有限，区域合计不超过5亿美元/年。主要依赖国际技术援助与跨国企业溢出效应。
investmentScale.en: Extremely limited AI investment, regionally totaling no more than $500 million per year. Mainly relying on international technical assistance and multinational company spillover effects.

capabilities.zh: 本土AI主要应用于政府数字化与银行业基础自动化。
capabilities.en: Domestic AI mainly applied in government digitalization and basic banking automation.

keyProducts.zh: 哈萨克斯坦最大金融科技超级应用，使用AI驱动支付、电商与银行服务。
keyProducts.en: Kazakhstan's largest fintech super app, using AI-driven payments, e-commerce, and banking services.

keyProducts.zh: 中亚最大在线分类信息与电商平台，应用AI推荐算法。
keyProducts.en: Central Asia's largest online classifieds and e-commerce platform, applying AI recommendation algorithms.

title.zh: 哈萨克斯坦数字发展与航空航天部长
title.en: Kazakhstan Minister of Digital Development and Aerospace

contribution.zh: 推动哈萨克斯坦数字化转型与AI发展战略制定。
contribution.en: Driving Kazakhstan's digital transformation and AI development strategy.

researchFocus.zh: 政务数字化与智慧城市（阿斯塔纳）、金融科技AI、自然资源勘探AI、农业AI初步探索。
researchFocus.en: Government digitalization and smart city (Astana), fintech AI, natural resource exploration AI, preliminary agricultural AI exploration.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 计算基础设施极为薄弱，无全球排名超算。哈萨克斯坦纳扎尔巴耶夫大学拥有区域最好的计算设施。依赖俄罗斯Yandex与国际云服务。
computeInfrastructure.en: Extremely weak compute infrastructure with no globally ranked supercomputers. Nazarbayev University in Kazakhstan has the region's best computing facilities. Dependent on Russia's Yandex and international cloud services.

talentPool.zh: STEM人才培养处于起步阶段，哈萨克斯坦纳扎尔巴耶夫大学与乌兹别克斯坦IT Park为培养核心。大量优秀人才外流至俄罗斯、欧洲和美国。
talentPool.en: STEM talent cultivation at early stage, Kazakhstan's Nazarbayev University and Uzbekistan's IT Park as training cores. Significant brain drain to Russia, Europe, and the US.

globalRanking.zh: AI发展处于全球最低梯队，但哈萨克斯坦的金融科技应用（Kaspi.kz）展示了跳跃式发展的可能性。
globalRanking.en: AI development at the global lowest tier, but Kazakhstan's fintech applications (Kaspi.kz) demonstrate the possibility of leapfrog development.

outlook.zh: 中亚AI发展将受益于「中间走廊」物流枢纽地位提升、中国技术溢出与年轻人口红利。哈萨克斯坦有望在5-10年内建立基础AI能力，其余国家将更为缓慢。
outlook.en: Central Asian AI development will benefit from enhanced 'Middle Corridor' logistics hub status, Chinese technology spillover, and young demographic dividend. Kazakhstan may build foundational AI capabilities in 5-10 years, other countries will be slower.

strengths.zh: 丰富能源与矿产资源（石油/天然气/铀/稀土）、年轻人口结构、地缘战略位置（欧亚大陆心脏/中间走廊）、哈萨克斯坦改革势头。
strengths.en: Rich energy and mineral resources (oil/gas/uranium/rare earths), young demographic structure, geostrategic location (Eurasian heartland/Middle Corridor), Kazakhstan's reform momentum.

weaknesses.zh: 威权治理与腐败、经济高度依赖资源出口（荷兰病风险）、水资源紧缺与环境问题（咸海危机）、AI与科技基础极其薄弱、人才外流严重。
weaknesses.en: Authoritarian governance and corruption, heavy economic dependence on resource exports (Dutch disease risk), water scarcity and environmental issues (Aral Sea crisis), extremely weak AI and tech foundations, serious brain drain.

outlook.zh: 俄乌战争催生的「中间走廊」战略机遇为中亚带来历史性转型窗口。哈萨克斯坦与乌兹别克斯坦若能深化改革、吸引外资、培育人才，有望在资源经济之外开辟新增长路径。但威权体制的结构性局限仍是最大障碍。
outlook.en: The 'Middle Corridor' strategic opportunity catalyzed by the Russia-Ukraine war opens a historic transformation window for Central Asia. If Kazakhstan and Uzbekistan can deepen reforms, attract investment, and cultivate talent, they may forge new growth paths beyond resource economies. But structural limitations of authoritarian systems remain the biggest obstacle.

description.zh: 2023年的中亚后苏联五国——哈萨克斯坦、乌兹别克斯坦、吉尔吉斯斯坦、塔吉克斯坦和土库曼斯坦——正处于历史性转型节点。俄乌战争深刻改变了中亚地缘格局，「中间走廊」（跨里海国际运输通道）的战略价值骤然提升，各国加速在俄中欧之间的多向平衡外交。哈萨克斯坦作为区域最大经济体（GDP约2200亿美元）推进后纳扎尔巴耶夫时代的政治经济改革，乌兹别克斯坦在米尔济约耶夫领导下成为中亚改革先锋。然而，威权治理、资源依赖与水资源紧缺仍是共同挑战。AI发展处于全球最初级阶段，仅Kaspi.kz等金融科技应用展现了数字化跳跃式发展的潜力。年轻的人口结构与丝绸之路复兴为这一区域的长远发展提供了想象空间。
description.en: The five Central Asian post-Soviet states — Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan, Kyrgyzstan, Tajikistan, and Turkmenistan — in 2023 sit at a historic transformation juncture. The Russia-Ukraine war has profoundly altered Central Asian geopolitics, with the 'Middle Corridor' (Trans-Caspian International Transport Route) gaining sudden strategic value as countries accelerate multi-vector diplomacy among Russia, China, and Europe. Kazakhstan as the largest regional economy (~$220B GDP) pursues post-Nazarbayev political and economic reforms, while Uzbekistan under Mirziyoyev leads Central Asian reform. However, authoritarian governance, resource dependence, and water scarcity remain shared challenges. AI development is at the world's most preliminary stage, with only fintech applications like Kaspi.kz demonstrating digital leapfrog potential. A young demographic structure and Silk Road revival provide long-term development prospects for the region.

name.zh: 北非马格里布联合区域

ruler.zh: 阿卜杜勒马吉德·特本（阿尔及利亚总统）

dynasty.zh: 后阿拉伯之春政府时期

capital.zh: 阿尔及尔（阿尔及利亚）/ 拉巴特（摩洛哥）/ 突尼斯（突尼斯）/ 的黎波里（利比亚）

governmentForm.zh: 各国体制各异：阿尔及利亚为半总统制共和国，摩洛哥为君主立宪制，突尼斯为总统制共和国，利比亚处于分裂治理状态。
governmentForm.en: Diverse systems: Algeria is a semi-presidential republic, Morocco a constitutional monarchy, Tunisia a presidential republic, Libya under divided governance.

socialStructure.zh: 以阿拉伯-柏柏尔族群为主体的社会结构，城市中产阶级增长但青年失业严重，石油精英与传统部落势力并存。
socialStructure.en: Society centered on Arab-Berber populations, with a growing urban middle class but severe youth unemployment; oil elites coexist with traditional tribal power structures.

rulingClass.zh: 军政精英（阿尔及利亚）、王室与商业精英（摩洛哥）、总统集权政府（突尼斯）、军阀派系（利比亚）。
rulingClass.en: Military-political elites (Algeria), royal family and business elites (Morocco), presidential government (Tunisia), warlord factions (Libya).

succession.zh: 阿尔及利亚和突尼斯通过总统选举，摩洛哥王位世袭，利比亚政治体制不稳定。
succession.en: Algeria and Tunisia via presidential elections, Morocco through hereditary monarchy, Libya's political system remains unstable.

structure.zh: 各国设有不同政府体制，阿尔及利亚有总统、总理与两院制议会，摩洛哥国王拥有广泛权力，突尼斯凯斯·赛义德集中总统权力。
structure.en: Varied government structures: Algeria has a president, prime minister, and bicameral parliament; Morocco's king holds broad powers; Tunisia's Kais Saied has concentrated presidential authority.

function.zh: 管理石油天然气与磷矿资源开发，各国核心经济支柱部门。
function.en: Manages oil, gas, and phosphate resource development — the core economic pillar across the region.

function.zh: 负责国内安全、边境管控与反恐行动。
function.en: Handles domestic security, border control, and counterterrorism operations.

function.zh: 协调地区外交、阿盟事务与欧盟关系。
function.en: Coordinates regional diplomacy, Arab League affairs, and EU relations.

localAdmin.zh: 各国设省级与市镇级地方行政体系，阿尔及利亚分48省，摩洛哥分12大区。
localAdmin.en: Each country has provincial and municipal administration; Algeria is divided into 48 provinces, Morocco into 12 regions.

legalSystem.zh: 以法国民法传统为基础，融合伊斯兰教法元素，摩洛哥保留较多伊斯兰法律传统。
legalSystem.en: Based on French civil law tradition blended with Islamic sharia elements; Morocco retains more Islamic legal traditions.

taxationSystem.zh: 以石油天然气收入为主要财政来源（阿尔及利亚、利比亚），摩洛哥与突尼斯依赖所得税与增值税。
taxationSystem.en: Oil and gas revenues as primary fiscal source (Algeria, Libya); Morocco and Tunisia rely on income tax and VAT.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（逊尼派马利基学派为主），世俗化程度因国而异
religion.en: Islam (predominantly Sunni Maliki school), degree of secularization varies by country

philosophy.zh: 阿拉伯-伊斯兰文化传统与法国世俗主义遗产并存，柏柏尔文化复兴运动活跃。
philosophy.en: Coexistence of Arab-Islamic cultural tradition and French secularist heritage, with an active Berber cultural revival movement.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯字母（阿拉伯语）、拉丁字母（法语为第二语言）、提非纳格字母（柏柏尔语）
writingSystem.en: Arabic script (Arabic), Latin alphabet (French as second language), Tifinagh (Berber)

culturalAchievements.zh: 丰富的阿拉伯-安达卢西亚音乐遗产、突尼斯电影业、摩洛哥手工艺传统、阿尔及利亚文学（卡缪与卡特布·亚辛的遗产）。
culturalAchievements.en: Rich Arab-Andalusian musical heritage, Tunisian cinema, Moroccan artisanal traditions, Algerian literary legacy (Camus and Kateb Yacine).

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系闪米特语族（阿拉伯语）、柏柏尔语族；印欧语系（法语通用）
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic Semitic (Arabic), Berber branch; Indo-European (French widely used)

gdpDescription.zh: 区域GDP合计约6200亿美元，阿尔及利亚（约1900亿）与摩洛哥（约1400亿）为最大经济体。石油天然气依赖度高，经济多元化进展缓慢。
gdpDescription.en: Combined regional GDP ~$620 billion, with Algeria (~$190B) and Morocco (~$140B) as largest economies. High oil/gas dependency with slow economic diversification.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气开采、磷矿、汽车制造（摩洛哥）、旅游业、农业、纺织业
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas extraction, phosphate mining, automotive manufacturing (Morocco), tourism, agriculture, textiles

tradeGoods.zh: 石油、天然气、磷酸盐、柑橘、橄榄油、汽车零部件、纺织品
tradeGoods.en: Oil, natural gas, phosphates, citrus fruits, olive oil, automotive parts, textiles

name.zh: 阿尔及利亚第纳尔/摩洛哥迪拉姆/突尼斯第纳尔/利比亚第纳尔
name.en: Algerian Dinar / Moroccan Dirham / Tunisian Dinar / Libyan Dinar

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数较低，城乡差距显著。摩洛哥与突尼斯中产阶级有所增长，阿尔及利亚受补贴经济影响。
householdWealth.en: Low median household wealth with significant urban-rural gaps. Growing middle class in Morocco and Tunisia; Algeria affected by subsidy-dependent economy.

tradeRoutes.zh: 地中海航运通往欧盟（最大贸易伙伴），撒哈拉以南非洲贸易增长，对华能源出口扩大。
tradeRoutes.en: Mediterranean shipping routes to the EU (largest trade partner), growing sub-Saharan African trade, expanding energy exports to China.

economicSystem.zh: 以国家主导经济为主（阿尔及利亚、利比亚），摩洛哥与突尼斯推进市场化改革与自由贸易协定。
economicSystem.en: State-led economies dominant (Algeria, Libya); Morocco and Tunisia advancing market reforms and free trade agreements.

unit.zh: 美元等值外汇储备（阿尔及利亚为主）
unit.en: US dollar equivalent forex reserves (primarily Algeria)

treasuryDescription.zh: 阿尔及利亚外汇储备约600亿美元，摩洛哥约350亿，区域总体财政承压但尚有缓冲。
treasuryDescription.en: Algeria's forex reserves ~$60 billion, Morocco ~$35 billion; regional fiscal pressure but with some buffer.

debtLevel.zh: 阿尔及利亚债务占GDP约50%，摩洛哥约70%，突尼斯约80%，利比亚较低但经济混乱。
debtLevel.en: Algeria debt ~50% of GDP, Morocco ~70%, Tunisia ~80%, Libya lower but economically chaotic.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 阿尔及利亚依赖油气补贴维持社会稳定，摩洛哥推进财政改革与基础设施投资，突尼斯接受IMF贷款条件。
fiscalPolicy.en: Algeria relies on oil/gas subsidies for social stability, Morocco advances fiscal reform and infrastructure investment, Tunisia accepts IMF loan conditions.

name.zh: 阿尔及利亚人民国家军

description.zh: 北非最大军事力量，装备俄制武器为主，军事开支占GDP约6%。
description.en: North Africa's largest military force, primarily equipped with Russian weapons, military spending ~6% of GDP.

description.zh: 装备日益现代化，加强与美国、以色列军事合作。
description.en: Increasingly modernized, strengthening military cooperation with the US and Israel.

name.zh: 突尼斯与利比亚军事力量

description.zh: 突尼斯军力较小但专业化，利比亚军事力量碎片化。
description.en: Tunisia has a small but professional force; Libya's military remains fragmented.

technology.zh: 以常规武器为主，阿尔及利亚拥有俄制战斗机与防空系统，摩洛哥引进美制F-16与土耳其TB2无人机。
technology.en: Primarily conventional weapons; Algeria has Russian fighters and air defense; Morocco has acquired US F-16s and Turkish TB2 drones.

threats.zh: 利比亚内战外溢、萨赫勒地区恐怖主义渗透、西撒哈拉争端、非法移民危机。
threats.en: Libya civil war spillover, Sahel terrorism infiltration, Western Sahara dispute, illegal migration crisis.

recentBattles.zh: 无大规模战争，但利比亚内部冲突持续，各国反恐行动不断。
recentBattles.en: No large-scale wars, but Libya's internal conflict persists and counterterrorism operations continue across the region.

populationDescription.zh: 区域总人口约1.07亿，阿尔及利亚（4500万）、摩洛哥（3700万）、突尼斯（1200万）、利比亚（700万）。青年人口占比高。
populationDescription.en: Regional population ~107 million: Algeria (45M), Morocco (37M), Tunisia (12M), Libya (7M). High youth population share.

ethnicGroups.zh: 阿拉伯人与柏柏尔人为主体，另有少量撒哈拉以南非洲裔、土耳其裔后裔
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly Arab and Berber, with small sub-Saharan African and Turkish-descent minorities

socialClasses.zh: 政治军事精英、城市中产阶级、传统商人阶层、农村与城市贫民阶层。青年失业率高达25-30%。
socialClasses.en: Political-military elites, urban middle class, traditional merchant class, rural and urban poor. Youth unemployment reaches 25-30%.

allies.zh: 法国（前殖民宗主国）、欧盟（贸易伙伴）、阿拉伯联盟成员，摩洛哥与美国、以色列关系紧密（亚伯拉罕协议）。
allies.en: France (former colonial power), EU (trade partner), Arab League members; Morocco has close ties with the US and Israel (Abraham Accords).

enemies.zh: 阿尔及利亚与摩洛哥因西撒哈拉问题长期对立，利比亚内部派系冲突。
enemies.en: Algeria and Morocco in long-standing opposition over Western Sahara; Libya's internal factional conflict.

treaties.zh: 阿拉伯马格里布联盟（功能停滞）、欧盟伙伴关系协定、非盟成员国。
treaties.en: Arab Maghreb Union (functionally stalled), EU partnership agreements, African Union membership.

foreignPolicy.zh: 阿尔及利亚坚持不结盟传统，摩洛哥积极西方外交并推进非洲合作，突尼斯寻求国际援助稳定经济。
foreignPolicy.en: Algeria maintains non-alignment tradition, Morocco pursues active Western diplomacy and African cooperation, Tunisia seeks international aid for economic stability.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年摩洛哥地震引发国际援助，阿尔及利亚与摩洛哥因西撒哈拉断交状态持续，利比亚和平进程缓慢。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Morocco earthquake triggered international aid, Algeria-Morocco diplomatic break over Western Sahara continues, Libya peace process remains slow.

era.zh: 数字化转型初期

keyInnovations.zh: 移动支付普及、摩洛哥太阳能发电（努尔电站）、阿尔及利亚能源技术、初步电子政务建设。
keyInnovations.en: Mobile payment adoption, Morocco's solar power (Noor station), Algeria's energy technology, initial e-governance development.

infrastructure.zh: 摩洛哥高速铁路（非洲首条）、区域光纤网络扩展中、可再生能源投资增长。
infrastructure.en: Morocco's high-speed rail (Africa's first), expanding regional fiber optic networks, growing renewable energy investments.

policy.zh: 摩洛哥发布国家AI战略，阿尔及利亚成立数字化转型部。各国AI政策处于起步阶段，缺乏系统性立法。
policy.en: Morocco released a national AI strategy; Algeria established a digital transformation ministry. AI policy across the region is nascent with no systematic legislation.

regulatoryStance.zh: 监管框架不完善，主要依赖现有数据保护法律和国际标准参照。
regulatoryStance.en: Regulatory frameworks underdeveloped, relying mainly on existing data protection laws and international standard references.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资规模极小，区域总计不足5亿美元，主要来自政府数字化项目和国际合作。
investmentScale.en: AI investment scale is minimal, regionally under $500 million, primarily from government digitalization projects and international cooperation.

capabilities.zh: 主要应用国际开源模型进行阿拉伯语NLP研究与农业AI应用。
capabilities.en: Primarily applying international open-source models for Arabic NLP research and agricultural AI applications.

keyProducts.zh: AI决策优化平台、生物医药AI
keyProducts.en: AI decision optimization platform, biopharma AI

name.zh: 卡里姆·贝纳贝德拉赫曼

contribution.zh: 突尼斯裔AI企业家，创建北非最成功的AI初创企业，后被BioNTech收购。
contribution.en: Tunisian AI entrepreneur who built North Africa's most successful AI startup, later acquired by BioNTech.

researchFocus.zh: 阿拉伯语自然语言处理、农业AI、能源优化、智慧城市基础研究。
researchFocus.en: Arabic NLP, agricultural AI, energy optimization, smart city foundational research.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 计算基础设施有限，依赖国际云服务商，少量大学和研究机构拥有GPU集群。
computeInfrastructure.en: Limited compute infrastructure, reliant on international cloud providers; a few universities and research institutions have GPU clusters.

talentPool.zh: 数学与工程教育基础较好，但AI专业人才大量外流至欧洲（尤其法国），本土AI人才储备不足。
talentPool.en: Good math and engineering education foundations, but significant AI talent drain to Europe (especially France); insufficient local AI talent pool.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI竞争力中下游，摩洛哥与突尼斯在非洲大陆相对领先。
globalRanking.en: Lower-middle tier in global AI competitiveness; Morocco and Tunisia relatively advanced within Africa.

outlook.zh: 短期内AI发展受限于投资不足与人才外流，但阿拉伯语AI应用和能源AI优化领域有潜力。
outlook.en: Near-term AI development constrained by underinvestment and talent drain, but potential exists in Arabic-language AI applications and energy AI optimization.

strengths.zh: 战略地理位置（连接欧非）、丰富的油气与矿产资源、年轻人口结构、摩洛哥制造业与可再生能源优势。
strengths.en: Strategic geographic position (Europe-Africa link), rich oil/gas/mineral resources, youthful demographics, Morocco's manufacturing and renewable energy advantages.

weaknesses.zh: 经济多元化不足、青年失业严重、政治自由受限、利比亚内战与区域紧张、AI与科技投入不足。
weaknesses.en: Insufficient economic diversification, severe youth unemployment, limited political freedoms, Libya's civil war and regional tensions, inadequate AI and tech investment.

outlook.zh: 若能推进经济改革、解决区域分裂并投资数字化转型，马格里布地区可成为连接欧洲与非洲大陆的重要经济走廊。
outlook.en: If economic reforms advance, regional fragmentation is addressed, and digital transformation investment grows, the Maghreb can become a key economic corridor linking Europe and Africa.

description.zh: 2023年的北非马格里布地区在石油经济、地缘政治紧张与数字化转型初期之间艰难平衡，AI发展处于起步阶段。
description.en: North Africa/Maghreb in 2023 balances precariously between oil economics, geopolitical tensions, and early digital transformation, with AI development in its infancy.

name.zh: 西非（尼日利亚·加纳·萨赫勒）

ruler.zh: 博拉·艾哈迈德·提努布（尼日利亚总统）

dynasty.zh: 第四共和国时期（尼日利亚）

capital.zh: 阿布贾（尼日利亚）/ 阿克拉（加纳）

governmentForm.zh: 尼日利亚与加纳为联邦/单一制总统共和国，萨赫勒国家（马里、布基纳法索、尼日尔）为军政府统治。
governmentForm.en: Nigeria and Ghana are federal/unitary presidential republics; Sahel states (Mali, Burkina Faso, Niger) under military junta rule.

socialStructure.zh: 多民族多宗教社会，尼日利亚北部穆斯林与南部基督教群体对立，新兴城市科技创业阶层崛起。
socialStructure.en: Multi-ethnic, multi-religious society; Nigeria's northern Muslim and southern Christian communities in tension; emerging urban tech entrepreneurial class.

rulingClass.zh: 政治精英（尼日利亚政党轮替）、军事将领（萨赫勒地区）、传统酋长与宗教领袖。
rulingClass.en: Political elites (Nigeria's party rotation), military generals (Sahel region), traditional chiefs and religious leaders.

succession.zh: 尼日利亚与加纳通过民主选举，萨赫勒国家经历系列军事政变。
succession.en: Nigeria and Ghana through democratic elections; Sahel nations experienced a series of military coups.

structure.zh: 尼日利亚实行联邦总统制，设36州与联邦首都区；加纳为单一制总统共和国；萨赫勒地区由军事过渡政府管理。
structure.en: Nigeria operates a federal presidential system with 36 states and FCT; Ghana is a unitary presidential republic; Sahel region governed by military transitional governments.

function.zh: 管理国家财政、预算分配与石油收入分配，监督经济改革。
function.en: Manages national finances, budget allocation, and oil revenue distribution; oversees economic reform.

name.zh: 西非国家经济共同体（ECOWAS）秘书处

function.zh: 促进区域经济一体化、调解政治危机与维和行动。
function.en: Promotes regional economic integration, mediates political crises, and coordinates peacekeeping.

name.zh: 尼日利亚通信与数字经济部
name.en: Nigerian Ministry of Communications and Digital Economy

function.zh: 推进数字经济战略、电信基础设施与科技创新政策。
function.en: Advances digital economy strategy, telecom infrastructure, and tech innovation policy.

localAdmin.zh: 尼日利亚36州各设州长，774个地方政府；加纳16个大区，各设地区行政长官。
localAdmin.en: Nigeria's 36 states each with a governor, 774 local governments; Ghana has 16 regions with district chief executives.

legalSystem.zh: 普通法（尼日利亚南部、加纳）、伊斯兰法（尼日利亚北部12州）、习惯法并存。
legalSystem.en: Common law (southern Nigeria, Ghana), Islamic sharia (12 northern Nigerian states), and customary law coexist.

taxationSystem.zh: 石油收入为尼日利亚主要税源，提努布政府推进燃油补贴改革。加纳依赖增值税与进口关税。
taxationSystem.en: Oil revenue is Nigeria's main fiscal source; Tinubu government advancing fuel subsidy reform. Ghana relies on VAT and import duties.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教与基督教各占约半（尼日利亚），基督教为主（加纳），伊斯兰教主导（萨赫勒），传统宗教并存
religion.en: Islam and Christianity each ~50% (Nigeria), predominantly Christian (Ghana), Islam dominant (Sahel), with traditional religions coexisting

philosophy.zh: 丰富的口述传统与社区主义哲学，泛非主义思想遗产，恩克鲁玛非洲统一理念。
philosophy.en: Rich oral tradition and communitarian philosophy, pan-Africanist ideological heritage, Nkrumah's vision of African unity.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（英语、法语官方语言）、阿拉伯字母（豪萨语）、各族群文字体系
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (English, French official languages), Arabic script (Hausa), various ethnic writing systems

culturalAchievements.zh: 诺莱坞（全球第二大电影产业）、阿弗罗节拍音乐全球流行（Burna Boy、Wizkid）、拉各斯科技创业文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Nollywood (world's second-largest film industry), Afrobeats music global popularity (Burna Boy, Wizkid), Lagos tech startup culture.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系（约鲁巴语、伊博语）、亚非语系（豪萨语）、印欧语系（英语、法语官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo family (Yoruba, Igbo), Afro-Asiatic (Hausa), Indo-European (English, French as official languages)

gdpDescription.zh: 区域GDP约6800亿美元，尼日利亚占约70%（约4700亿），加纳约770亿。提努布政府取消燃油补贴与汇率统一改革引发短期经济阵痛。
gdpDescription.en: Regional GDP ~$680B, Nigeria ~70% (~$470B), Ghana ~$77B. Tinubu's fuel subsidy removal and exchange rate unification reforms caused short-term economic pain.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气（尼日利亚）、黄金与可可（加纳）、农业、电信、金融科技、诺莱坞影视
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas (Nigeria), gold and cocoa (Ghana), agriculture, telecom, fintech, Nollywood entertainment

tradeGoods.zh: 原油、天然气、可可、黄金、棕榈油、花生、纺织品
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil, natural gas, cocoa, gold, palm oil, peanuts, textiles

name.zh: 尼日利亚奈拉/加纳塞地/西非法郎
name.en: Nigerian Naira / Ghanaian Cedi / West African CFA Franc

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富水平极低，尼日利亚约40%人口生活在极端贫困线以下。金融科技的普及改善了金融包容性。
householdWealth.en: Extremely low household wealth; ~40% of Nigerians live below the extreme poverty line. Fintech adoption has improved financial inclusion.

tradeRoutes.zh: 大西洋海运通往欧洲与美洲，尼日利亚石油出口至全球，中国成为重要贸易伙伴。
tradeRoutes.en: Atlantic shipping to Europe and Americas, Nigerian oil exports globally, China as a growing trade partner.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济体制，尼日利亚推进市场化改革（汇率浮动、补贴取消），萨赫勒经济受冲突严重影响。
economicSystem.en: Mixed economies; Nigeria advancing market reforms (exchange rate float, subsidy removal); Sahel economies severely impacted by conflict.

treasuryDescription.zh: 尼日利亚外汇储备约330亿美元，汇率改革后奈拉大幅贬值。加纳接受IMF 30亿美元救助。
treasuryDescription.en: Nigeria's forex reserves ~$33B, Naira depreciated sharply after exchange rate reform. Ghana accepted a $3B IMF bailout.

debtLevel.zh: 尼日利亚债务约占GDP 38%但债务偿还占收入90%以上，加纳债务危机导致主权违约重组。
debtLevel.en: Nigeria's debt ~38% of GDP but debt servicing exceeds 90% of revenue; Ghana's debt crisis led to sovereign default restructuring.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 提努布政府推行紧缩改革（取消燃油补贴、统一汇率），加纳在IMF监督下推进财政整顿。
fiscalPolicy.en: Tinubu government implementing austerity reforms (fuel subsidy removal, exchange rate unification); Ghana pursuing fiscal consolidation under IMF oversight.

description.zh: 西非最大军事力量，持续打击博科圣地与东南部分裂势力。
description.en: West Africa's largest military force, continuously combating Boko Haram and southeastern separatist movements.

description.zh: 马里、布基纳法索、尼日尔军政府掌权，联合对抗圣战组织。
description.en: Mali, Burkina Faso, Niger military juntas in power, jointly combating jihadist groups.

name.zh: 加纳与其他国家武装力量
name.en: Ghana and other national armed forces

description.zh: 加纳军队规模较小但参与联合国维和行动活跃。
description.en: Ghana's military is small but active in UN peacekeeping operations.

commanderInChief.zh: 各国国家元首/军政府领导人

technology.zh: 以常规轻武器和装甲车为主，尼日利亚引进中国与土耳其无人机用于反恐作战。
technology.en: Primarily conventional light weapons and armored vehicles; Nigeria has acquired Chinese and Turkish drones for counterterrorism operations.

threats.zh: 博科圣地/ISWAP恐怖组织、萨赫勒圣战运动、军事政变浪潮、民族分裂主义。
threats.en: Boko Haram/ISWAP terrorism, Sahel jihadist movements, wave of military coups, ethnic separatism.

recentBattles.zh: 尼日利亚东北部反博科圣地持续作战，萨赫勒地区反恐军事行动，2023年尼日尔政变引发ECOWAS军事干预威胁。
recentBattles.en: Ongoing anti-Boko Haram operations in northeastern Nigeria, Sahel counterterrorism operations, 2023 Niger coup triggering ECOWAS military intervention threats.

populationDescription.zh: 区域总人口约4.3亿，尼日利亚（约2.2亿，非洲第一）为核心。人口增长率极高，中位年龄仅18岁。
populationDescription.en: Regional population ~430 million, with Nigeria (~220M, Africa's most populous) at the core. Extremely high growth rate; median age just 18.

ethnicGroups.zh: 豪萨-富拉尼、约鲁巴、伊博（尼日利亚三大族群）、阿坎族（加纳）、曼丁卡、沃洛夫等数百个民族
ethnicGroups.en: Hausa-Fulani, Yoruba, Igbo (Nigeria's three major groups), Akan (Ghana), Mandinka, Wolof, and hundreds of other ethnic groups

socialClasses.zh: 极少数政治经济精英、快速增长的城市青年科技阶层、庞大的非正规经济从业者、农村贫困人口。
socialClasses.en: A small political-economic elite, a rapidly growing urban youth tech class, a massive informal economy workforce, and rural poor.

allies.zh: ECOWAS成员国、美国（安全合作）、英国（前宗主国）、中国（基建投资）、欧盟。
allies.en: ECOWAS member states, US (security cooperation), UK (former colonial power), China (infrastructure investment), EU.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但萨赫勒军政府与法国和ECOWAS关系破裂，博科圣地等恐怖组织为主要安全威胁。
enemies.en: No formal state enemies, but Sahel juntas have broken with France and ECOWAS; Boko Haram and other terrorist groups are the main security threats.

treaties.zh: ECOWAS条约、非盟成员、非洲大陆自由贸易区（AfCFTA，总部在阿克拉）。
treaties.en: ECOWAS treaty, African Union membership, African Continental Free Trade Area (AfCFTA, HQ in Accra).

foreignPolicy.zh: 尼日利亚作为地区大国主导ECOWAS，萨赫勒国家转向俄罗斯（瓦格纳集团），加纳维持亲西方路线。
foreignPolicy.en: Nigeria dominates ECOWAS as regional power; Sahel states pivot toward Russia (Wagner Group); Ghana maintains a pro-Western orientation.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年尼日尔军事政变引发ECOWAS制裁与军事干预威胁，萨赫勒三国宣布退出ECOWAS，法国从萨赫勒撤军。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Niger coup triggered ECOWAS sanctions and military intervention threats; three Sahel states announced ECOWAS withdrawal; France withdrew troops from the Sahel.

era.zh: 移动互联网与金融科技崛起期
era.en: Mobile internet and fintech rise era

keyInnovations.zh: 移动支付（OPay、Flutterwave）、金融科技创新、拉各斯科技生态系统、数字身份系统。
keyInnovations.en: Mobile payments (OPay, Flutterwave), fintech innovation, Lagos tech ecosystem, digital identity systems.

infrastructure.zh: 移动网络覆盖扩展中，电力供应不稳定仍是最大瓶颈，海底光缆连接改善中。
infrastructure.en: Expanding mobile network coverage, unreliable power supply remains the biggest bottleneck, submarine cable connectivity improving.

policy.zh: 尼日利亚发布国家AI战略草案，加纳推进数据保护法案。整体AI政策框架仍在形成中。
policy.en: Nigeria released a draft national AI strategy; Ghana advancing data protection legislation. Overall AI policy frameworks still forming.

regulatoryStance.zh: 监管处于早期阶段，尼日利亚关注数据本地化与金融科技监管。
regulatoryStance.en: Regulation at early stage; Nigeria focused on data localization and fintech regulation.

investmentScale.zh: AI专项投资较小，但科技创投在拉各斯生态圈累计超20亿美元（含金融科技），AI初创获融资增长。
investmentScale.en: Dedicated AI investment is small, but tech VC in the Lagos ecosystem has exceeded $2B cumulatively (including fintech); AI startup funding growing.

capabilities.zh: 主要聚焦非洲语言NLP、金融风控AI、农业AI应用，使用国际开源模型微调。
capabilities.en: Focused on African language NLP, financial risk AI, agricultural AI applications, fine-tuning international open-source models.

keyProducts.zh: AI人才培训、非洲语言数据集构建
keyProducts.en: AI talent training, African language dataset construction

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动支付基础设施与风控系统
keyProducts.en: AI-powered payment infrastructure and risk control systems

contribution.zh: 推动尼日利亚和非洲AI人才培养与生态建设。
contribution.en: Driving AI talent development and ecosystem building in Nigeria and across Africa.

researchFocus.zh: 非洲语言NLP（约鲁巴语、豪萨语、伊博语）、金融科技AI、农业AI、健康医疗AI。
researchFocus.en: African language NLP (Yoruba, Hausa, Igbo), fintech AI, agricultural AI, healthcare AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 计算基础设施极度匮乏，电力不稳定制约数据中心发展，主要依赖国际云平台。
computeInfrastructure.en: Severely lacking compute infrastructure; power instability constrains data center development; reliant on international cloud platforms.

talentPool.zh: 年轻人口基数庞大且对科技充满热情，但AI高端人才不足，脑流失至欧美严重。Masakhane等草根社区推动本土NLP研究。
talentPool.en: Massive young population enthusiastic about tech, but high-end AI talent insufficient with severe brain drain to West. Grassroots communities like Masakhane driving local NLP research.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI竞争力较低，但在非洲大陆拉各斯被视为AI与金融科技中心。
globalRanking.en: Low in global AI competitiveness, but Lagos is seen as Africa's AI and fintech hub.

outlook.zh: 庞大年轻人口和蓬勃的科技创业精神是最大资产，若解决基础设施和人才留存问题，有望成为非洲AI领军力量。
outlook.en: A massive young population and vibrant tech entrepreneurship are the greatest assets; if infrastructure and talent retention issues are resolved, the region could lead AI in Africa.

strengths.zh: 非洲最大经济体（尼日利亚）、庞大年轻人口、蓬勃的科技创业生态、丰富自然资源、AfCFTA机遇。
strengths.en: Africa's largest economy (Nigeria), massive young population, vibrant tech startup ecosystem, rich natural resources, AfCFTA opportunities.

weaknesses.zh: 基础设施严重不足、电力危机、安全威胁（博科圣地、萨赫勒危机）、治理腐败、极端贫困。
weaknesses.en: Severe infrastructure deficits, power crisis, security threats (Boko Haram, Sahel crisis), governance corruption, extreme poverty.

outlook.zh: 若提努布改革成功且安全环境改善，西非可释放巨大人口红利；但短期内经济改革阵痛与安全挑战并存。
outlook.en: If Tinubu's reforms succeed and security improves, West Africa can unlock enormous demographic dividends; but near-term economic reform pain and security challenges coexist.

description.zh: 2023年的西非在经济改革阵痛、萨赫勒政变浪潮与拉各斯科技繁荣之间呈现巨大反差，AI发展处于萌芽阶段。
description.en: West Africa in 2023 presents stark contrasts between economic reform pain, the Sahel coup wave, and Lagos tech boom, with AI development in its infancy.

name.zh: 东非/非洲之角/斯瓦希里海岸
name.en: East Africa / Horn of Africa / Swahili Coast

dynasty.zh: 后独立民主共和时期

capital.zh: 内罗毕（肯尼亚）/ 亚的斯亚贝巴（埃塞俄比亚）/ 多多马（坦桑尼亚）

governmentForm.zh: 肯尼亚为总统制共和国，埃塞俄比亚为联邦议会制共和国，坦桑尼亚为总统制单一制国家，索马里为脆弱联邦制。
governmentForm.en: Kenya is a presidential republic, Ethiopia a federal parliamentary republic, Tanzania a unitary presidential state, Somalia a fragile federal system.

socialStructure.zh: 多民族社会，肯尼亚科技创业中产阶级增长，埃塞俄比亚民族联邦制下族群关系紧张，索马里氏族社会结构。
socialStructure.en: Multi-ethnic societies; Kenya's tech-entrepreneurial middle class growing; Ethiopia's ethnic federalism creating communal tensions; Somalia's clan-based social structure.

rulingClass.zh: 民选总统与政治精英（肯尼亚、坦桑尼亚）、执政党主导（埃塞俄比亚繁荣党）、氏族领袖与军阀（索马里）。
rulingClass.en: Elected presidents and political elites (Kenya, Tanzania), ruling party dominance (Ethiopia's Prosperity Party), clan leaders and warlords (Somalia).

succession.zh: 肯尼亚与坦桑尼亚通过民主选举，埃塞俄比亚执政党主导的选举体制，索马里间接选举制。
succession.en: Kenya and Tanzania through democratic elections, Ethiopia's ruling party-led electoral system, Somalia's indirect election system.

structure.zh: 各国设有总统制或议会制政府，肯尼亚有完善的三权分立体系，埃塞俄比亚联邦制下设10个区域州。
structure.en: Countries have presidential or parliamentary governments; Kenya has an established separation of powers; Ethiopia's federation comprises 10 regional states.

name.zh: 肯尼亚信息通信技术部

function.zh: 推进数字经济战略、移动创新政策与科技园区建设。
function.en: Advances digital economy strategy, mobile innovation policy, and tech park development.

function.zh: 促进区域经济一体化、共同市场与基础设施互联互通。
function.en: Promotes regional economic integration, common market, and infrastructure connectivity.

function.zh: 协调国内和平进程、民族冲突调解与安全事务。
function.en: Coordinates domestic peace process, ethnic conflict mediation, and security affairs.

localAdmin.zh: 肯尼亚47个郡各设郡长，埃塞俄比亚10个区域州各有自治政府，坦桑尼亚分31个区。
localAdmin.en: Kenya's 47 counties each with a governor, Ethiopia's 10 regional states with autonomous governments, Tanzania divided into 31 regions.

legalSystem.zh: 普通法（肯尼亚、坦桑尼亚）、大陆法传统（埃塞俄比亚）、伊斯兰法与习惯法并存（索马里）。
legalSystem.en: Common law (Kenya, Tanzania), civil law tradition (Ethiopia), Islamic and customary law coexisting (Somalia).

taxationSystem.zh: 肯尼亚依赖所得税与增值税（鲁托政府推进增税计划），埃塞俄比亚以农业税与商业税为主。
taxationSystem.en: Kenya relies on income tax and VAT (Ruto government advancing tax increases), Ethiopia centered on agricultural and business taxes.

religion.zh: 基督教（肯尼亚、埃塞俄比亚东正教）、伊斯兰教（索马里、坦桑尼亚沿海）、传统宗教
religion.en: Christianity (Kenya, Ethiopian Orthodox), Islam (Somalia, Tanzanian coast), traditional religions

philosophy.zh: 乌班图（Ubuntu）共同体精神、埃塞俄比亚东正教传统、斯瓦希里文化融合、泛非主义。
philosophy.en: Ubuntu communal spirit, Ethiopian Orthodox tradition, Swahili cultural synthesis, pan-Africanism.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（斯瓦希里语、英语）、吉兹字母（阿姆哈拉语）、阿拉伯字母（索马里语）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Swahili, English), Ge'ez script (Amharic), Arabic script (Somali)

culturalAchievements.zh: M-Pesa移动支付革命、肯尼亚长跑传统、埃塞俄比亚咖啡文化遗产、斯瓦希里文学、内罗毕科技创新中心。
culturalAchievements.en: M-Pesa mobile payment revolution, Kenyan long-distance running tradition, Ethiopian coffee culture heritage, Swahili literature, Nairobi tech innovation hub.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系（班图语族/斯瓦希里语）、亚非语系（阿姆哈拉语、索马里语、奥罗莫语）、印欧语系（英语官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo (Bantu/Swahili), Afro-Asiatic (Amharic, Somali, Oromo), Indo-European (English as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 区域GDP约4300亿美元，肯尼亚（约1130亿）与埃塞俄比亚（约1560亿）为最大经济体。肯尼亚是东非金融科技中心。
gdpDescription.en: Regional GDP ~$430B, with Kenya (~$113B) and Ethiopia (~$156B) as largest economies. Kenya is East Africa's fintech hub.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（咖啡、茶叶、花卉）、移动金融科技、旅游业、制造业（埃塞俄比亚）、港口物流
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (coffee, tea, flowers), mobile fintech, tourism, manufacturing (Ethiopia), port logistics

tradeGoods.zh: 咖啡、茶叶、鲜花、钛矿、纺织品、活畜、黄金
tradeGoods.en: Coffee, tea, fresh flowers, titanium ore, textiles, livestock, gold

name.zh: 肯尼亚先令/埃塞俄比亚比尔/坦桑尼亚先令/索马里先令
name.en: Kenyan Shilling / Ethiopian Birr / Tanzanian Shilling / Somali Shilling

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富中位数极低，M-Pesa等移动金融服务极大提升了底层金融包容性，但贫困率仍居高不下。
householdWealth.en: Extremely low median household wealth; M-Pesa and mobile financial services greatly improved financial inclusion for the poor, but poverty rates remain high.

tradeRoutes.zh: 印度洋海运通往中东与亚洲，蒙巴萨港与吉布提港为区域门户，中国为最大贸易伙伴之一。
tradeRoutes.en: Indian Ocean shipping to the Middle East and Asia; Mombasa and Djibouti ports as regional gateways; China among the largest trade partners.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济为主（肯尼亚），国家主导发展模式（埃塞俄比亚），混合经济（坦桑尼亚）。
economicSystem.en: Market-oriented (Kenya), state-led development model (Ethiopia), mixed economy (Tanzania).

treasuryDescription.zh: 肯尼亚外汇储备约72亿美元，埃塞俄比亚约31亿（严重不足）。各国高度依赖国际发展贷款。
treasuryDescription.en: Kenya's forex reserves ~$7.2B, Ethiopia ~$3.1B (severely inadequate). Countries heavily dependent on international development loans.

debtLevel.zh: 肯尼亚债务约占GDP 68%，埃塞俄比亚约占GDP 42%（但外债压力大），多国面临债务可持续性风险。
debtLevel.en: Kenya's debt ~68% of GDP, Ethiopia ~42% of GDP (but heavy external debt pressure); multiple countries face debt sustainability risks.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 肯尼亚鲁托政府推增税方案引发争议，埃塞俄比亚申请债务减免（G20共同框架），坦桑尼亚加大基建投资。
fiscalPolicy.en: Kenya's Ruto government pushing controversial tax increases, Ethiopia seeking debt relief (G20 Common Framework), Tanzania expanding infrastructure investment.

description.zh: 东非最大军事力量，经历提格雷战争后正在重建，仍面临多方面安全挑战。
description.en: East Africa's largest military force, rebuilding after the Tigray war while facing multifaceted security challenges.

description.zh: 专业化军队，参与索马里维和行动（AMISOM），反恐经验丰富。
description.en: Professional military active in Somalia peacekeeping (AMISOM), with extensive counterterrorism experience.

name.zh: 坦桑尼亚与其他东非军队
name.en: Tanzanian and other East African forces

description.zh: 坦桑尼亚参与刚果（金）东部维和，区域安全合作增强。
description.en: Tanzania active in eastern DRC peacekeeping, regional security cooperation strengthening.

technology.zh: 以常规武器为主，埃塞俄比亚引进土耳其与中国无人机用于提格雷冲突，肯尼亚拥有较现代化的反恐装备。
technology.en: Primarily conventional weapons; Ethiopia acquired Turkish and Chinese drones for the Tigray conflict; Kenya has relatively modern counterterrorism equipment.

threats.zh: 青年党（索马里）恐怖主义、埃塞俄比亚内部民族冲突、南苏丹内战余波、厄立特里亚边境紧张。
threats.en: Al-Shabaab (Somalia) terrorism, Ethiopian internal ethnic conflicts, South Sudan civil war aftermath, Eritrean border tensions.

recentBattles.zh: 2022年埃塞俄比亚-提格雷停火后仍有零星冲突，索马里反青年党军事行动持续，肯尼亚北部边境安全行动。
recentBattles.en: Sporadic conflict after 2022 Ethiopia-Tigray ceasefire, ongoing anti-al-Shabaab operations in Somalia, Kenya's northern border security operations.

populationDescription.zh: 区域总人口约3.9亿，埃塞俄比亚（约1.2亿，非洲第二）、肯尼亚（约5500万）、坦桑尼亚（约6500万）为核心。
populationDescription.en: Regional population ~390M; Ethiopia (~120M, Africa's 2nd most populous), Kenya (~55M), Tanzania (~65M) form the core.

ethnicGroups.zh: 奥罗莫、阿姆哈拉、提格雷（埃塞俄比亚）；基库尤、卢奥、卡伦金（肯尼亚）；苏库马、查加（坦桑尼亚）；索马里氏族
ethnicGroups.en: Oromo, Amhara, Tigray (Ethiopia); Kikuyu, Luo, Kalenjin (Kenya); Sukuma, Chaga (Tanzania); Somali clans

socialClasses.zh: 城市科技新中产（尤其内罗毕）、政治精英、传统农业社会阶层、游牧社区、城市贫民。
socialClasses.en: Urban tech new middle class (especially Nairobi), political elites, traditional agricultural classes, pastoral communities, urban poor.

allies.zh: 美国（安全合作）、中国（基建投资/一带一路）、欧盟（发展援助）、东非共同体成员国。
allies.en: US (security cooperation), China (infrastructure investment/BRI), EU (development aid), East African Community member states.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但青年党为索马里与肯尼亚共同威胁，埃塞俄比亚与厄立特里亚关系时好时坏。
enemies.en: No formal state enemies, but al-Shabaab is a shared threat for Somalia and Kenya; Ethiopia-Eritrea relations fluctuate.

treaties.zh: 东非共同体条约、非洲大陆自由贸易区、联合国维和参与、美国《非洲增长与机遇法》。
treaties.en: East African Community treaty, AfCFTA, UN peacekeeping participation, US African Growth and Opportunity Act.

foreignPolicy.zh: 肯尼亚在美中之间平衡外交，埃塞俄比亚寻求重建国际形象（后提格雷战争），坦桑尼亚积极推动区域一体化。
foreignPolicy.en: Kenya balances between US and China, Ethiopia seeks to rebuild international image (post-Tigray war), Tanzania actively promotes regional integration.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年埃塞俄比亚-厄立特里亚关系恶化，肯尼亚主持苏丹和平谈判，东非共同体接纳刚果（金）为新成员。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Ethiopia-Eritrea relations deteriorated, Kenya hosted Sudan peace talks, East African Community admitted DRC as a new member.

era.zh: 移动创新与数字服务领先期
era.en: Mobile innovation and digital services leadership era

keyInnovations.zh: M-Pesa移动支付系统（全球移动金融先驱）、iHub创新中心、Ushahidi危机映射平台、肯尼亚绿色能源（地热）。
keyInnovations.en: M-Pesa mobile payment system (global mobile finance pioneer), iHub innovation center, Ushahidi crisis-mapping platform, Kenya's green energy (geothermal).

infrastructure.zh: 肯尼亚与坦桑尼亚光纤覆盖扩展中，中国建造的铁路（蒙巴萨-内罗毕标轨铁路、亚的斯-吉布提铁路），移动网络普及。
infrastructure.en: Expanding fiber optic coverage in Kenya and Tanzania, Chinese-built railways (Mombasa-Nairobi SGR, Addis-Djibouti railway), widespread mobile networks.

policy.zh: 肯尼亚制定数字经济蓝图但尚无专门AI立法，埃塞俄比亚聚焦于基础数字化建设。区域AI治理框架缺失。
policy.en: Kenya has a digital economy blueprint but no dedicated AI legislation; Ethiopia focused on basic digitalization. Regional AI governance framework absent.

regulatoryStance.zh: 监管宽松，肯尼亚对金融科技实行监管沙盒，数据保护法律逐步完善。
regulatoryStance.en: Light-touch regulation; Kenya operates fintech regulatory sandboxes; data protection laws gradually improving.

investmentScale.zh: AI专项投资有限，但内罗毕科技生态系统累计吸引超过10亿美元风投（含金融科技与AI应用）。
investmentScale.en: Limited dedicated AI investment, but Nairobi's tech ecosystem has attracted over $1B in VC funding cumulatively (including fintech and AI applications).

capabilities.zh: 聚焦斯瓦希里语NLP、农业AI、健康诊断AI，依赖国际开源模型。
capabilities.en: Focused on Swahili NLP, agricultural AI, health diagnostic AI, relying on international open-source models.

keyProducts.zh: M-Pesa移动支付（AI风控与信用评分）
keyProducts.en: M-Pesa mobile payments (AI risk control and credit scoring)

keyProducts.zh: 危机映射与AI数据分析平台
keyProducts.en: Crisis mapping and AI data analytics platform

contribution.zh: 开创性的开源危机映射平台，是肯尼亚科技创新的标志性人物。
contribution.en: Pioneered the open-source crisis-mapping platform, an iconic figure in Kenya's tech innovation.

researchFocus.zh: 斯瓦希里语与东非语言NLP、移动金融AI、农业精准种植AI、疾病预测与卫生AI。
researchFocus.en: Swahili and East African language NLP, mobile finance AI, agricultural precision farming AI, disease prediction and health AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 计算基础设施有限，依赖AWS与Google Cloud非洲节点，内罗毕有少量数据中心。
computeInfrastructure.en: Limited compute infrastructure; reliant on AWS and Google Cloud African nodes; Nairobi has a small number of data centers.

talentPool.zh: 内罗毕iHub等创新中心培养了活跃的科技社区，但高端AI研究人才不足。Google与Microsoft在内罗毕设有非洲AI研究中心。
talentPool.en: Nairobi's iHub and similar innovation centers have fostered an active tech community, but high-end AI research talent is insufficient. Google and Microsoft have African AI research centers in Nairobi.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI竞争力较低，但肯尼亚在撒哈拉以南非洲处于领先地位（仅次于南非）。
globalRanking.en: Low in global AI competitiveness, but Kenya leads in sub-Saharan Africa (second to South Africa).

outlook.zh: M-Pesa式移动创新传统与活跃的内罗毕科技生态为AI应用提供了独特优势，但基础设施与投资缺口仍大。
outlook.en: M-Pesa-style mobile innovation tradition and Nairobi's vibrant tech ecosystem provide unique advantages for AI applications, but infrastructure and investment gaps remain large.

strengths.zh: 全球移动金融创新领导者（M-Pesa）、活跃的内罗毕科技生态、年轻人口、地理位置优越（印度洋门户）。
strengths.en: Global mobile finance innovation leader (M-Pesa), vibrant Nairobi tech ecosystem, young population, advantageous geography (Indian Ocean gateway).

weaknesses.zh: 埃塞俄比亚内部冲突、索马里安全问题、基础设施不足、贫困率高、气候变化脆弱性（干旱与洪水）。
weaknesses.en: Ethiopian internal conflict, Somali security issues, infrastructure deficits, high poverty rate, climate change vulnerability (drought and floods).

outlook.zh: 若区域和平稳定，东非共同体深化一体化，数字创新传统可推动该区域在非洲数字经济中占据领先地位。
outlook.en: With regional peace and stability and deeper EAC integration, the digital innovation tradition can propel the region to lead Africa's digital economy.

description.zh: 2023年的东非在内罗毕科技创新与移动支付领先的同时，面临埃塞俄比亚内部冲突、索马里恐怖主义与债务危机的多重挑战。
description.en: East Africa in 2023 leads in Nairobi tech innovation and mobile payments while facing Ethiopian internal conflict, Somali terrorism, and debt crises.

ruler.zh: 费利克斯·齐塞克迪（刚果民主共和国总统）

dynasty.zh: 后蒙博托民主过渡时期

capital.zh: 金沙萨（刚果民主共和国）/ 雅温得（喀麦隆）/ 布拉柴维尔（刚果共和国）

governmentForm.zh: 刚果民主共和国为半总统制共和国（治理能力薄弱），喀麦隆为总统制共和国，各国治理水平差异巨大。
governmentForm.en: DRC is a semi-presidential republic (weak governance capacity), Cameroon a presidential republic; governance quality varies enormously across the region.

socialStructure.zh: 高度碎片化的多民族社会，精英阶层控制矿产资源，大部分人口从事自给农业，武装团体控制东部地区。
socialStructure.en: Highly fragmented multi-ethnic society, elites control mineral resources, most population engaged in subsistence agriculture, armed groups control eastern territories.

rulingClass.zh: 政治精英与矿业利益集团、军事将领、传统部落领袖、外国矿业公司代理人。
rulingClass.en: Political elites and mining interest groups, military commanders, traditional tribal leaders, foreign mining company agents.

succession.zh: 刚果民主共和国通过选举（争议频繁），喀麦隆比亚总统执政40余年，区域民主转型缓慢。
succession.en: DRC through elections (frequently disputed), Cameroon's Biya has ruled for over 40 years; democratic transition across the region is slow.

structure.zh: 各国设有总统制政府，但中央政府对偏远地区控制力极弱，刚果民主共和国东部大片区域处于武装团体控制下。
structure.en: Countries have presidential systems, but central government control over remote areas is extremely weak; large swathes of eastern DRC are under armed group control.

name.zh: 刚果民主共和国矿业部

function.zh: 管理钴、铜、锡、钽等战略矿产资源开发与出口许可。
function.en: Manages development and export licensing of strategic mineral resources including cobalt, copper, tin, and tantalum.

name.zh: 中部非洲国家经济共同体秘书处

function.zh: 促进中部非洲经济一体化与安全合作。
function.en: Promotes Central African economic integration and security cooperation.

name.zh: 联合国刚果民主共和国稳定团

function.zh: 维和与平民保护，计划逐步撤出。
function.en: Peacekeeping and civilian protection, with a planned gradual withdrawal.

localAdmin.zh: 刚果民主共和国分26省，但中央对大部分省份控制有限；喀麦隆分10个大区。
localAdmin.en: DRC divided into 26 provinces but central control over most is limited; Cameroon has 10 regions.

legalSystem.zh: 以比利时/法国大陆法传统为基础，习惯法在农村地区广泛适用，法治水平极低。
legalSystem.en: Based on Belgian/French civil law traditions, customary law widely applied in rural areas, rule of law extremely weak.

taxationSystem.zh: 矿产出口税与特许经营费为主要收入来源，但税收征管能力极弱，大量矿产通过非正式渠道出口。
taxationSystem.en: Mineral export taxes and concession fees as main revenue; tax collection capacity extremely weak with much mineral output exported through informal channels.

religion.zh: 基督教（天主教、新教）为主，伊斯兰教（北部）、传统宗教并存
religion.en: Christianity (Catholic, Protestant) predominant, Islam (northern regions), traditional religions coexisting

philosophy.zh: 班图社区主义传统、丰富的口述历史与音乐文化、泛非主义与卢蒙巴独立精神遗产。
philosophy.en: Bantu communitarian traditions, rich oral history and musical culture, pan-Africanism and Lumumba's independence legacy.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（法语官方语言、英语在喀麦隆部分地区）、林加拉语与斯瓦希里语通用
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (French official language, English in parts of Cameroon), Lingala and Swahili widely spoken

culturalAchievements.zh: 刚果伦巴音乐传统（UNESCO非遗）、丰富的班图雕刻艺术、金沙萨流行音乐文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Congolese rumba music tradition (UNESCO intangible heritage), rich Bantu sculptural arts, Kinshasa popular music culture.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语族（林加拉语、斯瓦希里语、基孔果语）、印欧语系（法语官方语言）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo Bantu (Lingala, Swahili, Kikongo), Indo-European (French as official language)

gdpDescription.zh: 区域GDP约1100亿美元，刚果民主共和国（约650亿）与喀麦隆（约450亿）为最大经济体。矿产资源极其丰富但经济发展极度落后。
gdpDescription.en: Regional GDP ~$110B; DRC (~$65B) and Cameroon (~$45B) are the largest economies. Extraordinarily rich in minerals but economic development extremely lagging.

mainIndustries.zh: 钴矿开采（全球70%）、铜矿、钻石、石油（喀麦隆/刚果共和国）、木材、自给农业
mainIndustries.en: Cobalt mining (70% of global supply), copper, diamonds, oil (Cameroon/Republic of Congo), timber, subsistence agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 钴、铜、钽、锡、钻石、木材、原油、棕榈油
tradeGoods.en: Cobalt, copper, tantalum, tin, diamonds, timber, crude oil, palm oil

name.en: Congolese Franc / Central African CFA Franc

householdWealth.zh: 全球最贫困地区之一，刚果民主共和国超过60%人口日均生活费不足2.15美元。矿业财富高度集中在少数精英手中。
householdWealth.en: One of the world's poorest regions; over 60% of DRC's population lives on less than $2.15/day. Mining wealth highly concentrated among a few elites.

tradeRoutes.zh: 刚果河水运体系，矿产出口至中国（最大钴买家）与欧洲，木材出口至亚洲。
tradeRoutes.en: Congo River waterway system; mineral exports to China (largest cobalt buyer) and Europe; timber exports to Asia.

economicSystem.zh: 名义市场经济但实际受精英垄断与冲突影响，矿业部门由外国跨国公司与中国企业主导。
economicSystem.en: Nominally market economy but effectively shaped by elite monopolies and conflict; mining sector dominated by foreign multinationals and Chinese companies.

source.zh: 矿业税费与特许权使用费

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备极低，刚果民主共和国约35亿美元，高度依赖国际援助与矿业收入。
treasuryDescription.en: Extremely low forex reserves; DRC ~$3.5B, heavily dependent on international aid and mining revenue.

debtLevel.zh: 刚果民主共和国债务约占GDP 20%（较低但偿还能力有限），喀麦隆约占GDP 45%。
debtLevel.en: DRC debt ~20% of GDP (low but limited repayment capacity), Cameroon ~45% of GDP.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 高度依赖矿业税收与国际援助，财政管理能力薄弱，腐败严重侵蚀公共收入。
fiscalPolicy.en: Heavily reliant on mining taxes and international aid; weak fiscal management capacity; corruption severely erodes public revenue.

name.zh: 刚果民主共和国武装部队

description.zh: 纸面规模庞大但训练不足、装备落后，与M23叛军和数十个武装团体作战。
description.en: Large on paper but poorly trained and equipped, fighting M23 rebels and dozens of armed groups.

name.zh: 喀麦隆与中非其他国家军队
name.en: Cameroon and other Central African forces

description.zh: 喀麦隆同时应对博科圣地北部威胁与英语区分裂危机。
description.en: Cameroon simultaneously confronting Boko Haram threats in the north and the Anglophone separatist crisis.

technology.zh: 军事技术极度落后，以轻武器为主，缺乏空中力量与现代通信设备，依赖联合国维和部队补充安全力量。
technology.en: Extremely backward military technology, primarily light weapons, lacking air power and modern communications, relying on UN peacekeepers to supplement security.

threats.zh: M23叛军（卢旺达支持）、上百个东部武装团体、博科圣地北部渗透、喀麦隆英语区分裂运动。
threats.en: M23 rebels (Rwanda-backed), over a hundred eastern armed groups, Boko Haram northern infiltration, Cameroon's Anglophone separatist movement.

recentBattles.zh: 2023年M23叛军在北基伍省扩大占领区域，东部人道危机加剧，MONUSCO开始撤离进程。
recentBattles.en: 2023 saw M23 rebels expanding territory in North Kivu, worsening eastern humanitarian crisis, MONUSCO beginning withdrawal process.

populationDescription.zh: 区域总人口约1.9亿，刚果民主共和国（约1亿，非洲第四）、喀麦隆（约2800万）为核心。人口增长率高。
populationDescription.en: Regional population ~190M; DRC (~100M, Africa's 4th most populous), Cameroon (~28M) at the core. High population growth rate.

ethnicGroups.zh: 班图族群为主体（巴刚果、蒙戈、卢巴、巴库巴等），俾格米人、苏丹语族群
ethnicGroups.en: Bantu peoples predominant (Bakongo, Mongo, Luba, Bakuba, etc.), Pygmy peoples, Sudanic groups

socialClasses.zh: 极少数政治矿业精英、微小城市中产、庞大的自给农业人口、东部冲突区数百万难民。
socialClasses.en: A tiny political-mining elite, minimal urban middle class, massive subsistence farming population, millions of displaced in eastern conflict zones.

allies.zh: 中国（最大矿业投资方）、法国（前殖民宗主国）、美国与欧盟（人道援助与安全合作）。
allies.en: China (largest mining investor), France (former colonial power), US and EU (humanitarian aid and security cooperation).

enemies.zh: 卢旺达（被指支持M23叛军）、东部武装团体。
enemies.en: Rwanda (accused of supporting M23 rebels), eastern armed groups.

treaties.zh: 中部非洲国家经济共同体、非洲联盟、东非共同体（刚果民主共和国新加入）。
treaties.en: ECCAS, African Union, East African Community (DRC newly joined).

foreignPolicy.zh: 齐塞克迪政府寻求国际社会关注东部冲突，要求卢旺达停止支持M23，深化与中国矿业合作。
foreignPolicy.en: Tshisekedi government seeks international attention on eastern conflict, demands Rwanda stop supporting M23, deepens mining cooperation with China.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年刚果民主共和国与卢旺达因M23问题关系恶化，MONUSCO开始分阶段撤离，12月刚果大选举行。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 DRC-Rwanda relations deteriorated over M23, MONUSCO began phased withdrawal, DRC elections held in December.

era.zh: 数字化基础建设期

keyInnovations.zh: 移动通信覆盖扩展、手工采矿向机械化过渡缓慢、基础电子支付系统推广。
keyInnovations.en: Expanding mobile communication coverage, slow transition from artisanal to mechanized mining, basic electronic payment system deployment.

infrastructure.zh: 基础设施极度匮乏，公路网络残破，电力覆盖率低（不足20%），移动网络在城市地区扩展。
infrastructure.en: Extremely deficient infrastructure, deteriorated road networks, low electricity coverage (under 20%), mobile networks expanding in urban areas.

policy.zh: 无专门AI政策，数字化转型仍处于最基础阶段。政府优先事项为基本治理与安全稳定。
policy.en: No dedicated AI policy; digital transformation at the most basic stage. Government priorities are basic governance and security stability.

regulatoryStance.zh: 无AI监管框架，基本数据保护法律也不完善。
regulatoryStance.en: No AI regulatory framework; even basic data protection laws are incomplete.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资几乎为零，整个ICT部门投资极为有限。
investmentScale.en: AI investment nearly zero; ICT sector investment overall is extremely limited.

capabilities.zh: 该地区尚无本土AI模型开发能力，少量国际NGO使用AI工具进行冲突预警和人道分析。
capabilities.en: No indigenous AI model development capability; a few international NGOs use AI tools for conflict early warning and humanitarian analysis.

keyProducts.zh: 国际矿业公司使用AI进行矿产勘探与供应链追溯（如IBM供应链追溯钴来源）。
keyProducts.en: International mining companies use AI for mineral exploration and supply chain tracing (e.g., IBM supply chain tracing cobalt origins).

contribution.zh: 该地区对全球AI产业的关键贡献在于钴供应——全球AI芯片和电池所需钴的70%来自刚果民主共和国。
contribution.en: The region's key contribution to global AI is cobalt supply — 70% of cobalt needed for AI chips and batteries worldwide comes from the DRC.

researchFocus.zh: 几乎无本土AI研究，国际组织在此开展冲突预测AI、矿产供应链追溯AI等应用研究。
researchFocus.en: Virtually no indigenous AI research; international organizations conduct applied research in conflict prediction AI and mineral supply chain tracing AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 计算基础设施几乎不存在，电力供应是最根本瓶颈。
computeInfrastructure.en: Compute infrastructure virtually nonexistent; power supply is the most fundamental bottleneck.

talentPool.zh: AI人才极度匮乏，高等教育体系薄弱，STEM毕业生大量外流。
talentPool.en: Extremely scarce AI talent, weak higher education system, massive STEM graduate brain drain.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI竞争力最低梯队，但作为钴的全球供应中心，对AI硬件产业链具有不可替代的战略价值。
globalRanking.en: Lowest tier in global AI competitiveness, but as the global cobalt supply center, holds irreplaceable strategic value for the AI hardware supply chain.

outlook.zh: 短期内AI发展前景暗淡，但若和平稳定实现且矿产资源得到合理开发，矿业AI和资源治理AI存在长远应用空间。
outlook.en: Near-term AI prospects bleak, but if peace and stability are achieved and mineral resources developed rationally, mining AI and resource governance AI have long-term application potential.

strengths.zh: 全球钴、铜、钽等战略矿产第一供应地（对AI芯片/电池不可或缺）、庞大年轻人口潜力、丰富水力资源。
strengths.en: World's #1 supplier of strategic minerals like cobalt, copper, tantalum (indispensable for AI chips/batteries), massive young population potential, abundant hydroelectric resources.

weaknesses.zh: 持续武装冲突、治理能力极弱、基础设施极度匮乏、极端贫困、腐败、人权危机。
weaknesses.en: Persistent armed conflict, extremely weak governance, severe infrastructure deficit, extreme poverty, corruption, human rights crisis.

outlook.zh: 该地区作为全球AI供应链中钴的关键来源，战略重要性将持续上升。但要实现自身发展需要和平与良治。
outlook.en: As the critical source of cobalt in the global AI supply chain, the region's strategic importance will continue to rise. But self-development requires peace and good governance.

description.zh: 2023年的中非地区身处全球AI供应链的关键节点——全球70%的钴产自刚果民主共和国，却同时深陷武装冲突与极端贫困。
description.en: Central Africa in 2023 sits at a critical node of the global AI supply chain — 70% of the world's cobalt comes from the DRC — yet remains mired in armed conflict and extreme poverty.

ruler.zh: 西里尔·拉马福萨（南非总统）

dynasty.zh: 后种族隔离民主时期（非国大执政）

capital.zh: 比勒陀利亚/开普敦/布隆方丹（南非三首都）

governmentForm.zh: 南非为议会制共和国（总统由议会选举），津巴布韦为总统制共和国，莫桑比克为半总统制。
governmentForm.en: South Africa is a parliamentary republic (president elected by parliament), Zimbabwe a presidential republic, Mozambique semi-presidential.

socialStructure.zh: 南非种族隔离遗留的高度不平等社会结构，黑人中产阶级增长但贫富差距全球最大，白人仍控制多数经济资源。
socialStructure.en: Highly unequal social structure inherited from apartheid; growing Black middle class but the world's widest wealth gap; whites still control most economic resources.

rulingClass.zh: 非国大政治精英、白人商业资本家、黑人经济赋权（BEE）受益者、矿业集团。
rulingClass.en: ANC political elites, White business capitalists, Black Economic Empowerment (BEE) beneficiaries, mining conglomerates.

succession.zh: 南非通过议会选举总统，非国大内部权力竞争决定候选人。津巴布韦通过总统选举。
succession.en: South Africa's president elected by parliament, ANC internal power competition determines candidate. Zimbabwe through presidential elections.

structure.zh: 南非设有国民议会与全国省务院两院制议会，九省各有省政府。区域设南部非洲发展共同体（SADC）协调。
structure.en: South Africa has a bicameral parliament with nine provincial governments. SADC serves as regional coordination mechanism.

name.zh: 南非通信与数字技术部
name.en: SA Dept of Communications and Digital Technologies

function.zh: 推进数字化转型战略、电信监管与AI政策研究。
function.en: Advances digital transformation, telecom regulation, and AI policy research.

name.en: SA Dept of Science and Innovation

function.zh: 管理国家研究基金、科技园区与创新战略。
function.en: Manages national research funds, science parks, and innovation strategy.

name.zh: 南部非洲发展共同体秘书处

function.zh: 促进南部非洲经济一体化与安全合作。
function.en: Promotes Southern African economic integration and security cooperation.

localAdmin.zh: 南非分九个省各设省长与省议会，市镇层面设自治市政府。
localAdmin.en: South Africa divided into nine provinces each with a premier and legislature, with autonomous municipal governments.

legalSystem.zh: 南非以罗马-荷兰法与普通法混合体系为基础，宪法法院为最高司法权威。
legalSystem.en: South Africa's hybrid Roman-Dutch and common law system, Constitutional Court as highest judicial authority.

taxationSystem.zh: 南非依赖个人所得税、增值税与公司税，矿业特许权使用费为重要补充。
taxationSystem.en: South Africa relies on personal income tax, VAT, and corporate tax, with mining royalties as supplement.

religion.zh: 基督教为主（约80%），传统非洲宗教、印度教与伊斯兰教少数
religion.en: Christianity predominant (~80%), with traditional African religions, Hinduism, Islam minorities

philosophy.zh: 乌班图哲学（'我因他人而存在'）、反种族隔离运动遗产（曼德拉精神）、彩虹国家理念。
philosophy.en: Ubuntu philosophy ('I am because we are'), anti-apartheid legacy (Mandela's spirit), Rainbow Nation ideal.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（英语、南非荷兰语等11种官方语言）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (English, Afrikaans, and 11 official languages)

culturalAchievements.zh: 反种族隔离文学（戈迪默、库切诺贝尔奖）、南非爵士乐、约翰内斯堡当代艺术、开普敦设计文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Anti-apartheid literature (Gordimer, Coetzee Nobel laureates), South African jazz, Johannesburg contemporary art, Cape Town design culture.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语族（祖鲁语、科萨语等）、印欧语系（英语、南非荷兰语）
languageFamily.en: Niger-Congo Bantu (Zulu, Xhosa, etc.), Indo-European (English, Afrikaans)

gdpDescription.zh: 区域GDP约4500亿美元，南非（约3800亿）为核心。南非经济受Eskom电力危机严重拖累。
gdpDescription.en: Regional GDP ~$450B, South Africa (~$380B) as core. Economy severely hampered by Eskom power crisis (load shedding).

mainIndustries.zh: 采矿（黄金、铂金、钻石、铬）、金融服务、汽车制造、农业、旅游业
mainIndustries.en: Mining (gold, platinum, diamonds, chromium), financial services, automotive, agriculture, tourism

tradeGoods.zh: 铂金、黄金、钻石、铬、锰、煤炭、汽车、水果、葡萄酒
tradeGoods.en: Platinum, gold, diamonds, chromium, manganese, coal, automobiles, fruit, wine

householdWealth.zh: 全球最不平等社会之一（基尼系数0.63），白人家庭财富是黑人十倍以上。
householdWealth.en: Among the world's most unequal (Gini 0.63); White household wealth over 10x Black households.

tradeRoutes.zh: 好望角海运，矿产出口至中国、欧盟、美国，非洲大陆内部贸易增长。
tradeRoutes.en: Cape of Good Hope sea routes; mineral exports to China, EU, US; growing intra-African trade.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济，黑人经济赋权（BEE）政策推行种族转型，国有企业效率低下。
economicSystem.en: Market-based with mandatory BEE racial transformation; state-owned enterprises plagued by inefficiency.

treasuryDescription.zh: 南非外汇储备约540亿美元，兰特波动较大，财政空间受债务增长挤压。
treasuryDescription.en: South Africa forex reserves ~$54B; Rand volatile; fiscal space squeezed by rising debt.

debtLevel.zh: 南非政府债务约占GDP 72%且持续上升，穆迪评级为垃圾级。
debtLevel.en: South African government debt ~72% of GDP and rising; rated junk by Moody's.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 试图控制赤字同时应对Eskom电力危机救助与社会福利支出压力。
fiscalPolicy.en: Balancing deficit control with Eskom bailouts and social welfare spending pressures.

description.zh: 非洲技术最先进军队之一，受预算削减影响战备下降。
description.en: One of Africa's most advanced militaries; readiness declining from budget cuts.

description.zh: 莫桑比克面临北部伊斯兰叛乱，津巴布韦军队政治化。
description.en: Mozambique faces northern Islamic insurgency; Zimbabwe's military heavily politicized.

technology.zh: 南非军工有一定基础（Denel），国防预算持续下降。曾拥有核武器（已自愿放弃）。
technology.en: SA has a defense industrial base (Denel); declining budgets. Once possessed nuclear weapons (voluntarily dismantled).

threats.zh: 莫桑比克北部叛乱、津巴布韦政治不稳定、区域移民压力、国内犯罪率极高。
threats.en: Mozambique insurgency, Zimbabwe instability, regional migration, extremely high domestic crime rates.

recentBattles.zh: 南非参与莫桑比克卡博德尔加多反叛乱SADC联合行动。
recentBattles.en: SA participates in SADC joint operations against insurgency in Mozambique's Cabo Delgado.

populationDescription.zh: 南非约6100万为核心，津巴布韦约1600万，莫桑比克约3300万。
populationDescription.en: South Africa ~61M as core, Zimbabwe ~16M, Mozambique ~33M.

ethnicGroups.en: Black Africans (~81%), Coloured (8.8%), White (7.8%), Asian (2.5%)

socialClasses.zh: 白人商业精英、黑人新富阶层（BEE）、城市中产、庞大失业与贫困阶层（约33%失业率）。
socialClasses.en: White business elite, Black new wealth (BEE), urban middle class, massive unemployed/poor (~33% unemployment).

allies.zh: BRICS成员、非盟、SADC、欧盟。
allies.en: BRICS member, African Union, SADC, EU.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，因拒绝谴责俄罗斯入侵乌克兰与西方关系紧张。
enemies.en: No formal enemies; relations with the West strained over refusal to condemn Russia's invasion of Ukraine.

treaties.zh: SADC条约、BRICS、非洲大陆自由贸易区、南非-欧盟贸易协定。
treaties.en: SADC treaty, BRICS, AfCFTA, SA-EU trade agreement.

foreignPolicy.zh: 南非不结盟传统，俄乌中立，推动BRICS扩员，维护非洲多边外交。
foreignPolicy.en: SA non-alignment tradition, neutral on Russia-Ukraine, promoting BRICS expansion, defending Africa's multilateral diplomacy.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年主办BRICS峰会推动6国扩员，ICC对普京逮捕令令南非陷入困境。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 hosted BRICS summit driving 6-nation expansion; ICC Putin warrant created diplomatic bind.

era.zh: 工业化与数字化并进期

keyInnovations.zh: 射电天文学（MeerKAT/SKA）、金融科技、CSIR科研、南非核研究遗产。
keyInnovations.en: Radio astronomy (MeerKAT/SKA), fintech, CSIR research, SA nuclear research legacy.

infrastructure.zh: 非洲最发达基础设施，但Eskom电力危机（每日停电6-10小时）严重制约发展。
infrastructure.en: Africa's most developed infrastructure, but Eskom crisis (6-10hr daily load shedding) severely constrains development.

policy.zh: 南非发布AI路线图草案，成立总统第四次工业革命委员会。政策执行力不足。
policy.en: SA released draft AI roadmap, established Presidential 4IR Commission. Policy execution weak.

regulatoryStance.zh: POPIA（个人信息保护法）为数据治理提供基础，尚无专门AI立法。
regulatoryStance.en: POPIA provides data governance foundation; no dedicated AI legislation yet.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资约2-3亿美元，主要来自政府研究基金与国际合作。
investmentScale.en: AI investment ~$200-300M, mainly from government research and international cooperation.

capabilities.zh: 聚焦南非11种语言NLP、矿业AI、天文数据AI。
capabilities.en: Focused on SA 11-language NLP, mining AI, astronomical data analysis AI.

keyProducts.zh: AI研究与创新、数据科学应用
keyProducts.en: AI research and innovation, data science applications

keyProducts.zh: 全球科技投资（腾讯大股东），间接参与AI
keyProducts.en: Global tech investment (major Tencent shareholder), indirect AI participation

title.zh: 比勒陀利亚大学数据科学教授
title.en: Professor of Data Science, University of Pretoria

contribution.zh: 南非AI学术领军人物，Masakhane NLP社区联合发起人，推动非洲语言NLP。
contribution.en: Leading SA AI academic, Masakhane NLP community co-founder, promoting African language NLP.

researchFocus.zh: 非洲语言NLP、矿业AI、天文大数据（SKA）、健康AI。
researchFocus.en: African language NLP, mining AI, astronomical big data (SKA), health AI.
