computeInfrastructure.zh: 非洲最佳计算设施（CHPC），但与全球前沿差距大。SKA项目带来科研计算需求。
computeInfrastructure.en: Africa's best compute (CHPC), but massive gap with global leaders. SKA drives research computing demand.

talentPool.zh: 非洲最优质AI人才基地（UCT、斯泰伦博斯、UP），但人才外流至欧美严重。
talentPool.en: Africa's best AI talent base (UCT, Stellenbosch, UP), but severe brain drain to West.

globalRanking.zh: 非洲大陆AI竞争力最强，全球中下游。
globalRanking.en: Strongest on the African continent, lower-middle tier globally.

outlook.zh: 电力危机制约AI基础设施，但大学研究、SKA与金融科技为AI应用提供非洲最佳条件。
outlook.en: Power crisis constrains AI infra, but university research, SKA, and fintech provide Africa's best AI conditions.

strengths.zh: 非洲最发达经济体、完善金融体系、丰富矿产、高等教育基础、BRICS成员。
strengths.en: Africa's most developed economy, mature financial system, rich minerals, higher education base, BRICS membership.

weaknesses.zh: Eskom电力危机、极端不平等、33%失业率、高犯罪率、国企低效、腐败。
weaknesses.en: Eskom power crisis, extreme inequality, 33% unemployment, high crime, SOE inefficiency, corruption.

outlook.zh: 若解决电力危机并推进改革，南非有潜力引领非洲数字化与AI转型。
outlook.en: If power crisis resolved and reforms advance, SA can lead Africa's digital and AI transformation.

description.zh: 2023年的南部非洲以南非为核心，在非洲最强科研基础与电力危机、高失业、极端不平等之间艰难前行。
description.en: Southern Africa in 2023, centered on South Africa, struggles between Africa's strongest research base and power crisis, unemployment, and inequality.

ruler.zh: 安德烈斯·曼努埃尔·洛佩斯·奥夫拉多尔

dynasty.zh: 国家复兴运动党（MORENA）执政期

governmentForm.zh: 联邦总统制共和国，三权分立，31州与1联邦区。
governmentForm.en: Federal presidential republic with separation of powers, 31 states and 1 federal district.

socialStructure.zh: 高度不平等社会，近岸外包推动北部工业城市中产增长。
socialStructure.en: Highly unequal society; nearshoring drives northern industrial city middle class growth.

rulingClass.zh: MORENA左翼精英、传统商业寡头（斯利姆等）、军方角色扩大。
rulingClass.en: MORENA left-wing elites, traditional oligarchs (Slim, etc.), expanding military role.

succession.zh: 总统直选，任期六年不可连任。2024年将大选。
succession.en: President directly elected, six-year non-renewable term. 2024 elections forthcoming.

structure.zh: 联邦总统制，参众两院国会，最高法院。AMLO扩大军方参与基建与安全。
structure.en: Federal presidential system, bicameral Congress, Supreme Court. AMLO expanded military role in infrastructure and security.

function.zh: 管理贸易政策、外国投资与近岸外包战略。
function.en: Manages trade policy, FDI, and nearshoring strategy.

function.zh: 军事防御、反贩毒，AMLO下承担大量基建项目。
function.en: Defense, counter-narcotics; under AMLO also managing major infrastructure projects.

function.zh: 管理对美关系、移民政策与拉美区域外交。
function.en: Manages US relations, immigration policy, and Latin American diplomacy.

localAdmin.zh: 31州各设州长与州议会，联邦区由市长治理。
localAdmin.en: 31 states each with governor and legislature; federal district governed by a mayor.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系联邦法律，2008年司法改革引入对抗制审判。安全领域法治面临挑战。
legalSystem.en: Civil law federal system; 2008 reform introduced adversarial trials. Rule of law challenged in security matters.

taxationSystem.zh: 增值税16%、所得税为主，Pemex石油收入为补充。
taxationSystem.en: VAT 16%, income taxes primary; Pemex oil revenue supplementary.

religion.zh: 天主教为主（约78%），新教增长，原住民宗教并存
religion.en: Catholicism predominant (~78%), Protestantism growing, indigenous religions coexisting

philosophy.zh: 原住民文明遗产与天主教融合、革命传统、AMLO'第四次转型'理念。
philosophy.en: Indigenous-Catholic fusion, revolutionary tradition, AMLO's 'Fourth Transformation' ideology.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（西班牙语），68种原住民语言
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Spanish), 68 indigenous languages

culturalAchievements.zh: 玛雅阿兹特克遗产、壁画运动、诺贝尔文学奖（帕斯）、美食UNESCO非遗、电影业。
culturalAchievements.en: Maya/Aztec heritage, muralist movement, Nobel literature (Paz), cuisine (UNESCO heritage), cinema.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语）、纳瓦特尔语、玛雅语等
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Romance (Spanish), Nahuatl, Maya, etc.

gdpDescription.zh: GDP约1.32万亿美元，拉美第二大经济体。近岸外包浪潮使墨西哥成为中美脱钩最大受益者之一。
gdpDescription.en: GDP ~$1.32T, Latin America's 2nd largest. Nearshoring wave makes Mexico a top beneficiary of US-China decoupling.

mainIndustries.zh: 汽车制造、电子组装、石油（Pemex）、航空航天、农业、旅游、汇款
mainIndustries.en: Automotive, electronics assembly, oil (Pemex), aerospace, agriculture, tourism, remittances

tradeGoods.zh: 汽车及零部件、电子产品、石油、农产品、医疗器械
tradeGoods.en: Automobiles, electronics, oil, agricultural products, medical devices

householdWealth.zh: 中产增长但约40%仍处贫困，北部工业城市与南部农村差距巨大。
householdWealth.en: Middle class growing but ~40% still in poverty; massive north-south divide.

tradeRoutes.zh: 对美出口占80%以上（USMCA），近岸外包吸引全球制造商，双洋贸易通道。
tradeRoutes.en: US trade >80% of exports (USMCA); nearshoring attracting global manufacturers; dual-ocean corridors.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济为主，AMLO加强国家干预（能源国有化），近岸外包驱动FDI创新高。
economicSystem.en: Market-based; AMLO increasing state intervention (energy nationalization); nearshoring driving record FDI.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备约2000亿美元，2023年比索表现强劲，财政纪律在拉美中较好。
treasuryDescription.en: Forex reserves ~$200B; peso strong in 2023; fiscal discipline relatively good in Latin America.

debtLevel.zh: 政府债务约占GDP 49%，Pemex债务是主要风险。
debtLevel.en: Government debt ~49% of GDP; Pemex debt the primary fiscal risk.

fiscalPolicy.zh: AMLO坚持'不举债'但社会支出增长，Pemex持续获救助，2024选举前支出扩大。
fiscalPolicy.en: AMLO's 'no borrowing' but social spending rising; Pemex bailouts continue; spending expanding pre-2024 elections.

description.zh: 反毒品行动为主，AMLO下承担民用基建项目。
description.en: Counter-narcotics focused; under AMLO managing civilian infrastructure projects.

description.zh: 海上安全与反贩毒，比陆军更不易腐败。
description.en: Maritime security and counter-narcotics; considered less corrupt than army.

description.zh: AMLO创立的准军事力量，负责国内安全与移民管控。
description.en: AMLO-created paramilitary force for domestic security and immigration control.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统洛佩斯·奥夫拉多尔

technology.zh: 常规武器为主，美制黑鹰直升机与以色列监控技术，网络安全提升中。
technology.en: Conventional weapons; US Black Hawks, Israeli surveillance tech; improving cybersecurity.

threats.zh: 贩毒集团（锡那罗亚、CJNG）是最大安全威胁，跨境犯罪，移民危机。
threats.en: Drug cartels (Sinaloa, CJNG) biggest threat; cross-border crime; migration crisis.

recentBattles.zh: 持续反毒品行动，2023年锡那罗亚暴力升级，北部边境安全严峻。
recentBattles.en: Ongoing anti-cartel operations; 2023 Sinaloa violence escalation; dire northern border security.

populationDescription.zh: 全球第十大人口国，约1.28亿。充裕劳动年龄人口是近岸外包优势。
populationDescription.en: World's 10th most populous, ~128M. Ample working-age population is a nearshoring advantage.

ethnicGroups.zh: 梅斯蒂索人（约62%）、原住民（约21%）、白人（约10%）
ethnicGroups.en: Mestizo (~62%), Indigenous (~21%), White (~10%)

socialClasses.zh: 商业寡头、北部工业城市新中产、非正规经济从业者、南部原住民贫困群体。
socialClasses.en: Business oligarchs, northern industrial new middle class, informal workers, southern indigenous poor.

allies.zh: 美国（USMCA）、加拿大、拉美国家、欧盟。
allies.en: US (USMCA), Canada, Latin American nations, EU.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，贩毒集团是实际最大威胁。
enemies.en: No formal enemies; drug cartels are the actual greatest threat.

treaties.zh: USMCA、太平洋联盟、CPTPP、CELAC。
treaties.en: USMCA, Pacific Alliance, CPTPP, CELAC.

foreignPolicy.zh: AMLO'不干涉'原则，与美国务实合作管控移民，积极吸引近岸外包。
foreignPolicy.en: AMLO's non-intervention principle; pragmatic US cooperation on migration; actively attracting nearshoring.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年近岸外包投资热潮，美墨移民谈判持续，2024大选前外交稳健。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 nearshoring boom, ongoing US-Mexico migration talks, steady diplomacy ahead of 2024 elections.

era.zh: 工业化升级与数字化追赶期
era.en: Industrial upgrading and digital catch-up era

keyInnovations.zh: 汽车航空制造自动化、金融科技（Konfío、Clip）、电商增长。
keyInnovations.en: Automotive/aerospace automation, fintech (Konfío, Clip), e-commerce growth.

infrastructure.zh: 北部工业走廊较好，玛雅列车推进中，数字鸿沟仍存。
infrastructure.en: Northern industrial corridor well-developed; Maya Train advancing; digital divide persists.

policy.zh: 发布AI路线图草案但缺乏执行，AMLO削减科研投入引发担忧。
policy.en: Draft AI roadmap released but lacks follow-through; AMLO science funding cuts raise concerns.

regulatoryStance.zh: 尚无专门AI立法，数据保护依据联邦法律。
regulatoryStance.en: No dedicated AI legislation; data protection under federal law.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资约5-8亿美元，近岸外包可望间接提升AI能力。
investmentScale.en: AI investment ~$500-800M; nearshoring may indirectly boost AI capabilities.

capabilities.zh: 西班牙语NLP、制造业AI优化、金融科技AI。
capabilities.en: Spanish NLP, manufacturing AI optimization, fintech AI.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动中小企业信贷
keyProducts.en: AI-powered SME lending

keyProducts.zh: 数字支付与AI风控
keyProducts.en: Digital payments and AI risk control

title.zh: 蒙特雷科技大学AI研究中心负责人
title.en: Head of AI Research, Tec de Monterrey

contribution.zh: 推动墨西哥AI学术研究与产学合作。
contribution.en: Advancing Mexico's AI academic research and industry collaboration.

researchFocus.zh: 制造业AI（近岸外包驱动）、西班牙语NLP、金融科技AI、智慧农业。
researchFocus.en: Manufacturing AI (nearshoring-driven), Spanish NLP, fintech AI, smart agriculture.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 有限，依赖AWS/Azure，近岸外包可能推动数据中心投资。
computeInfrastructure.en: Limited, reliant on AWS/Azure; nearshoring may drive data center investment.

talentPool.zh: UNAM与蒙特雷科技有工程基础，AI专才不足，部分外流美国。
talentPool.en: UNAM and Tec de Monterrey provide engineering base; AI specialists insufficient, some drain to US.

globalRanking.zh: 拉美AI第二（仅次巴西），全球中下游。
globalRanking.en: 2nd in Latin American AI (after Brazil), lower-middle globally.

outlook.zh: 近岸外包为AI发展带来重大机遇，制造业AI与金融科技AI有望快速增长。
outlook.en: Nearshoring brings major AI opportunities; manufacturing AI and fintech AI poised for rapid growth.

strengths.zh: 近岸外包浪潮、美国邻国优势、年轻劳动力、USMCA、制造业基础。
strengths.en: Nearshoring wave, US proximity, young workforce, USMCA, manufacturing base.

weaknesses.zh: 贩毒暴力、AMLO削减科研、基础设施瓶颈（能源/水）、南北差距。
weaknesses.en: Cartel violence, AMLO science cuts, infrastructure bottlenecks, north-south gap.

outlook.zh: 若改善安全并投资科技教育，墨西哥有望成为拉美工业与科技强国。
outlook.en: If security improves and tech education investment grows, Mexico can become a Latin American industrial power.

description.zh: 2023年的墨西哥正站在近岸外包浪潮风口，有望成为中美脱钩最大受益者，但贩毒暴力与政策不确定性仍是隐忧。
description.en: Mexico in 2023 rides the nearshoring wave, poised as biggest US-China decoupling beneficiary, but cartel violence and policy uncertainty remain concerns.

ruler.zh: 路易斯·伊纳西奥·卢拉·达席尔瓦

dynasty.zh: 劳工党第三次执政期

governmentForm.zh: 联邦总统制共和国，三权分立，26州与1联邦区。
governmentForm.en: Federal presidential republic with separation of powers, 26 states and 1 federal district.

socialStructure.zh: 高度不平等多种族社会，卢拉重启社会项目缩小差距。
socialStructure.en: Highly unequal multiracial society; Lula restarted social programs to reduce gaps.

rulingClass.zh: 劳工党左翼精英、农业寡头、金融资本家、军方影响犹存。
rulingClass.en: PT left-wing elites, agricultural oligarchs, financial capitalists, lingering military influence.

succession.zh: 总统直选（两轮制），四年任期可连任一次。卢拉2022年险胜博索纳罗。
succession.en: Direct vote (two-round), four-year term renewable once. Lula narrowly defeated Bolsonaro 2022.

structure.zh: 联邦总统制，参众两院国会，联邦最高法院，26州高度自治。
structure.en: Federal presidential system, bicameral Congress, Supreme Federal Court, 26 autonomous states.

name.en: Ministry of Science, Technology and Innovation

function.zh: 管理科技政策、AI战略与研究资助。
function.en: Manages science policy, AI strategy, and research funding.

function.zh: 联邦财政、2023年历史性税改与经济政策。
function.en: Federal finances, historic 2023 tax reform, economic policy.

name.en: Ministry of Environment and Climate Change

function.zh: 亚马逊保护、气候政策与环境执法。
function.en: Amazon protection, climate policy, environmental enforcement.

localAdmin.zh: 26州各设州长与议会，5570个市镇各设市长。联邦制下地方自治权大。
localAdmin.en: 26 states with governors/legislatures, 5,570 municipalities with mayors. Substantial local autonomy.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系联邦体系，1988年宪法确立公民权利。司法独立但效率待提升。
legalSystem.en: Civil law federal system; 1988 constitution establishes civil rights. Independent but efficiency needs improvement.

taxationSystem.zh: 复杂三级税制，2023年通过历史性增值税改革简化。税负在拉美中较高。
taxationSystem.en: Complex three-tier system; historic 2023 VAT reform for simplification. High tax burden for Latin America.

religion.zh: 天主教（约65%下降中）、福音派快速增长（约30%）、非洲裔传统
religion.en: Catholicism (~65% declining), Evangelicalism rapidly growing (~30%), Afro-Brazilian traditions

philosophy.zh: 多元文化融合、自由民主、卢拉主义社会福利与新自由主义张力。
philosophy.en: Multicultural fusion, liberal democracy, Lulism welfare state ideology vs neoliberalism tension.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（葡萄牙语）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Portuguese)

culturalAchievements.zh: 桑巴波萨诺瓦音乐、嘉年华、足球、尼迈耶建筑、柯艾略文学。
culturalAchievements.en: Samba/Bossa Nova, Carnival, football, Niemeyer architecture, Coelho literature.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（葡萄牙语），约180种原住民语言
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Romance (Portuguese), ~180 indigenous languages

gdpDescription.zh: GDP约2.1万亿美元，拉美最大、全球第十大经济体。2023年增长超预期，推进社会项目与税改。
gdpDescription.en: GDP ~$2.1T, Latin America's largest, world's 10th. 2023 growth exceeded expectations; advancing social programs and tax reform.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（大豆、牛肉、咖啡）、深海石油、铁矿石、汽车、航空（巴航工业）、金融科技
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (soy, beef, coffee), deep-sea oil, iron ore, automotive, Embraer aviation, fintech

tradeGoods.zh: 大豆、铁矿石、原油、牛肉、咖啡、糖、飞机、纸浆
tradeGoods.en: Soybeans, iron ore, crude oil, beef, coffee, sugar, aircraft, pulp

householdWealth.zh: 基尼系数0.53，卢拉重启Bolsa Família惠及底层。中产庞大但脆弱。
householdWealth.en: Gini 0.53; Lula restarted Bolsa Família benefiting the poor. Large but fragile middle class.

tradeRoutes.zh: 大西洋通往欧非，中国为最大贸易伙伴（大豆铁矿石），美国与阿根廷重要市场。
tradeRoutes.en: Atlantic to Europe/Africa; China largest partner (soy, iron ore); US and Argentina important markets.

economicSystem.zh: 混合市场经济，卢拉加强社会福利与国家资本主义，同时推进税改与财政纪律。
economicSystem.en: Mixed market economy; Lula strengthening welfare/state capitalism while advancing tax reform and fiscal discipline.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备约3400亿美元，新兴市场中稳健。央行独立性获国际认可。
treasuryDescription.en: Forex reserves ~$340B, robust for emerging markets. Central bank independence internationally recognized.

debtLevel.zh: 政府总债务约占GDP 75%，在拉美大国中较高。
debtLevel.en: Total government debt ~75% of GDP, high among major Latin American economies.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 卢拉推新财政框架，平衡社会支出与可持续性。2023年通过历史性税改。
fiscalPolicy.en: Lula advancing new fiscal framework balancing social spending and sustainability. Historic 2023 tax reform.

description.zh: 拉美最大陆军，亚马逊边境安全与国内秩序。
description.en: Latin America's largest; Amazon border security and domestic order.

description.zh: 核潜艇计划推进中。
description.en: Nuclear submarine program advancing.

description.zh: 引进鹰狮战斗机，亚马逊空中监控。
description.en: Acquiring Gripen fighters; Amazon airspace surveillance.

technology.zh: 拉美最先进：核潜艇计划、巴航工业军机、亚马逊监控系统。2023年1月政变未遂后加强文官控制。
technology.en: Most advanced in LatAm: nuclear sub program, Embraer military aircraft, Amazon surveillance. Civilian control strengthened post-Jan 2023 insurrection attempt.

threats.zh: 亚马逊非法采矿与毁林、跨境犯罪（PCC）、政治极化。
threats.en: Amazon illegal mining/deforestation, transnational crime (PCC), political polarization.

recentBattles.zh: 2023年1月8日国会冲击后续审判，亚马逊反非法采矿行动。
recentBattles.en: Post-Jan 8, 2023 Congress attack trials; Amazon anti-illegal mining operations.

populationDescription.zh: 全球第七大人口国，约2.16亿。多元种族，老龄化趋势显现。
populationDescription.en: World's 7th most populous, ~216M. Racially diverse; aging trend emerging.

ethnicGroups.zh: 棕色人种（约43%）、白人（约47%）、黑人（约8%）、亚裔与原住民（约2%）
ethnicGroups.en: Pardo (~43%), White (~47%), Black (~8%), Asian/Indigenous (~2%)

socialClasses.zh: 商业金融精英、庞大脆弱中产、城市贫民窟居民、农村贫困人口。
socialClasses.en: Business/financial elite, large fragile middle class, favela residents, rural poor.

allies.zh: BRICS成员、南方共同市场、美国（复杂）、欧盟。
allies.en: BRICS member, Mercosur, US (complex), EU.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，卢拉奉行多边外交与不结盟。
enemies.en: No formal enemies; Lula pursues multilateral diplomacy and non-alignment.

treaties.zh: 南方共同市场、BRICS、联合国安理会非常任理事国、AfCFTA观察员。
treaties.en: Mercosur, BRICS, UNSC non-permanent member, AfCFTA observer.

foreignPolicy.zh: 卢拉重塑全球领导角色，主持G20、推动南南合作、亚马逊气候外交，俄乌中立。
foreignPolicy.en: Lula reshaping global leadership: G20 presidency, South-South cooperation, Amazon climate diplomacy, Russia-Ukraine neutrality.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年卢拉访华、重返联合国舞台、BRICS扩员、恢复与委内瑞拉关系、亚马逊峰会。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Lula visited China, returned to UN stage, BRICS expansion, restored Venezuela ties, Amazon summit.

era.zh: 数字经济与金融科技领先期
era.en: Digital economy and fintech leadership era

keyInnovations.zh: Pix即时支付（全球最成功央行数字支付）、Nubank、农业科技、巴航工业。
keyInnovations.en: Pix instant payment (world's most successful CB digital payment), Nubank, agritech, Embraer.

infrastructure.zh: 城市数字基础设施较好，5G推进中，农村与亚马逊数字鸿沟大。
infrastructure.en: Urban digital infra fairly developed; 5G advancing; rural/Amazon digital divide large.

policy.zh: 推进AI监管框架法案（参议院审议），拉美AI立法先行者。设AI战略委员会。
policy.en: Advancing AI regulatory framework bill (Senate review); Latin American AI legislation pioneer. AI strategy committee established.

regulatoryStance.zh: 积极推进立法，借鉴欧盟风险分级方法，注重保护创新空间。
regulatoryStance.en: Actively advancing legislation, drawing on EU risk-based approach while protecting innovation.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资约15-20亿美元，拉美领先。圣保罗科技生态吸引大量风投。
investmentScale.en: AI investment ~$1.5-2B, leading in LatAm. São Paulo tech ecosystem attracts substantial VC.

capabilities.zh: 巴西本土葡萄牙语大语言模型。
capabilities.en: Brazilian indigenous Portuguese LLM.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动数字银行，拉美最大
keyProducts.en: AI-powered digital bank, Latin America's largest

keyProducts.zh: AI食品配送与物流优化
keyProducts.en: AI food delivery and logistics optimization

contribution.zh: 创建拉美最大数字银行，AI金融服务惠及数千万无银行账户人群。
contribution.en: Created LatAm's largest digital bank; AI financial services serving tens of millions previously unbanked.

researchFocus.zh: 葡萄牙语NLP、农业AI、金融AI、健康AI、亚马逊环境监测AI。
researchFocus.en: Portuguese NLP, agricultural AI, financial AI, health AI, Amazon environmental monitoring AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 拉美最大云计算市场，AWS/Azure/GCP均设数据中心，但与全球前沿差距仍大。
computeInfrastructure.en: LatAm's largest cloud market; AWS/Azure/GCP all have data centers; significant gap with global frontiers.

talentPool.zh: 拉美最大AI人才库（USP、Unicamp），高端人才有外流。
talentPool.en: LatAm's largest AI talent pool (USP, Unicamp); some top talent brain drain.

globalRanking.zh: 拉美AI第一，全球约20-25位。
globalRanking.en: #1 in LatAm AI, ~20-25th globally.

outlook.zh: 有望成为全球南方AI立法标杆，金融科技AI和农业AI是最强应用方向。
outlook.en: Poised as Global South AI legislation benchmark; fintech AI and agri-AI are strongest areas.

strengths.zh: 拉美最大经济体、Pix创新、庞大市场、卢拉外交影响力、AI立法先行。
strengths.en: LatAm's largest economy, Pix innovation, huge market, Lula's diplomatic influence, AI legislation leadership.

weaknesses.zh: 政治极化、高度不平等、财政赤字、官僚主义、亚马逊毁林。
weaknesses.en: Political polarization, high inequality, fiscal deficit, bureaucracy, Amazon deforestation.

outlook.zh: 若卢拉改革成功并保持政治稳定，巴西可引领全球南方数字经济与AI治理。
outlook.en: If Lula's reforms succeed and stability holds, Brazil can lead the Global South in digital economy and AI governance.

description.zh: 2023年的巴西在卢拉回归后重返全球舞台，以拉美最大经济体引领AI立法，Pix与金融科技AI展示数字创新实力。
description.en: Brazil in 2023 returns to global stage under Lula, leading regional AI legislation, with Pix and fintech AI showcasing digital innovation.

name.zh: 中美洲与加勒比联合区域
name.en: Central American and Caribbean Collective Region

ruler.zh: 纳伊布·布克尔（萨尔瓦多总统）

dynasty.zh: 民主共和时期（各国政体各异）

capital.zh: 各国首都（圣何塞/哈瓦那/圣萨尔瓦多/危地马拉城等）
capital.en: Various capitals (San José/Havana/San Salvador/Guatemala City, etc.)

governmentForm.zh: 多为总统制共和国，古巴为一党制，布克尔强势总统制引发民主争议。
governmentForm.en: Mostly presidential republics; Cuba single-party; Bukele's strong presidentialism raises democratic concerns.

socialStructure.zh: 小型经济体，侨汇依赖高，移民与帮派问题突出，少数精英控制资源。
socialStructure.en: Small economies, high remittance dependency, migration/gang issues, few elites control resources.

rulingClass.zh: 政治精英、寡头家族、布克尔式民粹领袖、古巴共产党。
rulingClass.en: Political elites, oligarch families, Bukele-style populists, Cuban Communist Party.

succession.zh: 多数民主选举（质量不一），古巴共产党主导，布克尔被指破坏任期限制。
succession.en: Most through elections (varying quality); Cuba under CPC; Bukele accused of undermining term limits.

structure.zh: 各国独立政府，SICA与CARICOM为区域协调机制。
structure.en: Individual governments; SICA and CARICOM as regional coordination mechanisms.

function.zh: 促进中美洲经济一体化与安全合作。
function.en: Promotes Central American integration and security cooperation.

function.zh: 应对帮派暴力与贩毒。布克尔反帮派模式成为区域标杆。
function.en: Addressing gang violence and drug trafficking. Bukele's anti-gang model becoming regional benchmark.

function.zh: 促进加勒比经济合作与气候适应。
function.en: Promotes Caribbean economic cooperation and climate adaptation.

localAdmin.zh: 各国设省/市级地方政府，小岛国行政结构简单。
localAdmin.en: Provincial/municipal governments; small island nations have simple structures.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系（中美洲）、普通法（加勒比英语国家）、古巴社会主义法。
legalSystem.en: Civil law (Central America), common law (English Caribbean), Cuban socialist law.

taxationSystem.zh: 间接税为主，直接税征管弱，多国依赖侨汇与援助。
taxationSystem.en: Indirect taxes primary; weak direct tax collection; many dependent on remittances and aid.

religion.zh: 天主教为主，新教增长，加勒比有拉斯塔法里与伏都教
religion.en: Catholicism main, Protestantism growing; Caribbean has Rastafari and Vodou

philosophy.zh: 玛雅遗产、加勒比海洋文化、非洲裔传统、革命精神（古巴、尼加拉瓜）。
philosophy.en: Maya heritage, Caribbean maritime culture, African diaspora traditions, revolutionary spirit (Cuba, Nicaragua).

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（西班牙语、英语、法语）、克里奥尔语
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Spanish, English, French), Creole

culturalAchievements.zh: 雷鬼音乐（牙买加）、萨尔萨舞、古巴音乐文学、玛雅遗迹、加勒比嘉年华。
culturalAchievements.en: Reggae (Jamaica), Salsa, Cuban music/literature, Maya ruins, Caribbean carnival.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语、法语）、日耳曼语族（英语）、克里奥尔语、玛雅语
languageFamily.en: Romance (Spanish, French), Germanic (English), Creole, Mayan

gdpDescription.zh: 区域GDP约3200亿美元。哥斯达黎加与危地马拉最大。旅游与侨汇是多国经济支柱。
gdpDescription.en: Regional GDP ~$320B. Costa Rica and Guatemala largest. Tourism and remittances are key pillars.

mainIndustries.zh: 旅游业、农业、纺织业、侨汇、离岸金融
mainIndustries.en: Tourism, agriculture, textiles, remittances, offshore finance

tradeGoods.zh: 香蕉、咖啡、糖、纺织品、海鲜、旅游服务
tradeGoods.en: Bananas, coffee, sugar, textiles, seafood, tourism services

name.zh: 各国货币/美元（萨尔瓦多/巴拿马）/比特币（萨尔瓦多）

householdWealth.zh: 普遍贫困，侨汇为生命线。哥斯达黎加中产较发达。
householdWealth.en: Widespread poverty; remittances as lifeline. Costa Rica has relatively developed middle class.

tradeRoutes.zh: 美国为最大伙伴（CAFTA-DR），巴拿马运河全球贸易咽喉。
tradeRoutes.en: US as largest partner (CAFTA-DR); Panama Canal as global trade chokepoint.

economicSystem.zh: 市场经济为主，古巴计划经济渐进改革，萨尔瓦多比特币实验。
economicSystem.en: Mostly market; Cuba planned economy with gradual reform; El Salvador Bitcoin experiment.

treasuryDescription.zh: 储备有限，哥斯达黎加巴拿马较稳，萨尔瓦多因比特币有财政风险。
treasuryDescription.en: Limited reserves; Costa Rica/Panama stable; El Salvador faces Bitcoin fiscal risks.

debtLevel.zh: 萨尔瓦多约GDP 80%，哥斯达黎加约68%，加勒比小岛国债务负担重。
debtLevel.en: El Salvador ~80% GDP, Costa Rica ~68%; Caribbean SIDS carry heavy debt.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 多数审慎财政，萨尔瓦多比特币实验影响信用，IMF在多国提供技术援助。
fiscalPolicy.en: Most pursue prudent policies; El Salvador Bitcoin affects credibility; IMF assists multiple countries.

description.zh: 规模小，主要国内安全。哥斯达黎加无常备军。
description.en: Small-scale, mainly domestic security. Costa Rica has no standing army.

description.zh: 布克尔大规模反帮派行动逮捕超7万人。
description.en: Bukele's massive anti-gang operations arrested over 70,000.

technology.zh: 轻武器与巡逻装备为主，依赖美国安全援助。
technology.en: Light weapons and patrol equipment; reliant on US security assistance.

threats.zh: 帮派（MS-13、Barrio 18）、贩毒、飓风、海平面上升（加勒比）。
threats.en: Gangs (MS-13, Barrio 18), drug trafficking, hurricanes, sea level rise (Caribbean).

recentBattles.zh: 萨尔瓦多大规模反帮派行动，各国反毒行动，海地帮派暴力。
recentBattles.en: El Salvador massive anti-gang crackdown, regional anti-narcotics, Haiti gang violence.

populationDescription.zh: 区域约7600万，危地马拉（1800万）与古巴（1100万）最大。大量移民美国。
populationDescription.en: Regional ~76M; Guatemala (~18M) and Cuba (~11M) largest. Significant US emigration.

ethnicGroups.zh: 梅斯蒂索人（中美洲）、非洲裔（加勒比）、原住民（危地马拉玛雅人>40%）
ethnicGroups.en: Mestizo (Central America), African descent (Caribbean), Indigenous (Maya >40% in Guatemala)

socialClasses.zh: 极少数寡头、侨汇依赖中下层、非正规经济者、原住民贫困群体。
socialClasses.en: Tiny oligarchy, remittance-dependent lower-middle class, informal workers, indigenous poor.

allies.zh: 美国（最大伙伴与侨汇来源）、SICA、CARICOM、欧盟。
allies.en: US (largest partner and remittance source), SICA, CARICOM, EU.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国。美国制裁古巴与尼加拉瓜。中美洲面临美中外交选择。
enemies.en: No formal enemies. US sanctions Cuba and Nicaragua. Central America faces US-China diplomatic choices.

treaties.zh: CAFTA-DR、SICA、CARICOM、巴拿马运河中立条约。
treaties.en: CAFTA-DR, SICA, CARICOM, Panama Canal Neutrality Treaty.

foreignPolicy.zh: 多数国家紧密对美，布克尔与美关系复杂，古巴尼加拉瓜反美。
foreignPolicy.en: Most maintain close US ties; Bukele's complex US relationship; Cuba/Nicaragua anti-US.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年布克尔反帮派获关注，洪都拉斯弃台转向中国，海地危机加深。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Bukele anti-gang attention; Honduras switched from Taiwan to China; Haiti crisis deepened.

era.zh: 数字化初期

keyInnovations.zh: 萨尔瓦多比特币实验、哥斯达黎加科技外包、巴拿马运河数字化。
keyInnovations.en: El Salvador Bitcoin experiment, Costa Rica tech outsourcing, Panama Canal digitalization.

infrastructure.zh: 差异巨大：哥斯达黎加巴拿马较好，洪都拉斯海地极落后。
infrastructure.en: Vast disparities: Costa Rica/Panama decent; Honduras/Haiti extremely underdeveloped.

policy.zh: 无区域AI政策，哥斯达黎加有初步数字战略。多数国家AI不在议程。
policy.en: No regional AI policy; Costa Rica has preliminary digital strategy; most countries have AI off-agenda.

regulatoryStance.zh: 无AI监管，数据保护法部分国家有但执行弱。
regulatoryStance.en: No AI regulation; some data protection laws exist but enforcement weak.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资几乎为零。
investmentScale.en: AI investment near zero.

capabilities.zh: 无本土AI模型。少量国际AI服务用于旅游与金融。
capabilities.en: No indigenous AI models. Some international AI services in tourism and finance.

keyProducts.zh: 哥斯达黎加科技外包使用AI工具但无自主产品。
keyProducts.en: Costa Rica tech outsourcing uses AI tools but no indigenous products.

contribution.zh: 比特币法币与数字治理实验对区域科技政策有示范效应。
contribution.en: Bitcoin legal tender and digital governance experiment has demonstration effect on regional tech policy.

researchFocus.zh: 几乎无AI研究。哥斯达黎加大学有少量数据科学研究。
researchFocus.en: Virtually no AI research. University of Costa Rica has limited data science work.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 极为有限，依赖国际云服务。
computeInfrastructure.en: Extremely limited; reliant on international cloud services.

talentPool.zh: 科技人才极匮乏，优秀人才外流美国。
talentPool.en: Extremely scarce tech talent; brain drain to US.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI最低梯队之一。
globalRanking.en: Among the lowest tiers globally in AI.

outlook.zh: 短期AI前景有限，但哥斯达黎加外包与布克尔数字治理可能为区域打开突破口。
outlook.en: Limited near-term prospects; Costa Rica outsourcing and Bukele digital governance may open breakthroughs.

strengths.zh: 巴拿马运河、哥斯达黎加民主与教育、旅游资源、加勒比金融中心。
strengths.en: Panama Canal, Costa Rica democracy/education, tourism resources, Caribbean financial centers.

weaknesses.zh: 帮派暴力、侨汇依赖、气候脆弱（飓风/海平面）、海地危机、民主倒退。
weaknesses.en: Gang violence, remittance dependence, climate vulnerability, Haiti crisis, democratic backsliding.

outlook.zh: 若安全改善并加大教育数字化投资，可从近岸外包趋势受益。
outlook.en: If security improves and education/digital investment grows, the region can benefit from nearshoring.

description.zh: 2023年的中美洲与加勒比在布克尔反帮派模式、侨汇经济与气候危机间寻求平衡，AI几乎空白。
description.en: Central America/Caribbean in 2023 balances Bukele's anti-gang model, remittance economics, and climate crisis, with virtually no AI.

ruler.zh: 古斯塔沃·佩特罗（哥伦比亚总统）

dynasty.zh: 多元民主与左翼浪潮时期
dynasty.en: Diverse democracy and leftist wave era

capital.zh: 波哥大（哥伦比亚）/ 利马（秘鲁）/ 基多（厄瓜多尔）/ 拉巴斯（玻利维亚）/ 加拉加斯（委内瑞拉）
capital.en: Bogotá (Colombia) / Lima (Peru) / Quito (Ecuador) / La Paz (Bolivia) / Caracas (Venezuela)

governmentForm.zh: 哥伦比亚与秘鲁为总统制共和国，厄瓜多尔总统制，玻利维亚多民族制，委内瑞拉名义民主实际威权。
governmentForm.en: Colombia and Peru presidential republics, Ecuador presidential, Bolivia plurinational state, Venezuela nominally democratic but authoritarian.

socialStructure.zh: 多民族社会（原住民、梅斯蒂索、非洲裔），极度不平等，哥伦比亚科技中产增长，委内瑞拉经济崩溃。
socialStructure.en: Multi-ethnic (Indigenous, Mestizo, Afro-descendant), extreme inequality; Colombia's tech middle class growing; Venezuela's economy collapsed.

rulingClass.zh: 佩特罗左翼改革政府、秘鲁政治精英（频繁更迭）、马杜罗独裁政权、玻利维亚原住民运动。
rulingClass.en: Petro's left-wing reform government, Peruvian political elite (frequent turnover), Maduro's authoritarian regime, Bolivian indigenous movement.

succession.zh: 多数通过选举，委内瑞拉选举制度受质疑，秘鲁政治极度不稳定（6年换6任总统）。
succession.en: Most through elections; Venezuela's electoral system questioned; Peru extremely unstable (6 presidents in 6 years).

structure.zh: 各国设独立政府，安第斯共同体为区域协调机制（功能减弱）。
structure.en: Individual governments; Andean Community as regional coordination (weakened).

name.zh: 哥伦比亚信息技术与通信部

function.zh: 数字化转型与科技创新政策。
function.en: Digital transformation and tech innovation policy.

function.zh: 促进区域经济一体化与贸易便利化。
function.en: Promotes regional integration and trade facilitation.

function.zh: 应对内部冲突、贩毒与安全挑战。
function.en: Addressing internal conflict, drug trafficking, and security challenges.

localAdmin.zh: 哥伦比亚分32省，秘鲁25大区，各国设省/市级地方政府。
localAdmin.en: Colombia 32 departments, Peru 25 regions; each country with provincial/municipal governments.

legalSystem.zh: 以大陆法系为基础，多数国家宪法承认原住民司法管辖权。
legalSystem.en: Civil law-based; most constitutions recognize indigenous judicial jurisdiction.

taxationSystem.zh: 哥伦比亚依赖增值税与所得税（佩特罗推税改），秘鲁矿业税收重要，委内瑞拉经济混乱税制崩溃。
taxationSystem.en: Colombia relies on VAT and income tax (Petro pushing reform); Peru mining taxes important; Venezuela's economic chaos collapsed the tax system.

religion.zh: 天主教为主，福音派增长，安第斯原住民信仰传统（帕查妈妈）
religion.en: Catholicism main, Evangelical growth, Andean indigenous traditions (Pachamama)

philosophy.zh: 印加文明遗产、解放者玻利瓦尔精神、原住民'美好生活'(Buen Vivir)理念、加西亚·马尔克斯魔幻现实主义。
philosophy.en: Inca heritage, Bolívar's liberator spirit, indigenous 'Buen Vivir' philosophy, García Márquez magical realism.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（西班牙语），盖丘亚语与艾马拉语在玻利维亚和秘鲁有官方地位
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Spanish); Quechua and Aymara have official status in Bolivia and Peru

culturalAchievements.zh: 拉美文学爆炸（马尔克斯、略萨）、安第斯音乐、哥伦比亚当代艺术、印加遗迹（马丘比丘）。
culturalAchievements.en: Latin American literary boom (Márquez, Vargas Llosa), Andean music, Colombian contemporary art, Inca ruins (Machu Picchu).

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语）、盖丘亚语族、艾马拉语
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Romance (Spanish), Quechuan family, Aymara

gdpDescription.zh: 区域GDP约7800亿美元，哥伦比亚（约3440亿）为最大经济体，委内瑞拉经济崩溃后仅约约1000亿。
gdpDescription.en: Regional GDP ~$780B; Colombia (~$344B) largest; Venezuela's collapsed economy only ~$100B.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油（委内瑞拉、哥伦比亚、厄瓜多尔）、矿业（秘鲁铜金银、玻利维亚锂）、咖啡、花卉、可卡因经济
mainIndustries.en: Oil (Venezuela, Colombia, Ecuador), mining (Peru copper/gold/silver, Bolivia lithium), coffee, flowers, cocaine economy

tradeGoods.zh: 石油、铜、黄金、咖啡、花卉、锂、天然气、可可
tradeGoods.en: Oil, copper, gold, coffee, flowers, lithium, natural gas, cocoa

name.zh: 哥伦比亚比索/秘鲁索尔/厄瓜多尔美元化/玻利维亚诺/委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔
name.en: Colombian Peso / Peruvian Sol / Ecuador (dollarized) / Boliviano / Venezuelan Bolívar

householdWealth.zh: 普遍不平等，哥伦比亚与秘鲁中产增长但脆弱，委内瑞拉730万人外逃移民危机。
householdWealth.en: Widespread inequality; Colombia and Peru middle class growing but fragile; Venezuela 7.3M emigrant crisis.

tradeRoutes.zh: 太平洋与加勒比双洋贸易，对美中欧均有重要贸易关系，秘鲁锂矿对AI供应链有价值。
tradeRoutes.en: Pacific and Caribbean dual-ocean trade; important relationships with US, China, EU; Peru's minerals valuable to AI supply chain.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济，哥伦比亚市场经济加社会改革，委内瑞拉国家控制经济崩溃，玻利维亚资源国有化。
economicSystem.en: Mixed: Colombia market + social reform; Venezuela state-controlled collapse; Bolivia resource nationalization.

treasuryDescription.zh: 秘鲁与哥伦比亚储备较稳健，委内瑞拉外汇几乎耗尽。
treasuryDescription.en: Peru and Colombia have stable reserves; Venezuela's forex nearly depleted.

debtLevel.zh: 哥伦比亚约占GDP 55%，秘鲁约35%（较低），委内瑞拉债务违约状态。
debtLevel.en: Colombia ~55% GDP, Peru ~35% (low); Venezuela in debt default.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 佩特罗推进哥伦比亚税改扩大社会支出，秘鲁政治动荡影响财政政策连续性。
fiscalPolicy.en: Petro advancing Colombia tax reform for social spending; Peru's political turmoil disrupts fiscal continuity.

description.zh: 拉美实战经验最丰富军队，数十年反游击战经验，正转向后冲突安全。
description.en: LatAm's most combat-experienced military; decades of counter-insurgency; transitioning to post-conflict security.

name.zh: 秘鲁与其他安第斯国家军队

description.zh: 秘鲁军队参与国内安全行动，委内瑞拉军方高度政治化。
description.en: Peru military in domestic security; Venezuela military highly politicized.

technology.zh: 哥伦比亚接受大量美国军事援助与训练（哥伦比亚计划遗产），委内瑞拉拥有俄制武器但维护困难。
technology.en: Colombia receives extensive US military aid/training (Plan Colombia legacy); Venezuela has Russian weapons but maintenance issues.

threats.zh: 贩毒集团（哥伦比亚残余游击队/犯罪组织）、委内瑞拉政治危机、厄瓜多尔安全急剧恶化。
threats.en: Drug cartels (Colombia's residual guerrillas/criminal orgs), Venezuela political crisis, Ecuador's rapidly deteriorating security.

recentBattles.zh: 哥伦比亚与残余游击队/贩毒组织持续冲突，厄瓜多尔2023年安全危机急剧恶化（帮派暴力），秘鲁2022-2023年政治危机。
recentBattles.en: Colombia's ongoing conflict with residual guerrillas/cartels; Ecuador's 2023 security crisis (gang violence); Peru's 2022-2023 political crisis.

populationDescription.zh: 区域约1.4亿，哥伦比亚（5200万）与秘鲁（3400万）最大。委内瑞拉人口因移民危机锐减。
populationDescription.en: Regional ~140M; Colombia (52M) and Peru (34M) largest. Venezuela population declined sharply from migration crisis.

ethnicGroups.zh: 梅斯蒂索人为主、原住民（秘鲁、玻利维亚占比高）、非洲裔（哥伦比亚太平洋沿岸）、白人
ethnicGroups.en: Mestizo dominant, Indigenous (high share in Peru/Bolivia), Afro-descendant (Colombia Pacific coast), White

socialClasses.zh: 商业精英、城市中产（增长但脆弱）、庞大非正规经济者、原住民与农村贫困群体。
socialClasses.en: Business elite, urban middle class (growing but fragile), massive informal workers, indigenous and rural poor.

allies.zh: 美国（哥伦比亚传统盟友）、欧盟、中国（资源贸易伙伴）、太平洋联盟成员。
allies.en: US (Colombia's traditional ally), EU, China (resource trade partner), Pacific Alliance members.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国。委内瑞拉与美国长期对立。哥伦比亚与委内瑞拉关系复杂。
enemies.en: No formal enemies. Venezuela long opposed to US. Colombia-Venezuela relations complex.

treaties.zh: 安第斯共同体、太平洋联盟（哥秘智墨）、南方共同市场（委内瑞拉被停权）。
treaties.en: Andean Community, Pacific Alliance (Col/Peru/Chile/Mex), Mercosur (Venezuela suspended).

foreignPolicy.zh: 佩特罗推进与委内瑞拉关系正常化，秘鲁政治动荡影响外交连续性，玻利维亚亲华路线。
foreignPolicy.en: Petro normalizing Venezuela relations; Peru's turmoil disrupts diplomatic continuity; Bolivia pro-China orientation.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年哥伦比亚-委内瑞拉恢复外交，厄瓜多尔安全危机引发区域关注，委内瑞拉选举前景受国际关注。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Colombia-Venezuela diplomatic restoration; Ecuador security crisis drew regional attention; Venezuela election prospects under international scrutiny.

era.zh: 数字化转型与创新创业兴起期
era.en: Digital transformation and entrepreneurship rise era

keyInnovations.zh: 哥伦比亚金融科技生态（Rappi独角兽）、秘鲁矿业技术、玻利维亚锂资源开发技术。
keyInnovations.en: Colombia fintech ecosystem (Rappi unicorn), Peru mining technology, Bolivia lithium development tech.

infrastructure.zh: 哥伦比亚数字基础设施改善中，秘鲁城市连接较好但安第斯高原落后，委内瑞拉基础设施崩溃。
infrastructure.en: Colombia digital infrastructure improving; Peru urban connectivity decent but Andean highlands lag; Venezuela infrastructure collapsed.

policy.zh: 哥伦比亚发布AI伦理框架与数字政府AI指南，秘鲁与厄瓜多尔尚在起步阶段。
policy.en: Colombia released AI ethics framework and digital government AI guidelines; Peru and Ecuador still in early stages.

regulatoryStance.zh: 监管宽松，哥伦比亚数据保护法较完善，其他国家法律框架不成熟。
regulatoryStance.en: Light regulation; Colombia's data protection law relatively mature; other countries' legal frameworks immature.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资约3-5亿美元（主要在哥伦比亚），拉美科技创投在波哥大与利马有所增长。
investmentScale.en: AI investment ~$300-500M (mainly Colombia); LatAm tech VC growing in Bogotá and Lima.

capabilities.zh: 西班牙语NLP应用、矿业AI优化、农业AI。
capabilities.en: Spanish NLP applications, mining AI optimization, agricultural AI.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动超级应用（配送/金融/电商）
keyProducts.en: AI-powered super app (delivery/finance/e-commerce)

contribution.zh: 创建拉美最大超级应用之一，AI驱动配送与金融服务。
contribution.en: Created one of LatAm's largest super apps; AI-powered delivery and financial services.

researchFocus.zh: 西班牙语NLP、矿业AI（秘鲁铜矿优化）、农业AI、生物多样性AI监测。
researchFocus.en: Spanish NLP, mining AI (Peru copper optimization), agricultural AI, biodiversity AI monitoring.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 有限，依赖国际云服务。哥伦比亚有少量数据中心。
computeInfrastructure.en: Limited; reliant on international cloud. Colombia has some data centers.

talentPool.zh: 哥伦比亚工程教育基础较好，但AI专才不足。秘鲁与玻利维亚更为匮乏。
talentPool.en: Colombia has decent engineering education but insufficient AI specialists. Peru and Bolivia more scarce.

globalRanking.zh: 拉美AI中游（哥伦比亚领先），全球下游。
globalRanking.en: Mid-range in LatAm AI (Colombia leading), lower tier globally.

outlook.zh: 哥伦比亚创业生态与矿业AI（秘鲁/玻利维亚锂资源）是最大增长点，但安全与政治稳定是前提。
outlook.en: Colombia's startup ecosystem and mining AI (Peru/Bolivia lithium) are biggest growth areas, but security and stability are prerequisites.

strengths.zh: 丰富矿产（铜、锂、黄金）、哥伦比亚科技创业生态（Rappi）、年轻人口、生物多样性资源。
strengths.en: Rich minerals (copper, lithium, gold), Colombia tech startup ecosystem (Rappi), young population, biodiversity resources.

weaknesses.zh: 委内瑞拉经济崩溃与移民危机、厄瓜多尔安全恶化、秘鲁政治不稳、贩毒与暴力。
weaknesses.en: Venezuela economic collapse and migration crisis, Ecuador security deterioration, Peru political instability, drug trafficking and violence.

outlook.zh: 哥伦比亚若佩特罗改革成功可引领区域发展，玻利维亚锂资源在AI时代具有战略价值。
outlook.en: If Petro's reforms succeed, Colombia can lead regional development; Bolivia's lithium is strategically valuable in the AI era.

description.zh: 2023年的安第斯地区在哥伦比亚科技创业与委内瑞拉崩溃、厄瓜多尔安全危机之间呈现极大反差。
description.en: The Andean States in 2023 present stark contrasts between Colombia's tech entrepreneurship and Venezuela's collapse / Ecuador's security crisis.

name.en: South American Southern Cone Collective Region

ruler.zh: 哈维尔·米莱（阿根廷总统）

dynasty.zh: 自由至上主义/右翼民粹执政期（阿根廷）

capital.zh: 布宜诺斯艾利斯（阿根廷）/ 圣地亚哥（智利）/ 蒙得维的亚（乌拉圭）/ 亚松森（巴拉圭）

governmentForm.zh: 阿根廷与智利为总统制共和国，乌拉圭为总统制（拉美最稳定民主），巴拉圭为总统制。
governmentForm.en: Argentina and Chile presidential republics; Uruguay presidential (LatAm's most stable democracy); Paraguay presidential.

socialStructure.zh: 欧洲移民后裔占比高，中产阶级传统较强但阿根廷经济危机侵蚀中产，智利不平等引发社会运动。
socialStructure.en: High European descent population; strong middle class tradition but Argentina's economic crisis eroding it; Chilean inequality sparking social movements.

rulingClass.zh: 米莱自由至上主义运动、阿根廷庇隆主义残余、智利中左联盟、乌拉圭两大传统政党。
rulingClass.en: Milei's libertarian movement, Argentine Peronist remnants, Chilean center-left coalition, Uruguay's two traditional parties.

succession.zh: 各国通过民主选举，阿根廷2023年米莱以反建制路线当选引发全球关注。
succession.en: All through democratic elections; Argentina's 2023 election of anti-establishment Milei drew global attention.

structure.zh: 各国设独立总统制政府。南方共同市场为区域协调机制。
structure.en: Individual presidential governments. Mercosur as regional coordination mechanism.

function.zh: 应对通胀危机与经济改革。米莱计划激进紧缩。
function.en: Addressing inflation crisis and economic reform. Milei plans radical austerity.

name.en: Chilean Ministry of Science and Technology

function.zh: 管理科技政策、天文研究与铜锂产业技术。
function.en: Manages science policy, astronomical research, and copper/lithium technology.

function.zh: 促进区域贸易一体化与经济合作。
function.en: Promotes regional trade integration and economic cooperation.

localAdmin.zh: 阿根廷23省各设省长，智利16大区，乌拉圭19省。
localAdmin.en: Argentina 23 provinces with governors; Chile 16 regions; Uruguay 19 departments.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系为基础，智利2022年新宪法草案被否后仍使用皮诺切特时期宪法（修正版）。
legalSystem.en: Civil law-based; Chile still using Pinochet-era constitution (amended) after 2022 new draft was rejected.

taxationSystem.zh: 阿根廷税制混乱（高出口税、多重汇率），智利依赖铜矿税与增值税，乌拉圭税制相对简洁。
taxationSystem.en: Argentina's chaotic tax system (high export taxes, multiple exchange rates); Chile relies on copper/mining taxes and VAT; Uruguay's system relatively simple.

religion.zh: 天主教为主（下降中），无宗教人口增长，乌拉圭为拉美世俗化程度最高国家
religion.en: Catholicism main (declining), growing non-religious; Uruguay most secular in LatAm

philosophy.zh: 欧洲移民文化传统深厚、探戈与高乔文化（阿根廷）、智利诗歌传统（聂鲁达）、乌拉圭进步主义。
philosophy.en: Deep European immigrant cultural traditions, tango and gaucho culture (Argentina), Chilean poetry (Neruda), Uruguayan progressivism.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（西班牙语）、瓜拉尼语（巴拉圭官方语言）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Spanish), Guaraní (official in Paraguay)

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿根廷探戈（UNESCO非遗）、博尔赫斯文学、智利葡萄酒文化、乌拉圭社会进步立法、2022世界杯冠军梅西。
culturalAchievements.en: Argentine tango (UNESCO heritage), Borges literature, Chilean wine culture, Uruguayan progressive legislation, 2022 World Cup champion Messi.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语为主）、图皮语系（瓜拉尼语）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Romance (Spanish), Tupian (Guaraní)

gdpDescription.zh: 区域GDP约8500亿美元，阿根廷（约6300亿）为最大但经济危机严重（年通胀超140%）。智利人均收入拉美最高。
gdpDescription.en: Regional GDP ~$850B; Argentina (~$630B) largest but in severe crisis (inflation >140%/yr). Chile has LatAm's highest per capita income.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（阿根廷大豆牛肉）、铜矿锂矿（智利）、软件与服务业、葡萄酒、旅游
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (Argentine soy/beef), copper/lithium mining (Chile), software/services, wine, tourism

tradeGoods.zh: 大豆、铜、锂、牛肉、葡萄酒、渔业产品、软件服务
tradeGoods.en: Soybeans, copper, lithium, beef, wine, fishery products, software services

name.zh: 阿根廷比索/智利比索/乌拉圭比索/巴拉圭瓜拉尼
name.en: Argentine Peso / Chilean Peso / Uruguayan Peso / Paraguayan Guaraní

householdWealth.zh: 阿根廷中产急剧萎缩（通胀吞噬储蓄），智利中产拉美最强但不平等高，乌拉圭分配最均匀。
householdWealth.en: Argentine middle class shrinking rapidly (inflation destroys savings); Chile's strongest LatAm middle class but high inequality; Uruguay most equal distribution.

tradeRoutes.zh: 大西洋与太平洋贸易，中国为智利最大铜矿买家，阿根廷大豆出口至全球。
tradeRoutes.en: Atlantic and Pacific trade; China is Chile's largest copper buyer; Argentine soy exports globally.

economicSystem.zh: 阿根廷米莱计划激进自由化（美元化讨论），智利社会市场经济，乌拉圭开放经济。
economicSystem.en: Argentina: Milei plans radical liberalization (dollarization debate); Chile: social market economy; Uruguay: open economy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 阿根廷央行净外汇储备为负值（危机标志），智利约400亿较稳健，乌拉圭财政健康。
treasuryDescription.en: Argentina's central bank net forex reserves are negative (crisis indicator); Chile ~$40B stable; Uruguay fiscally healthy.

debtLevel.zh: 阿根廷经历多次债务重组（总债务约GDP 90%），智利约38%（较低），乌拉圭约60%。
debtLevel.en: Argentina multiple debt restructurings (total ~90% GDP); Chile ~38% (low); Uruguay ~60%.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 米莱推行激进财政紧缩（砍部委、裁公务员、取消补贴），智利维持审慎财政，乌拉圭稳健。
fiscalPolicy.en: Milei pursuing radical austerity (cutting ministries, firing civil servants, removing subsidies); Chile maintains prudent policy; Uruguay stable.

description.zh: 预算长期不足导致装备老化，南大西洋主权主张（马岛）。
description.en: Long-underfunded with aging equipment; South Atlantic sovereignty claims (Falklands/Malvinas).

description.zh: 拉美装备最现代化军队之一，受铜矿法（10%铜收入拨军方）支持。
description.en: Among LatAm's most modernized; supported by the copper law (10% copper revenue to military).

description.zh: 规模小，乌拉圭积极参与联合国维和行动。
description.en: Small-scale; Uruguay active in UN peacekeeping.

technology.zh: 智利拥有F-16与现代海军，阿根廷装备老化，乌拉圭参与多项联合国维和任务。
technology.en: Chile has F-16s and modern navy; Argentina's equipment aging; Uruguay participates in multiple UN peacekeeping missions.

threats.zh: 阿根廷经济崩溃风险、马岛主权争端（低烈度）、跨境犯罪增长。
threats.en: Argentina economic collapse risk, Falklands/Malvinas dispute (low intensity), growing cross-border crime.

recentBattles.zh: 无军事冲突。阿根廷国内因米莱经济改革面临大规模社会抗议。
recentBattles.en: No military conflicts. Argentina facing massive social protests over Milei's economic reforms.

populationDescription.zh: 区域约7100万，阿根廷（4600万）为核心，智利（1960万）、乌拉圭（350万）、巴拉圭（730万）。
populationDescription.en: Regional ~71M; Argentina (46M) core, Chile (19.6M), Uruguay (3.5M), Paraguay (7.3M).

ethnicGroups.zh: 欧洲裔为主（阿根廷/乌拉圭约85%）、梅斯蒂索人（智利/巴拉圭）、原住民少数（马普切人等）
ethnicGroups.en: European descent dominant (Argentina/Uruguay ~85%), Mestizo (Chile/Paraguay), Indigenous minorities (Mapuche, etc.)

socialClasses.zh: 传统中产阶级较强（正被通胀侵蚀/阿根廷）、知识精英、工会运动传统、农村贫困群体。
socialClasses.en: Traditionally strong middle class (being eroded by inflation in Argentina), intellectual elite, labor union tradition, rural poor.

allies.zh: 南方共同市场、太平洋联盟（智利）、欧盟、美国（米莱亲美路线）。
allies.en: Mercosur, Pacific Alliance (Chile), EU, US (Milei's pro-US orientation).

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国。阿根廷与英国马岛争端长期存在（低烈度）。米莱敌视中国与巴西左翼政府。
enemies.en: No formal enemies. Argentina's Falklands/Malvinas dispute with UK persists (low intensity). Milei hostile toward China and Brazil's left-wing government.

treaties.zh: 南方共同市场（米莱态度冷淡）、太平洋联盟、欧盟-南共市自贸谈判（漫长）。
treaties.en: Mercosur (Milei lukewarm), Pacific Alliance, EU-Mercosur FTA negotiations (protracted).

foreignPolicy.zh: 米莱激进亲美亲以色列、反中国，颠覆阿根廷传统外交路线。智利维持务实多边外交。
foreignPolicy.en: Milei radically pro-US/Israel, anti-China, disrupting Argentina's traditional diplomacy. Chile maintains pragmatic multilateralism.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年12月米莱就任引发外交震荡（拒邀卢拉出席就职典礼），智利推进矿业外交，乌拉圭探索独立贸易协定。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Dec 2023 Milei inauguration caused diplomatic shocks (snubbed Lula); Chile advancing mining diplomacy; Uruguay exploring independent trade deals.

era.zh: 信息技术与天文研究并进期

keyInnovations.zh: 智利天文观测（全球最佳天文台址）、阿根廷核技术（拉美唯一核潜艇计划国）、乌拉圭数字政府。
keyInnovations.en: Chile astronomical observation (world's best sites), Argentina nuclear technology (LatAm's only nuclear sub program nation), Uruguay digital government.

infrastructure.zh: 城市数字基础设施较好，乌拉圭光纤覆盖拉美最高（>90%家庭），智利5G领先。
infrastructure.en: Urban digital infrastructure good; Uruguay fiber coverage highest in LatAm (>90% households); Chile 5G leading.

policy.zh: 智利发布国家AI政策（拉美首个），阿根廷有AI发展计划但执行受经济危机影响，乌拉圭推数字治理。
policy.en: Chile released national AI policy (first in LatAm); Argentina has AI plan but execution hampered by economic crisis; Uruguay advancing digital governance.

regulatoryStance.zh: 智利AI政策最为完善，阿根廷关注数据保护，乌拉圭个人数据保护法在拉美领先。
regulatoryStance.en: Chile's AI policy most developed; Argentina focused on data protection; Uruguay's personal data protection law leads in LatAm.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资约5-8亿美元，智利与阿根廷各有科技创投生态。
investmentScale.en: AI investment ~$500-800M; Chile and Argentina each have tech VC ecosystems.

capabilities.zh: 西班牙语NLP、天文数据AI、农业AI、金融AI。
capabilities.en: Spanish NLP, astronomical data AI, agricultural AI, financial AI.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动数字转型服务、企业AI解决方案
keyProducts.en: AI-powered digital transformation services, enterprise AI solutions

headquarters.zh: 布宜诺斯艾利斯/卢森堡

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动电商与金融科技平台（拉美最大）
keyProducts.en: AI-powered e-commerce and fintech platform (LatAm's largest)

contribution.zh: 创建拉美最大AI与数字转型服务公司之一。
contribution.en: Created one of LatAm's largest AI and digital transformation service companies.

researchFocus.zh: 天文数据AI（智利全球天文观测中心）、西班牙语NLP、农业AI、金融AI。
researchFocus.en: Astronomical data AI (Chile as global observation center), Spanish NLP, agricultural AI, financial AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 智利天文观测数据处理设施先进，AWS在阿根廷与智利设有区域节点，乌拉圭数字基础设施完善。
computeInfrastructure.en: Chile's astronomical data processing facilities advanced; AWS has regional nodes in Argentina/Chile; Uruguay's digital infrastructure well-developed.

talentPool.zh: 阿根廷工程师全球闻名（Globant等出口人才），智利大学研究能力强，但顶尖AI人才外流。
talentPool.en: Argentine engineers globally renowned (Globant exports talent); Chilean universities have strong research; but top AI talent drains abroad.

globalRanking.zh: 拉美AI竞争力中上游（仅次巴西），智利AI政策拉美最成熟。
globalRanking.en: Upper-middle in LatAm AI (after Brazil); Chile's AI policy most mature in LatAm.

outlook.zh: 阿根廷科技人才与智利AI政策/天文数据优势为区域AI发展提供基础，但阿根廷经济危机是最大不确定性。
outlook.en: Argentine tech talent and Chile's AI policy/astronomical data advantages provide a foundation; but Argentina's economic crisis is the biggest uncertainty.

strengths.zh: 高教育水平与科技人才（阿根廷）、智利锂铜资源与AI政策领先、乌拉圭数字治理模范、高识字率。
strengths.en: High education and tech talent (Argentina), Chile lithium/copper and AI policy leadership, Uruguay digital governance model, high literacy.

weaknesses.zh: 阿根廷经济危机（年通胀超140%）、米莱激进改革的社会风险、区域一体化停滞、人才外流。
weaknesses.en: Argentina economic crisis (>140% annual inflation), Milei's radical reform social risks, stalled regional integration, talent drain.

outlook.zh: 米莱能否稳定阿根廷经济将决定区域走向。智利锂资源在AI时代具战略价值，乌拉圭是拉美数字化典范。
outlook.en: Whether Milei stabilizes Argentina's economy will determine regional trajectory. Chile's lithium is strategic in the AI era; Uruguay is LatAm's digital model.

description.zh: 2023年的南锥体以米莱当选阿根廷总统为标志性事件，区域在经济危机、锂矿战略资源与科技人才优势之间寻找平衡。
description.en: The Southern Cone in 2023 is marked by Milei's election in Argentina, balancing between economic crisis, strategic lithium resources, and tech talent advantages.

name.zh: 大洋洲（澳大利亚·新西兰·太平洋岛国）

ruler.zh: 安东尼·阿尔巴内塞（澳大利亚总理）

dynasty.zh: 工党执政期（澳大利亚）

capital.zh: 堪培拉（澳大利亚）/ 惠灵顿（新西兰）

governmentForm.zh: 澳大利亚与新西兰为议会制君主立宪国（英国国王为国家元首），太平洋岛国为共和制或君主制小国。
governmentForm.en: Australia and New Zealand are parliamentary constitutional monarchies (British monarch as head of state); Pacific islands are small republics or monarchies.

socialStructure.zh: 高收入多元文化社会（澳新），原住民社区面临系统性不平等。太平洋岛国社会传统部落结构为主。
socialStructure.en: High-income multicultural societies (Aus/NZ); Indigenous communities face systemic inequality. Pacific islands have traditional tribal structures.

rulingClass.zh: 两党制民选政府（澳新）、矿业与金融精英、太平洋岛国传统领袖与民选政府。
rulingClass.en: Two-party elected governments (Aus/NZ), mining and finance elites, Pacific island traditional leaders and elected governments.

succession.zh: 澳新通过议会选举总理，太平洋岛国通过民主选举或传统领袖继承。
succession.en: Aus/NZ prime ministers through parliamentary elections; Pacific islands through democratic elections or traditional succession.

structure.zh: 澳大利亚联邦制设参众两院，6州2领地各有议会。新西兰单一制一院制。太平洋岛屿论坛为区域协调。
structure.en: Australia federal with bicameral parliament, 6 states and 2 territories. NZ unitary unicameral. Pacific Islands Forum for regional coordination.

name.zh: 澳大利亚工业科学与资源部
name.en: Australian Dept of Industry, Science and Resources

function.zh: 管理科技政策、AI战略与关键矿产资源。
function.en: Manages science policy, AI strategy, and critical mineral resources.

function.zh: AUKUS核潜艇计划、印太安全战略与网络安全。
function.en: AUKUS nuclear submarine program, Indo-Pacific security, and cybersecurity.

name.zh: 太平洋岛屿论坛秘书处

function.zh: 协调太平洋区域气候适应、安全合作与经济发展。
function.en: Coordinates Pacific regional climate adaptation, security cooperation, and economic development.

localAdmin.zh: 澳大利亚6州2领地各设州长/首席部长与州议会，新西兰设67个地方议会。
localAdmin.en: Australia's 6 states and 2 territories with premiers/chief ministers; NZ has 67 local councils.

legalSystem.zh: 普通法体系（英国法律传统），澳大利亚联邦高等法院为最高司法权威。
legalSystem.en: Common law system (British legal tradition); Australian High Court as highest judicial authority.

taxationSystem.zh: 澳大利亚以个人所得税、公司税与GST（商品服务税）为主，矿业资源税为重要补充。
taxationSystem.en: Australia primarily personal/corporate income tax and GST; mining resource taxes as important supplement.

religion.zh: 基督教（下降中）、无宗教（快速增长至39%）、多元宗教并存
religion.en: Christianity (declining), no religion (rapidly growing to 39%), multifaith coexistence

philosophy.zh: 多元文化主义、平等主义传统（'mate'文化）、原住民梦创时代哲学、环保意识强。
philosophy.en: Multiculturalism, egalitarian tradition ('mateship'), Indigenous Dreamtime philosophy, strong environmental consciousness.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（英语）、毛利语（新西兰官方语言）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (English), Te Reo Māori (NZ official language)

culturalAchievements.zh: 悉尼歌剧院、澳大利亚电影业、原住民艺术、新西兰电影（指环王）、太平洋岛屿传统航海文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Sydney Opera House, Australian cinema, Aboriginal art, NZ film (Lord of the Rings), Pacific Islands traditional navigation.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（英语）、澳大利亚原住民语言、南岛语系（毛利语、太平洋岛屿语言）
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Germanic (English), Australian Aboriginal languages, Austronesian (Māori, Pacific languages)

gdpDescription.zh: 区域GDP约1.92万亿美元，澳大利亚（约1.7万亿）为绝对核心，新西兰约2500亿。30年无衰退纪录。
gdpDescription.en: Regional GDP ~$1.92T; Australia (~$1.7T) absolute core, NZ ~$250B. 30-year recession-free record.

mainIndustries.zh: 采矿（铁矿石、锂、天然气）、金融服务、教育出口、农业（乳制品/羊毛）、旅游、科技
mainIndustries.en: Mining (iron ore, lithium, natural gas), financial services, education exports, agriculture (dairy/wool), tourism, technology

tradeGoods.zh: 铁矿石、液化天然气、锂、煤炭、乳制品、羊毛、教育服务、葡萄酒
tradeGoods.en: Iron ore, LNG, lithium, coal, dairy products, wool, education services, wine

householdWealth.zh: 全球最高家庭财富中位数之一（澳大利亚约27万美元），住房价格极高是主要社会压力。
householdWealth.en: Among the world's highest median household wealth (~$270K AUD); extreme housing prices are the main social pressure.

tradeRoutes.zh: 印度洋-太平洋航线为核心，中国为最大贸易伙伴（铁矿石天然气），日韩美欧为重要市场。
tradeRoutes.en: Indo-Pacific shipping core; China largest trade partner (iron ore, LNG); Japan, Korea, US, EU important markets.

economicSystem.zh: 开放市场经济，矿业繁荣驱动增长，阿尔巴内塞政府推进绿色转型与'未来制造'战略。
economicSystem.en: Open market economy, mining boom driving growth; Albanese government advancing green transition and 'Future Made in Australia' strategy.

treasuryDescription.zh: 外汇储备约600亿美元，澳大利亚主权财富基金（未来基金）约1500亿澳元。
treasuryDescription.en: Forex reserves ~$60B; Australia's sovereign wealth fund (Future Fund) ~A$150B.

debtLevel.zh: 澳大利亚联邦债务约占GDP 45%，在发达国家中较低。新西兰约34%。
debtLevel.en: Australian federal debt ~45% of GDP, low among developed nations. NZ ~34%.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 阿尔巴内塞政府平衡财政纪律与社会投资，推进AUKUS国防支出与绿色转型投资。
fiscalPolicy.en: Albanese government balancing fiscal discipline with social investment; advancing AUKUS defense spending and green transition investment.

description.zh: AUKUS核潜艇计划推进中，印太安全核心力量，军事技术先进。
description.en: AUKUS nuclear submarine program advancing; core Indo-Pacific security force; advanced military technology.

description.zh: 规模小但参与五眼联盟情报合作与太平洋维和。
description.en: Small but participates in Five Eyes intelligence and Pacific peacekeeping.

description.zh: 多数太平洋岛国无正规军队，依赖澳新安全保障。
description.en: Most Pacific islands have no regular military; rely on Aus/NZ security guarantees.

technology.zh: AUKUS核潜艇将赋予澳大利亚核动力攻击潜艇能力，五眼联盟情报共享，先进网络战能力。
technology.en: AUKUS nuclear subs will give Australia nuclear-powered attack sub capability; Five Eyes intelligence sharing; advanced cyber warfare.

threats.zh: 中国在太平洋地区军事扩张、太平洋岛国地缘竞争（中国vs澳新）、网络安全威胁。
threats.en: China's Pacific military expansion, Pacific island geopolitical competition (China vs Aus/NZ), cybersecurity threats.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接军事冲突，但AUKUS潜艇计划标志澳大利亚二战后最大国防投资。
recentBattles.en: No direct military conflicts, but AUKUS submarine program marks Australia's biggest post-WWII defense investment.

populationDescription.zh: 澳大利亚约2600万（移民驱动快速增长）、新西兰约520万、太平洋岛国约300万。
populationDescription.en: Australia ~26M (immigration-driven rapid growth), NZ ~5.2M, Pacific islands ~3M.

ethnicGroups.zh: 欧洲裔（约58%）、亚裔（约17%，快速增长）、原住民/托雷斯海峡岛民（3.8%）、毛利人（新西兰16.5%）、太平洋岛民
ethnicGroups.en: European (~58%), Asian (~17%, rapidly growing), Aboriginal/Torres Strait Islander (3.8%), Māori (NZ 16.5%), Pacific Islanders

socialClasses.zh: 广泛中产阶级社会，矿业与金融精英，科技从业者收入增长，原住民社区仍面临不平等。
socialClasses.en: Broadly middle-class society; mining and finance elites; tech workers with growing income; Indigenous communities still face inequality.

allies.zh: 美国（AUKUS/ANZUS）、英国（AUKUS/五眼）、日本（准联盟）、印度（Quad）、新加坡、太平洋岛国。
allies.en: US (AUKUS/ANZUS), UK (AUKUS/Five Eyes), Japan (quasi-alliance), India (Quad), Singapore, Pacific islands.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但与中国关系紧张（贸易战/安全竞争），正在修复中。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, but relations with China tense (trade war/security competition), currently being repaired.

treaties.zh: AUKUS、ANZUS、五眼联盟、Quad、CPTPP、太平洋岛屿论坛。
treaties.en: AUKUS, ANZUS, Five Eyes, Quad, CPTPP, Pacific Islands Forum.

foreignPolicy.zh: 阿尔巴内塞政府在维持美国同盟的同时稳定对华关系，加强太平洋岛国外交以对抗中国影响力扩张。
foreignPolicy.en: Albanese stabilizing China relations while maintaining US alliance; strengthening Pacific island diplomacy to counter Chinese influence expansion.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年澳中关系回暖（贸易制裁解除），AUKUS潜艇计划推进，太平洋岛国外交竞争加剧。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Australia-China relations warming (trade sanctions lifting), AUKUS submarine program advancing, Pacific island diplomatic competition intensifying.

era.zh: 数字经济与AI应用领先期
era.en: Digital economy and AI application leadership era

keyInnovations.zh: 量子计算研究（悉尼大学/UNSW）、CSIRO科研体系、Canva设计平台、Atlassian协作工具、WiFi发明（CSIRO）。
keyInnovations.en: Quantum computing research (USyd/UNSW), CSIRO research system, Canva design platform, Atlassian collaboration tools, WiFi invention (CSIRO).

infrastructure.zh: NBN全国宽带网络、完善的4G/5G覆盖、先进的数据中心基础设施、世界级研究型大学。
infrastructure.en: NBN national broadband network, comprehensive 4G/5G coverage, advanced data center infrastructure, world-class research universities.

policy.zh: 澳大利亚发布国家AI行动计划，成立国家AI中心，推进负责任AI框架。2023年加入全球AI安全对话。
policy.en: Australia released National AI Action Plan, established National AI Centre, advancing responsible AI framework. Joined global AI safety dialogue in 2023.

regulatoryStance.zh: 以行业自律与标准为主，推进自愿性AI伦理原则，正在讨论高风险AI监管立法。
regulatoryStance.en: Industry self-regulation and standards-based; advancing voluntary AI ethics principles; discussing high-risk AI regulatory legislation.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资约30-40亿美元（含政府与私营），在亚太地区处于中上水平。
investmentScale.en: AI investment ~$3-4B (government and private); upper-middle in Asia-Pacific.

capabilities.zh: 医学影像AI辅助诊断，在放射学领域达到专家级准确度。
capabilities.en: Medical imaging AI-assisted diagnosis, achieving specialist-level accuracy in radiology.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动设计平台（Magic Design、AI文案生成、背景移除）
keyProducts.en: AI-powered design platform (Magic Design, AI copy generation, background removal)

keyProducts.zh: Atlassian Intelligence（AI驱动项目管理与协作工具）
keyProducts.en: Atlassian Intelligence (AI-powered project management and collaboration)

keyProducts.zh: AI基础研究、机器学习平台、网络安全AI
keyProducts.en: AI foundational research, ML platforms, cybersecurity AI

keyProducts.zh: 医疗AI影像诊断
keyProducts.en: Medical AI imaging diagnostics

contribution.zh: 创建全球最大AI设计平台之一，推动AI民主化设计工具，澳大利亚科技创业标志性人物。
contribution.en: Created one of the world's largest AI design platforms, democratizing design with AI tools; iconic figure in Australian tech entrepreneurship.

contribution.zh: 将Atlassian建设为全球协作软件领导者，推进AI工具集成与可再生能源投资。
contribution.en: Built Atlassian into a global collaboration software leader; advancing AI tool integration and renewable energy investment.

researchFocus.zh: 医疗AI、量子计算与AI融合、网络安全AI、自然语言处理、矿业AI、气候与环境AI。
researchFocus.en: Medical AI, quantum computing-AI convergence, cybersecurity AI, NLP, mining AI, climate and environmental AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: AWS、Azure、Google Cloud均在悉尼设大型区域数据中心，CSIRO拥有国家级高性能计算设施，量子计算研究领先。
computeInfrastructure.en: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud all have major regional data centers in Sydney; CSIRO has national HPC facilities; leading quantum computing research.

talentPool.zh: 高质量AI研究人才（悉尼大学、UNSW、墨尔本大学、ANU），移民政策吸引国际人才，但与美中相比规模仍小。
talentPool.en: High-quality AI research talent (USyd, UNSW, Melbourne, ANU); immigration policy attracts international talent; but scale small vs US/China.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI竞争力约第7-10位，在基础研究与商业应用方面均有优势，医疗AI与设计AI全球领先。
globalRanking.en: ~7th-10th globally in AI competitiveness; strong in both foundational research and commercial applications; medical AI and design AI globally leading.

outlook.zh: 凭借世界级研究体系、Canva/Atlassian等科技巨头与AUKUS安全框架下的技术共享，澳大利亚AI实力有望持续提升。
outlook.en: With world-class research, tech giants like Canva/Atlassian, and AUKUS tech sharing, Australia's AI strength is poised for continued growth.

strengths.zh: 高收入发达经济体、世界级大学与科研（CSIRO）、Canva与Atlassian等科技独角兽、AUKUS安全框架、丰富矿产（锂铁矿石）。
strengths.en: High-income developed economy, world-class universities and research (CSIRO), tech unicorns (Canva, Atlassian), AUKUS security framework, rich minerals (lithium, iron ore).

weaknesses.zh: 人口规模小（AI市场有限）、对中国贸易依赖度高、住房成本危机、原住民差距、气候变化脆弱。
weaknesses.en: Small population (limited AI market), high China trade dependence, housing cost crisis, Indigenous gap, climate change vulnerability.

outlook.zh: 作为五眼联盟与AUKUS成员，澳大利亚在印太AI与安全格局中占据独特地位。锂资源在AI硬件供应链中战略价值上升。
outlook.en: As Five Eyes/AUKUS member, Australia holds a unique position in Indo-Pacific AI and security. Lithium resources rising in strategic value for AI hardware.

description.zh: 2023年的大洋洲以澳大利亚为核心，凭借Canva、Atlassian、Harrison.ai等科技巨头与CSIRO研究体系，在全球AI竞争中占据中上位置。
description.en: Oceania in 2023, centered on Australia, holds an upper-middle position in global AI competition through Canva, Atlassian, Harrison.ai, and CSIRO research.

title.zh: 以色列-哈马斯战争爆发

description.zh: 2023年10月7日，哈马斯对以色列南部发动突然袭击，造成约1200人死亡。以色列随后对加沙发动大规模军事行动，引发严重人道主义危机，中东局势急剧升级。
description.en: On October 7, 2023, Hamas launched a surprise attack on southern Israel, killing approximately 1,200 people. Israel responded with a massive military operation in Gaza, triggering a severe humanitarian crisis and sharp escalation in Middle East tensions.

title.en: Biden Signs Executive Order on AI Safety

description.zh: 2023年10月30日，美国总统拜登签署关于人工智能安全的行政令，要求开发强大AI系统的公司在发布前与政府共享安全测试结果，这是美国迄今最全面的AI监管措施。
description.en: On October 30, 2023, President Biden signed an Executive Order on AI Safety, requiring companies developing powerful AI systems to share safety test results with the government before release — the most comprehensive US AI regulatory action to date.

title.zh: OpenAI领导层危机：奥特曼被解雇后回归
title.en: OpenAI Leadership Crisis: Altman Fired Then Returned

description.zh: 2023年11月17日，OpenAI董事会突然解雇CEO萨姆·奥特曼，引发全球科技界震动。经过五天的戏剧性事件，包括大部分员工威胁辞职，奥特曼于11月22日回归，董事会改组。此事件暴露了AI安全与商业化之间的深层张力。
description.en: On November 17, 2023, the OpenAI board abruptly fired CEO Sam Altman, shocking the global tech world. After five dramatic days, including most employees threatening to resign, Altman returned on November 22 with a restructured board. The crisis exposed deep tensions between AI safety and commercialization.

description.zh: 2023年11月15日，美国总统拜登与中国国家主席习近平在旧金山APEC峰会期间举行会谈，同意恢复军事对话渠道并讨论AI安全合作，标志中美关系阶段性缓和。
description.en: On November 15, 2023, President Biden and President Xi held talks during the APEC summit in San Francisco, agreeing to restore military communication channels and discuss AI safety cooperation, marking a phase of US-China relations stabilization.

title.zh: 英国布莱切利AI安全峰会
title.en: UK Bletchley Park AI Safety Summit

description.zh: 2023年11月1-2日，英国在布莱切利公园举办全球首届AI安全峰会，28个国家（包括中国）签署《布莱切利宣言》，承诺合作应对前沿AI风险。
description.en: On November 1-2, 2023, the UK hosted the first global AI Safety Summit at Bletchley Park. 28 countries including China signed the Bletchley Declaration, committing to cooperate on frontier AI risks.

title.zh: 欧盟AI法案达成政治协议
title.en: EU AI Act Political Agreement Reached

description.zh: 2023年12月8日，欧洲议会与欧盟理事会就《欧盟AI法案》达成政治协议，确立全球首部综合性AI监管法律框架，按风险等级对AI系统进行分类监管。
description.en: On December 8, 2023, the European Parliament and EU Council reached political agreement on the EU AI Act, establishing the world's first comprehensive AI regulatory legal framework with risk-based classification of AI systems.

title.en: Google Launches Gemini Multimodal AI Model

description.zh: 2023年12月6日，Google DeepMind发布Gemini模型，这是Google应对GPT-4的多模态大语言模型，原生支持文本、图像、音频和视频理解，标志Google在AI竞赛中的重大反击。
description.en: On December 6, 2023, Google DeepMind launched the Gemini model — Google's multimodal LLM response to GPT-4, with native text, image, audio, and video understanding, marking a major counter-offensive in the AI race.

title.en: Mistral AI Releases Mistral 7B Open-Source Model

description.zh: 2023年9月，法国初创公司Mistral AI发布70亿参数的开源模型Mistral 7B，性能超越同级别所有模型，被视为欧洲AI自主的里程碑。
description.en: In September 2023, French startup Mistral AI released the 7-billion parameter open-source Mistral 7B model, outperforming all models in its class, seen as a milestone for European AI sovereignty.

description.zh: 2023年7月18日，Meta发布Llama 2开源大语言模型系列，免费用于研究与商业用途，极大推动了开源AI生态发展，打破闭源模型垄断。
description.en: On July 18, 2023, Meta released the Llama 2 open-source LLM family, free for research and commercial use, greatly advancing the open-source AI ecosystem and breaking the closed-model monopoly.

title.zh: 美国加强对华AI芯片出口管制
title.en: US Tightens AI Chip Export Controls on China

description.zh: 2023年10月17日，美国商务部更新对华半导体出口管制规则，进一步收紧对NVIDIA等公司向中国出口高端AI芯片的限制，封堵此前的"降规格"出口漏洞。
description.en: On October 17, 2023, the US Commerce Department updated semiconductor export control rules for China, further tightening restrictions on companies like NVIDIA exporting high-end AI chips to China, closing previous 'downgraded spec' export loopholes.

title.zh: 华为发布Mate 60 Pro搭载自研芯片
title.en: Huawei Launches Mate 60 Pro with Domestic Chip

description.zh: 2023年8月29日，华为发布Mate 60 Pro手机，搭载麒麟9000S芯片（采用中芯国际7nm工艺），证明中国在美国制裁下仍能制造先进芯片，引发全球关注。
description.en: On August 29, 2023, Huawei launched the Mate 60 Pro phone with the Kirin 9000S chip (SMIC 7nm process), proving China can still produce advanced chips under US sanctions, drawing global attention.

description.zh: 2024年2月8日，Google将其AI聊天机器人Bard正式更名为Gemini，并推出付费版Gemini Advanced（基于Ultra 1.0模型），标志Google全面以Gemini品牌整合AI产品线。
description.en: On February 8, 2024, Google officially rebranded its AI chatbot Bard as Gemini and launched the paid Gemini Advanced (based on Ultra 1.0), signaling Google's full consolidation of its AI product line under the Gemini brand.

description.zh: 2024年3月4日，Anthropic发布Claude 3系列（Haiku/Sonnet/Opus），其中Opus在多项基准测试中超越GPT-4，标志AI安全导向的企业首次在性能上挑战OpenAI的领先地位。
description.en: On March 4, 2024, Anthropic released the Claude 3 family (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus), with Opus surpassing GPT-4 on multiple benchmarks — the first time a safety-oriented company challenged OpenAI's performance leadership.

description.zh: 2024年5月13日，OpenAI发布GPT-4o（"o"代表omni），实现文本、音频与视觉的实时多模态交互，响应速度接近人类对话水平，免费向所有用户开放。
description.en: On May 13, 2024, OpenAI released GPT-4o ('o' for omni), enabling real-time multimodal interaction across text, audio, and vision with near-human-conversation response speed, free for all users.

title.zh: NVIDIA成为全球市值最高公司
title.en: NVIDIA Becomes World's Most Valuable Company

description.zh: 2024年6月18日，NVIDIA市值短暂超越微软与苹果，成为全球市值最高的上市公司（约3.34万亿美元），反映AI算力需求的爆发性增长。
description.en: On June 18, 2024, NVIDIA's market cap briefly surpassed Microsoft and Apple to become the world's most valuable public company (~$3.34 trillion), reflecting the explosive growth in AI compute demand.

title.zh: 美国众议院通过TikTok剥离法案
title.en: US House Passes TikTok Divestiture Bill

description.zh: 2024年4月20日，美国国会通过法案要求字节跳动在约一年内出售TikTok的美国业务，否则将面临全国禁令，标志中美科技博弈升级到社交媒体领域。
description.en: On April 20, 2024, the US Congress passed legislation requiring ByteDance to divest TikTok's US operations within approximately one year or face a nationwide ban, escalating US-China tech rivalry into social media.

description.zh: 2024年2月15日，OpenAI展示文生视频模型Sora，能生成长达一分钟的高保真视频，在视觉质量和叙事连贯性上远超此前模型，引发影视与创意行业震动。
description.en: On February 15, 2024, OpenAI unveiled Sora, a text-to-video model capable of generating up to one minute of high-fidelity video, far exceeding previous models in visual quality and narrative coherence, shaking the film and creative industries.

title.zh: 中国多家大模型获批上线
title.en: Multiple Chinese LLMs Approved for Public Launch

description.zh: 2023年8月底，百度文心一言、商汤日日新等多家中国大模型通过国家网信办备案审批，正式向公众开放，标志中国大模型产业进入商用阶段。
description.en: In late August 2023, Baidu's ERNIE Bot, SenseTime's SenseNova, and other Chinese LLMs passed CAC registration approval and officially opened to the public, marking China's LLM industry entering the commercial phase.

title.zh: G7广岛峰会启动"广岛AI进程"
title.en: G7 Hiroshima Summit Launches 'Hiroshima AI Process'

description.zh: 2023年5月19-21日，G7广岛峰会上各国领导人启动"广岛AI进程"，旨在建立生成式AI的国际治理框架与行业指导原则。
description.en: At the G7 Hiroshima Summit on May 19-21, 2023, leaders launched the 'Hiroshima AI Process' to establish an international governance framework and industry guidelines for generative AI.

title.zh: GPT-4发布引发全球AI竞赛加速
title.en: GPT-4 Release Accelerates Global AI Race

description.zh: 2023年3月14日，OpenAI发布GPT-4，在推理、创造性和专业知识方面大幅超越前代模型，通过律师资格考试等专业测试，引发全球AI军备竞赛全面升级。
description.en: On March 14, 2023, OpenAI released GPT-4, dramatically surpassing previous models in reasoning, creativity, and professional knowledge, passing professional tests like the bar exam, triggering a full-scale escalation of the global AI arms race.

title.zh: TSMC宣布日本与美国建厂计划推进
title.en: TSMC Advances Japan and US Fab Plans

description.zh: 2023年，台积电在日本熊本的第一座工厂加速建设，同时推进美国亚利桑那州工厂计划，半导体供应链多元化成为地缘政治优先事项。
description.en: In 2023, TSMC accelerated construction of its first fab in Kumamoto, Japan, while advancing its Arizona fab plans, with semiconductor supply chain diversification becoming a geopolitical priority.

title.zh: 印度成功着陆月球南极
title.en: India Lands on Moon's South Pole

description.zh: 2023年8月23日，印度月船三号成功在月球南极附近软着陆，成为第四个实现月球软着陆的国家，也是首个到达月球南极的国家，提振国家科技信心。
description.en: On August 23, 2023, India's Chandrayaan-3 successfully soft-landed near the Moon's south pole, making India the fourth country to achieve a lunar soft landing and the first to reach the south pole, boosting national tech confidence.

description.zh: 2023年2月，俄乌战争进入第二年。乌克兰获得西方大规模军事援助，2023年夏发动反攻但进展有限。战争持续消耗俄罗斯经济与军事资源，同时加速欧洲国防重建。
description.en: In February 2023, the Russia-Ukraine war entered its second year. Ukraine received massive Western military aid and launched a summer counter-offensive with limited progress. The war continues to drain Russian economic and military resources while accelerating European defense rebuilding.

description.zh: 2023年8月，金砖国家约翰内斯堡峰会宣布邀请沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋、伊朗、埃及、埃塞俄比亚与阿根廷加入，标志"全球南方"联合力量的壮大。
description.en: In August 2023, the BRICS Johannesburg Summit announced invitations for Saudi Arabia, UAE, Iran, Egypt, Ethiopia, and Argentina to join, marking the growing collective strength of the 'Global South.'

description.zh: 2024年4月18日，Meta发布Llama 3系列开源大语言模型（8B和70B参数版本），在同等规模模型中性能最优，进一步巩固Meta在开源AI领域的领导地位。
description.en: On April 18, 2024, Meta released the Llama 3 open-source LLM family (8B and 70B parameter versions), achieving best-in-class performance at their respective scales, further consolidating Meta's leadership in open-source AI.

title.zh: 三星SK海力士HBM芯片供不应求
title.en: Samsung and SK Hynix HBM Chips in Severe Shortage

description.zh: 2024年初，用于AI加速器的高带宽存储器(HBM)芯片需求激增，韩国三星与SK海力士作为全球主要供应商产能满载，HBM成为AI算力竞赛的关键瓶颈。
description.en: In early 2024, demand for High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) chips used in AI accelerators surged, with Samsung and SK Hynix as the world's primary suppliers running at full capacity — HBM becoming a critical bottleneck in the AI compute race.

title.en: Geoffrey Hinton Leaves Google, Warns of AI Risks

description.zh: 2023年5月1日，"AI教父"Geoffrey Hinton从Google辞职，公开警告AI可能对人类构成生存性威胁，引发全球关于AI安全的广泛讨论。
description.en: On May 1, 2023, 'AI Godfather' Geoffrey Hinton resigned from Google and publicly warned that AI could pose existential threats to humanity, sparking worldwide discussion on AI safety.

title.en: UAE's G42 Releases Falcon 180B Open-Source Model

description.zh: 阿联酋技术创新研究院(TII)发布1800亿参数的Falcon 180B开源大模型，是当时最大的公开可用模型之一，标志海湾国家在AI领域的雄心。
description.en: The UAE's Technology Innovation Institute (TII) released the 180-billion parameter Falcon 180B open-source model, one of the largest publicly available models at the time, signaling Gulf states' AI ambitions.

title.zh: 苹果发布Apple Intelligence AI战略
title.en: Apple Launches Apple Intelligence AI Strategy

description.zh: 2024年6月10日，苹果在WWDC上发布"Apple Intelligence"个人智能系统，将AI深度集成到iPhone、iPad和Mac中，并与OpenAI达成合作在Siri中集成ChatGPT。
description.en: On June 10, 2024, Apple unveiled 'Apple Intelligence' at WWDC, deeply integrating AI into iPhone, iPad, and Mac, and partnering with OpenAI to integrate ChatGPT into Siri.

title.zh: 台湾大选赖清德当选总统
title.en: Taiwan Election: Lai Ching-te Elected President

description.zh: 2024年1月13日，民进党候选人赖清德赢得台湾总统选举，延续蔡英文路线，北京表示"严重关切"，台海局势持续紧张。台积电在全球AI芯片供应链中的核心地位使台湾地缘政治重要性进一步提升。
description.en: On January 13, 2024, DPP candidate Lai Ching-te won Taiwan's presidential election, continuing the Tsai Ing-wen line. Beijing expressed 'grave concern,' with cross-strait tensions persisting. TSMC's core role in the global AI chip supply chain further elevates Taiwan's geopolitical importance.
